title: Conjunctive Prompt Attacks in Multi-Agent LLM Systems
summary: Most LLM safety work studies single-agent models, but many real applications rely on multiple interacting agents. In these systems, prompt segmentation and inter-agent routing create attack surfaces that single-agent evaluations miss. We study \emph{conjunctive prompt attacks}, where a trigger key in the user query and a hidden adversarial template in one compromised remote agent each appear benign alone but activate harmful behavior when routing brings them together. We consider an attacker who changes neither model weights nor the client agent and instead controls only trigger placement and template insertion. Across star, chain, and DAG topologies, routing-aware optimization substantially increases attack success over non-optimized baselines while keeping false activations low. Existing defenses, including PromptGuard, Llama-Guard variants, and system-level controls such as tool restrictions, do not reliably stop the attack because no single component appears malicious in isolation. These results expose a structural vulnerability in agentic LLM pipelines and motivate defenses that reason over routing and cross-agent composition. Code is available at https://github.com/UCF-ML-Research/ConjunctiveAgents.

AI.tldr: 多智能体LLM系统中存在一种新型安全漏洞：连接性提示攻击。攻击者通过用户查询中的触发密钥和远程代理中的隐藏对抗模板，在路由过程中组合激活有害行为，而单独检查时两者都看似良性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM安全研究主要关注单智能体模型，但实际应用中多智能体系统广泛存在。这些系统中的提示分割和智能体间路由创造了单智能体评估无法覆盖的攻击面，需要研究多智能体环境下的新型安全威胁。
AI.method: 提出连接性提示攻击方法：攻击者不修改模型权重或客户端代理，仅控制触发密钥放置和模板插入。在星型、链式和DAG拓扑结构中，通过路由感知优化显著提高攻击成功率，同时保持低误激活率。
AI.result: 路由感知优化相比非优化基线显著提升攻击成功率。现有防御措施（包括PromptGuard、Llama-Guard变体和系统级控制如工具限制）无法可靠阻止攻击，因为单个组件在隔离检查时都不显示恶意。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体LLM管道存在结构性漏洞，需要能够推理路由和跨智能体组合的防御机制。代码已开源供进一步研究。

title: Agentic AI for Education: A Unified Multi-Agent Framework for Personalized Learning and Institutional Intelligence
summary: Agentic Artificial Intelligence (AI) represents a paradigm shift from reactive systems to proactive, autonomous decision making frameworks. Existing AI-based educational systems remain fragmented and lack multi-level integration across stakeholders. This paper proposes the Agentic Unified Student Support System (AUSS), a novel multi-agent architecture integrating student-level personalization, educator-level automation, and institutional-level intelligence. The framework leverages Large Language Models (LLMs), reinforcement learning, predictive analytics, and rule-based reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate improvements in recommendation accuracy (92.4%), grading efficiency (94.1%), and dropout prediction (F1-score: 89.5%). The proposed system enables scalable, adaptive, and intelligent educational ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 提出AUSS多智能体架构，整合学生个性化、教师自动化和机构智能，提升教育系统效能
AI.motivation: 现有AI教育系统碎片化，缺乏跨利益相关者的多层次整合，需要从被动系统转向主动自主决策框架
AI.method: 提出Agentic Unified Student Support System (AUSS)多智能体架构，整合LLM、强化学习、预测分析和基于规则的推理，实现学生级个性化、教师级自动化和机构级智能
AI.result: 推荐准确率提升至92.4%，评分效率达94.1%，辍学预测F1分数达89.5%，证明系统有效性
AI.conclusion: AUSS系统能够实现可扩展、自适应和智能的教育生态系统，为教育AI提供统一的多层次解决方案

title: CogGen: A Cognitively Inspired Recursive Framework for Deep Research Report Generation
comment: 28 pages, 3 figures, Accepted to ACL 2026 Findings
summary: The autonomous synthesis of deep research reports represents a critical frontier for Large Language Models (LLMs), demanding sophisticated information orchestration and non-linear narrative logic. Current approaches rely on rigid predefined linear workflows, which cause error accumulation, preclude global restructuring from subsequent insights, and ultimately limit in-depth multimodal fusion and report quality. We propose CogGen, a Cognitively inspired recursive framework for deep research report Generation. Leveraging a Hierarchical Recursive Architecture to simulate cognitive writing, CogGen enables flexible planning and global restructuring. To extend this recursivity to multimodal content, we introduce Abstract Visual Representation (AVR): a concise intent-driven language that iteratively refines visual-text layouts without pixel-level regeneration overhead. We further present CLEF, a Cognitive Load Evaluation Framework, and curate a new benchmark from Our World in Data (OWID). Extensive experiments show CogGen achieves state-of-the-art results among open-source systems, generating reports comparable to professional analysts' outputs and surpassing Gemini Deep Research. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/NJUNLP/CogGen.

AI.tldr: CogGen是一个认知启发的递归框架，用于生成深度研究报告，通过分层递归架构和抽象视觉表示实现灵活规划和全局重构，在开放源码系统中达到SOTA水平。
AI.motivation: 当前基于预定义线性工作流的方法存在错误累积、无法全局重构、限制多模态融合和报告质量等问题，需要更灵活的深度研究报告生成框架。
AI.method: 提出CogGen框架：1）分层递归架构模拟认知写作过程；2）抽象视觉表示（AVR）实现多模态内容迭代优化；3）认知负载评估框架（CLEF）和新基准数据集。
AI.result: CogGen在开放源码系统中达到最先进水平，生成的报告质量可与专业分析师输出相媲美，甚至超越Gemini Deep Research。
AI.conclusion: CogGen通过认知启发的递归框架成功解决了深度研究报告生成的挑战，实现了灵活规划、全局重构和多模态融合，为LLM自主合成深度内容提供了有效方案。

title: Logic-Based Verification of Task Allocation for LLM-Enabled Multi-Agent Manufacturing Systems
summary: Manufacturing industries are facing increasing product variability due to the growing demand for personalized products. Under these conditions, ensuring safety becomes challenging as frequent reconfigurations can lead to unintended hazardous behaviors. Multi-agent control architectures have been proposed to improve flexibility through decentralized decision-making and coordination. However, these architectures are based on predefined task models, which limit their ability to adapt task planning to new product requirements while preserving safety. Recently, large language models have been introduced into manufacturing systems to enhance adaptability, but reliability remains a key challenge. To address this issue, we propose a control architecture that leverages the flexibility of large language models while preserving safety on the manufacturing shop floor. Specifically, the proposed framework verifies large language model-enabled task allocations by using temporal logic and discrete event systems. The effectiveness of the proposed framework is demonstrated through a case study that involves a multi-robot assembly scenario, showing that unsafe tasks can be allocated safely before task execution.

AI.tldr: 提出结合大语言模型灵活性与形式化验证的控制架构，在制造系统中实现安全的自适应任务分配
AI.motivation: 制造业面临产品个性化需求增加带来的变异性挑战，频繁重构可能导致安全隐患。现有多智能体控制架构基于预定义任务模型，难以适应新需求同时保证安全。大语言模型虽能增强适应性，但可靠性不足。
AI.method: 提出一种控制架构，利用大语言模型的灵活性进行任务分配，同时使用时序逻辑和离散事件系统对分配结果进行形式化验证，确保制造车间安全。
AI.result: 通过多机器人装配场景的案例研究验证了框架有效性，证明能够在任务执行前将不安全任务分配转化为安全分配。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功结合了大语言模型的适应性与形式化验证的安全性，为制造业应对产品变异性挑战提供了可行的解决方案。

title: BASIS: Balanced Activation Sketching with Invariant Scalars for "Ghost Backpropagation"
summary: The activation memory required for exact backpropagation scales linearly with network depth, context length, and feature dimensionality, forming an O(L * BN ) spatial bottleneck (where B is the sequence-batch cardinality and N is the feature dimension). This constraint historically throttles the scaling of deep neural networks. While randomized automatic differentiation attempts to mitigate this, it historically suffers from catastrophic variance. In this paper, we introduce BASIS (Balanced Activation Sketching with Invariant Scalars), an efficient backpropagation algorithm that fully decouples activation memory from the batch and sequence dimensions. BASIS propagates the exact error signal (dX) to preserve flawless gradient flow, but computes the weight updates (dW) using massively compressed rank-R tensors. To solve the foundational instability of sketched gradients, we propose two novel mechanisms: Balanced Hashing, which strictly eliminates off-diagonal collision variance, and Invariant Scalars, a principled bias-variance tradeoff that deterministically preserves the exact continuous energy norm of the spatial geometry. Theoretically, BASIS reduces activation memory to O(L * RN ) and heavily decreases the backward pass matrix-multiplication footprint. Empirically, training a GPT architecture for 50,000 steps validates our theoretical guarantees: at R = 32, BASIS achieves parity with (and marginally outperforms) exact backpropagation validation loss (6.575 vs. 6.616), acting as an implicit regularizer. Remarkably, the stabilized magnitude trajectory allows the model to converge smoothly even under extreme spatial compression (R = 1), proving the extreme robustness of the estimator. The code is available at https://github.com/VladimerKhasia/basis

AI.tldr: BASIS是一种高效的反向传播算法，通过平衡哈希和不变标量机制，将激活内存从批次和序列维度完全解耦，显著减少内存占用同时保持精确梯度流。
AI.motivation: 传统精确反向传播的激活内存随网络深度、上下文长度和特征维度线性增长，形成O(L*BN)的空间瓶颈，限制了深度神经网络的扩展。虽然随机自动微分试图缓解这一问题，但历史上存在灾难性方差问题。
AI.method: BASIS算法通过两个创新机制：平衡哈希（严格消除非对角碰撞方差）和不变标量（确定性保持空间几何的精确连续能量范数），使用秩R张量计算权重更新，同时传播精确误差信号。
AI.result: 理论上将激活内存减少到O(L*RN)，大幅降低反向传播矩阵乘法开销。在GPT架构上训练50,000步，R=32时达到与精确反向传播相当的验证损失（6.575 vs. 6.616），甚至在极端压缩（R=1）下也能平滑收敛。
AI.conclusion: BASIS算法成功解决了随机自动微分的方差问题，实现了激活内存与批次序列维度的完全解耦，为大规模深度神经网络训练提供了高效稳定的解决方案。

title: A High-Accuracy Optical Music Recognition Method Based on Bottleneck Residual Convolutions
summary: Optical Music Recognition (OMR) aims to convert printed or handwritten music score images into editable symbolic representations. This paper presents an end-to-end OMR framework that combines residual bottleneck convolutions with bidirectional gated recurrent unit (BiGRU)-based sequence modeling. A convolutional neural network with ResNet-v2-style residual bottleneck blocks and multi-scale dilated convolutions is used to extract features that encode both fine-grained symbol details and global staff-line structures. The extracted feature sequences are then fed into a BiGRU network to model temporal dependencies among musical symbols. The model is trained using the Connectionist Temporal Classification loss, enabling end-to-end prediction without explicit alignment annotations. Experimental results on the Camera-PrIMuS and PrIMuS datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. On Camera-PrIMuS, the proposed method achieves a sequence error rate (SeER) of $7.52\%$ and a symbol error rate (SyER) of $0.45\%$, with pitch, type, and note accuracies of $99.33\%$, $99.60\%$, and $99.28\%$, respectively. The average training time is 1.74~s per epoch, demonstrating high computational efficiency while maintaining strong recognition performance. On PrIMuS, the method achieves a SeER of $8.11\%$ and a SyER of $0.49\%$, with pitch, type, and note accuracies of $99.27\%$, $99.58\%$, and $99.21\%$, respectively. A fine-grained error analysis further confirms the effectiveness of the proposed model.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种端到端的光学音乐识别框架，结合残差瓶颈卷积和双向门控循环单元进行序列建模，在Camera-PrIMuS和PrIMuS数据集上取得了优异的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 光学音乐识别(OMR)旨在将印刷或手写乐谱图像转换为可编辑的符号表示。现有方法需要复杂的预处理和符号分割，本文旨在开发一个端到端的框架，直接从图像序列预测符号序列。
AI.method: 采用ResNet-v2风格的残差瓶颈块和多尺度扩张卷积的CNN提取特征，编码细粒度符号细节和全局谱线结构。特征序列输入BiGRU网络建模音乐符号间的时序依赖，使用连接时序分类损失进行端到端训练，无需显式对齐标注。
AI.result: 在Camera-PrIMuS数据集上：序列错误率7.52%，符号错误率0.45%，音高、类型和音符准确率分别为99.33%、99.60%和99.28%。在PrIMuS数据集上：序列错误率8.11%，符号错误率0.49%，音高、类型和音符准确率分别为99.27%、99.58%和99.21%。平均每轮训练时间1.74秒，计算效率高。
AI.conclusion: 提出的端到端OMR框架结合残差卷积和BiGRU序列建模，在保持高计算效率的同时实现了强大的识别性能，细粒度错误分析进一步证实了模型的有效性。

title: Governing the Agentic Enterprise: A Governance Maturity Model for Managing AI Agent Sprawl in Business Operations
summary: The rapid adoption of agentic AI in enterprise business operations--autonomous systems capable of planning, reasoning, and executing multi-step workflows--has created an urgent governance crisis. Organizations face uncontrolled agent sprawl: the proliferation of redundant, ungoverned, and conflicting AI agents across business functions. Industry surveys report that only 21% of enterprises have mature governance models for autonomous agents, while 40% of agentic AI projects are projected to fail by 2027 due to inadequate governance and risk controls. Despite growing acknowledgment of this challenge, academic literature lacks a formal, empirically validated governance maturity model connecting governance capability to measurable business outcomes. This paper introduces the Agentic AI Governance Maturity Model (AAGMM), a five-level framework spanning 12 governance domains, grounded in NIST AI RMF and ISO/IEC 42001 standards. We additionally propose a novel taxonomy of agent sprawl patterns--functional duplication, shadow agents, orphaned agents, permission creep, and unmonitored delegation chains--each linked to quantifiable business cost models. The framework is validated through 750 simulation runs across five enterprise scenarios and five governance maturity levels, measuring business outcomes including cost containment, risk incident rates, operational efficiency, and decision quality. Results demonstrate statistically significant differences (p < 0.001, large effect sizes d > 2.0) between all governance maturity levels, with Level 4-5 organizations achieving 94.3% lower sprawl indices, 96.4% fewer risk incidents, and 32.6% higher effective task completion rates compared to Level 1. The AAGMM provides practitioners with an actionable roadmap for governing autonomous AI agents while maximizing business returns.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一个面向企业自主AI代理的治理成熟度模型（AAGMM），包含5个成熟度级别和12个治理领域，并通过仿真验证了该模型能显著降低代理蔓延风险并提升业务绩效。
AI.motivation: 企业自主AI代理的快速采用导致了"代理蔓延"危机——冗余、无管控、冲突的AI代理在企业各部门中激增。目前只有21%的企业拥有成熟的自主代理治理模型，40%的自主AI项目预计因治理不足而失败。学术界缺乏连接治理能力与可衡量业务成果的正式、经验验证的治理成熟度模型。
AI.method: 提出了自主AI代理治理成熟度模型（AAGMM），包含五个成熟度级别和12个治理领域，基于NIST AI RMF和ISO/IEC 42001标准。同时提出了代理蔓延模式的新分类法（功能重复、影子代理、孤儿代理、权限蔓延、未监控的委托链），每种模式都与可量化的业务成本模型相关联。通过750次仿真运行在五个企业场景和五个治理成熟度级别上进行验证。
AI.result: 结果显示所有治理成熟度级别之间存在统计学显著差异（p < 0.001，效应量d > 2.0）。第4-5级组织相比第1级组织实现了：94.3%更低的蔓延指数、96.4%更少的风险事件、32.6%更高的有效任务完成率。
AI.conclusion: AAGMM为从业者提供了一个可操作的路线图，用于治理自主AI代理同时最大化业务回报。该框架填补了学术文献中连接治理能力与可衡量业务成果的正式、经验验证模型的空白。

title: Multimodal Claim Extraction for Fact-Checking
summary: Automated Fact-Checking (AFC) relies on claim extraction as a first step, yet existing methods largely overlook the multimodal nature of today's misinformation. Social media posts often combine short, informal text with images such as memes, screenshots, and photos, creating challenges that differ from both text-only claim extraction and well-studied multimodal tasks like image captioning or visual question answering. In this work, we present the first benchmark for multimodal claim extraction from social media, consisting of posts containing text and one or more images, annotated with gold-standard claims derived from real-world fact-checkers. We evaluate state-of-the-art multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) under a three-part evaluation framework (semantic alignment, faithfulness, and decontextualization) and find that baseline MLLMs struggle to model rhetorical intent and contextual cues. To address this, we introduce MICE, an intent-aware framework which shows improvements in intent-critical cases.

AI.tldr: 首个多模态社交媒体声明提取基准，提出MICE框架解决MLLMs在建模修辞意图和上下文线索方面的不足
AI.motivation: 现有自动事实核查方法主要忽视多模态特性，社交媒体帖子常结合简短非正式文本与图像（如表情包、截图、照片），这带来了与纯文本声明提取和传统多模态任务不同的挑战
AI.method: 1. 创建首个社交媒体多模态声明提取基准，包含文本和图像的真实帖子，标注来自事实核查者的黄金标准声明；2. 在三部分评估框架（语义对齐、忠实度、去上下文化）下评估最先进的多模态LLMs；3. 提出MICE意图感知框架解决基线MLLMs的不足
AI.result: 基线多模态LLMs在建模修辞意图和上下文线索方面表现不佳，而提出的MICE框架在意图关键案例中显示出改进
AI.conclusion: 多模态声明提取面临独特挑战，需要专门的方法来理解社交媒体内容中的修辞意图和上下文，MICE框架为解决这一问题提供了有效途径

title: Dynamics of Cognitive Heterogeneity: Investigating Behavioral Biases in Multi-Stage Supply Chains with LLM-Based Simulation
comment: Accepted to the Main Conference of ACL 2026. 18 pages, 8 figures in total (9 pages, 7 figures for the main text)
summary: Modeling coordination among generative agents in complex multi-round decision-making presents a core challenge for AI and operations management. Although behavioral experiments have revealed cognitive biases behind supply chain inefficiencies, traditional methods face scalability and control limitations. We introduce a scalable experimental paradigm using Large Language Models (LLMs) to simulate multi-stage supply chain dynamics. Grounded in a Hierarchical Reasoning Framework, this study specifically analyzes the impact of cognitive heterogeneity on agent interactions. Unlike prior homogeneous settings, we employ DeepSeek and GPT agents to systematically vary reasoning sophistication across supply chain tiers. Through rigorously replicated and statistically validated simulations, we investigate how this cognitive diversity influences collective outcomes. Results indicate that agents exhibit myopic and self-interested behaviors that exacerbate systemic inefficiencies. However, we demonstrate that information sharing effectively mitigates these adverse effects. Our findings extend traditional behavioral methods and offer new insights into the dynamics of AI-enabled organizations. This work underscores both the potential and limitations of LLM-based agents as proxies for human decision-making in complex operational environments.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用大语言模型模拟多阶段供应链，分析认知异质性对代理交互的影响，发现信息共享能缓解代理近视自私行为导致的系统低效。
AI.motivation: 传统行为实验方法在模拟复杂多轮决策中的代理协调时面临可扩展性和控制限制，需要新方法来研究供应链动态中的认知偏差影响。
AI.method: 引入基于大语言模型的可扩展实验范式，采用分层推理框架，使用DeepSeek和GPT代理在不同供应链层级上系统变化推理复杂度，通过严格复制和统计验证的模拟进行分析。
AI.result: 代理表现出近视和自私行为，加剧了系统低效；但信息共享能有效缓解这些负面影响；认知异质性显著影响集体结果。
AI.conclusion: LLM代理作为人类决策代理在复杂运营环境中既有潜力也有局限，研究扩展了传统行为方法，为AI赋能组织的动态提供了新见解。

title: UniMamba: A Unified Spatial-Temporal Modeling Framework with State-Space and Attention Integration
summary: Multivariate time series forecasting is fundamental to numerous domains such as energy, finance, and environmental monitoring, where complex temporal dependencies and cross-variable interactions pose enduring challenges. Existing Transformer-based methods capture temporal correlations through attention mechanisms but suffer from quadratic computational cost, while state-space models like Mamba achieve efficient long-context modeling yet lack explicit temporal pattern recognition. Therefore we introduce UniMamba, a unified spatial-temporal forecasting framework that integrates efficient state-space dynamics with attention-based dependency learning. UniMamba employs a Mamba Variate-Channel Encoding Layer enhanced with FFT-Laplace Transform and TCN to capture global temporal dependencies, and a Spatial Temporal Attention Layer to jointly model inter-variate correlations and temporal evolution. A Feedforward Temporal Dynamics Layer further fuses continuous and discrete contexts for accurate forecasting. Comprehensive experiments on eight public benchmark datasets demonstrate that UniMamba consistently outperforms state-of-the-art forecasting models in both forecasting accuracy and computational efficiency, establishing a scalable and robust solution for long-sequence multivariate time-series prediction.

AI.tldr: UniMamba是一个统一的空间-时间预测框架，结合了高效的状态空间动态和基于注意力的依赖学习，在多元时间序列预测中实现了更好的准确性和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 多元时间序列预测在能源、金融、环境监测等领域至关重要，但现有方法存在局限性：基于Transformer的方法虽然能捕捉时间相关性，但计算成本呈二次方增长；而状态空间模型（如Mamba）虽然能高效建模长上下文，但缺乏显式的时间模式识别能力。
AI.method: UniMamba框架包含三个核心组件：1) 使用FFT-Laplace变换和TCN增强的Mamba Variate-Channel编码层，用于捕捉全局时间依赖；2) 空间-时间注意力层，联合建模变量间相关性和时间演化；3) 前馈时间动态层，融合连续和离散上下文进行准确预测。
AI.result: 在八个公共基准数据集上的综合实验表明，UniMamba在预测准确性和计算效率方面都持续优于最先进的预测模型，为长序列多元时间序列预测提供了一个可扩展且稳健的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: UniMamba成功整合了状态空间模型的高效长上下文建模能力和注意力机制的显式依赖学习优势，为多元时间序列预测提供了一个统一且高效的框架，在准确性和计算效率方面都取得了显著改进。

title: From Inheritance to Saturation: Disentangling the Evolution of Visual Redundancy for Architecture-Aware MLLM Inference Acceleration
comment: 16 pages, 14 figures, plus appendix, accepted at ACL 2026
summary: High-resolution Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) face prohibitive computational costs during inference due to the explosion of visual tokens. Existing acceleration strategies, such as token pruning or layer sparsity, suffer from severe "backbone dependency", performing well on Vicuna or Mistral architectures (e.g., LLaVA) but causing significant performance degradation when transferred to architectures like Qwen. To address this, we leverage truncated matrix entropy to uncover a universal three-stage inference lifecycle, decoupling visual redundancy into universal Intrinsic Visual Redundancy (IVR) and architecture-dependent Secondary Saturation Redundancy (SSR). Guided by this insight, we propose HalfV, a framework that first mitigates IVR via a unified pruning strategy and then adaptively handles SSR based on its specific manifestation. Experiments demonstrate that HalfV achieves superior efficiency-performance trade-offs across diverse backbones. Notably, on Qwen25-VL, it retains 96.8\% performance at a 4.1$\times$ FLOPs speedup, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. Our code is available at https://github.com/civilizwa/HalfV.

AI.tldr: HalfV是一个解决高分辨率多模态大语言模型计算成本过高问题的框架，通过发现视觉冗余的三阶段推理生命周期，分别处理通用内在视觉冗余和架构相关的二次饱和冗余，实现高效推理。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率多模态大语言模型在推理时面临视觉token爆炸导致的过高计算成本。现有加速策略存在严重的"骨干网络依赖性"，在不同架构间迁移时性能下降严重。
AI.method: 利用截断矩阵熵揭示通用的三阶段推理生命周期，将视觉冗余解耦为通用内在视觉冗余和架构相关的二次饱和冗余。提出HalfV框架：先通过统一剪枝策略缓解内在视觉冗余，然后根据具体表现自适应处理二次饱和冗余。
AI.result: HalfV在不同骨干网络上实现了优越的效率-性能权衡。在Qwen25-VL上，以4.1倍FLOPs加速保留了96.8%的性能，显著优于现有最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦视觉冗余为通用和架构相关两部分，HalfV框架能够有效加速高分辨率多模态大语言模型推理，解决了现有方法的骨干网络依赖性问题，实现了跨架构的通用高效加速。

title: Semantic Consensus: Process-Aware Conflict Detection and Resolution for Enterprise Multi-Agent LLM Systems
summary: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems are rapidly emerging as the dominant architecture for enterprise AI automation, yet production deployments exhibit failure rates between 41% and 86.7%, with nearly 79% of failures originating from specification and coordination issues rather than model capability limitations. This paper identifies Semantic Intent Divergence--the phenomenon whereby cooperating LLM agents develop inconsistent interpretations of shared objectives due to siloed context and absent process models--as a primary yet formally unaddressed root cause of multi-agent failure in enterprise settings. We propose the Semantic Consensus Framework (SCF), a process-aware middleware comprising six components: a Process Context Layer for shared operational semantics, a Semantic Intent Graph for formal intent representation, a Conflict Detection Engine for real-time identification of contradictory, contention-based, and causally invalid intent combinations, a Consensus Resolution Protocol using a policy--authority--temporal hierarchy, a Drift Monitor for detecting gradual semantic divergence, and a Process-Aware Governance Integration layer for organizational policy enforcement. Evaluation across 600 runs spanning three multi-agent frameworks (AutoGen, CrewAI, LangGraph) and four enterprise scenarios demonstrates that SCF is the only approach to achieve 100% workflow completion--compared to 25.1% for the next-best baseline--while detecting 65.2% of semantic conflicts with 27.9% precision and providing complete governance audit trails. The framework is protocol-agnostic and compatible with MCP and A2A communication standards.

AI.tldr: 论文提出语义共识框架（SCF），解决多智能体LLM系统中语义意图分歧问题，显著提升工作流完成率至100%。
AI.motivation: 当前多智能体LLM系统在企业AI自动化中失败率高达41%-86.7%，其中79%的失败源于规范和协调问题而非模型能力限制。语义意图分歧（智能体因孤立上下文和缺乏流程模型而对共享目标产生不一致理解）是主要但未正式解决的根本原因。
AI.method: 提出语义共识框架（SCF），包含六个组件：流程上下文层（共享操作语义）、语义意图图（形式化意图表示）、冲突检测引擎（实时识别矛盾、竞争和因果无效意图组合）、共识解决协议（使用策略-权威-时间层次结构）、漂移监控器（检测渐进语义分歧）、流程感知治理集成层（组织策略执行）。
AI.result: 在三个多智能体框架（AutoGen、CrewAI、LangGraph）和四个企业场景的600次运行评估中，SCF是唯一实现100%工作流完成率的方法（次优基线仅25.1%），能检测65.2%的语义冲突（精度27.9%），并提供完整的治理审计跟踪。框架与MCP和A2A通信标准兼容。
AI.conclusion: 语义共识框架有效解决了多智能体LLM系统中的语义意图分歧问题，显著提升了企业AI自动化系统的可靠性和治理能力，为生产部署提供了实用解决方案。

title: Cross-Family Speculative Decoding for Polish Language Models on Apple~Silicon: An Empirical Evaluation of Bielik~11B with UAG-Extended MLX-LM
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by using a small draft model to propose k candidate tokens for a target model to verify. While effective for same-tokenizer pairs on high-bandwidth GPUs, its applicability to cross-family pairs with mismatched tokenizers and consumer-grade unified memory remains underexplored. We extend the MLX-LM framework with Universal Assisted Generation (UAG) to enable cross-tokenizer speculative decoding on Apple Silicon. We evaluate Bielik 11B-Instruct (Mistral-based) as the target model, paired with three draft models: Bielik 1.5B (Qwen-based with custom tokenizer), Qwen2.5-1.5B, and Llama 3.2-1B. Experiments on three Polish-language datasets (Wikipedia, pl_alpaca, synthetic) use draft lengths k in {2, 4, 6} to compare naive and context-aware token translation. Results show: (1) context-aware translation consistently improves acceptance rates across all configurations; (2) the Polish-specialized Bielik 1.5B achieves lower acceptance than general-purpose Qwen2.5 and Llama 3.2 drafters; (3) throughput on Apple Silicon is content-dependent, reaching 1.7x speedup for structured text but failing for varied instructions; and (4) verification cost on unified memory does not amortize as theory predicts because both models are memory-bandwidth bound, making sequential drafting expensive relative to batched verification. We propose a hardware-aware speedup formula and characterize conditions for cross-family speculative decoding on Apple Silicon. This is the first systematic evaluation of cross-family speculative decoding for Polish LLMs and the first empirical study of UAG-based decoding on unified memory architectures.

AI.tldr: 在Apple Silicon上实现跨tokenizer的推测解码，评估波兰语LLM的加速效果，发现上下文感知翻译提升接受率，但统一内存架构限制了理论加速效果。
AI.motivation: 现有推测解码主要针对相同tokenizer的模型对和高带宽GPU，对于跨家族模型对（tokenizer不匹配）和消费级统一内存架构的应用研究不足。本文旨在探索在Apple Silicon上跨tokenizer推测解码的可行性，特别是针对波兰语LLM。
AI.method: 扩展MLX-LM框架，引入通用辅助生成（UAG）支持跨tokenizer推测解码。以Bielik 11B-Instruct（基于Mistral）为目标模型，搭配三个草稿模型：Bielik 1.5B（基于Qwen的自定义tokenizer）、Qwen2.5-1.5B和Llama 3.2-1B。在三个波兰语数据集（Wikipedia、pl_alpaca、合成数据）上测试，草稿长度k∈{2,4,6}，比较朴素和上下文感知的token翻译方法。
AI.result: 1) 上下文感知翻译在所有配置中持续提升接受率；2) 波兰语专用的Bielik 1.5B草稿模型接受率低于通用模型Qwen2.5和Llama 3.2；3) Apple Silicon上的吞吐量内容依赖，结构化文本可达1.7倍加速，但多样化指令场景加速失败；4) 统一内存上的验证成本未能按理论摊销，因为两个模型都受内存带宽限制，顺序草稿生成相对于批量验证成本较高。
AI.conclusion: 提出了硬件感知的加速公式，并描述了在Apple Silicon上实现跨家族推测解码的条件。这是首次对波兰语LLM进行跨家族推测解码的系统评估，也是首次在统一内存架构上基于UAG的解码实证研究。

title: ARMove: Learning to Predict Human Mobility through Agentic Reasoning
summary: Human mobility prediction is a critical task but remains challenging due to its complexity and variability across populations and regions. Recently, large language models (LLMs) have made progress in zero-shot prediction, but existing methods suffer from limited interpretability (due to black-box reasoning), lack of iterative learning from new data, and poor transferability. In this paper, we introduce \textbf{ARMove}, a fully transferable framework for predicting human mobility through agentic reasoning. To address these limitations, ARMove employs standardized feature management with iterative optimization and user-specific customization: four major feature pools for foundational knowledge, user profiles for segmentation, and an automated generation mechanism integrating LLM knowledge. Robust generalization is achieved via agentic decision-making that adjusts feature weights to maximize accuracy while providing interpretable decision paths. Finally, large-small model synergy distills strategies from large LLMs (e.g., 72B) to smaller ones (e.g., 7B), reducing costs and enhancing performance ceilings. Extensive experiments on four global datasets show ARMove outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on 6 out of 12 metrics (gains of 0.78\% to 10.47\%), with transferability tests confirming robustness across regions, users, and scales. The other 4 items also achieved suboptimal results. Transferability tests confirm its 19 robustness across regions, user groups, and model scales, while interpretability 20 analysis highlights its transparency in decision-making. Our codes are available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ARMove-F847.

AI.tldr: ARMove是一个基于智能体推理的可迁移人类移动预测框架，通过标准化特征管理、迭代优化和用户定制化，结合大-小模型协同，在零样本预测中实现更好的性能、可解释性和可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 当前基于大语言模型的人类移动预测方法存在可解释性差（黑盒推理）、缺乏从新数据中迭代学习的能力、以及可迁移性不足的问题。需要开发一个既能保持高性能又能提供透明决策路径的框架。
AI.method: ARMove采用标准化特征管理（四个主要特征池）、用户画像分割、自动生成机制整合LLM知识。通过智能体决策调整特征权重以最大化准确性并提供可解释决策路径。最后通过大-小模型协同，将大模型（如72B）的策略蒸馏到小模型（如7B），降低成本并提升性能上限。
AI.result: 在四个全球数据集上的实验表明，ARMove在12个指标中的6个上优于最先进的基线方法（提升0.78%到10.47%），其他4个指标也取得了次优结果。可迁移性测试证实了其在跨区域、用户群体和模型规模上的鲁棒性，可解释性分析突出了其决策透明度。
AI.conclusion: ARMove通过智能体推理提供了一个完全可迁移的人类移动预测框架，解决了现有方法的可解释性、迭代学习和可迁移性问题，在保持高性能的同时提供了透明的决策路径，并通过模型协同降低了计算成本。

title: Annotation Entropy Predicts Per-Example Learning Dynamics in LoRA Fine-Tuning
summary: We find that LoRA fine-tuning exhibits un-learning on contested examples: items with high annotator disagreement show increasing loss during training, a qualitatively distinct pattern largely absent under full fine-tuning and consistent across all six models tested (four encoder, two decoder-only). This discovery emerges from correlating annotation entropy, computed from ChaosNLI's 100 labels per example, with per-example area under the loss curve (AULC) on SNLI and MNLI. The correlation is positive in all 25 conditions tested (Spearman $ρ= 0.06$-$0.43$), with decoder-only models showing stronger correlations than encoders at matched LoRA rank. The effect survives partial-correlation controls and replicates across seeds and datasets. A preliminary noise-injection experiment is consistent with these findings.

AI.tldr: LoRA微调在标注者分歧高的样本上表现出"遗忘"现象，即训练过程中损失值反而增加，这与全参数微调不同，在6个模型中都观察到这一现象。
AI.motivation: 研究LoRA微调与全参数微调在训练动态上的差异，特别关注标注者分歧高的样本（争议样本）上的表现。
AI.method: 使用ChaosNLI数据集的100个标注计算标注熵，与SNLI和MNLI数据集上每个样本的损失曲线下面积（AULC）进行相关性分析，测试了25种条件，包括4个编码器模型和2个仅解码器模型。
AI.result: 在所有25种条件下都观察到正相关（Spearman ρ=0.06-0.43），仅解码器模型在相同LoRA秩下表现出更强的相关性。该效应在部分相关性控制、不同随机种子和数据集上都能复现。
AI.conclusion: LoRA微调在争议样本上表现出独特的"遗忘"现象，这可能与参数高效微调方法的训练动态有关，需要进一步研究其机制和影响。

title: Latent-Compressed Variational Autoencoder for Video Diffusion Models
summary: Video variational autoencoders (VAEs) used in latent diffusion models typically require a sufficiently large number of latent channels to ensure high-quality video reconstruction. However, recent studies have revealed that an excessive number of latent channels can impede the convergence of latent diffusion models and deteriorate their generative performance, even when reconstruction quality remains high. We propose a latent compression method that removes high-frequency components in video latent representations rather than directly reducing the number of channels, which often compromises reconstruction fidelity. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior video reconstruction quality compared to strong baselines while maintaining the same overall compression ratio.

AI.tldr: 提出一种视频潜在压缩方法，通过移除视频潜在表示中的高频分量而非减少通道数，在保持相同压缩比的同时获得更好的重建质量
AI.motivation: 视频变分自编码器需要大量潜在通道来保证高质量重建，但过多的通道会阻碍潜在扩散模型的收敛并降低生成性能，即使重建质量仍然很高
AI.method: 提出一种潜在压缩方法，移除视频潜在表示中的高频分量，而不是直接减少通道数（这会损害重建保真度）
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在保持相同整体压缩比的同时，相比强基线实现了更优的视频重建质量
AI.conclusion: 通过移除高频分量而非减少通道数来进行潜在压缩，可以在不损害扩散模型性能的情况下获得更好的视频重建质量

title: Computational Hermeneutics: Evaluating generative AI as a cultural technology
comment: Published in Frontiers in Artificial Intelligence
summary: Generative AI systems are increasingly recognized as cultural technologies, yet current evaluation frameworks often treat culture as a variable to be measured rather than fundamental to the system's operation. Drawing on hermeneutic theory from the humanities, we argue that GenAI systems function as "context machines" that must inherently address three interpretive challenges: situatedness (meaning only emerges in context), plurality (multiple valid interpretations coexist), and ambiguity (interpretations naturally conflict). We present computational hermeneutics as an emerging framework offering an interpretive account of what GenAI systems do, and how they might do it better. We offer three principles for hermeneutic evaluation -- that benchmarks should be iterative, not one-off; include people, not just machines; and measure cultural context, not just model output. This perspective offers a nascent paradigm for designing and evaluating contemporary AI systems: shifting from standardized questions about accuracy to contextual ones about meaning.

AI.tldr: 论文提出生成式AI应被视为"语境机器"，需从解释学角度评估，强调情境性、多元性和模糊性，而非仅关注准确性
AI.motivation: 当前AI评估框架将文化视为可测量变量而非系统运作基础，缺乏对生成式AI作为文化技术的本质理解
AI.method: 借鉴人文学科的解释学理论，提出计算解释学框架，将GenAI视为"语境机器"，需应对三个解释挑战
AI.result: 提出解释学评估三原则：基准应迭代而非一次性；包含人而不仅是机器；测量文化语境而不仅是模型输出
AI.conclusion: 这为AI系统设计和评估提供了新范式：从标准化的准确性问题转向情境化的意义问题

title: Brain-CLIPLM: Decoding Compressed Semantic Representations in EEG for Language Reconstruction
summary: Decoding natural language from non-invasive electroencephalography (EEG) remains fundamentally limited by low signal-to-noise ratio and restricted information bandwidth. This raises a fundamental question regarding whether sentence-level linguistic structure can be reliably recovered from such signals. In this work, we suggest that this assumption may not hold under realistic information constraints, and instead propose a semantic compression hypothesis in which EEG signals encode a compressed set of semantic anchors rather than full linguistic structure. Under our new perspective, direct sentence reconstruction becomes an overparameterized objective relative to the intrinsic information capacity of EEG. To address this mismatch, we introduce Brain-CLIPLM, a two-stage framework that decomposes EEG-to-text decoding into semantic anchor extraction via contrastive learning and sentence reconstruction using a retrieval-grounded large language model (LLM) with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, following a granularity matching principle that aligns decoding complexity with neural information capacity. Evaluated on the Zurich Cognitive Language Processing Corpus, Brain-CLIPLM achieves 67.55\% top-5 and 85.00\% top-25 sentence retrieval accuracy, significantly outperforming direct decoding baseline, while cross-subject evaluation confirms robust generalization. Control analyses, including permutation testing, further demonstrate that EEG-derived representations carry sentence-specific information beyond language model priors. These results suggest that EEG-to-text decoding is better framed as recovering compressed semantic content rather than reconstructing full sentences, providing a biologically grounded and data-efficient pathway for non-invasive brain-computer interfaces.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出Brain-CLIPLM框架，将EEG到文本的解码重新定义为语义压缩恢复而非完整句子重建，通过两阶段方法显著提升解码性能。
AI.motivation: 非侵入性脑电图（EEG）信号的信噪比低、信息带宽有限，传统假设认为可以从EEG中恢复句子级语言结构，但作者质疑这一假设在现实信息约束下是否成立，提出EEG信号可能编码的是压缩的语义锚点而非完整语言结构。
AI.method: 提出Brain-CLIPLM两阶段框架：1）通过对比学习提取语义锚点；2）使用基于检索的大语言模型（LLM）结合思维链（CoT）推理进行句子重建。该方法遵循粒度匹配原则，使解码复杂度与神经信息容量对齐。
AI.result: 在苏黎世认知语言处理语料库上，Brain-CLIPLM达到67.55%的top-5和85.00%的top-25句子检索准确率，显著优于直接解码基线。跨被试评估证实了良好的泛化能力。控制分析显示EEG表示携带超越语言模型先验的句子特定信息。
AI.conclusion: EEG到文本解码更适合被理解为恢复压缩的语义内容而非重建完整句子，这为非侵入性脑机接口提供了生物学基础和数据高效的路径。

title: Towards Self-Improving Error Diagnosis in Multi-Agent Systems
comment: 15 pages, 3 figures; accepted at ACL 2026 Findings
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) enable complex problem-solving but introduce significant debugging challenges, characterized by long interaction traces, inter-agent dependencies, and delayed error manifestation. Existing diagnostic approaches often rely on expensive expert annotation or ''LLM-as-a-judge'' paradigms, which struggle to pinpoint decisive error steps within extended contexts. In this paper, we introduce ErrorProbe, a self-improving framework for semantic failure attribution that identifies responsible agents and the originating error step. The framework operates via a three-stage pipeline: (1) operationalizing the MAS failure taxonomy to detect local anomalies, (2) performing symptom-driven backward tracing to prune irrelevant context, and (3) employing a specialized multi-agent team (Strategist, Investigator, Arbiter) to validate error hypotheses through tool-grounded execution. Crucially, ErrorProbe maintains a verified episodic memory that updates only when error patterns are confirmed by executable evidence, without the need for annotation. Experiments across the TracerTraj and Who&When benchmarks demonstrate that ErrorProbe significantly outperforms baselines, particularly in step-level localization, while the verified memory enables robust cross-domain transfer without retraining.

AI.tldr: ErrorProbe：一个用于多智能体系统的自改进语义故障归因框架，通过三阶段流程精确定位错误步骤和责任智能体，无需专家标注
AI.motivation: 基于LLM的多智能体系统在解决复杂问题时存在调试困难，包括长交互轨迹、智能体间依赖和延迟错误表现。现有方法依赖昂贵的专家标注或"LLM-as-a-judge"范式，难以在扩展上下文中精确定位关键错误步骤。
AI.method: 采用三阶段管道：1) 操作化MAS故障分类以检测局部异常；2) 执行症状驱动的反向追踪以修剪无关上下文；3) 使用专门的多智能体团队（策略师、调查员、仲裁员）通过工具基础执行验证错误假设。框架维护经验证的片段记忆，仅在错误模式被可执行证据确认时更新。
AI.result: 在TracerTraj和Who&When基准测试中，ErrorProbe显著优于基线方法，特别是在步骤级定位方面。经验证的记忆实现了无需重新训练的跨领域鲁棒迁移。
AI.conclusion: ErrorProbe为多智能体系统提供了一种有效的自改进故障归因框架，能够精确定位错误步骤和责任智能体，无需专家标注，并支持跨领域知识迁移。

title: A Discordance-Aware Multimodal Framework with Multi-Agent Clinical Reasoning
summary: Knee osteoarthritis frequently exhibits discordance between structural damage observed in imaging and patient-reported symptoms such as pain. This mismatch complicates clinical interpretation and patient stratification and remains insufficiently modeled in existing decision support systems. We propose a discordance aware multimodal framework that combines machine learning prediction models with a tool grounded multi agent reasoning system. Using baseline data from the FNIH Osteoarthritis Biomarkers Consortium, we trained multimodal models to predict two progression tasks, joint space loss only progression versus non progression, and pain only progression versus non progression. The predictive system integrates three modality specific experts: a CatBoost tabular model using demographic, radiographic, MRI-derived scalar, and biomarker features; MRI image embeddings extracted using a ResNet18 backbone; and Xray embeddings derived from the same architecture. Expert predictions are fused using a stacking ensemble. Residual based models estimate expected pain from structural features, enabling the computation of a pain structure discordance score between observed and expected symptoms. A multi-agent reasoning layer interprets these signals to assign clinically interpretable OA phenotypes and generate phenotype specific management recommendations.

AI.tldr: 提出一个结合机器学习预测模型与多智能体推理系统的膝关节骨关节炎不协调感知多模态框架，用于预测结构进展与疼痛进展，并生成临床可解释的表型和治疗建议。
AI.motivation: 膝关节骨关节炎中影像学结构损伤与患者报告症状（如疼痛）之间存在不协调，这使临床解释和患者分层复杂化，现有决策支持系统未能充分建模这种不匹配。
AI.method: 使用FNIH骨关节炎生物标志物联盟的基线数据，训练多模态模型预测两个进展任务：仅关节间隙丢失进展与非进展，以及仅疼痛进展与非进展。系统集成三个模态特定专家：基于CatBoost的表格模型（人口统计学、影像学、MRI衍生标量和生物标志物特征）、MRI图像嵌入（ResNet18骨干网络）和X射线嵌入（相同架构）。专家预测通过堆叠集成融合。基于残差的模型从结构特征估计预期疼痛，计算疼痛-结构不协调分数。多智能体推理层解释这些信号以分配临床可解释的OA表型并生成表型特异性管理建议。
AI.result: 论文提出了一个完整的框架，但未在摘要中报告具体性能指标。框架能够预测结构进展和疼痛进展，计算疼痛-结构不协调分数，并通过多智能体系统生成临床表型和治疗建议。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一个新颖的不协调感知多模态框架，结合机器学习预测和多智能体推理，能够更好地建模膝关节骨关节炎中结构损伤与症状之间的不协调，为临床决策支持提供更全面的工具。

title: Positioning radiata pine branches requiring pruning by drone stereo vision
summary: This paper presents a stereo-vision-based system mounted on a drone for detecting and localising radiata pine branches to support autonomous pruning. The proposed pipeline comprises two stages: branch segmentation and depth estimation. For segmentation, YOLOv8, YOLOv9, and Mask R-CNN variants are compared on a custom dataset of 71 stereo image pairs captured with a ZED Mini camera. For depth estimation, both a traditional method (SGBM with WLS filtering) and deep-learning-based methods (PSMNet, ACVNet, GWCNet, MobileStereoNet, RAFT-Stereo, and NeRF-Supervised Deep Stereo) are evaluated. A centroid-based triangulation algorithm with MAD outlier rejection is proposed to compute branch distance from the segmentation mask and disparity map. Qualitative evaluation at distances of 1-2 m indicates that the deep learning-based disparity maps produce more coherent depth estimates than SGBM, demonstrating the feasibility of low-cost stereo vision for automated branch positioning in forestry.

AI.tldr: 基于无人机立体视觉的辐射松树枝检测与定位系统，用于支持自主修剪。比较了多种分割和深度估计算法，验证了低成本立体视觉在林业自动化中的可行性。
AI.motivation: 开发一个自动化系统来检测和定位辐射松树枝，以支持林业中的自主修剪操作，提高效率和安全性。
AI.method: 采用两阶段流水线：1) 分支分割（比较YOLOv8、YOLOv9和Mask R-CNN变体）；2) 深度估计（比较传统SGBM+WLS滤波与多种深度学习立体匹配方法）。提出基于质心的三角测量算法和MAD异常值剔除来计算分支距离。
AI.result: 在1-2米距离的定性评估表明，基于深度学习的视差图比传统SGBM方法产生更一致的深度估计，证明了低成本立体视觉在林业自动化分支定位中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统展示了使用低成本立体视觉进行自动化树枝检测和定位的潜力，为林业自主修剪应用提供了可行的技术方案。

title: Heterogeneous Self-Play for Realistic Highway Traffic Simulation
summary: Realistic highway simulation is critical for scalable safety evaluation of autonomous vehicles, particularly for interactions that are too rare to study from logged data alone. Yet highway traffic generation remains challenging because it requires broad coverage across speeds and maneuvers, controllable generation of rare safety-critical scenarios, and behavioral credibility in multi-agent interactions. We present PHASE, Policy for Heterogeneous Agent Self-play on Expressway, a context-aware self-play framework that addresses these three requirements through explicit per-agent conditioning for controllability, synthetic scenario generation for broad highway coverage, and closed-loop multi-agent training for realistic interaction dynamics. PHASE further supports different vehicle profiles, for example, passenger cars and articulated trailer trucks, within a single policy via vehicle-aware dynamics and context-conditioned actions, and stabilizes self-play with early termination of unrecoverable states, at-fault collision attribution, highway-aware reward shaping, coupled curricula, and robust policy optimization. Despite being trained only on synthetic data, PHASE transfers zero-shot to 512 unseen high-interaction real scenarios in exiD, achieving a 96.3% success rate and reducing ADE/FDE from 6.57/12.07 m to 2.44/5.25 m relative to a prior self-play baseline. In a learned trajectory embedding space, it also improves behavioral realism over IDM, reducing Frechet trajectory distance by 13.1% and energy distance by 20.2%. These results show that synthetic self-play can provide a scalable route to controllable and realistic highway scenario generation without direct imitation of expert logs.

AI.tldr: PHASE是一个用于高速公路场景生成的自博弈框架，通过上下文感知和车辆感知设计，实现了可控、覆盖广且行为真实的交通模拟，在真实场景中实现了零样本迁移。
AI.motivation: 高速公路模拟对自动驾驶安全评估至关重要，但现有方法难以同时满足：1) 覆盖不同速度和机动动作的广泛场景；2) 可控生成罕见安全关键场景；3) 多智能体交互的行为可信度。
AI.method: PHASE采用上下文感知的自博弈框架，包括：显式智能体条件控制、合成场景生成、闭环多智能体训练、车辆感知动力学、早期终止机制、碰撞责任归因、高速公路奖励塑造、耦合课程学习和鲁棒策略优化。
AI.result: 在exiD数据集512个未见真实场景中实现零样本迁移：成功率96.3%，ADE/FDE从6.57/12.07m降至2.44/5.25m；在轨迹嵌入空间中，相比IDM模型，Frèchet轨迹距离减少13.1%，能量距离减少20.2%。
AI.conclusion: 合成自博弈方法无需专家日志模仿，即可为高速公路场景生成提供可扩展、可控且真实的解决方案，展示了合成训练向真实世界迁移的有效性。

title: CFMS: Towards Explainable and Fine-Grained Chinese Multimodal Sarcasm Detection Benchmark
summary: Multimodal sarcasm detection has recently garnered significant attention. However, existing benchmarks suffer from coarse-grained annotations and limited cultural coverage, which hinder research into fine-grained semantic understanding. To address this, we construct CFMS, the first fine-grained multimodal sarcasm dataset tailored for Chinese social media. It comprises 2,796 high-quality image-text pairs and provides a triple-level annotation framework: sarcasm identification, target recognition, and explanation generation. We find that the fine-grained explanation annotations effectively guide AI in generating images with explicit sarcastic intent. Furthermore, we curate a high-consistency parallel Chinese-English metaphor subset (200 entries each), revealing significant limitations of current models in metaphoric reasoning. To overcome the constraints of traditional retrieval methods, we propose a Reinforcement Learning-augmented In-Context Learning strategy (PGDS) to dynamically optimize exemplar selection. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CFMS provides a solid foundation for building reliable multimodal sarcasm understanding systems, and the PGDS method significantly outperforms existing baselines on key tasks. Our data and code are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/CFMS-E8F9.

AI.tldr: 构建首个中文社交媒体细粒度多模态讽刺数据集CFMS，包含2,796个高质量图文对，提供三层标注框架，并提出强化学习增强的上下文学习策略PGDS，显著提升多模态讽刺理解性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态讽刺检测基准存在标注粒度粗糙和文化覆盖有限的问题，阻碍了细粒度语义理解研究，需要构建更精细的中文社交媒体数据集。
AI.method: 构建CFMS数据集，包含2,796个高质量图文对，采用三层标注框架：讽刺识别、目标识别和解释生成；并提出强化学习增强的上下文学习策略PGDS，动态优化示例选择。
AI.result: CFMS为构建可靠的多模态讽刺理解系统提供了坚实基础；PGDS方法在关键任务上显著优于现有基线；细粒度解释标注能有效指导AI生成具有明确讽刺意图的图像。
AI.conclusion: CFMS填补了中文社交媒体细粒度多模态讽刺数据集的空白，PGDS方法克服了传统检索方法的限制，为多模态讽刺理解研究提供了新的基准和方法。

title: Multi-UAV Path Following using Vector-Field Guidance
comment: Submitted to 2026 Modeling, Estimation and Control Conference (MECC)
summary: This paper presents a decentralized, collision-free framework for path following guidance of multiple uncrewed aerial vehicles (UAVs), while maintaining uniform spacing along a reference path. A vector field-based guidance law is employed to drive each UAV toward the reference path. A rotational repulsion mechanism, utilizing relative distance and bearing between UAVs, is proposed to avoid collisions during convergence to the path, and an inter-UAV spacing error-based velocity control law is presented to achieve uniform separation along the path. Analytical guarantees are established for collision avoidance and convergence of the inter-UAV spacing errors to zero, ensuring uniform separation along the path. Numerical simulations demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出一种去中心化的多无人机路径跟随框架，实现无碰撞路径跟踪和均匀间距保持
AI.motivation: 多无人机协同执行任务时，需要同时实现路径跟踪、碰撞避免和间距保持，现有方法难以同时满足这些要求
AI.method: 采用向量场引导律驱动无人机向参考路径收敛；提出基于相对距离和方位的旋转排斥机制避免碰撞；设计基于间距误差的速度控制律实现均匀间距
AI.result: 建立了碰撞避免和间距误差收敛到零的理论保证，数值仿真验证了方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够有效实现多无人机的无碰撞路径跟踪和均匀间距保持，具有去中心化、理论保证和实际可行性

title: Preventing overfitting in deep learning using differential privacy
comment: Master's dissertation State University of New York at Buffalo first published in 2017
summary: The use of Deep Neural Network based systems in the real world is growing. They have achieved state-of-the-art performance on many image, speech and text datasets. They have been shown to be powerful systems that are capable of learning detailed relationships and abstractions from the data. This is a double-edged sword which makes such systems vulnerable to learning the noise in the training set, thereby negatively impacting performance. This is also known as the problem of \emph{overfitting} or \emph{poor generalization}. In a practical setting, analysts typically have limited data to build models that must generalize to unseen data. In this work, we explore the use of a differential-privacy based approach to improve generalization in Deep Neural Networks.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨使用差分隐私方法改进深度神经网络的泛化能力，解决过拟合问题
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在现实应用中日益增长，虽然在某些数据集上达到最先进性能，但容易学习训练集中的噪声导致过拟合和泛化能力差。实际应用中数据有限，需要构建能泛化到未见数据的模型。
AI.method: 采用基于差分隐私的方法来改进深度神经网络的泛化能力
AI.result: 论文探索了该方法，但摘要中未提供具体实验结果
AI.conclusion: 差分隐私方法有望解决深度神经网络过拟合问题，提高模型在实际应用中的泛化性能

title: Erasing Thousands of Concepts: Towards Scalable and Practical Concept Erasure for Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
summary: Large-scale text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models deliver remarkable visual fidelity but pose safety risks due to their capacity to reproduce undesirable content, such as copyrighted ones. Concept erasure has emerged as a mitigation strategy, yet existing approaches struggle to balance scalability, precision, and robustness, which restricts their applicability to erasing only a few hundred concepts. To address these limitations, we present Erasing Thousands of Concepts (ETC), a scalable framework capable of erasing thousands of concepts while preserving generation quality. Our method first models low-rank concept distributions via a Student's t-distribution Mixture Model (tMM). It enables pin-point erasure of target concepts via affine optimal transport while preserving others by anchoring the boundaries of target concept distributions without pre-defined anchor concepts. We then train a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)-based module, termed MoEraser, which removes target embeddings while preserving the anchor embeddings. By injecting noise into the text embedding projector and fine-tuning MoEraser for recovery, our framework achieves robustness to white-box attack such as module removal. Extensive experiments on over 2,000 concepts across heterogeneous domains and diffusion models demerate state-of-the-art scalability and precision in large-scale concept erasure.

AI.tldr: ETC是一个可扩展的概念擦除框架，能够同时擦除数千个概念，同时保持生成质量，通过t分布混合模型建模概念分布，使用MoEraser模块实现精确擦除，并具有抗白盒攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 大规模文本到图像扩散模型虽然视觉保真度高，但存在安全风险，可能生成不受欢迎的内容（如受版权保护的内容）。现有概念擦除方法在可扩展性、精确性和鲁棒性方面存在平衡问题，通常只能擦除几百个概念。
AI.method: 1. 使用学生t分布混合模型建模低秩概念分布；2. 通过仿射最优传输实现目标概念的精确擦除，同时通过锚定目标概念分布边界来保留其他概念；3. 训练基于混合专家的MoEraser模块，移除目标嵌入同时保留锚定嵌入；4. 通过向文本嵌入投影器注入噪声并微调MoEraser实现恢复，获得抗白盒攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在超过2000个跨异构领域和扩散模型的概念上进行了广泛实验，展示了在大规模概念擦除方面最先进的可扩展性和精确性。
AI.conclusion: ETC框架成功解决了现有概念擦除方法在可扩展性、精确性和鲁棒性方面的限制，能够同时擦除数千个概念，为大规模文本到图像模型的安全应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Support Sufficiency as Consequence-Sensitive Compression in Belief Arbitration
summary:
When a system commits to a hypothesis, much of the evidential structure behind that commitment is lost to compression. Standard accounts assume that selected content and scalar confidence suffice for downstream control. This paper argues that they do not, and that determining what must survive compression is itself a consequence-sensitive problem. We develop a recurrent arbitration architecture in which active constraint fields jointly determine a hypothesis geometry over candidates. Rather than carrying that geometry forward in full, the system compresses it into a support-aware control state whose resolution is regulated by current consequence geometry, arbitration memory, and resource constraints.
  A bounded objective formalizes the tradeoff. Too little retained support collapses policy-relevant distinctions, producing controllers that select content adequately while misrouting verification, abstention, and recovery. Too much retained support fragments learning across overly fine contexts, degrading adaptation even as discrimination improves. These failure modes yield ordered controller predictions confirmed by a minimal repeated-interaction simulation. Adaptive controllers that regulate support resolution outperform all fixed-resolution controllers in cumulative utility. Agile adaptive control outperforms sluggish adaptive control. Fixed high-resolution control achieves the best commitment accuracy but still trails adaptive controllers because resource cost and learning fragmentation offset the gains from richer retention.
  Support sufficiency should be understood not as a static representational threshold, but as a dynamic compression criterion. Robust arbitration depends on preserving the smallest support structure adequate for policy under the current consequence landscape, and on regulating that structure as conditions change across repeated cycles of inference and action.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于后果敏感的压缩机制，用于在假设选择中保留足够的支持结构，通过动态调节支持分辨率来优化控制性能。
AI.motivation: 传统假设选择方法在压缩证据结构时丢失了重要信息，仅保留内容和置信度不足以支持下游控制任务。需要一种能够根据当前后果几何动态调节压缩程度的机制。
AI.method: 开发了循环仲裁架构，使用主动约束场共同确定候选假设的几何结构。系统将几何结构压缩为支持感知的控制状态，其分辨率由当前后果几何、仲裁记忆和资源约束调节。
AI.result: 自适应控制器在累积效用上优于所有固定分辨率控制器。固定高分辨率控制器在承诺准确性上最佳，但由于资源成本和学习碎片化，仍落后于自适应控制器。
AI.conclusion: 支持充分性应被视为动态压缩标准而非静态表示阈值。稳健仲裁需要保留在当前后果景观下政策所需的最小支持结构，并在推理和行动的重复周期中调节该结构。

title: Foundational Study on Authorship Attribution of Japanese Web Reviews for Actor Analysis
summary: This study investigates the applicability of authorship attribution based on stylistic features to support actor analysis in threat intelligence. As a foundational step toward future application to dark web forums, we conducted experiments using Japanese review data from clear web sources. We constructed datasets from Rakuten Ichiba reviews and compared four methods: TF-IDF with logistic regression (TF-IDF+LR), BERT embeddings with logistic regression (BERT-Emb+LR), BERT fine-tuning (BERT-FT), and metric learning with $k$-nearest neighbors (Metric+kNN). Results showed that BERT-FT achieved the best performance; however, training became unstable as the number of authors scaled to several hundred, where TF-IDF+LR proved superior in terms of accuracy, stability, and computational cost. Furthermore, Top-$k$ evaluation demonstrated the utility of candidate screening, and error analysis revealed that boilerplate text, topic dependency, and short text length were primary factors causing misclassification.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了基于风格特征进行作者归属在威胁情报中支持参与者分析的适用性，使用日本评论数据进行实验，比较了四种方法，发现BERT微调在小规模作者上表现最佳，但TF-IDF+逻辑回归在大规模作者上更稳定高效。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是将作者归属技术应用于威胁情报中的参与者分析，特别是针对暗网论坛。作为向暗网应用的基础步骤，首先在明网数据上进行实验验证方法的可行性。
AI.method: 使用日本乐天市场的评论数据构建数据集，比较了四种方法：1) TF-IDF+逻辑回归，2) BERT嵌入+逻辑回归，3) BERT微调，4) 度量学习+k近邻。采用Top-k评估进行候选筛选，并进行错误分析。
AI.result: BERT微调在小规模作者上表现最佳，但当作者数量扩展到数百时训练变得不稳定。TF-IDF+逻辑回归在准确性、稳定性和计算成本方面表现更优。Top-k评估显示候选筛选具有实用性，错误分析发现模板文本、主题依赖和文本长度短是导致误分类的主要因素。
AI.conclusion: 作者归属技术可用于威胁情报的参与者分析，但需要考虑方法在不同规模下的适用性。TF-IDF+逻辑回归在大规模场景下更具优势，而BERT微调在小规模时更准确。实际应用中需要考虑文本特征和规模因素。

title: Diversity Collapse in Multi-Agent LLM Systems: Structural Coupling and Collective Failure in Open-Ended Idea Generation
comment: 56 pages, 15 figures; Accepted at ACL 2026 Findings
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) are increasingly used for open-ended idea generation, driven by the expectation that collective interaction will broaden the exploration diversity. However, when and why such collaboration truly expands the solution space remains unclear. We present a systematic empirical study of diversity in MAS-based ideation across three bottom-up levels: model intelligence, agent cognition, and system dynamics. At the model level, we identify a compute efficiency paradox, where stronger, highly aligned models yield diminishing marginal diversity despite higher per-sample quality. At the cognition level, authority-driven dynamics suppress semantic diversity compared to junior-dominated groups. At the system level, group-size scaling yields diminishing returns and dense communication topologies accelerate premature convergence. We characterize these outcomes as collective failures emerging from structural coupling, a process where interaction inadvertently contracts agent exploration and triggers diversity collapse. Our analysis shows that this collapse arises primarily from the interaction structure rather than inherent model insufficiency, highlighting the importance of preserving independence and disagreement when designing MAS for creative tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/Xtra-Computing/MAS_Diversity.

AI.tldr: 多智能体系统在创意生成中存在多样性崩溃问题：更强的模型、权威主导的群体、密集通信拓扑反而会减少探索多样性，主要源于结构耦合而非模型能力不足。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统被广泛用于开放式创意生成，期望通过集体互动扩大探索多样性，但协作何时以及为何真正扩展解决方案空间仍不清楚，需要系统研究多样性在多智能体创意生成中的表现。
AI.method: 通过三个自下而上的层次进行系统性实证研究：模型智能层次（计算效率悖论）、智能体认知层次（权威驱动动态）、系统动态层次（群体规模缩放和通信拓扑），分析结构耦合如何导致多样性崩溃。
AI.result: 发现计算效率悖论：更强、更对齐的模型产生边际多样性递减；权威主导的动态抑制语义多样性；群体规模缩放产生递减回报，密集通信拓扑加速过早收敛；多样性崩溃主要源于交互结构而非模型能力不足。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体创意生成中的多样性崩溃主要是结构耦合的结果，交互无意中收缩了智能体探索空间。设计创意任务的多智能体系统时，需要保持独立性和分歧，避免过早收敛。

title: Beyond Verifiable Rewards: Rubric-Based GRM for Reinforced Fine-Tuning SWE Agents
summary: Despite recent progress in Large Language Model (LLM) Agents for Software Engineering (SWE) tasks, end-to-end fine-tuning typically relies on verifiable terminal rewards such as whether all unit tests pass. While these binary signals reflect whether the final solution is correct, they provide little guidance for shaping intermediate behaviors during multi-step interactions, thereby limiting improvements in the overall quality of the resolution process. To address this, we introduce a rubric-based Generative Reward Model (GRM) that provides richer learning signals. The GRM is equipped with human-designed rubrics that indicate criteria for encouraging or discouraging specific behavioral patterns, and we leverage this feedback for high-quality training data collection via trajectory filtration. When used for Reinforced Fine-Tuning (RFT) on SWE Tasks, our approach outperforms terminal-score-only rejection sampling: it more effectively suppresses undesirable patterns while promoting beneficial ones, as confirmed by case analyses, and it ultimately improves final test accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出基于评分标准的生成奖励模型（GRM），为软件工程任务中的LLM智能体提供更丰富的学习信号，相比仅依赖终端测试结果的奖励，能更好地引导中间行为模式。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM智能体在软件工程任务中的端到端微调主要依赖可验证的终端奖励（如单元测试是否通过），这些二元信号虽然能反映最终解决方案是否正确，但对多步交互过程中的中间行为指导有限，限制了解决过程整体质量的提升。
AI.method: 引入基于评分标准的生成奖励模型（GRM），该模型配备人工设计的评分标准，用于鼓励或抑制特定的行为模式；利用这种反馈通过轨迹过滤收集高质量训练数据；将GRM用于软件工程任务的强化微调（RFT）。
AI.result: 该方法优于仅依赖终端分数的拒绝采样：能更有效地抑制不良行为模式同时促进有益模式（案例分析证实），最终提高了最终测试准确率。
AI.conclusion: 基于评分标准的生成奖励模型为LLM智能体在软件工程任务中提供了更丰富的学习信号，相比仅依赖终端测试结果的奖励方法，能更好地引导中间行为，提升整体解决过程质量。

title: A Survey of Spatial Memory Representations for Efficient Robot Navigation
comment: Accepted at the Women in Computer Vision (WiCV) Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: As vision-based robots navigate larger environments, their spatial memory grows without bound, eventually exhausting computational resources, particularly on embedded platforms (8-16GB shared memory, $<$30W) where adding hardware is not an option. This survey examines the spatial memory efficiency problem across 88 references spanning 52 systems (1989-2025), from occupancy grids to neural implicit representations. We introduce the $α= M_{\text{peak}} / M_{\text{map}}$, the ratio of peak runtime memory (the total RAM or GPU memory consumed during operation) to saved map size (the persistent checkpoint written to disk), exposing the gap between published map sizes and actual deployment cost. Independent profiling on an NVIDIA A100 GPU reveals that $α$ spans two orders of magnitude within neural methods alone, ranging from 2.3 (Point-SLAM) to 215 (NICE-SLAM, whose 47,MB map requires 10GB at runtime), showing that memory architecture, not paradigm label, determines deployment feasibility. We propose a standardized evaluation protocol comprising memory growth rate, query latency, memory-completeness curves, and throughput degradation, none of which current benchmarks capture. Through a Pareto frontier analysis with explicit benchmark separation, we show that no single paradigm dominates within its evaluation regime: 3DGS methods achieve the best absolute accuracy at 90-254,MB map size on Replica, while scene graphs provide semantic abstraction at predictable cost. We provide the first independently measured $α$ reference values and an $α$-aware budgeting algorithm enabling practitioners to assess deployment feasibility on target hardware prior to implementation.

AI.tldr: 该调查分析了视觉机器人空间内存效率问题，提出了α=峰值运行时内存/保存地图大小的比率，揭示了实际部署成本与发布地图大小之间的差距，并建立了标准化评估协议。
AI.motivation: 随着视觉机器人在更大环境中导航，其空间内存无限增长，最终耗尽计算资源，特别是在嵌入式平台上（8-16GB共享内存，<30W），这些平台无法添加硬件。
AI.method: 调查了88篇参考文献中的52个系统（1989-2025），从占用网格到神经隐式表示。引入了α比率（峰值运行时内存/保存地图大小），在NVIDIA A100 GPU上进行独立性能分析，提出了包含内存增长率、查询延迟、内存-完整性曲线和吞吐量下降的标准化评估协议。
AI.result: α在神经方法中跨越两个数量级，从2.3（Point-SLAM）到215（NICE-SLAM）。通过帕累托前沿分析显示，没有单一范式在其评估体系中占主导地位：3DGS方法在Replica上以90-254MB地图大小实现最佳绝对精度，而场景图以可预测成本提供语义抽象。
AI.conclusion: 提供了首个独立测量的α参考值和α感知预算算法，使从业者能够在实施前评估目标硬件上的部署可行性。内存架构而非范式标签决定了部署可行性。

title: Healthcare AI for Automation or Allocation? A Transaction Cost Economics Framework
summary: Healthcare productivity is shaped not only by clinical complexity but by the costs of coordinating work under uncertainty. Transaction-cost economics offers a theory of these coordination frictions, yet has rarely been operationalised at task level across health occupations. Using task statements and frequency weights from the O*NET occupational database, we characterised healthcare work at task granularity and coded each unique task using a constrained large language model into one dominant transaction-cost category (information search, decision and bargaining, monitoring and enforcement, or adaptation and coordination) together with an overall transaction-cost intensity score. Aggregating to the occupation level, clinician roles exhibited substantially higher transaction-cost intensity than non-clinician roles, driven primarily by greater burdens of information search and decision-related coordination, while dispersion of transaction costs within occupations did not differ. These findings demonstrate systematic heterogeneity in the nature of coordination work across healthcare roles and suggest that the opportunities for digital and AI interventions are unevenly distributed, shaped less by technical task complexity than by underlying coordination structure.

AI.tldr: 使用O*NET职业数据库，通过大语言模型将医疗任务编码为交易成本类别，发现临床角色的交易成本强度显著高于非临床角色，主要由信息搜索和决策协调负担驱动
AI.motivation: 医疗生产力不仅受临床复杂性影响，还受不确定性下协调工作的成本影响。交易成本经济学提供了协调摩擦的理论，但很少在医疗职业的任务层面进行操作化研究
AI.method: 使用O*NET职业数据库的任务陈述和频率权重，在任务粒度上表征医疗工作；使用约束大语言模型将每个独特任务编码到主导交易成本类别（信息搜索、决策与谈判、监控与执行、适应与协调）和总体交易成本强度得分；聚合到职业层面进行分析
AI.result: 临床角色的交易成本强度显著高于非临床角色，主要由更大的信息搜索和决策相关协调负担驱动；职业内交易成本的分散度没有差异
AI.conclusion: 医疗角色间协调工作的性质存在系统性异质性；数字和AI干预的机会分布不均，受协调结构影响大于技术任务复杂性

title: GoCoMA: Hyperbolic Multimodal Representation Fusion for Large Language Model-Generated Code Attribution
comment: Accepted to the International Conference on Multimedia & Expo (ICME) 2026
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) trained on massive code corpora are now increasingly capable of generating code that is hard to distinguish from human-written code. This raises practical concerns, including security vulnerabilities and licensing ambiguity, and also motivates a forensic question: 'Who (or which LLM) wrote this piece of code?' We present GoCoMA, a multimodal framework that models an extrinsic hierarchy between (i) code stylometry, capturing higher-level structural and stylistic signatures, and (ii) image representations of binary pre-executable artifacts (BPEA), capturing lower-level, execution-oriented byte semantics shaped by compilation and toolchains. GoCoMA projects modality embeddings into a hyperbolic Poincaré ball, fuses them via a geodesic-cosine similarity-based cross-modal attention (GCSA) fusion mechanism, and back-projects the fused representation to Euclidean space for final LLM-source attribution. Experiments on two open-source benchmarks (CoDET-M4 and LLMAuthorBench) show that GoCoMA consistently outperforms unimodal and Euclidean multimodal baselines under identical evaluation protocols.

AI.tldr: GoCoMA是一个多模态框架，通过结合代码风格特征和二进制预执行文件图像表示，在双曲空间中融合特征来识别代码的LLM来源。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM生成代码能力的提升，识别代码来源变得重要，这涉及安全漏洞、许可问题等实际关切，需要解决"谁（或哪个LLM）写了这段代码"的取证问题。
AI.method: GoCoMA采用多模态框架，建模代码风格特征（高层结构风格签名）和二进制预执行文件图像表示（低层执行导向的字节语义）之间的外部层次关系。将模态嵌入投影到双曲庞加莱球中，通过基于测地线余弦相似度的跨模态注意力融合机制融合特征，然后将融合表示反投影到欧几里得空间进行最终的LLM来源归属。
AI.result: 在两个开源基准测试（CoDET-M4和LLMAuthorBench）上的实验表明，在相同的评估协议下，GoCoMA始终优于单模态和欧几里得多模态基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GoCoMA通过结合代码风格和二进制表示的多模态方法，在双曲空间中有效融合特征，为LLM生成代码的溯源提供了有效的解决方案。

title: ConventionPlay: Capability-Limited Training for Robust Ad-Hoc Collaboration
summary: Ad-hoc collaboration often relies on identifying and adhering to shared conventions. However, when partners can follow multiple conventions, agents must do more than simply adapt; they must actively steer the team toward the most effective joint strategy. We present ConventionPlay, a reinforcement learning-based approach that extends cognitive hierarchies to include a diverse population of adaptive followers. By training against partners with varied capability limits, our agent learns to probe its partner's repertoire, leading the team when possible and following when necessary. Our results in canonical coordination tasks show that ConventionPlay achieves superior coordination efficiency, particularly in settings where conventions have differentiated payoffs.

AI.tldr: ConventionPlay：一种基于强化学习的方法，通过扩展认知层次结构来包含多样化的自适应跟随者，使智能体能够主动引导团队走向最有效的联合策略
AI.motivation: 在临时协作中，当合作伙伴可以遵循多种约定时，智能体需要做的不仅仅是简单适应，而是必须主动引导团队走向最有效的联合策略。现有方法在处理多样化合作伙伴能力限制方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出ConventionPlay方法，基于强化学习扩展认知层次结构，包含多样化的自适应跟随者。通过训练与具有不同能力限制的合作伙伴对抗，智能体学习探测合作伙伴的能力范围，在可能时引导团队，必要时跟随。
AI.result: 在典型协调任务中的结果显示，ConventionPlay实现了优越的协调效率，特别是在约定具有差异化收益的设置中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: ConventionPlay通过主动探测和适应合作伙伴的能力范围，在多样化协作环境中实现了更有效的协调，为处理具有不同能力限制的合作伙伴提供了新的解决方案。

title: SaFeR-Steer: Evolving Multi-Turn MLLMs via Synthetic Bootstrapping and Feedback Dynamics
summary: MLLMs are increasingly deployed in multi-turn settings, where attackers can escalate unsafe intent through the evolving visual-text history and exploit long-context safety decay. Yet safety alignment is still dominated by single-turn data and fixed-template dialogues, leaving a mismatch between training and deployment.To bridge this gap, we propose SaFeR-Steer, a progressive multi-turn alignment framework that combines staged synthetic bootstrapping with tutor-in-the-loop GRPO to train a single student under adaptive, on-policy attacks. We also introduce TCSR, which uses trajectory minimum/average safety to propagate late-turn failures to earlier turns.I. Dataset. We release STEER, a multi-turn multimodal safety dataset with STEER-SFT (12,934), STEER-RL (2,000), and STEER-Bench (3,227) dialogues spanning 2~10 turns.II. Experiment. Starting from Qwen2.5-VL-3B/7B, SaFeR-Steer substantially improves Safety/Helpfulness on both single-turn (48.30/45.86 -> 81.84/70.77 for 3B; 56.21/60.32 -> 87.89/77.40 for 7B) and multi-turn benchmarks (12.55/27.13 -> 55.58/70.27 for 3B; 24.66/46.48 -> 64.89/72.35 for 7B), shifting failures to later turns and yielding robustness beyond scaling alone.Codes are available at https://github.com/Ed-Bg/SaFeR-Steer

AI.tldr: SaFeR-Steer是一个渐进式多轮对齐框架，通过分阶段合成引导和导师循环GRPO训练，结合轨迹安全传播机制，显著提升多模态大语言模型在多轮对话中的安全性。
AI.motivation: 当前MLLMs的安全对齐主要基于单轮数据和固定模板对话，与多轮部署场景存在不匹配。攻击者可以利用视觉-文本历史在多轮对话中逐步升级不安全意图，并利用长上下文安全衰减漏洞。
AI.method: 提出SaFeR-Steer框架：1）分阶段合成引导：使用渐进式多轮安全数据集STEER（包含SFT、RL和Benchmark子集）；2）导师循环GRPO：在自适应、策略内攻击下训练单个学生模型；3）TCSR机制：通过轨迹最小/平均安全分数将后期轮次的安全失败传播到早期轮次。
AI.result: 基于Qwen2.5-VL-3B/7B模型，SaFeR-Steer显著提升单轮和多轮基准测试的安全性和有用性：3B模型单轮从48.30/45.86提升到81.84/70.77，多轮从12.55/27.13提升到55.58/70.27；7B模型单轮从56.21/60.32提升到87.89/77.40，多轮从24.66/46.48提升到64.89/72.35，将安全失败推迟到后期轮次。
AI.conclusion: SaFeR-Steer通过渐进式多轮对齐有效解决了训练与部署场景不匹配问题，提供了超越单纯模型缩放的安全鲁棒性，为多模态大语言模型的多轮安全对齐提供了系统解决方案。

title: Dynamic Eraser for Guided Concept Erasure in Diffusion Models
summary: Concept erasure in Text-To-Image (T2I) diffusion models is vital for safe content generation, but existing inference-time methods face significant limitations. Feature-correction approaches often cause uncontrolled over-correction, while token-level interventions struggle with semantic granularity and context. Moreover, both types of methods are prone to severe semantic drift or even complete representation collapse. To address these challenges, we present Dynamic Semantic Steering (DSS), a lightweight, training-free framework for interpretable and controllable concept erasure. DSS introduces: 1) Sensitive Semantic Boundary Modeling (SSBM) to automate the discovery of safe semantic anchors, and 2) Sensitive Semantic Guidance (SSG), which leverages cross-attention features for precise detection and performs correction via a closed-form solution derived from a well-posed objective. This ensures optimal suppression of sensitive content while preserving benign semantics. DSS achieves an average erasure rate of 91.0\%, significantly outperforming SOTA methods (from 18.6\% to 85.9\%) with minimal impact on output fidelity.

AI.tldr: DSS是一个无需训练的动态语义引导框架，通过敏感语义边界建模和敏感语义引导，实现文本到图像扩散模型中的可控概念擦除，平均擦除率达91.0%。
AI.motivation: 现有T2I扩散模型的概念擦除方法存在局限性：特征修正方法容易导致过度修正，令牌级干预方法在语义粒度和上下文处理上不足，且两种方法都容易出现语义漂移或表示崩溃问题。
AI.method: 提出动态语义引导（DSS）框架：1）敏感语义边界建模（SSBM）自动发现安全语义锚点；2）敏感语义引导（SSG）利用交叉注意力特征进行精确检测，并通过闭式解进行修正。
AI.result: DSS平均擦除率达到91.0%，显著优于现有SOTA方法（从18.6%到85.9%），同时对输出保真度影响最小。
AI.conclusion: DSS提供了一个轻量级、无需训练、可解释且可控的概念擦除框架，有效解决了现有方法在语义控制、过度修正和表示崩溃方面的问题。

title: Agentic Frameworks for Reasoning Tasks: An Empirical Study
summary:
Recent advances in agentic frameworks have enabled AI agents to perform complex reasoning and decision-making. However, evidence comparing their reasoning performance, efficiency, and practical suitability remains limited. To address this gap, we empirically evaluate 22 widely used agentic frameworks across three reasoning benchmarks: BBH, GSM8K, and ARC. The frameworks were selected from 1,200 GitHub repositories collected between January 2023 and July 2025 and organized into a taxonomy based on architectural design. We evaluated them under a unified setting, measuring reasoning accuracy, execution time, computational cost, and cross-benchmark consistency.
  Our results show that 19 of the 22 frameworks completed all three benchmarks. Among these, 12 showed stable performance, with mean accuracy of 74.6-75.9%, execution time of 4-6 seconds per task, and cost of 0.14-0.18 cents per task. Poorer results were mainly caused by orchestration problems rather than reasoning limits. For example, Camel failed to complete BBH after 11 days because of uncontrolled context growth, while Upsonic consumed USD 1,434 in one day because repeated extraction failures triggered costly retries. AutoGen and Mastra also exhausted API quotas through iterative interactions that increased prompt length without improving results.
  We also found a sharp drop in mathematical reasoning. Mean accuracy on GSM8K was 44.35%, compared with 89.80% on BBH and 89.56% on ARC. Overall, this study provides the first large-scale empirical comparison of agentic frameworks for reasoning-intensive software engineering tasks and shows that framework selection should prioritize orchestration quality, especially memory control, failure handling, and cost management.

AI.tldr: 对22个主流智能体框架在三个推理基准测试上的首次大规模实证比较，发现框架选择应优先考虑编排质量，特别是内存控制、故障处理和成本管理。
AI.motivation: 尽管智能体框架在复杂推理和决策方面取得了进展，但缺乏对其性能、效率和实用性的实证比较证据，需要填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 从2023年1月至2025年7月收集的1200个GitHub仓库中筛选出22个广泛使用的智能体框架，基于架构设计进行分类，在统一设置下评估其在BBH、GSM8K和ARC三个推理基准上的表现，测量推理准确率、执行时间、计算成本和跨基准一致性。
AI.result: 22个框架中有19个完成了所有三个基准测试，其中12个表现稳定，平均准确率74.6-75.9%，执行时间4-6秒/任务，成本0.14-0.18美分/任务。数学推理表现显著下降，GSM8K平均准确率44.35%，而BBH和ARC分别为89.80%和89.56%。性能问题主要源于编排问题而非推理限制。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个针对推理密集型软件工程任务的智能体框架大规模实证比较，研究表明框架选择应优先考虑编排质量，特别是内存控制、故障处理和成本管理，而非仅仅关注推理能力。

title: Reciprocal Co-Training (RCT): Coupling Gradient-Based and Non-Differentiable Models via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) and classical machine learning methods offer complementary strengths for predictive modeling, yet their fundamentally different representations and training paradigms hinder effective integration: LLMs rely on gradient-based optimization over textual data, whereas models such as Random Forests (RF) employ non-differentiable feature partitioning. This work introduces a reciprocal co-training framework that couples an LLM with an RF classifier via reinforcement learning, creating an iterative feedback loop in which each model improves using signals from the other. Tabular data are reformulated into standardized textual representations for the LLM, whose embeddings augment the RF feature space, while calibrated RF probability estimates provide feedback signals that guide reinforcement learning updates of the LLM. Experiments across three medical datasets demonstrate consistent performance gains for both models, with particularly strong effects for the LLM. Ablation analyses show that iterative refinement, hybrid reward design, and dimensionality control jointly contribute to these gains. The proposed framework provides a general mechanism that allows incompatible model families to leverage each other's strengths through bidirectional adaptation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通过强化学习将LLM与随机森林分类器耦合的互惠协同训练框架，使两种不同范式模型能相互提升性能
AI.motivation: LLM和传统机器学习方法（如随机森林）在预测建模中各有优势，但由于表示形式和训练范式根本不同（LLM基于梯度优化的文本数据，RF使用不可微特征划分），难以有效整合
AI.method: 引入互惠协同训练框架：1）将表格数据转换为标准化文本表示供LLM使用；2）LLM的嵌入增强RF特征空间；3）校准的RF概率估计提供反馈信号指导LLM的强化学习更新；4）通过迭代反馈循环让两个模型相互改进
AI.result: 在三个医疗数据集上的实验显示，两个模型都获得了一致的性能提升，LLM的提升效果尤其显著。消融分析表明迭代细化、混合奖励设计和维度控制共同促成了这些增益
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一种通用机制，允许不兼容的模型家族通过双向适应来利用彼此的优势，实现了不同范式模型的有效整合

title: Aether: Network Validation Using Agentic AI and Digital Twin
summary: Network change validation remains a critical yet predominantly manual, time-consuming, and error-prone process in modern network operations. While formal network verification has made substantial progress in proving correctness properties, it is typically applied in offline, pre-deployment settings and faces challenges in accommodating continuous changes and validating live production behavior. Current operational approaches typically involve scattered testing tools, resulting in partial coverage and errors that surface only after deployment. In this paper, we present Aether, a novel approach that integrates Generative Agentic AI with a multi-functional Network Digital Twin to automate and streamline network change validation workflows. It features an agentic architecture with five specialized Network Operations AI agents that collaboratively handle the change validation lifecycle from intent analysis to network verification and testing. Aether agents use a unified Network Digital Twin integrating modeling, simulation, and emulation to maintain a consistent, up-to-date network view for verification and testing. By orchestrating agent collaboration atop this digital twin, Aether enables automated, rapid network change validation while reducing manual effort, minimizing errors, and improving operational agility and cost-effectiveness. We evaluate Aether over synthetic network change scenarios covering main classes of network changes and on past incidents from a major ISP operational network, demonstrating promising results in error detection (100%), diagnostic coverage (92-96%), and speed (6-7 minutes) over traditional methods.

AI.tldr: Aether是一个将生成式智能体AI与多功能网络数字孪生相结合的自动化网络变更验证系统，通过5个专用AI智能体协作实现从意图分析到网络验证的完整生命周期管理。
AI.motivation: 网络变更验证目前主要依赖人工操作，耗时且容易出错。虽然形式化网络验证在离线预部署环境中取得进展，但难以适应持续变更和实时生产环境验证。现有操作工具分散，导致覆盖不全且错误往往在部署后才被发现。
AI.method: 提出Aether系统，采用智能体架构包含5个专用网络操作AI智能体，协作处理变更验证生命周期。系统基于统一的网络数字孪生，整合建模、仿真和模拟功能，为验证和测试提供一致的最新网络视图。
AI.result: 在合成网络变更场景和主要ISP运营网络历史事件上评估，Aether在错误检测（100%）、诊断覆盖率（92-96%）和速度（6-7分钟）方面相比传统方法表现优异。
AI.conclusion: Aether通过智能体AI与网络数字孪生的集成，实现了自动化、快速的网络变更验证，减少了人工工作量，最小化错误，提高了操作敏捷性和成本效益。

title: SetFlow: Generating Structured Sets of Representations for Multiple Instance Learning
summary: Data scarcity and weak supervision continue to limit the performance of machine learning models in many real-world applications, such as mammography, where Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) often offers the best formulation. While recent foundation models provide strong semantic representations out of the box, effective augmentation of such representations of MIL data remains limited, as existing methods operate at the instance level and fail to capture intra-bag dependencies. In this work, we introduce SetFlow, a generative architecture that models entire MIL bags (i.e., sets) directly in the representation space. Our approach leverages the flow matching paradigm combined with a Set Transformer-inspired design, enabling it to handle permutation-invariant inputs while capturing interactions between instances within each bag. The model is conditioned on both class labels and input scale, allowing it to generate coherent and semantically consistent sets of representations. We evaluate SetFlow on a large-scale mammography benchmark using a state-of-the-art MIL-PF classification pipeline. The generated samples are shown to closely match the original data distribution and even improve downstream performance when used for augmentation. Furthermore, training on synthetic data alone shows competitive results, demonstrating the effectiveness of representation-space generative modeling for data-scarce and privacy-sensitive tasks.

AI.tldr: SetFlow：一种直接在表示空间中生成MIL袋（集合）的生成架构，通过流匹配和集合变换器设计，改善数据稀缺场景下的性能
AI.motivation: 在医学影像等实际应用中，数据稀缺和弱监督限制了机器学习模型性能。现有方法在实例级别操作，无法捕捉MIL袋内的实例间依赖关系，需要更好的表示增强方法
AI.method: 提出SetFlow生成架构，结合流匹配范式和集合变换器设计，直接在表示空间中建模整个MIL袋。模型以类别标签和输入规模为条件，生成语义一致的表示集合
AI.result: 在大规模乳腺X光基准测试中，生成样本与原始数据分布高度匹配，用于数据增强时能提升下游性能。仅使用合成数据训练也能获得有竞争力的结果
AI.conclusion: SetFlow证明了表示空间生成建模在数据稀缺和隐私敏感任务中的有效性，为MIL框架提供了新的数据增强方法

title: DexWorldModel: Causal Latent World Modeling towards Automated Learning of Embodied Tasks
summary: Deploying generative World-Action Models for manipulation is severely bottlenecked by redundant pixel-level reconstruction, $\mathcal{O}(T)$ memory scaling, and sequential inference latency. We introduce the Causal Latent World Model (CLWM), which employs DINOv3 features as generative targets to disentangle interaction semantics from visual noise, yielding highly robust domain generalization. To overcome memory scaling, CLWM features a Dual-State Test-Time Training (TTT) Memory that guarantees a strict $\mathcal{O}(1)$ footprint for long-horizon tasks. To overcome deployment latency, we propose Speculative Asynchronous Inference (SAI) to mask partial diffusion denoising behind physical execution, cutting blocking latency by about $50\%$. To scale robust policies, we present EmbodiChain, an online framework that establishes the Efficiency Law by injecting an infinite flow of physics-grounded trajectories during training. Extensive experiments validate that CLWM achieves state-of-the-art performance in complex dual-arm simulation and unprecedented zero-shot sim-to-real transfer on physical robots, outperforming baselines explicitly finetuned on real-world data.

AI.tldr: CLWM模型使用DINOv3特征作为生成目标，实现O(1)内存占用和异步推理，显著提升机器人操作任务的效率和泛化能力
AI.motivation: 当前生成式世界-动作模型在机器人操作部署中存在三大瓶颈：冗余的像素级重建导致计算浪费、O(T)内存扩展限制长时任务、顺序推理延迟影响实时性
AI.method: 1) 使用DINOv3特征作为生成目标，分离交互语义与视觉噪声；2) 双状态测试时训练内存实现O(1)内存占用；3) 推测性异步推理将部分扩散去噪与物理执行并行；4) EmbodiChain框架注入无限物理轨迹流进行训练
AI.result: 在复杂双臂仿真中达到SOTA性能，实现前所未有的零样本仿真到真实机器人迁移，性能优于在真实数据上微调的基线方法
AI.conclusion: CLWM通过语义特征生成、恒定内存占用和异步推理，有效解决了生成式世界模型在机器人操作中的部署瓶颈，实现了高效且泛化能力强的策略

title: From Subsumption to Satisfiability: LLM-Assisted Active Learning for OWL Ontologies
summary: In active learning, membership queries (MQs) allow a learner to pose questions to a teacher, such as ''Is every apple a fruit?'', to which the teacher responds correctly with yes or no. These MQs can be viewed as subsumption tests with respect to the target ontology. Inspired by the standard reduction of subsumption to satisfiability in description logics, we reformulate each candidate axiom into its corresponding counter-concept and verbalise it in controlled natural language before presenting it to Large Language Models (LLMs). We introduce LLMs as a third component that provides real-world examples approximating an instance of the counter-concept. This design property ensures that only Type II errors may occur in ontology modelling; in the worst case, these errors merely delay the construction process without introducing inconsistencies. Experimental results on 13 commercial LLMs show that recall, corresponding to Type II errors in our framework, remains stable across several well-established ontologies.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种使用大语言模型辅助主动学习的方法，通过将候选公理转化为反概念并用受控自然语言表达，让LLMs提供现实世界示例来近似反概念实例，从而在ontology建模中只允许Type II错误而不引入不一致性。
AI.motivation: 在主动学习中，成员查询允许学习者向教师提问，这些查询可视为相对于目标本体的包含测试。传统方法中，LLMs在ontology建模中可能产生不一致性，需要一种方法既能利用LLMs的知识，又能避免引入Type I错误（不一致性）。
AI.method: 受描述逻辑中将包含测试归约为可满足性测试的启发，将每个候选公理转化为对应的反概念，并用受控自然语言表达。然后引入LLMs作为第三方组件，提供近似反概念实例的现实世界示例。这种设计确保只有Type II错误可能发生。
AI.result: 在13个商业LLMs上的实验结果表明，在提出的框架中，对应于Type II错误的召回率在多个已建立的本体中保持稳定，说明该方法能够有效利用LLMs的知识而不引入不一致性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将LLMs作为提供反概念实例的第三方组件，可以在ontology建模中安全地利用LLMs的知识，只允许Type II错误，这些错误在最坏情况下只会延迟构建过程而不会引入不一致性。

title: Data Mixing for Large Language Models Pretraining: A Survey and Outlook
