summary: Large language models (LLMs) rely on pretraining on massive and heterogeneous corpora, where training data composition has a decisive impact on training efficiency and downstream generalization under realistic compute and data budget constraints. Unlike sample-level data selection, data mixing optimizes domain-level sampling weights to allocate limited budgets more effectively. In recent years, a growing body of work has proposed principled data mixing methods for LLM pretraining; however, the literature remains fragmented and lacks a dedicated, systematic survey. This paper provides a comprehensive review of data mixing for LLM pretraining. We first formalize data mixture optimization as a bilevel problem on the probability simplex and clarify the role of data mixing in the pretraining pipeline, and briefly explain how existing methods make this formulation tractable in practice. We then introduce a fine-grained taxonomy that organizes existing methods along two dimensions: static versus dynamic mixing. Static mixing is further categorized into rule-based and learning-based methods, while dynamic mixing is grouped into adaptive and externally guided families. For each class, we summarize representative approaches and analyze their strengths and limitations from a performance-cost trade-off perspective. Building on this analysis, we highlight challenges that cut across methods, including limited transferability across data domains, optimization objectives, models, and validation sets, as well as unstandardized evaluation protocols and benchmarks, and the inherent tension between performance gains and cost control in learning-based methods. Finally, we outline several exploratory directions, including finer-grained domain partitioning and inverse data mixing, as well as pipeline-aware designs, aiming to provide conceptual and methodological insights for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了LLM预训练中的数据混合方法，将其分类为静态与动态混合，分析了各类方法的优缺点，并指出了跨方法挑战与未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: LLM预训练中数据组成对训练效率和下游泛化有决定性影响，但现有数据混合方法研究分散且缺乏系统性综述，需要整理分类以指导未来研究。
AI.method: 将数据混合优化形式化为概率单纯形上的双层问题，提出细粒度分类法：静态混合（规则基与学习基）和动态混合（自适应与外部引导），分析各类代表性方法。
AI.result: 建立了数据混合方法的系统分类框架，识别了跨方法挑战：跨领域/目标/模型/验证集的有限可迁移性、评估协议不标准化、学习基方法中性能增益与成本控制的矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 数据混合对LLM预训练至关重要，未来研究方向包括更细粒度领域划分、逆向数据混合、管道感知设计等，需要标准化评估和成本效益平衡的方法。

title: QRAFTI: An Agentic Framework for Empirical Research in Quantitative Finance
summary: We introduce a multi-agent framework intended to emulate parts of a quantitative research team and support equity factor research on large financial panel datasets. QRAFTI integrates a research toolkit for panel data with MCP servers that expose data access, factor construction, and custom coding operations as callable tools. It can help replicate established factors, formulate and test new signals, and generate standardized research reports accompanied by narrative analysis and computational traces. On multi-step empirical tasks, using chained tool calls and reflection-based planning may offer better performance and explainability than dynamic code generation alone.

AI.tldr: QRAFTI是一个多智能体框架，用于模拟量化研究团队，支持在大型金融面板数据集上进行因子研究，整合了数据访问、因子构建和自定义编码工具，能够复制现有因子、测试新信号并生成标准化研究报告。
AI.motivation: 传统量化研究需要大量手动工作和专业知识，QRAFTI旨在通过多智能体框架自动化这一过程，提高研究效率和可解释性，支持大规模金融面板数据的因子研究。
AI.method: 整合面板数据研究工具包与MCP服务器，将数据访问、因子构建和自定义编码操作暴露为可调用工具；采用链式工具调用和基于反射的规划，相比动态代码生成提供更好的性能和可解释性。
AI.result: 框架能够帮助复制已建立的因子、制定和测试新信号，并生成包含叙述分析和计算轨迹的标准化研究报告；在多步骤实证任务中，链式工具调用和反射规划优于单纯动态代码生成。
AI.conclusion: QRAFTI为量化因子研究提供了一个有效的多智能体框架，通过工具集成和智能规划提高了研究效率和可解释性，在金融数据分析领域具有应用价值。

title: Matched-Learning-Rate Analysis of Attention Drift and Transfer Retention in Fine-Tuned CLIP
summary: CLIP adaptation can improve in-domain accuracy while degrading out-of-domain transfer, but comparisons between Full Fine-Tuning (Full FT) and LoRA are often confounded by different learning-rate conventions. We study how adaptation method and optimization scale jointly shape attention drift and transfer retention in CLIP using a controlled matched-learning-rate comparison of Full FT and LoRA. The completed matrix contains 80 runs on CLIP ViT-B/32 across EuroSAT and Oxford-IIIT Pets, spanning four shared learning rates ($10^{-6}$, $5{\times}10^{-6}$, $10^{-5}$, $5{\times}10^{-5}$) and five seeds, and evaluates attention-drift metrics, best validation accuracy, and adapter-aware CIFAR-100 zero-shot accuracy. Learning rate strongly modulates structural change: on EuroSAT, Full FT moves from mild entropy broadening at $10^{-6}$ to marked contraction at $5{\times}10^{-5}$, whereas LoRA remains entropy-positive across the full matched grid. At matched learning rates, LoRA preserves substantially more zero-shot transfer than Full FT, averaging $45.13\%$ versus $11.28\%$ CIFAR-100 accuracy on EuroSAT and $58.01\%$ versus $8.54\%$ on Pets. Oxford-IIIT Pets also reveals a regime effect: low-learning-rate LoRA underfits in-domain, so method-only averages can obscure when LoRA becomes competitive. Supporting rollout, patch-to-patch, and CKA analyses are directionally consistent with the controlled matrix. Overall, matched-learning-rate evaluation materially changes the interpretation of Full FT versus LoRA, and attention drift is most useful as a descriptive diagnostic of representation preservation rather than a causal explanation of transfer behavior.

AI.tldr: 在匹配学习率条件下对比CLIP的Full Fine-Tuning和LoRA适配方法，发现LoRA在保持零样本迁移能力方面显著优于Full FT，同时注意力漂移可作为表征保持的诊断指标而非迁移行为的因果解释。
AI.motivation: 研究CLIP适配方法（Full FT vs LoRA）在匹配学习率条件下的真实比较，避免因学习率惯例不同而产生的混淆，探究优化规模如何共同影响注意力漂移和迁移保持能力。
AI.method: 采用控制变量法，在CLIP ViT-B/32模型上对EuroSAT和Oxford-IIIT Pets数据集进行80次实验，涵盖4个共享学习率（10^-6到5×10^-5）和5个随机种子，评估注意力漂移指标、最佳验证准确率和适配器感知的CIFAR-100零样本准确率。
AI.result: 学习率强烈调节结构变化：在EuroSAT上，Full FT从10^-6时的轻度熵增到5×10^-5时的显著熵减，而LoRA在整个匹配网格中保持熵增。在匹配学习率下，LoRA保持的零样本迁移能力显著优于Full FT（EuroSAT：45.13% vs 11.28%；Pets：58.01% vs 8.54%）。
AI.conclusion: 匹配学习率评估显著改变了Full FT与LoRA的比较解释，注意力漂移更适合作为表征保持的描述性诊断指标，而非迁移行为的因果解释。LoRA在保持迁移能力方面具有明显优势，但低学习率时可能欠拟合。

title: Saccade Attention Networks: Using Transfer Learning of Attention to Reduce Network Sizes
summary: One of the limitations of transformer networks is the sequence length due to the quadratic nature of the attention matrix. Classical self attention uses the entire sequence length, however, the actual attention being used is sparse. Humans use a form of sparse attention when analyzing an image or scene called saccades. Focusing on key features greatly reduces computation time. By using a network (Saccade Attention Network) to learn where to attend from a large pre-trained model, we can use it to pre-process images and greatly reduce network size by reducing the input sequence length to just the key features being attended to. Our results indicate that you can reduce calculations by close to 80% and produce similar results.

AI.tldr: 提出Saccade Attention Network，通过模仿人类眼动机制学习图像关键特征位置，大幅减少Transformer注意力计算量（约80%），同时保持相似性能
AI.motivation: Transformer网络因注意力矩阵的二次复杂度而受限于序列长度。传统自注意力使用完整序列，但实际上注意力是稀疏的。人类视觉系统通过眼动（saccades）机制聚焦关键特征来减少计算，这为优化Transformer提供了灵感
AI.method: 提出Saccade Attention Network，利用大型预训练模型学习图像中需要关注的关键特征位置。该网络预处理图像，将输入序列长度减少到仅包含被关注的关键特征，从而大幅降低计算复杂度
AI.result: 实验结果显示，该方法能减少约80%的计算量，同时产生相似的结果质量，在保持性能的前提下显著提升了计算效率
AI.conclusion: 通过模仿人类视觉的稀疏注意力机制，Saccade Attention Network能有效减少Transformer的计算负担，为解决注意力矩阵二次复杂度问题提供了一种有前景的解决方案

title: Agentic Risk-Aware Set-Based Engineering Design
summary: This paper introduces a multi-agent framework guided by Large Language Models (LLMs) to assist in the early stages of engineering design, a phase often characterized by vast parameter spaces and inherent uncertainty. Operating under a human-in-the-loop paradigm and demonstrated on the canonical problem of aerodynamic airfoil design, the framework employs a team of specialized agents: a Coding Assistant, a Design Agent, a Systems Engineering Agent, and an Analyst Agent - all coordinated by a human Manager. Integrated within a set-based design philosophy, the process begins with a collaborative phase where the Manager and Coding Assistant develop a suite of validated tools, after which the agents execute a structured workflow to systematically explore and prune a large set of initial design candidates. A key contribution of this work is the explicit integration of formal risk management, employing the Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) as a quantitative metric to filter designs that exhibit a high probability of failing to meet performance requirements, specifically the target coefficient of lift. The framework automates labor-intensive initial exploration through a global sensitivity analysis conducted by the Analyst agent, which generates actionable heuristics to guide the other agents. The process culminates by presenting the human Manager with a curated final set of promising design candidates, augmented with high-fidelity Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) simulations. This approach effectively leverages AI to handle high-volume analytical tasks, thereby enhancing the decision-making capability of the human expert in selecting the final, risk-assessed design.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于大语言模型的多智能体框架，用于工程设计的早期阶段，通过风险管理和自动化探索来辅助人类专家进行空气动力学翼型设计。
AI.motivation: 工程设计早期阶段面临参数空间巨大、不确定性高的挑战，需要系统化方法来探索设计空间并管理风险，同时减轻人类专家的计算负担。
AI.method: 采用基于集合的设计哲学，构建由大语言模型驱动的多智能体系统（包括编码助手、设计代理、系统工程代理和分析代理），由人类管理者协调。通过全局敏感性分析生成启发式规则，使用条件风险价值（CVaR）进行正式风险管理，自动筛选高风险设计。
AI.result: 框架能够自动化处理大量分析任务，系统性地探索和修剪初始设计候选集，最终向人类管理者呈现经过风险评估的精选设计候选集，并附带高保真CFD模拟结果。
AI.conclusion: 该多智能体框架有效利用AI处理高容量分析任务，增强了人类专家在风险评估设计选择中的决策能力，为工程设计早期阶段的自动化探索提供了可行方案。

title: LiFT: Does Instruction Fine-Tuning Improve In-Context Learning for Longitudinal Modelling by Large Language Models?
summary: Longitudinal NLP tasks require reasoning over temporally ordered text to detect persistence and change in human behavior and opinions. However, in-context learning with large language models struggles on tasks where models must integrate historical context, track evolving interactions, and handle rare change events. We introduce LiFT, a longitudinal instruction fine-tuning framework that unifies diverse longitudinal modeling tasks under a shared instruction schema. LiFT uses a curriculum that progressively increases temporal difficulty while incorporating few-shot structure and temporal conditioning to encourage effective use of past context. We evaluate LiFT across five datasets. Models trained on longitudinal tasks with different levels of temporal granularity are tested for generalisability on two separate datasets. Across models with different parameter sizes (OLMo (1B/7B), LLaMA-8B, and Qwen-14B), LiFT consistently outperforms base-model ICL, with strong gains on out-of-distribution data and minority change events.

AI.tldr: LiFT框架通过纵向指令微调，统一多种时序建模任务，提升大语言模型在时序推理任务上的表现，特别是在处理历史上下文、追踪演化交互和处理罕见变化事件方面。
AI.motivation: 纵向NLP任务需要基于时序文本进行推理，以检测人类行为和观点的持续性与变化。然而，大语言模型的上下文学习在处理需要整合历史上下文、追踪演化交互和处理罕见变化事件的任务时存在困难。
AI.method: 提出LiFT纵向指令微调框架，采用统一的指令模式整合多种纵向建模任务。使用渐进式课程学习，逐步增加时序难度，同时结合少样本结构和时序条件，以促进对历史上下文的有效利用。
AI.result: 在五个数据集上评估LiFT，使用不同时序粒度的纵向任务训练模型，并在两个独立数据集上测试泛化能力。在不同参数规模模型（OLMo 1B/7B、LLaMA-8B、Qwen-14B）上，LiFT均显著优于基础模型的上下文学习，在分布外数据和少数变化事件上表现尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: LiFT框架通过纵向指令微调有效提升大语言模型在时序推理任务上的性能，特别是在处理复杂时序关系和罕见事件方面表现出色，具有良好的泛化能力。

title: CGCMA: Conditionally-Gated Cross-Modal Attention for Event-Conditioned Asynchronous Fusion
summary: We study asynchronous alignment, a first-class multimodal learning setting in which a dense primary stream must be fused with sporadic external context whose value depends on when it arrives. Unlike standard multimodal benchmarks that assume structural synchrony, this setting requires models to reason explicitly about freshness and trust. We focus on the event-conditioned case in which continuous market states are paired with delayed web intelligence, and we use high-frequency cryptocurrency markets only as a timestamped, high-noise stress test for this broader problem. We propose CGCMA (Conditionally-Gated Cross-Modal Attention), whose central design principle is to separate text-conditioned grounding from lag-aware trust control. Text first attends over price sequences to identify event-relevant market states, after which a conditional gate uses modality agreement, web features, and lag $τ_{\mathrm{lag}}$ to regulate residual injection and fall back toward unimodal prediction when external context is stale or contradictory. We introduce CMI (Crypto Market Intelligence), an asynchronous evaluation corpus with 27,914 real-news samples pairing high-frequency price sequences with lagged web intelligence. On the current short real-news corpus, CGCMA attains the highest mean downstream Sharpe ratio ($+0.449 \pm 0.257$) among the evaluated baselines under a shared zero-cost threshold-trading evaluation on news-available bars. Additional controls show that the gain is not explained by web scalars alone and is not recovered by simple freshness heuristics. The resulting evidence supports problem validity and a promising asynchronous multimodal gain on this stress-test setting.

AI.tldr: CGCMA模型通过条件门控跨模态注意力机制，在异步多模态学习场景中有效融合连续市场状态与延迟的网络情报，提升加密货币市场交易表现。
AI.motivation: 研究异步对齐问题，这是多模态学习中的一个重要场景，其中密集的主数据流需要与偶发的外部上下文融合，而这些上下文的价值取决于其到达时间。不同于标准多模态基准假设的结构同步性，该场景要求模型显式地考虑新鲜度和可信度。
AI.method: 提出CGCMA（条件门控跨模态注意力）模型，其核心设计原则是将文本条件的基础与滞后感知的信任控制分离。文本首先关注价格序列以识别事件相关的市场状态，然后条件门使用模态一致性、网络特征和滞后时间τ_lag来调节残差注入，并在外部上下文过时或矛盾时回退到单模态预测。
AI.result: 在CMI（加密货币市场情报）评估语料库上，CGCMA在新闻可用条目的共享零成本阈值交易评估中获得了最高的平均下游夏普比率（+0.449 ± 0.257）。额外控制实验表明，增益不能仅由网络标量解释，也无法通过简单的新鲜度启发式方法恢复。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果支持了问题有效性，并展示了在这种压力测试场景下异步多模态学习的潜在增益，为处理异步多模态融合问题提供了有前景的方法。

title: Aletheia: Physics-Conditioned Localized Artifact Attention (PhyLAA-X) for End-to-End Generalizable and Robust Deepfake Video Detection
comment: Code: https://github.com/devghori1264/Aletheia (MIT license). Dataset notes: see Data and Code Availability section
summary:
State-of-the-art deepfake detectors achieve near-perfect in-domain accuracy yet degrade under cross-generator shifts, heavy compression, and adversarial perturbations. The core limitation remains the decoupling of semantic artifact learning from physical invariants: optical-flow discontinuities, specular-reflection inconsistencies, and cardiac-modulated reflectance (rPPG) are treated either as post-hoc features or ignored.
  We introduce PhyLAA-X, a novel physics-conditioned extension of Localized Artifact Attention (LAA-X). PhyLAA-X injects three end-to-end differentiable physics-derived feature volumes - optical-flow curl, specular-reflectance skewness, and spatially-upsampled rPPG power spectra - directly into the LAA-X attention computation via cross-attention gating and a resonance consistency loss. This forces the network to learn manipulation boundaries where semantic inconsistencies and physical violations co-occur - regions inherently harder for generative models to replicate consistently.
  PhyLAA-X is embedded across an efficient spatiotemporal ensemble (EfficientNet-B4+BiLSTM, ResNeXt-101+Transformer, Xception+causal Conv1D) with uncertainty-aware adaptive weighting. On FaceForensics++ (c23), Aletheia reaches 97.2% accuracy / 0.992 AUC-ROC; on Celeb-DF v2, 94.9% / 0.981; on DFDC, 90.8% / 0.966 - outperforming the strongest published baseline (LAA-Net [1]) by 4.1-7.3% in cross-generator settings and maintaining 79.4% accuracy under epsilon = 0.02 PGD-10 attacks. Single-backbone ablations confirm PhyLAA-X alone delivers a 4.2% cross-dataset AUC gain. The full production system is open-sourced at https://github.com/devghori1264/Aletheia (v1.2, April 2026) with pretrained weights, the adversarial corpus (referred to as ADC-2026 in this work), and complete reproducibility artifacts.

AI.tldr: PhyLAA-X是一种新型的深度伪造检测方法，通过将物理特征（光流、镜面反射、rPPG）注入到注意力机制中，显著提升了跨生成器、压缩和对抗攻击下的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测器在域内准确率很高，但在跨生成器、重压缩和对抗攻击下性能下降。核心问题是语义伪影学习与物理不变量的解耦，物理特征要么作为后处理特征，要么被忽略。
AI.method: 提出PhyLAA-X，将三种端到端可微的物理特征（光流旋度、镜面反射偏度、空间上采样的rPPG功率谱）通过交叉注意力门控和共振一致性损失直接注入到LAA-X注意力计算中。采用高效时空集成架构（EfficientNet-B4+BiLSTM等）和不确定性感知自适应加权。
AI.result: 在FaceForensics++ (c23)上达到97.2%准确率/0.992 AUC-ROC；Celeb-DF v2上94.9%/0.981；DFDC上90.8%/0.966。在跨生成器设置中比最强基线(LAA-Net)提升4.1-7.3%，在epsilon=0.02 PGD-10攻击下保持79.4%准确率。单骨干消融实验显示PhyLAA-X单独带来4.2%跨数据集AUC增益。
AI.conclusion: PhyLAA-X通过将物理特征直接集成到注意力机制中，强制网络学习语义不一致和物理违规共现的操作边界，显著提升了深度伪造检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。系统已开源。

title: The Query Channel: Information-Theoretic Limits of Masking-Based Explanations
summary: Masking-based post-hoc explanation methods, such as KernelSHAP and LIME, estimate local feature importance by querying a black-box model under randomized perturbations. This paper formulates this procedure as communication over a query channel, where the latent explanation acts as a message and each masked evaluation is a channel use. Within this framework, the complexity of the explanation is captured by the entropy of the hypothesis class, while the query interface supplies information at a rate determined by an identification capacity per query. We derive a strong converse showing that, if the explanation rate exceeds this capacity, the probability of exact recovery necessarily converges to one in error for any sequence of explainers and decoders. We also prove an achievability result establishing that a sparse maximum-likelihood decoder attains reliable recovery when the rate lies below capacity. A Monte Carlo estimator of mutual information yields a non-asymptotic query benchmark that we use to compare optimal decoding with Lasso- and OLS-based procedures that mirror LIME and KernelSHAP. Experiments reveal a range of query budgets where information theory permits reliable explanations but standard convex surrogates still fail. Finally, we interpret super-pixel resolution and tokenization for neural language models as a source-coding choice that sets the entropy of the explanation and show how Gaussian noise and nonlinear curvature degrade the query channel, induce waterfall and error-floor behavior, and render high-resolution explanations unattainable.

AI.tldr: 该论文将基于掩码的后解释方法（如KernelSHAP和LIME）建模为通信问题，通过信息论框架分析解释的可靠性，推导出解释恢复的容量界限，并实验验证标准方法在信息理论允许的查询预算下仍可能失败。
AI.motivation: 现有基于掩码的后解释方法（如KernelSHAP和LIME）缺乏理论保证，无法确定需要多少查询才能可靠地恢复特征重要性。本文旨在通过信息论框架为这些方法提供理论基础，量化解释的复杂性和查询效率之间的关系。
AI.method: 将解释过程建模为通信信道：潜在解释作为消息，每个掩码评估作为信道使用。推导解释恢复的强逆定理和可达性结果，提出基于互信息的蒙特卡洛估计器作为查询基准，比较最优解码与Lasso/OLS方法（对应LIME和KernelSHAP）。
AI.result: 证明了当解释速率超过信道容量时，精确恢复概率必然趋近于零（强逆定理）；稀疏最大似然解码器在速率低于容量时可实现可靠恢复。实验显示存在查询预算范围，信息理论允许可靠解释但标准凸代理方法仍失败。高斯噪声和非线性曲率会降低信道质量。
AI.conclusion: 信息论为基于掩码的解释方法提供了理论基础和性能界限。超像素分辨率和分词等源编码选择决定了解释的熵，而噪声和曲率会降低查询信道质量，使高分辨率解释难以实现。标准方法在理论允许的查询预算下可能仍不足够。

title: QU-NLP at QIAS 2026: Multi-Stage QLoRA Fine-Tuning for Arabic Islamic Inheritance Reasoning
comment: Accepted for publication, The 7th Workshop on Open-Source Arabic Corpora and Processing Tools, LREC26 conference
summary: Islamic inheritance law (ilm al-mawarıth) presents a challenging domain for evaluating large language models' structured reasoning capabilities, requiring multi-step legal analysis, rule-based blocking decisions, and precise fractional calculations. We present QU-NLP's submission to the QIAS 2026 shared task on Arabic Islamic inheritance reasoning. Our approach employs a multi-stage Quantized Low-Rank Adaptation (QLoRA) fine-tuning strategy on Qwen3-4B: (1) domain adaptation on 3,166 Islamic fatwa records to acquire inheritance terminology and jurisprudential reasoning patterns, followed by (2) task-specific training on 12,000 structured inheritance cases to optimize JSON-formatted output generation. Using 4-bit NF4 quantization with rank-128 LoRA adapters, our model achieves 90% MIR-E (Mawarith Inheritance Reasoning Evaluation) score on the test set, demonstrating competitive performance while requiring minimal computational resources. Our results show that domain-specific pre-adaptation combined with structured output training enables small language models to perform complex legal reasoning tasks effectively comparing to commercial systems such as Gemini-2.5-flash.

AI.tldr: QU-NLP团队使用多阶段QLoRA微调策略在Qwen3-4B模型上，通过伊斯兰教法领域适应和结构化输出训练，在阿拉伯伊斯兰继承推理任务中取得了90%的MIR-E分数，性能接近商业系统。
AI.motivation: 伊斯兰继承法是一个具有挑战性的领域，需要多步骤法律分析、基于规则的阻断决策和精确的分数计算，适合评估大语言模型的结构化推理能力。
AI.method: 采用多阶段量化低秩适应（QLoRA）微调策略：1）在3,166条伊斯兰教法记录上进行领域适应，学习继承术语和法理推理模式；2）在12,000个结构化继承案例上进行任务特定训练，优化JSON格式输出生成。使用4位NF4量化和秩-128 LoRA适配器。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到了90%的MIR-E（Mawarith继承推理评估）分数，展示了有竞争力的性能，同时只需要最小的计算资源。
AI.conclusion: 领域特定的预适应结合结构化输出训练，能够使小型语言模型有效地执行复杂的法律推理任务，性能可与Gemini-2.5-flash等商业系统相媲美。

title: Shifting the Gradient: Understanding How Defensive Training Methods Protect Language Model Integrity
summary: Defensive training methods such as positive preventative steering (PPS) and inoculation prompting (IP) offer surprising results through seemingly similar processes: both add trait-inducing objects to large language models (LLMs) during training, and both defend the LLM against acquiring the trait. The surprising success of these methods comes with the question: how do they work? Are PPS and IP doing the same thing? We provide behavioral and mechanistic comparisons of these two methods using "evilness" as a case-study trait. Our central finding is that PPS and IP achieve their defensive benefits through distinct mechanisms. Behaviorally, we show that neither PPS nor IP operates through a purely associative mechanism; and PPS can both defend against trait acquisition and actively reduce pre-existing expression, whereas IP is ineffective in models that were previously finetuned to express the trait. This behavioral divergence is reflected mechanistically: PPS shifts the activation gradient towards an attenuating direction along the PPS vector axis. When the PPS vector is aligned with a trait-expressing axis, it can reverse the gradient pressure, reducing rather than increasing activation along that axis. In contrast, IP continues to resist a precise mechanistic account. Direct cosine similarity analyses reveal that IP has a characteristically different gradient signature than PPS, and qualitative analyses reveal IP's gradient to be more diffuse. Furthermore, IP reduces the next-token prediction loss on trait-expressing data where PPS need not, consistent with the notion that IP "explains away" the trait-expression in the training data. Taken together, our analyses reveal distinct mechanisms by which each method operates and highlight open questions about IP's mechanistic picture.

AI.tldr: PPS和IP是两种防御性训练方法，都能防止LLM获得特定特质，但工作机制不同：PPS通过改变激活梯度方向来防御和减少已有特质表达，而IP机制更复杂且对已有特质的防御效果有限。
AI.motivation: 研究PPS（正向预防性转向）和IP（接种提示）这两种看似相似的防御性训练方法的工作机制，探究它们是否通过相同机制防止LLM获得特定特质（以"邪恶性"为例）。
AI.method: 使用行为比较和机制分析，包括激活梯度分析、余弦相似度分析和定性分析，对比PPS和IP在防御特质获取方面的效果和机制差异。
AI.result: PPS和IP通过不同机制实现防御：PPS能改变激活梯度方向，防御特质获取并减少已有特质表达；IP机制更复杂且对已有特质防御效果有限，具有不同的梯度特征和更分散的梯度模式。
AI.conclusion: PPS和IP是两种工作机制不同的防御方法，PPS通过梯度方向改变实现防御，而IP机制尚不完全清楚，需要进一步研究其工作机制。

title: Geometry-Aware CLIP Retrieval via Local Cross-Modal Alignment and Steering
summary: CLIP retrieval is typically framed as a pointwise similarity problem in a shared embedding space. While CLIP achieves strong global cross-modal alignment, many retrieval failures arise from local geometric inconsistencies: nearby items are incorrectly ordered, leading to systematic confusions (e.g., pentagon vs. hexagon) and produces diffuse, weakly controlled result sets. Prior work largely optimizes for point wise relevance or finetuning to mitigate these problems. We instead view retrieval as a problem of neighborhood alignment. Our work introduces (1) neighborhood-level re-ranking via Hungarian matching, which rewards structural consistency; (2) query-conditioned local steering, where directions derived from contrastive neighborhoods around the query reshape retrieval. We show that these techniques improve retrieval performance on attribute-binding and compositional retrieval tasks. Together, these methods operate on local neighborhoods but serve different roles: re-ranking rewards alignment whereas local steering controls neighborhood structure. This shows that retrieval quality and controllability depend critically on local structure, which can be exploited at inference time without retraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于局部邻域对齐的CLIP检索改进方法：匈牙利匹配重排序和查询条件局部引导，无需重新训练即可提升检索性能和控制性。
AI.motivation: CLIP检索通常被视为共享嵌入空间中的点相似性问题，虽然实现了全局跨模态对齐，但局部几何不一致性导致检索失败，如邻近项排序错误、系统性混淆（五边形vs六边形）以及结果集分散且控制性弱。
AI.method: 1) 通过匈牙利匹配进行邻域级重排序，奖励结构一致性；2) 查询条件局部引导，利用查询周围对比邻域导出的方向重塑检索结果。
AI.result: 这些技术在属性绑定和组合检索任务上提高了检索性能，重排序奖励对齐，局部引导控制邻域结构。
AI.conclusion: 检索质量和可控性关键依赖于局部结构，可以在推理时利用这些方法而无需重新训练，表明局部邻域对齐是改进CLIP检索的有效途径。

title: RankGuide: Tensor-Rank-Guided Routing and Steering for Efficient Reasoning
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) enhance problem-solving capabilities by generating explicit multi-step chains of thought (CoT) reasoning; however, they incur substantial inference latency and computational overhead. To mitigate this issue, recent works have explored model collaboration paradigms, where small reasoning models (SRMs) generate intermediate reasoning steps to achieve a better accuracy--latency trade-off. Despite recent progress, effectively and efficiently detecting and mitigating SRM failures in collaborative systems remains a key challenge. To address this issue, we analyze SRM inference in both the generated text and hidden-state spaces, and identify three types of failure modes: \textit{overconfidence}, \textit{uncertainty}, and \textit{heavy revalidation}. Building on these insights, we propose \textbf{RankGuide}, a framework that improves the efficiency and effectiveness of SRM--LRM collaboration through tensor-rank-guided routing and steering. Specifically, RankGuide leverages a routing signal that incorporates tensor-rank signals derived from consecutive hidden states to detect when SRMs are likely to fail and selectively invoke LRMs. In addition, we introduce a tensor-rank-filtered steering vector extraction method to modulate the reasoning trajectory of SRMs, thereby improving their generation quality. By improving both routing and steering through tensor-rank signals, RankGuide enables SRM--LRM collaborative systems to achieve more efficient reasoning with fewer steps and improved accuracy. Experiments on multiple reasoning benchmarks demonstrate the efficacy of RankGuide in reducing latency by up to $1.75\times$ compared to LRM, while maintaining competitive accuracy relative to prior methods.

AI.tldr: RankGuide框架通过张量秩引导的路由和转向机制，提升小推理模型与大推理模型协作系统的效率和准确性，在多个推理基准上实现1.75倍延迟降低。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型虽然能生成多步思维链推理，但存在显著的推理延迟和计算开销。现有小模型协作系统在检测和缓解小模型失败方面仍面临挑战，需要更有效的协作机制。
AI.method: 提出RankGuide框架：1）分析小模型在文本和隐藏状态空间的推理，识别三种失败模式；2）利用连续隐藏状态的张量秩信号构建路由机制，选择性调用大模型；3）提出张量秩过滤的转向向量提取方法，改善小模型的生成质量。
AI.result: 在多个推理基准上的实验表明，RankGuide相比大型推理模型能减少高达1.75倍的延迟，同时保持与现有方法相当的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 通过张量秩信号引导的路由和转向机制，RankGuide有效提升了小模型-大模型协作系统的推理效率和准确性，为模型协作提供了新思路。

title: Measuring Representation Robustness in Large Language Models for Geometry
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly evaluated on mathematical reasoning, yet their robustness to equivalent problem representations remains poorly understood. In geometry, identical problems can be expressed in Euclidean, coordinate, or vector forms, but existing benchmarks report accuracy on fixed formats, implicitly assuming representation invariance and masking failures caused by representational changes alone. We propose GeoRepEval, a representation-aware evaluation framework that measures correctness, invariance, and consistency at the problem level across parallel formulations, combining strict answer matching, bootstrap confidence intervals, paired McNemar tests, representation-flip analyses, and regression controls for surface complexity. We prove that our Invariance@3 metric decomposes accuracy into robust and fragile components and is bounded by the weakest representation. Evaluating eleven LLMs on 158 curated high-school geometry problems (474 instances), we find accuracy gaps of up to 14 percentage points induced solely by representation choice. Vector formulations emerge as a consistent failure point, with Invariance@3 as low as 0.044 even after controlling for length and symbolic complexity. A convert-then-solve prompting intervention improves vector accuracy by up to 52 percentage points for high-capacity models, suggesting that failures reflect representation sensitivity rather than inability; however, low-capacity models show no gains, indicating deeper limitations. These results suggest that current models rely on representation-specific heuristics rather than abstract geometric reasoning. All datasets, prompts, and scripts are released at https://github.com/vedjaw/GeoRepEval.

AI.tldr: GeoRepEval：一个几何问题表示感知的评估框架，发现LLMs在几何推理中存在表示敏感性，相同问题在不同表示形式下准确率差异可达14个百分点
AI.motivation: 现有LLMs数学推理评估通常假设表示不变性，但几何问题可以有欧几里得、坐标或向量等多种等价表示形式，需要评估模型对这些表示变化的鲁棒性
AI.method: 提出GeoRepEval框架，包含严格答案匹配、bootstrap置信区间、配对McNemar检验、表示翻转分析和表面复杂度回归控制，引入Invariance@3度量将准确率分解为鲁棒和脆弱成分
AI.result: 评估11个LLMs在158个高中几何问题上的表现，发现仅因表示选择导致的准确率差距可达14个百分点，向量表示是常见失败点，Invariance@3低至0.044。转换后求解提示可提升高容量模型向量准确率52个百分点，但低容量模型无改善
AI.conclusion: 当前模型依赖表示特定的启发式方法而非抽象几何推理，表示敏感性是评估数学推理能力的重要维度，需要更鲁棒的评估框架

title: Functional Similarity Metric for Neural Networks: Overcoming Parametric Ambiguity via Activation Region Analysis
summary: As modern deep learning architectures grow in complexity, representational ambiguity emerges as a critical barrier to their interpretability and reliable merging. For ReLU networks, identical functional mappings can be achieved through entirely different weight configurations due to algebraic symmetries: neuron permutation and positive diagonal scaling. Consequently, traditional parameter-based comparison methods exhibit extreme instability to slight weight perturbations during training. This paper proposes a mathematically grounded approach to constructing a stable canonical representation of neural networks and a robust functional similarity metric. We shift focus from comparing raw weights to analyzing the topology of neuron activation regions. The algorithm first eliminates scaling ambiguity via L2-normalization of weight vectors with subsequent layer compensation. Next, discrete approximations of activation regions are generated as binary functional signatures evaluated over a data sample. To overcome the computational bottleneck of comparing large binary vectors, we adapt Locality-Sensitive Hashing, specifically MinHash, providing a fast and statistically precise approximation of the Jaccard index. The final cross-network neuron matching is formulated as a linear sum assignment problem solved via the Hungarian algorithm. We demonstrate theoretically and experimentally that our metric mitigates the neuron "flickering" effect and exhibits exceptional robustness to minor weight perturbations. This framework provides a solid foundation for model merging, transfer learning, objective assessment during pruning, and Explainable AI paradigms.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于神经元激活区域拓扑的稳定规范表示和功能相似性度量方法，解决ReLU网络因代数对称性导致的表示歧义问题
AI.motivation: 现代深度学习架构复杂性增加导致表示歧义成为可解释性和可靠模型合并的关键障碍。ReLU网络因神经元排列和正对角缩放等代数对称性，相同功能映射可由完全不同权重配置实现，传统参数比较方法对训练中微小权重扰动极度不稳定
AI.method: 1) 通过L2归一化权重向量并层补偿消除缩放歧义；2) 生成离散激活区域近似作为二进制功能签名；3) 采用MinHash局部敏感哈希快速近似Jaccard指数；4) 将跨网络神经元匹配建模为线性分配问题，用匈牙利算法求解
AI.result: 理论上和实验证明该度量方法缓解了神经元"闪烁"效应，对微小权重扰动表现出卓越鲁棒性，为模型合并、迁移学习、剪枝评估和可解释AI提供坚实基础
AI.conclusion: 该框架从比较原始权重转向分析神经元激活区域拓扑，提供数学上严谨的稳定规范表示和鲁棒功能相似性度量，解决了深度学习模型比较中的根本稳定性问题

title: An Uncertainty-Aware Loss Function Incorporating Fuzzy Logic: Application to MRI Brain Image Segmentation
summary: Accurate brain image segmentation, particularly for distinguishing various tissues from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) images, plays a pivotal role in finding the neurological dis ease and medical image computing. In deep learning approaches, loss functions are very crucial for optimizing the model. In this study, we introduce a novel loss function integrating fuzzy logic to deals uncertainty issues in brain image segmentation into various tissues. It integrates the well-known categorical cross-entropy (CCE) loss function and fuzzy entropy based on fuzzy logic. By employing fuzzy logic, this loss function accounts for the inherent uncertainties in pixel classifications. The proposed loss function has been evaluated on two publicly available benchmark datasets, IBSR and OASIS, using two widely recognised architectures, U-Net and U-Net++. Experimental results demonstrate that the trained model with proposed loss function provided better results in comparison to the CCE optimisation function in terms of various performance metrics. Additionally, it effectively enhances segmentation performance while handling meaningful uncer tainty during training. The findings suggest that this approach not only improves segmentation outcomes but also contributes to the reliability of model predictions.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合模糊逻辑的新型损失函数，用于处理脑图像分割中的不确定性，在IBSR和OASIS数据集上优于传统交叉熵损失。
AI.motivation: 脑图像分割对神经系统疾病诊断至关重要，但现有深度学习方法在处理分割不确定性方面存在不足，需要能有效处理像素分类不确定性的损失函数。
AI.method: 提出新颖的损失函数，结合分类交叉熵(CCE)和基于模糊逻辑的模糊熵，通过模糊逻辑处理像素分类中的固有不确定性。
AI.result: 在IBSR和OASIS数据集上使用U-Net和U-Net++架构评估，相比CCE损失函数，新损失函数在多种性能指标上表现更好，能有效处理训练中的不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅提高了脑图像分割性能，还增强了模型预测的可靠性，为医学图像分割中的不确定性处理提供了有效解决方案。

title: Evaluating Tool-Using Language Agents: Judge Reliability, Propagation Cascades, and Runtime Mitigation in AgentProp-Bench
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, 12 tables (8 main + 4 supplementary). Under review at Information Processing & Management. Code and data: https://github.com/bhaskargurram-ai/agenthallu-bench
summary: Automated evaluation of tool-using large language model (LLM) agents is widely assumed to be reliable, but this assumption has rarely been validated against human annotation. We introduce AgentProp-Bench, a 2,000-task benchmark with 2,300 traces across four domains, nine production LLMs, and a 100-label human-validated subset. We quantify judge reliability, characterize error propagation, and evaluate a runtime mitigation. Substring-based judging agrees with human annotation at kappa=0.049 (chance-level); a three-LLM ensemble reaches kappa=0.432 (moderate) with a conservative bias. Under validated evaluation, a parameter-level injection propagates to a wrong final answer with human-calibrated probability approximately 0.62 (range 0.46-0.73 across models). Rejection (catching bad parameters) and recovery (correcting after acceptance) are independent model capabilities (Spearman rho=0.126, p=0.747). A tuned runtime interceptor reduces hallucination on GPT-4o-mini by 23.0 percentage points under a concurrent n=600 control, but shows no significant effect on Gemini-2.0-Flash, whose aggressive parameter rejection eliminates the target failure mode. All code, data, traces, and human labels are released at https://github.com/bhaskargurram-ai/agenthallu-bench.

AI.tldr: AgentProp-Bench是一个包含2000个任务、2300条轨迹的基准测试，用于评估工具使用型LLM代理的自动化评估可靠性。研究发现基于子串的评估与人工标注的一致性仅为机会水平，而三LLM集成能达到中等一致性。参数级错误传播到最终答案的概率约为62%，拒绝和恢复是独立的能力。
AI.motivation: 当前广泛假设工具使用型LLM代理的自动化评估是可靠的，但这种假设很少通过人工标注进行验证。需要量化评估者的可靠性、表征错误传播，并评估运行时缓解措施的有效性。
AI.method: 构建AgentProp-Bench基准测试，包含2000个任务、2300条轨迹，涵盖4个领域、9个生产级LLM，以及100个标签的人工验证子集。使用kappa系数衡量评估者可靠性，分析错误传播概率，测试三LLM集成评估方法，并实施运行时拦截器进行缓解。
AI.result: 基于子串的评估与人工标注的一致性仅为kappa=0.049（机会水平）；三LLM集成达到kappa=0.432（中等一致性），但存在保守偏差。参数级注入错误传播到最终答案的概率约为0.62（范围0.46-0.73）。拒绝和恢复是独立的能力（Spearman rho=0.126）。调优的运行时拦截器在GPT-4o-mini上减少幻觉23.0个百分点，但对Gemini-2.0-Flash无显著效果。
AI.conclusion: 工具使用型LLM代理的自动化评估可靠性远低于普遍假设，需要更严格的验证方法。三LLM集成评估能显著提高可靠性，但仍有改进空间。错误传播概率高，拒绝和恢复是独立能力，针对性的运行时缓解措施对某些模型有效但对其他模型可能无效。

title: Injecting Structured Biomedical Knowledge into Language Models: Continual Pretraining vs. GraphRAG
summary: The injection of domain-specific knowledge is crucial for adapting language models (LMs) to specialized fields such as biomedicine. While most current approaches rely on unstructured text corpora, this study explores two complementary strategies for leveraging structured knowledge from the UMLS Metathesaurus: (i) Continual pretraining that embeds knowledge into model parameters, and (ii) Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) that consults a knowledge graph at inference time. We first construct a large-scale biomedical knowledge graph from UMLS (3.4 million concepts and 34.2 million relations), stored in Neo4j for efficient querying. We then derive a ~100-million-token textual corpus from this graph to continually pretrain two models: BERTUMLS (from BERT) and BioBERTUMLS (from BioBERT). We evaluate these models on six BLURB (Biomedical Language Understanding and Reasoning Benchmark) datasets spanning five task types and evaluate GraphRAG on the two QA (Question Answering) datasets (PubMedQA, BioASQ). On BLURB tasks, BERTUMLS improves over BERT, with the largest gains on knowledge-intensive QA. Effects on BioBERT are more nuanced, suggesting diminishing returns when the base model already encodes substantial biomedical text knowledge. Finally, augmenting LLaMA 3-8B with our GraphRAG pipeline yields over than 3 points accuracy on PubMedQA and 5 points on BioASQ without any retraining, delivering transparent, multi-hop, and easily updated knowledge access. We release the processed UMLS Neo4j graph to support reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 该研究探索了两种利用UMLS结构化知识增强语言模型的方法：持续预训练将知识嵌入参数，以及GraphRAG在推理时查询知识图谱，在生物医学任务上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 将领域特定知识注入语言模型对适应生物医学等专业领域至关重要。当前方法主要依赖非结构化文本语料，本研究探索利用UMLS Metathesaurus结构化知识的互补策略。
AI.method: 1) 从UMLS构建大规模生物医学知识图谱(340万概念，3420万关系)，存储在Neo4j中；2) 从图谱生成约1亿token的文本语料，用于持续预训练BERTUMLS和BioBERTUMLS；3) 开发GraphRAG管道，在推理时查询知识图谱增强LLaMA 3-8B。
AI.result: BERTUMLS在BLURB的6个数据集上优于BERT，在知识密集型QA任务上提升最大；BioBERTUMLS效果更微妙，表明基础模型已编码大量生物医学知识时收益递减。GraphRAG使LLaMA 3-8B在PubMedQA和BioASQ上分别提升超过3分和5分准确率，无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: 结构化知识注入对语言模型适应专业领域至关重要。持续预训练和GraphRAG是互补策略，GraphRAG特别适合需要透明、多跳推理和易于更新的知识访问场景。研究发布了处理的UMLS Neo4j图谱支持可复现性。

title: Non-Stationarity in the Embedding Space of Time Series Foundation Models
summary: Time series foundation models (TSFMs) are widely used as generic feature extractors, yet the notion of non-stationarity in their embedding spaces remains poorly understood. Recent work often conflates non-stationarity with distribution shift, blurring distinctions fundamental to classical time-series analysis and long-standing methodologies such as statistical process control (SPC). In SPC, non-stationarity signals a process leaving a stable regime - via shifts in mean, variance, or emerging trends - and detecting such departures is central to quality monitoring and change-point analysis. Motivated by this diagnostic tradition, we study how different forms of distributional non-stationarity - mean shifts, variance changes, and linear trends - become linearly accessible in TSFM embedding spaces under controlled conditions. We further examine temporal non-stationarity arising from persistence, which reflects violations of weak stationarity due to long-memory or near-unit-root behavior rather than explicit distributional shifts. By sweeping shift strength and probing multiple TSFMs, we find that embedding-space detectability of non-stationarity degrades smoothly and that different models exhibit distinct, model-specific failure modes.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了时间序列基础模型嵌入空间中非平稳性的可检测性，区分了分布非平稳性（均值漂移、方差变化、线性趋势）和时间非平稳性（持续性），发现不同模型在检测非平稳性方面存在特定失败模式。
AI.motivation: 当前时间序列基础模型作为通用特征提取器被广泛使用，但其嵌入空间中的非平稳性概念理解不足。现有研究常将非平稳性与分布漂移混为一谈，而统计过程控制等经典方法中，非平稳性标志着过程离开稳定状态。受此诊断传统启发，研究不同形式的非平稳性在TSFM嵌入空间中的线性可检测性。
AI.method: 在受控条件下研究分布非平稳性（均值漂移、方差变化、线性趋势）在TSFM嵌入空间中的线性可访问性；同时研究时间非平稳性（持续性），反映弱平稳性因长记忆或近单位根行为的违反；通过扫描漂移强度并探测多个TSFM模型进行分析。
AI.result: 嵌入空间对非平稳性的可检测性平滑下降；不同模型表现出特定于模型本身的失败模式；不同形式的非平稳性在嵌入空间中的可检测性存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 时间序列基础模型在检测非平稳性方面存在局限性，不同模型有特定的失败模式，这为理解TSFM嵌入空间的特性提供了重要见解，对质量监控和变点分析应用有实际意义。

title: A Lightweight Transformer for Pain Recognition from Brain Activity
summary: Pain is a multifaceted and widespread phenomenon with substantial clinical and societal burden, making reliable automated assessment a critical objective. This paper presents a lightweight transformer architecture that fuses multiple fNIRS representations through a unified tokenization mechanism, enabling joint modeling of complementary signal views without requiring modality-specific adaptations or increasing architectural complexity. The proposed token-mixing strategy preserves spatial, temporal, and time-frequency characteristics by projecting heterogeneous inputs onto a shared latent representation, using a structured segmentation scheme to control the granularity of local aggregation and global interaction. The model is evaluated on the AI4Pain dataset using stacked raw waveform and power spectral density representations of fNIRS inputs. Experimental results demonstrate competitive pain recognition performance while remaining computationally compact, making the approach suitable for real-time inference on both GPU and CPU hardware.

AI.tldr: 提出轻量级Transformer架构，通过统一标记化机制融合多种fNIRS表示，实现疼痛识别，保持计算紧凑性适合实时推理。
AI.motivation: 疼痛是普遍且临床负担重的现象，需要可靠的自动化评估方法。现有方法在处理多模态fNIRS信号时存在架构复杂或需要特定适配的问题。
AI.method: 采用轻量级Transformer架构，通过统一标记化机制融合多种fNIRS表示（原始波形和功率谱密度）。使用结构化分割方案控制局部聚合和全局交互的粒度，将异构输入投影到共享潜在表示。
AI.result: 在AI4Pain数据集上评估，实验结果显示具有竞争力的疼痛识别性能，同时保持计算紧凑性，适合GPU和CPU硬件的实时推理。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能够有效融合互补的fNIRS信号视图，无需特定模态适配或增加架构复杂性，为实时疼痛评估提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Debate as Reward: A Multi-Agent Reward System for Scientific Ideation via RL Post-Training
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated potential in automating scientific ideation, yet current approaches relying on iterative prompting or complex multi-agent architectures often suffer from hallucination or computational inefficiency. A critical bottleneck in applying Reinforcement Learning (RL) to this open-ended domain is reward hacking -- where models exploit imperfect evaluation proxies to maximize scores without producing genuine scientific innovation. To address these limitations, we propose an RL framework explicitly tailored for high-quality scientific idea generation. We propose the first multi-agent reward function designed to serve as a judge, decoupling methodological validation from implementation details while providing strict binary rewards that are robust to reward hacking. To effectively optimize against this sparse signal, we utilize an unbiased variant of Group Relative Policy Optimization to mitigate artificial length bias. We grounded our training in ICLR-320, a curated dataset of problem-solution pairs extracted from ICLR 2024 proceedings. Experiments demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across expert-evaluated metrics of novelty, feasibility, and effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个针对高质量科学创意生成的强化学习框架，通过多智能体奖励函数和抗奖励攻击机制，在ICLR-320数据集上显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在科学创意生成中存在幻觉和计算效率低的问题，而强化学习在该开放领域面临奖励攻击的瓶颈——模型会利用不完善的评估代理来最大化分数，而非产生真正的科学创新。
AI.method: 1) 提出首个多智能体奖励函数作为评判者，将方法验证与实现细节解耦，提供严格的二元奖励以抵抗奖励攻击；2) 使用无偏的Group Relative Policy Optimization变体来缓解人工长度偏差；3) 在ICLR-320数据集（从ICLR 2024会议论文中提取的问题-解决方案对）上进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在专家评估的新颖性、可行性和有效性指标上显著优于最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的强化学习框架通过专门的奖励设计和优化策略，有效解决了科学创意生成中的奖励攻击问题，能够产生更高质量的科学创新想法。

title: HalluSAE: Detecting Hallucinations in Large Language Models via Sparse Auto-Encoders
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are powerful and widely adopted, but their practical impact is limited by the well-known hallucination phenomenon. While recent hallucination detection methods have made notable progress, we find most of them overlook the dynamic nature and underlying mechanisms of it. To address this gap, we propose HalluSAE, a phase transition-inspired framework that models hallucination as a critical shift in the model's latent dynamics. By modeling the generation process as a trajectory through a potential energy landscape, HalluSAE identifies critical transition zones and attributes factual errors to specific high-energy sparse features. Our approach consists of three stages: (1) Potential Energy Empowered Phase Zone Localization via sparse autoencoders and a geometric potential energy metric; (2) Hallucination-related Sparse Feature Attribution using contrastive logit attribution; and (3) Probing-based Causal Hallucination Detection through linear probes on disentangled features. Extensive experiments on Gemma-2-9B demonstrate that HalluSAE achieves state-of-the-art hallucination detection performance.

AI.tldr: HalluSAE：一个基于相变理论的幻觉检测框架，将大语言模型幻觉建模为潜在动态中的临界转变，通过稀疏自编码器和几何势能指标实现SOTA检测性能
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉检测方法大多忽视了幻觉的动态特性和底层机制，限制了实际应用效果。需要从动态系统角度理解幻觉的产生过程
AI.method: 提出三阶段框架：1) 基于稀疏自编码器和几何势能指标的相区定位；2) 使用对比对数归因的幻觉相关稀疏特征归因；3) 基于解耦特征的线性探针因果检测
AI.result: 在Gemma-2-9B模型上的大量实验表明，HalluSAE实现了最先进的幻觉检测性能
AI.conclusion: 将幻觉建模为潜在动态中的临界相变是有效的，HalluSAE框架为理解和检测大语言模型幻觉提供了新的理论视角和实用工具

title: The Consensus Trap: Rescuing Multi-Agent LLMs from Adversarial Majorities via Token-Level Collaboration
summary: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) architectures increasingly rely on response-level aggregation, such as Majority Voting (MAJ), to raise reasoning ceilings. However, in open environments, agents are highly susceptible to stealthy contextual corruption, such as targeted prompt injections. We reveal a critical structural vulnerability in current multi-agent systems: response-level aggregation collapses when corrupted agents form a local majority. Because voting aggregates fully-formed conclusions, it is blind to flawed intermediate logic. To overcome this systematic limitation, we propose the Token-Level Round-Robin (RR) Collaboration, where agents sequentially interleave generation within a shared auto-regressive context. We formalize this process as a discrete-time dynamical system, proving that token-level interleaving transitions aggregation from a brittle counting of final votes (a linear sum) to a dynamic, interwoven chain of logic (a non-linear operator product). Through this theoretical lens, we prove that the honest model's restorative pull can overpower adversarial corruptions, even when corrupted agents form a majority. We conduct an exhaustive empirical evaluation across diverse reasoning benchmarks and demonstrate that while MAJ collapses when corrupted agents reach a majority, RR maintains robust accuracy well beyond this critical threshold.

AI.tldr: 多智能体LLM系统存在结构性漏洞：当被腐蚀智能体形成局部多数时，基于响应级聚合（如多数投票）会崩溃。提出令牌级轮询协作方法，通过令牌级交错生成实现鲁棒推理。
AI.motivation: 当前多智能体LLM架构依赖响应级聚合（如多数投票）提升推理能力，但在开放环境中，智能体容易受到隐蔽的上下文腐蚀攻击（如针对性提示注入）。研究发现当被腐蚀智能体形成局部多数时，现有聚合方法会崩溃，因为投票只关注最终结论而忽略有缺陷的中间逻辑。
AI.method: 提出令牌级轮询协作方法：智能体在共享自回归上下文中顺序交错生成令牌。将其形式化为离散时间动力系统，证明令牌级交错将聚合从脆弱的最终投票计数（线性求和）转变为动态交织的逻辑链（非线性算子乘积）。
AI.result: 理论证明诚实模型的恢复力可以克服对抗性腐蚀，即使被腐蚀智能体形成多数。实证评估显示，当被腐蚀智能体达到多数时，多数投票方法崩溃，而轮询协作方法在超过临界阈值后仍保持鲁棒准确性。
AI.conclusion: 令牌级协作通过将聚合从响应级转移到令牌级，从根本上改变了多智能体系统的脆弱性结构，为对抗性环境中的鲁棒集体推理提供了新范式。

title: (Sparse) Attention to the Details: Preserving Spectral Fidelity in ML-based Weather Forecasting Models
summary: We introduce Mosaic, a probabilistic weather forecasting model that addresses two principal sources of spectral degradation in ML-based weather prediction: (1) deterministic training against ensemble means and (2) compressive encoding creating an information bottleneck. Mosaic generates ensemble members through learned functional perturbations and operates on native-resolution grids via block-sparse attention, a hardware-aligned mechanism that captures long-range dependencies at linear cost by sharing keys and values across spatially adjacent queries. At 1.5$°$ resolution with 214M parameters, Mosaic matches or outperforms models trained on 6 times finer data on headline upper-air variables and achieves state-of-the-art results among 1.5$°$ models, producing well-calibrated ensembles whose individual members exhibit near-perfect spectral alignment across all resolved frequencies. A 24-member, 10-day forecast takes under 12 seconds on a single H100 GPU.

AI.tldr: Mosaic是一个概率天气预测模型，通过功能扰动生成集合成员，使用块稀疏注意力在原生分辨率网格上运行，解决了ML天气预测中的谱退化问题。
AI.motivation: 解决基于机器学习的天气预测中两个主要的谱退化来源：1）针对集合均值的确定性训练；2）压缩编码造成的信息瓶颈。
AI.method: 通过学习的函数扰动生成集合成员，使用块稀疏注意力在原生分辨率网格上运行，通过空间相邻查询共享键和值以线性成本捕获长程依赖。
AI.result: 在1.5°分辨率下，Mosaic匹配或优于使用6倍精细数据训练的模型，在1.5°模型中达到最先进水平，产生校准良好的集合，其单个成员在所有解析频率上表现出近乎完美的谱对齐。
AI.conclusion: Mosaic是一个高效的天气预测模型，解决了ML天气预测中的谱退化问题，在单GPU上能快速生成高质量的集合预测。

title: LayerCache: Exploiting Layer-wise Velocity Heterogeneity for Efficient Flow Matching Inference
summary: Flow Matching models achieve state-of-the-art image generation quality but incur substantial inference cost due to iterative denoising through large Transformer networks. We observe that different layer groups within a Transformer exhibit markedly heterogeneous velocity dynamics: shallow layers are highly stable and amenable to aggressive caching, while deep layers undergo large velocity changes that demand full computation. Existing caching methods, however, treat the entire Transformer as a monolithic unit, applying a single caching decision per timestep and thus failing to exploit this heterogeneity. Based on this finding, we propose LayerCache, a layer-aware caching framework that partitions the Transformer into layer groups and makes independent, per-group caching decisions at each denoising step. LayerCache introduces an adaptive JVP span K selection mechanism that leverages per-group stability measurements to balance estimation accuracy and computational savings. We formulate a three-dimensional scheduling problem over timesteps, layer groups, and JVP span, and solve it with a greedy budget allocation algorithm. On Qwen-Image (1024x1024, 50 steps), LayerCache achieves PSNR 37.46 dB (+5.38 dB over MeanCache), SSIM 0.9834, and LPIPS 0.0178 (a 70% reduction over MeanCache) at 1.37x speedup, dominating all prior caching methods on the quality-speed Pareto frontier.

AI.tldr: LayerCache：针对Flow Matching模型的层感知缓存框架，通过分层缓存决策和自适应JVP跨度选择，在保持生成质量的同时显著提升推理速度。
AI.motivation: Flow Matching模型虽然生成质量优秀，但需要大型Transformer网络进行迭代去噪，推理成本高昂。现有缓存方法将整个Transformer视为单一单元，无法利用不同层组之间的速度动态异质性。
AI.method: 提出LayerCache框架：1) 将Transformer划分为层组；2) 在每个去噪步骤为每个层组独立做出缓存决策；3) 引入自适应JVP跨度K选择机制，利用层组稳定性测量平衡估计精度和计算节省；4) 通过贪婪预算分配算法解决三维调度问题（时间步、层组、JVP跨度）。
AI.result: 在Qwen-Image（1024x1024，50步）上，LayerCache达到PSNR 37.46 dB（比MeanCache提升5.38 dB），SSIM 0.9834，LPIPS 0.0178（比MeanCache减少70%），加速1.37倍，在所有现有缓存方法的质量-速度帕累托前沿上表现最优。
AI.conclusion: LayerCache通过利用Transformer层间的异质性动态，实现了更高效的缓存策略，在保持高质量图像生成的同时显著降低了Flow Matching模型的推理成本，为迭代生成模型的加速提供了新思路。

title: When Agents Go Quiet: Output Generation Capacity and Format-Cost Separation for LLM Document Synthesis
summary: LLM-powered coding agents suffer from a poorly understood failure mode we term output stalling: the agent silently produces empty responses when attempting to generate large, format-heavy documents. We present a theoretical framework that explains and prevents this failure through three contributions. (1) We introduce Output Generation Capacity (OGC), a formal measure of an agent's effective ability to produce output given its current context state - distinct from and empirically smaller than the raw context window. (2) We prove a Format-Cost Separation Theorem showing that deferred template rendering is always at least as token-efficient as direct generation for any format with overhead multiplier $μ_f > 1$, and derive tight bounds on the savings. (3) We formalize Adaptive Strategy Selection, a decision framework that maps the ratio of estimated output cost to available OGC into an optimal generation strategy (direct, chunked, or deferred). We validate the theory through controlled experiments across three models (Claude 3.5 Sonnet, GPT-4o, Llama 3.1 70B), four document types, and an ablation study isolating each component's contribution. Deferred rendering reduces LLM generation tokens by 48-72% across all conditions and eliminates output stalling entirely. We instantiate the framework as GEN-PILOT, an open-source MCP server, demonstrating that the theory translates directly into a practical tool.

AI.tldr: 论文提出输出停滞问题，引入输出生成容量概念，证明格式成本分离定理，并提出自适应策略选择框架，最终实现为GEN-PILOT工具，显著减少生成token并消除输出停滞。
AI.motivation: LLM驱动的编码代理存在输出停滞问题：在生成大型、格式密集文档时，代理会静默产生空响应。这个问题尚未被充分理解，需要理论框架来解释和预防。
AI.method: 1. 引入输出生成容量（OGC）作为代理在当前上下文状态下有效产生输出的形式化度量；2. 证明格式成本分离定理，显示延迟模板渲染总是比直接生成更token高效；3. 形式化自适应策略选择框架，根据估计输出成本与可用OGC的比率选择最优生成策略（直接、分块或延迟）。
AI.result: 在三个模型（Claude 3.5 Sonnet、GPT-4o、Llama 3.1 70B）和四种文档类型上的实验验证：延迟渲染在所有条件下减少LLM生成token 48-72%，完全消除输出停滞。消融研究分离了每个组件的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 提出的理论框架成功解释了输出停滞问题，并通过GEN-PILOT开源MCP服务器实现了实用工具，理论直接转化为实践解决方案。

title: SynopticBench: Evaluating Vision-Language Models on Generating Weather Forecast Discussions of the Future
comment: Accepted for presentation at Climate Informatics 2026
summary: Recent advances in visual-language models (VLMs) have led to significant improvements in a plethora of complex multimodal tasks like image captioning, report generation, and visual perception. However, generating text from meteorological data is highly challenging because the atmosphere is a chaotic system that is rapidly changing at various spatial and temporal scales. Given the complexity of atmospheric phenomena, it is critical to verifiably quantify the effectiveness of existing VLMs on weather forecasting data. In this work, we present SynopticBench, a high-quality dataset consisting of 1,367,041 text samples of Area Forecast Discussions created by the National Weather Service over the continental United States paired to images of 500mb geopotential height, 2 meter temperature, and 850mb wind velocity in weather forecasts. We also present Synoptic Phenomena Alignment and Coverage Evaluation (SPACE), a novel evaluation framework that can be used to effectively estimate the quality of text descriptions of synoptic weather phenomena. Extensive experiments on generating forecast discussions using state-of-the-art VLMs show the sensitivity of existing evaluation metrics in this domain and enable further exploration into synoptic weather and climate text generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SynopticBench数据集和SPACE评估框架，用于评估视觉语言模型在气象预报文本生成任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在多种多模态任务上取得了显著进展，但由于大气系统具有混沌性和多尺度变化的复杂性，从气象数据生成文本仍然极具挑战。需要可靠地量化现有VLMs在天气预报数据上的有效性。
AI.method:
1. 构建SynopticBench数据集：包含1,367,041个美国国家气象局发布的区域预报讨论文本样本，配对了500mb位势高度、2米温度和850mb风速的预报图像。
2. 提出SPACE评估框架：一种新颖的评估方法，用于有效估计对天气现象的文本描述质量。
AI.result: 使用最先进的视觉语言模型进行预报讨论生成的广泛实验表明，现有评估指标在该领域具有敏感性，并为天气和气候文本生成的进一步探索提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: SynopticBench数据集和SPACE评估框架为评估视觉语言模型在气象文本生成任务上的性能提供了高质量基准，揭示了现有评估指标的局限性，推动了天气和气候文本生成领域的研究。

title: LLM-Guided Strategy Synthesis for Scalable Equality Saturation
summary:
Equality saturation (EqSat) is a powerful optimization paradigm that compactly represents many equivalent programs in an e-graph and delays commitment until extraction selects a lowest-cost program. Making EqSat effective, therefore, requires not only domain-specific rewrite rules but also domain-specific strategies. Today, much of this strategy design is still manual, making it a major obstacle to automating e-graph-based compilers. Recent rule-synthesis frameworks can automatically infer large rewrite vocabularies from semantic specifications, but they also enlarge the rewrite space and further exacerbate e-graph explosion. Although large language models (LLMs) make automated strategy synthesis plausible, directly evolving backend code remains ineffective in practice. The search lacks reusable strategy abstractions and actionable feedback, and can easily trigger e-graph explosion or converge to poor designs.
  We present EggMind, an LLM-guided, end-to-end framework for synthesizing reusable EqSat strategies. At its core, EggMind introduces a domain-specific language, EqSatL, to represent EqSat strategies as explicit and inspectable artifacts. It then proposes an LLM-guided agentic workflow, equipped with novel techniques including proof-derived rewrite motif caching and tractability guidance, to search efficiently for high-quality strategies while keeping synthesis stable under e-graph growth. Evaluation shows that EggMind substantially improves the resource-quality trade-off on vectorization benchmarks, reducing final cost by 45.1% and peak RAM by 69.1% relative to full EqSat. We further show that the same methodology transfers effectively to an XLA-based tensor compiler, and demonstrate its practical potential in a logic-synthesis case study with augmented rewrite spaces.

AI.tldr: EggMind是一个LLM引导的端到端框架，用于合成可重用的等式饱和策略，通过领域特定语言EqSatL表示策略，并引入证明派生的重写模式缓存和可处理性指导等技术，显著提升向量化基准的资源-质量权衡。
AI.motivation: 等式饱和(EqSat)需要领域特定的重写规则和策略，但策略设计主要依赖人工，成为自动化e-graph编译器的障碍。现有规则合成框架虽然能自动推断大量重写词汇，但会扩大重写空间并加剧e-graph爆炸。LLM虽然使自动策略合成成为可能，但直接演化后端代码在实践中效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出EggMind框架：1) 引入领域特定语言EqSatL，将EqSat策略表示为明确可检查的工件；2) 设计LLM引导的智能工作流，包含证明派生的重写模式缓存和可处理性指导等新技术，在e-graph增长时保持合成稳定性；3) 高效搜索高质量策略。
AI.result: 在向量化基准测试中，EggMind显著改善了资源-质量权衡：相比完整EqSat，最终成本降低45.1%，峰值RAM减少69.1%。该方法还能有效迁移到基于XLA的张量编译器，并在增强重写空间的逻辑合成案例中展示实际潜力。
AI.conclusion: EggMind通过将EqSat策略形式化为可检查的工件，并采用LLM引导的智能工作流，成功解决了EqSat策略合成的自动化问题，显著提升了优化效果和资源效率，展示了在多种编译器场景中的适用性。

title: Dimensional Criticality at Grokking Across MLPs and Transformers
summary: Abrupt transitions between distinct dynamical regimes are a hallmark of complex systems. Grokking in deep neural networks provides a striking example -- an abrupt transition from memorization to generalization long after training accuracy saturates -- yet robust macroscopic signatures of this transition remain elusive. Here we introduce \textbf{TDU--OFC} (Thresholded Diffusion Update--Olami-Feder-Christensen), an offline avalanche probe that converts gradient snapshots into cascade statistics and extracts a \emph{macroscopic observable} -- the time-resolved effective cascade dimension $D(t)$ -- via grokking-aligned finite-size scaling. Across Transformers trained on modular addition and MLPs trained on XOR, we discover a localized dynamical crossing of the Gaussian diffusion baseline $D=1$ precisely at the generalization transition. The crossing direction is task-dependent: modular addition descends through $D=1$ (approaching from $D>1$), while XOR ascends (from $D<1$). This opposite-direction convergence is consistent with attraction toward a candidate shared critical manifold, rather than trivial residence near $D \approx 1$. Negative controls confirm this picture: ungrokked runs remain supercritical ($D>1$) and never enter the post-transition regime. In addition, avalanche distributions exhibit heavy tails and finite-size scaling consistent with the dimensional exponent extracted from $D(t)$. Shadow-probe controls ($α_{\mathrm{train}}=0$) confirm that $D(t)$ is non-invasive, and grokked trajectories diverge from ungrokked ones in $D(t)$ some $100$--$200$ epochs before the behavioral transition.

AI.tldr: 论文提出TDU-OFC方法，通过梯度快照分析深度神经网络中的grokking现象，发现泛化转变时会出现宏观可观测的维度交叉特征。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络中的grokking现象（从记忆到泛化的突然转变）缺乏稳健的宏观特征标记。研究者希望找到能够表征这种转变的宏观可观测指标。
AI.method: 提出TDU-OFC（阈值扩散更新-Olami-Feder-Christensen）离线雪崩探测方法，将梯度快照转换为级联统计量，并通过grokking对齐的有限尺寸标度提取时间分辨的有效级联维度D(t)。
AI.result: 在Transformer（模加法）和MLP（XOR）中发现，泛化转变时D(t)会局部交叉高斯扩散基线D=1。交叉方向任务相关：模加法从D>1下降通过D=1，XOR从D<1上升通过D=1。未grokked的运行保持超临界状态（D>1）。雪崩分布呈现重尾特征，与提取的维度指数一致。
AI.conclusion: TDU-OFC方法能够非侵入性地检测grokking转变，D(t)维度交叉是泛化转变的稳健宏观特征，表明存在共享的临界流形，而非简单的D≈1附近停留。

title: HQA-VLAttack: Towards High Quality Adversarial Attack on Vision-Language Pre-Trained Models
summary: Black-box adversarial attack on vision-language pre-trained models is a practical and challenging task, as text and image perturbations need to be considered simultaneously, and only the predicted results are accessible. Research on this problem is in its infancy, and only a handful of methods are available. Nevertheless, existing methods either rely on a complex iterative cross-search strategy, which inevitably consumes numerous queries, or only consider reducing the similarity of positive image-text pairs but ignore that of negative ones, which will also be implicitly diminished, thus inevitably affecting the attack performance. To alleviate the above issues, we propose a simple yet effective framework to generate high-quality adversarial examples on vision-language pre-trained models, named HQA-VLAttack, which consists of text and image attack stages. For text perturbation generation, it leverages the counter-fitting word vector to generate the substitute word set, thus guaranteeing the semantic consistency between the substitute word and the original word. For image perturbation generation, it first initializes the image adversarial example via the layer-importance guided strategy, and then utilizes contrastive learning to optimize the image adversarial perturbation, which ensures that the similarity of positive image-text pairs is decreased while that of negative image-text pairs is increased. In this way, the optimized adversarial images and texts are more likely to retrieve negative examples, thereby enhancing the attack success rate. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that HQA-VLAttack significantly outperforms strong baselines in terms of attack success rate.

AI.tldr: HQA-VLAttack：针对视觉语言预训练模型的黑盒对抗攻击框架，通过文本和图像两阶段攻击，在保证语义一致性的同时提升攻击成功率
AI.motivation: 当前针对视觉语言预训练模型的黑盒对抗攻击研究处于初级阶段，现有方法要么依赖复杂的迭代交叉搜索策略导致查询次数过多，要么只考虑降低正样本对的相似度而忽略负样本对，影响攻击性能
AI.method: 提出两阶段攻击框架：1）文本攻击阶段使用counter-fitting词向量生成替代词集，保证语义一致性；2）图像攻击阶段先通过层重要性引导策略初始化对抗样本，再利用对比学习优化图像对抗扰动，同时降低正样本对相似度并提高负样本对相似度
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验结果表明，HQA-VLAttack在攻击成功率方面显著优于现有强基线方法
AI.conclusion: HQA-VLAttack是一个简单有效的视觉语言预训练模型对抗攻击框架，能够生成高质量的对抗样本，显著提升攻击成功率，同时避免了现有方法的局限性

title: CT Open: An Open-Access, Uncontaminated, Live Platform for the Open Challenge of Clinical Trial Outcome Prediction
summary: Scientists have long sought to accurately predict outcomes of real-world events before they happen. Can AI systems do so more reliably? We study this question through clinical trial outcome prediction, a high-stakes open challenge even for domain experts. We introduce CT Open, an open-access, live platform that will run four challenge every year. Anyone can submit predictions for each challenge. CT Open evaluates those submissions on trials whose outcomes were not yet public at the time of submission but were made public afterwards. Determining if a trial's outcome is public on the internet before a certain date is surprisingly difficult. Outcomes posted on official registries may lag behind by years, while the first mention may appear in obscure articles. To address this, we propose a novel, fully automated decontamination pipeline that uses iterative LLM-powered web search to identify the earliest mention of trial outcomes. We validate the pipeline's quality and accuracy by human expert's annotations. Since CT Open's pipeline ensures that every evaluated trial had no publicly reported outcome when the prediction was made, it allows participants to use any methodology and any data source. In this paper, we release a training set and two time-stamped test benchmarks, Winter 2025 and Summer 2025. We believe CT Open can serve as a central hub for advancing AI research on forecasting real-world outcomes before they occur, while also informing biomedical research and improving clinical trial design. CT Open Platform is hosted at $\href{https://ct-open.net/}{https://ct-open.net/}$

AI.tldr: CT Open是一个用于临床试验结果预测的开放平台，通过自动化去污染流程确保预测评估的公正性，旨在推动AI在真实世界事件预测方面的研究。
AI.motivation: 科学家长期寻求准确预测真实世界事件的结果，临床试验结果预测是一个高风险且对领域专家都具有挑战性的任务。研究旨在探索AI系统是否能更可靠地进行此类预测。
AI.method: 创建CT Open开放平台，每年运行四次挑战赛。采用创新的自动化去污染流程，使用迭代的LLM驱动的网络搜索来识别试验结果的最早提及时间，确保评估时试验结果尚未公开。
AI.result: 发布了训练集和两个时间戳测试基准（Winter 2025和Summer 2025），验证了去污染流程的质量和准确性，并建立了可访问的平台（https://ct-open.net/）。
AI.conclusion: CT Open可作为推进AI在真实世界事件预测研究的中心枢纽，同时为生物医学研究和临床试验设计提供信息，参与者可使用任何方法和数据源进行预测。

title: EchoChain: A Full-Duplex Benchmark for State-Update Reasoning Under Interruptions
summary: Real-time voice assistants must revise task state when users interrupt mid-response, but existing spoken-dialog benchmarks largely evaluate turn-based interaction and miss this failure mode. We introduce EchoChain, a controlled benchmark for evaluating full-duplex state-update reasoning under mid-speech interruptions. EchoChain identifies three recurring failure patterns in post-interruption continuations: contextual inertia, interruption amnesia, and objective displacement. The benchmark generates scenario-driven conversations and injects interruptions at a standardized point relative to assistant speech onset, enabling controlled cross-model comparison. In a paired half-duplex control, total failures drop by 40.2% relative to interrupted runs, indicating that many errors are driven by state-update reasoning under interruption rather than task difficulty alone. Across evaluated real-time voice models, no system exceeds a 50% pass rate, showing substantial room for improvement in mid-generation state revision. EchoChain provides a reproducible benchmark for diagnosing state-update reasoning failures in full-duplex voice interaction.

AI.tldr: EchoChain是一个评估语音助手在用户中途打断时状态更新推理能力的基准测试，揭示了三种常见失败模式，现有系统表现不佳
AI.motivation: 现有语音对话基准主要评估轮次式交互，忽略了用户在中途打断时语音助手需要更新任务状态的失败模式，需要专门基准来评估这种全双工状态更新推理能力
AI.method: 引入EchoChain基准，生成场景驱动的对话并在助手语音开始后的标准化时间点注入打断，通过对比全双工和半双工控制组来评估状态更新推理能力
AI.result: 识别出三种失败模式：上下文惯性、打断遗忘和目标偏移；在半双工控制组中，总失败率比被打断组降低40.2%；所有评估的实时语音模型通过率都不超过50%
AI.conclusion: EchoChain为诊断全双工语音交互中的状态更新推理失败提供了可复现的基准，显示现有系统在中途打断时的状态更新能力有显著改进空间

title: SkillGraph: Self-Evolving Multi-Agent Collaboration with Multimodal Graph Topology
summary: Scaling vision-language models into Visual Multiagent Systems (VMAS) is hindered by two coupled issues. First, communication topologies are fixed before inference, leaving them blind to visual content and query context; second, agent reasoning abilities remain static during deployment. These issues reinforce each other: a rigid topology fails to leverage richer agent expertise, while static agents lack incentives to specialize for a given query. We address this with SkillGraph, a joint framework that evolves both agent expertise and communication topology. Within this framework, a Multimodal Graph Transformer (MMGT) encodes visual tokens, instruction semantics and active skill embeddings to predict a query-conditioned collaboration graph, replacing hand-crafted routing with dynamic, content-aware information flow. Complementing this, a Skill Designer distills and refines reasoning heuristics from failure cases, constructing a self-evolving multimodal Skill Bank. Crucially, updated skill embeddings are fed back into the MMGT, enabling the topology to adapt alongside capability growth. Experiments show that SkillGraph achieves consistent improvements across four benchmarks, five common MAS structures and four base models. Code is available at https://github.com/niez233/skillgraph.

AI.tldr: SkillGraph提出联合演化智能体专业能力和通信拓扑的框架，通过多模态图变换器预测查询条件化的协作图，以及技能设计师从失败案例提炼推理启发式，构建自演化的多模态技能库。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉多智能体系统存在两个耦合问题：通信拓扑在推理前固定，无法适应视觉内容和查询上下文；智能体推理能力在部署期间保持静态。这两个问题相互强化：刚性拓扑无法利用更丰富的智能体专业知识，而静态智能体缺乏针对特定查询专门化的动力。
AI.method: 提出SkillGraph框架：1) 多模态图变换器(MMGT)编码视觉标记、指令语义和活跃技能嵌入，预测查询条件化的协作图，实现动态、内容感知的信息流；2) 技能设计师从失败案例中提炼和精炼推理启发式，构建自演化的多模态技能库；3) 更新的技能嵌入反馈到MMGT，使拓扑能随能力增长而适应。
AI.result: 在四个基准测试、五种常见MAS结构和四个基础模型上，SkillGraph都实现了持续改进。
AI.conclusion: SkillGraph通过联合演化智能体专业能力和通信拓扑，解决了视觉多智能体系统中拓扑固定和智能体能力静态的问题，实现了动态、内容感知的协作，显著提升了系统性能。

title: Sampling for Quality: Training-Free Reward-Guided LLM Decoding via Sequential Monte Carlo
summary: We introduce a principled probabilistic framework for reward-guided decoding in large language models, addressing the limitations of standard decoding methods that optimize token-level likelihood rather than sequence-level quality. Our method defines a reward-augmented target distribution over complete sequences by combining model transition probabilities with prefix-dependent reward potentials. Importantly, the approach is training-free: it leaves model weights unchanged and instead modifies the inference distribution via reward potentials, with all gains arising purely from inference-time sampling. To sample from this distribution, we develop Sequential Monte Carlo algorithms, including a computationally efficient prefix-only variant and a lookahead variant whose intermediate targets match the exact marginals of the full sequence distribution. The framework also integrates resample-move updates with Metropolis-Hastings rejuvenation and supports block-wise generation, subsuming common decoding strategies such as temperature sampling and power-tempered objectives. Empirical results across three 7B models show significant gains. On code generation (HumanEval), our method improves base performance by up to 54.9% and surpasses the strongest sampling baselines by 9.1%-15.3%. On mathematical reasoning (MATH500), it achieves gains of up to 8.8%. Notably, it reaches 87.8% on HumanEval and 78.4% on MATH500 with Qwen2.5-7B, consistently outperforming the reinforcement learning method GRPO.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于概率框架的奖励引导解码方法，通过结合模型转移概率和奖励势能来定义序列级目标分布，无需训练即可在推理时提升大语言模型性能。
AI.motivation: 标准解码方法主要优化token级似然而非序列级质量，存在局限性。需要一种训练免费的方法，在不改变模型权重的情况下，通过推理时采样提升序列生成质量。
AI.method: 建立概率框架，定义奖励增强的目标分布，结合模型转移概率和前缀依赖的奖励势能。开发顺序蒙特卡洛算法，包括计算高效的前缀变体和前瞻变体，支持重采样-移动更新和块级生成。
AI.result: 在三个7B模型上验证：代码生成(HumanEval)提升达54.9%，超越最强基线9.1%-15.3%；数学推理(MATH500)提升达8.8%。Qwen2.5-7B在HumanEval达87.8%，MATH500达78.4%，均优于强化学习方法GRPO。
AI.conclusion: 该训练免费的奖励引导解码框架通过推理时采样显著提升大语言模型性能，为解码策略提供了统一的理论基础，在代码生成和数学推理任务上表现优异。

title: Semantically Stable Image Composition Analysis via Saliency and Gradient Vector Flow Fusion
summary: The reliable computational assessment of photographic composition requires features that are discriminative of spatial layout yet robust to semantic content. This paper proposes a low-level representation grounded in the assumption that composition can be understood as the flow of visual attention across geometric structure. We introduce VFCNet, which fuses saliency and edge information into a gradient vector flow (GVF) field. The model computes dual-stream GVF representations, integrates them via attention, and extracts multi-scale flow features with a DINOv3 backbone. VFCNet achieves state-of-the-art performance on the PICD benchmark (CDA-1: 0.683, CDA-2: 0.629), improving by 33.1\% and 36.1\% over the previous best method. We also show that a simple classifier on self-supervised DINOv3 features substantially outperforms more sophisticated, composition-specialized models. Code is available at https://github.com/ADadras/VFCNet

AI.tldr: VFCNet提出了一种基于视觉注意力流和几何结构的低层表示方法，通过融合显著性和边缘信息到梯度向量流场中，在照片构图评估任务上取得了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 可靠的摄影构图计算评估需要既能区分空间布局又对语义内容具有鲁棒性的特征。传统方法难以同时满足这两个要求。
AI.method: 提出VFCNet模型，将显著性和边缘信息融合到梯度向量流(GVF)场中，计算双流GVF表示，通过注意力机制整合，并使用DINOv3骨干网络提取多尺度流特征。
AI.result: 在PICD基准测试上取得最先进性能（CDA-1: 0.683，CDA-2: 0.629），比之前最佳方法分别提升33.1%和36.1%。同时发现，基于自监督DINOv3特征的简单分类器显著优于更复杂的构图专用模型。
AI.conclusion: 基于视觉注意力流和几何结构的低层表示能有效评估摄影构图，且自监督视觉特征在构图分析任务上表现出色。

title: Why Training-Free Token Reduction Collapses: The Inherent Instability of Pairwise Scoring Signals
summary: Training-free token reduction methods for Vision Transformers (ToMe, ToFu, PiToMe, and MCTF) employ different scoring mechanisms, yet they share a closely matched cliff-like collapse at high compression. This paper explains \emph{why}. We develop a diagnostic framework with two tools, ranking consistency $ρ_s$ and off-diagonal correlation $ρ_\text{off}$, that decomposes the collapse into (1)a signal-agnostic error amplifier inherent to layer-wise reduction, predicting convex Pareto curves and $r_{\text{crit}} \propto 1/L$; and (2)shared reliance on \emph{pairwise} similarity signals whose ranking consistency degrades from $ρ_s{=}0.88$ to $0.27$ in deep layers. Pairwise rankings are inherently unstable ($O(N_p^2)$ joint perturbations) while unary signals enjoy greater stability ($O(N_p)$ perturbations, CLT). From three design principles derived from this diagnosis, we construct CATIS as a constructive validation: unary signals raise the trigger threshold, triage suppresses the gain. On ViT-Large at 63% FLOPs reduction, CATIS retains 96.9% of vanilla accuracy (81.0%) on ImageNet-1K where all baselines collapse to 43--65%.

AI.tldr: 本文解释了为什么无训练token缩减方法在高压縮时会突然崩溃，提出了诊断框架和设计原则，并构建了CATIS方法来解决这个问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的无训练token缩减方法（如ToMe、ToFu、PiToMe、MCTF）虽然采用不同的评分机制，但在高压縮时都会出现类似的突然崩溃现象。本文旨在解释这种现象的根本原因。
AI.method: 开发了一个诊断框架，包含两个工具：排序一致性ρ_s和对角线外相关性ρ_off。该框架将崩溃分解为：(1)层间缩减固有的信号无关误差放大器；(2)对成对相似性信号的共同依赖。基于诊断结果，提出了三个设计原则，并构建了CATIS方法作为验证。
AI.result: 在ViT-Large上，当FLOPs减少63%时，CATIS在ImageNet-1K上保持了96.9%的原始准确率（81.0%），而所有基线方法都崩溃到43-65%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 无训练token缩减方法的崩溃源于层间缩减固有的误差放大效应和对不稳定的成对相似性信号的依赖。通过采用单变量信号和分流机制，可以显著提高方法的鲁棒性和性能。

title: Revisiting a Pain in the Neck: A Semantic Reasoning Benchmark for Language Models
summary: We present SemanticQA, an evaluation suite designed to assess language models (LMs) in semantic phrase processing tasks. The benchmark consolidates existing multiword expression (MwE) resources and reorganizes them into a unified testbed. It covers both general lexical phenomena, such as lexical collocations, and three fine-grained categories: idiomatic expressions, noun compounds, and verbal constructions. Through SemanticQA, we assess LMs of diverse architectures and scales in extraction, classification, and interpretation tasks, as well as sequential task compositions. We reveal substantial performance variation, particularly on tasks requiring semantic reasoning, highlighting differences in reasoning efficacy and semantic understanding of LMs, providing insights for pushing LMs with stronger comprehension on non-trivial semantic phrases. The evaluation harness and data of SemanticQA are available at https://github.com/jacklanda/SemanticQA.

AI.tldr: SemanticQA是一个评估语言模型在语义短语处理任务中表现的基准测试套件，整合了多词表达资源，涵盖习语、名词复合词和动词结构等类别。
AI.motivation: 需要系统评估语言模型在语义短语处理方面的能力，特别是在需要语义推理的任务上，以了解不同模型在语义理解上的差异。
AI.method: 整合现有的多词表达资源，重新组织成统一的测试平台，涵盖提取、分类、解释等任务，并对不同架构和规模的语言模型进行评估。
AI.result: 发现语言模型在需要语义推理的任务上表现差异显著，揭示了不同模型在推理效果和语义理解能力上的差异。
AI.conclusion: SemanticQA为评估语言模型在非平凡语义短语上的理解能力提供了重要工具，有助于推动语言模型在语义理解方面的进步。

title: SafeAgent: A Runtime Protection Architecture for Agentic Systems
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are vulnerable to prompt-injection attacks that propagate through multi-step workflows, tool interactions, and persistent context, making input-output filtering alone insufficient for reliable protection. This paper presents SafeAgent, a runtime security architecture that treats agent safety as a stateful decision problem over evolving interaction trajectories. The proposed design separates execution governance from semantic risk reasoning through two coordinated components: a runtime controller that mediates actions around the agent loop and a context-aware decision core that operates over persistent session state. The core is formalized as a context-aware advanced machine intelligence and instantiated through operators for risk encoding, utility-cost evaluation, consequence modeling, policy arbitration, and state synchronization. Experiments on Agent Security Bench (ASB) and InjecAgent show that SafeAgent consistently improves robustness over baseline and text-level guardrail methods while maintaining competitive benign-task performance. Ablation studies further show that recovery confidence and policy weighting determine distinct safety-utility operating points.

AI.tldr: SafeAgent是一个运行时安全架构，通过将智能体安全视为状态决策问题，分离执行治理与语义风险推理，在多步工作流中提供针对提示注入攻击的防护。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型智能体在多步工作流、工具交互和持久上下文中容易受到提示注入攻击，仅靠输入输出过滤不足以提供可靠保护，需要更全面的安全解决方案。
AI.method: 提出SafeAgent架构，包含两个协调组件：运行时控制器（在智能体循环中协调动作）和上下文感知决策核心（在持久会话状态上操作）。决策核心通过风险编码、效用成本评估、后果建模、策略仲裁和状态同步等算子实现。
AI.result: 在Agent Security Bench (ASB)和InjecAgent上的实验表明，SafeAgent相比基线方法和文本级护栏方法持续提高了鲁棒性，同时保持了竞争力的良性任务性能。消融研究显示恢复置信度和策略加权决定了不同的安全-效用操作点。
AI.conclusion: SafeAgent通过将智能体安全视为状态决策问题，提供了一种有效的运行时安全架构，能够在多步工作流中抵御提示注入攻击，同时平衡安全性和实用性。

title: Multi-Label Phase Diagram Prediction in Complex Alloys via Physics-Informed Graph Attention Networks
summary: Accurate phase equilibria are foundational to alloy design because they encode the underlying thermodynamics governing stability, transformations, and processing windows. However, while the CALculation of Phase Diagrams (CALPHAD) provides a rigorous thermodynamic framework, exploring multicomponent composition-temperature space remains computationally expensive and is typically limited to sparse section. To enable rapid phase mapping and alloy screening, we propose a physics-informed graph attention network (GAT) that learns element-aware representations and couples them with thermodynamic constraints for multi-label phase-set prediction in the Ag-Bi-Cu-Sn alloy system. Using about 25,000 equilibrium states generated with pycalphad, each composition-temperature point is represented as a four-node element graph with atomic fractions and elemental descriptors as node features. The model combines graph attention, global pooling, and a multilayer perceptron to predict nine relevant phases. To improve physical consistency, we incorporate thermodynamic constraints, applied as training penalties or as an inference-time projection. Across six binary and three ternary subsystems, the baseline model achieves a macro-F1 score of 0.951 and 93.98% exact-set match, while physics-informed decoding improves robustness and raises exact-set accuracy to about 96% on dense in-domain grids. The surrogate also generalizes to an unseen ternary section with 99.32% exact-set accuracy and to a quaternary section at 700 °C with 91.78% accuracy. These results demonstrate that attention-based graph learning coupled with thermodynamic constraint enforcement provides an effective and physically consistent surrogate for high-resolution phase mapping and extrapolative alloy screening.

AI.tldr: 提出基于图注意力网络（GAT）的物理信息机器学习模型，用于快速预测Ag-Bi-Cu-Sn合金系统的相图，结合热力学约束提高预测的物理一致性。
AI.motivation: CALPHAD方法虽然提供了严格的热力学框架，但在多组分成分-温度空间中计算成本高昂，通常只能进行稀疏截面分析。需要开发快速相图映射和合金筛选的替代方法。
AI.method: 使用物理信息图注意力网络（GAT），将每个成分-温度点表示为四节点元素图（原子分数和元素描述符作为节点特征）。模型结合图注意力、全局池化和多层感知机预测九个相关相，并通过训练惩罚或推理时投影引入热力学约束。
AI.result: 基线模型在六个二元和三个三元子系统中获得0.951的宏观F1分数和93.98%的精确集合匹配率。物理信息解码将密集域网格上的精确集合准确率提高到约96%。模型在未见三元截面上达到99.32%准确率，在700°C四元截面上达到91.78%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 基于注意力的图学习与热力学约束相结合，为高分辨率相图映射和外推合金筛选提供了有效且物理一致的替代模型。

title: Topology-Aware Layer Pruning for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in natural language understanding and reasoning, while recent extensions that incorporate visual inputs enable them to process multimodal information. Despite these advances, Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) incur substantial computational and memory costs, hindering deployment in resource-constrained scenarios. Existing layer pruning methods typically rely on local similarity metrics or static proxy signals, failing to capture the global and dynamic evolution of representations across model depth, which often leads to the removal of transition-critical layers. To address this limitation, we propose a topology-aware layer pruning framework for LVLMs. Specifically, we represent layer wise hidden states as point clouds and models their evolution using \textit{simplicial complexes}. By leveraging \textit{zigzag persistent homology}, we quantify inter-layer topological consistency and enable adaptive pruning that preserves critical representational transitions. Extensive experiments on diverse multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms existing pruning methods across a wide range of sparsity ratios. Our code is available at https://github.com/zpc456/TopoVLM.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于拓扑感知的层剪枝框架TopoVLM，用于大型视觉语言模型，通过持续同调分析层间拓扑一致性，实现自适应剪枝，在多种稀疏度下优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型计算和内存成本高，难以在资源受限场景部署。现有层剪枝方法依赖局部相似度或静态代理信号，无法捕捉表示在模型深度上的全局动态演化，常误删关键过渡层。
AI.method: 将层间隐藏状态表示为点云，使用单纯复形建模其演化过程。利用zigzag持续同调量化层间拓扑一致性，实现自适应剪枝，保留关键表示过渡。
AI.result: 在多样化多模态基准测试中，该框架在广泛的稀疏度范围内一致优于现有剪枝方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的拓扑感知层剪枝框架能有效降低大型视觉语言模型的计算成本，同时保持性能，为资源受限部署提供解决方案。

title: Don't Start What You Can't Finish: A Counterfactual Audit of Support-State Triage in LLM Agents
