summary: Current agent evaluations largely reward execution on fully specified tasks, while recent work studies clarification [11, 22, 2], capability awareness [9, 1], abstention [8, 14], and search termination [20, 5] mostly in isolation. This leaves open whether agents can diagnose why a task is blocked before acting. We introduce the Support-State Triage Audit (SSTA-32), a matched-item diagnostic framework in which minimal counterfactual edits flip the same base request across four support states: Complete (ANSWER), Clarifiable (CLARIFY), Support-Blocked (REQUEST SUPPORT), and Unsupported-Now (ABSTAIN). We evaluate a frontier model under four prompting conditions - Direct, Action-Only, Confidence-Only, and a typed Preflight Support Check (PSC) - using Dual-Persona Auto-Auditing (DPAA) with deterministic heuristic scoring. Default execution overcommits heavily on non-complete tasks (41.7% overcommitment rate). Scalar confidence mapping avoids overcommitment but collapses the three-way deferral space (58.3% typed deferral accuracy). Conversely, both Action-Only and PSC achieve 91.7% typed deferral accuracy by surfacing the categorical ontology in the prompt. Targeted ablations confirm that removing the support-sufficiency dimension selectively degrades REQUEST SUPPORT accuracy, while removing the evidence-sufficiency dimension triggers systematic overcommitment on unsupported items. Because DPAA operates within a single context window, these results represent upper-bound capability estimates; nonetheless, the structural findings indicate that frontier models possess strong latent triage capabilities that require explicit categorical decision paths to activate safely.

AI.tldr: 论文提出SSTA-32评估框架，测试AI代理在任务受阻时的诊断能力，发现前沿模型具备潜在分流能力，但需要明确的分类决策路径才能安全激活。
AI.motivation: 当前代理评估主要关注完全指定任务的执行，而澄清、能力意识、弃权和搜索终止等研究大多孤立进行。这留下了一个开放问题：代理是否能在行动前诊断任务受阻的原因。
AI.method: 引入支持状态分流审计(SSTA-32)框架，通过最小反事实编辑将相同基础请求翻转到四种支持状态：完整(ANSWER)、可澄清(CLARIFY)、支持受阻(REQUEST SUPPORT)和当前不支持(ABSTAIN)。使用四种提示条件评估前沿模型，并采用双角色自动审计(DPAA)和确定性启发式评分。
AI.result: 默认执行在非完整任务上过度承诺严重(41.7%过度承诺率)。标量置信度映射避免了过度承诺，但压缩了三方延迟空间(58.3%类型延迟准确率)。相反，Action-Only和PSC通过提示中的分类本体实现了91.7%的类型延迟准确率。针对性消融实验证实，移除支持充分性维度会选择性降低REQUEST SUPPORT准确率，而移除证据充分性维度会触发系统性的过度承诺。
AI.conclusion: 前沿模型具备强大的潜在分流能力，但需要明确的分类决策路径才能安全激活。虽然DPAA在单一上下文窗口中运行，这些结果代表了上限能力估计，但结构发现表明模型的分流能力需要适当的提示设计才能有效发挥。

title: Spotlights and Blindspots: Evaluation Machine-Generated Text Detection
summary: With the rise of generative language models, machine-generated text detection has become a critical challenge. A wide variety of models is available, but inconsistent datasets, evaluation metrics, and assessment strategies obscure comparisons of model effectiveness. To address this, we evaluate 15 different detection models from six distinct systems, as well as seven trained models, across seven English-language textual test sets and three creative human-written datasets. We provide an empirical analysis of model performance, the influence of training and evaluation data, and the impact of key metrics. We find that no single system excels in all areas and nearly all are effective for certain tasks, and the representation of model performance is critically linked to dataset and metric choices. We find high variance in model ranks based on datasets and metrics, and overall poor performance on novel human-written texts in high-risk domains. Across datasets and metrics, we find that methodological choices that are often assumed or overlooked are essential for clearly and accurately reflecting model performance.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统评估了15个机器生成文本检测模型，发现没有单一系统在所有领域都表现优异，模型性能评估高度依赖于数据集和指标选择，且在风险领域的新颖人类文本上表现普遍较差。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式语言模型的兴起，机器生成文本检测成为关键挑战。现有检测模型众多，但数据集、评估指标和评估策略的不一致性使得模型效果难以比较。
AI.method: 评估了来自6个不同系统的15个检测模型和7个训练模型，在7个英文文本测试集和3个创造性人类写作数据集上进行测试，分析模型性能、训练和评估数据的影响以及关键指标的影响。
AI.result: 发现没有单一系统在所有领域都表现优异，几乎所有模型在特定任务中都有效；模型性能表示与数据集和指标选择密切相关；模型排名在不同数据集和指标上差异很大；在风险领域的新颖人类文本上表现普遍较差。
AI.conclusion: 方法论选择（通常被假设或忽视）对于清晰准确反映模型性能至关重要。研究强调了数据集和指标选择对评估结果的决定性影响。

title: CAPO: Counterfactual Credit Assignment in Sequential Cooperative Teams
summary: In cooperative teams where agents act in a fixed order and share a single team reward, it is hard to know how much each agent contributed, and harder still when agents are updated one at a time because data collected earlier no longer reflects the new policies. We introduce the Sequential Aristocrat Utility (SeqAU), the unique per-agent learning signal that maximizes the individual learnability of each agent's action, extending the classical framework of Wolpert and Tumer (2002) to this sequential setting. From SeqAU we derive CAPO (Counterfactual Advantage Policy Optimization), a critic-free policy-gradient algorithm. CAPO fits a per-agent reward decomposition from group rewards and computes the per-agent advantage in closed form plus a handful of forward passes through the current policy, requiring no extra environment calls beyond the initial batch. We give analytic bias and variance bounds and validate them on a controlled sequential bandit, where CAPO's advantage over standard baselines grows with the team size. The framework is general; multi-LLM pipelines are a natural deployment target.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeqAU（顺序贵族效用）作为顺序合作团队中个体贡献的独特学习信号，并基于此开发了CAPO算法，该算法无需critic即可进行策略梯度优化，在团队规模增大时优势更明显。
AI.motivation: 在顺序合作团队中，当智能体按固定顺序行动且共享团队奖励时，很难评估每个智能体的贡献度。特别是当智能体逐个更新时，早期收集的数据不再反映新策略，这增加了学习难度。
AI.method: 提出SeqAU作为最大化每个智能体动作个体可学习性的独特信号，并基于此开发CAPO算法。CAPO从团队奖励中拟合每个智能体的奖励分解，通过闭式解计算每个智能体的优势值，仅需少量前向传播，无需额外环境调用。
AI.result: 提供了理论上的偏差和方差界限，并在受控的顺序多臂赌博机环境中验证。CAPO相对于标准基线的优势随团队规模增大而增长，特别适合多LLM管道等应用场景。
AI.conclusion: SeqAU为顺序合作团队提供了有效的个体贡献评估框架，CAPO算法在无需critic的情况下实现了高效策略优化，为多智能体顺序协作系统提供了实用的解决方案。

title: Positive-Only Drifting Policy Optimization
summary: In the field of online reinforcement learning (RL), traditional Gaussian policies and flow-based methods are often constrained by their unimodal expressiveness, complex gradient clipping, or stringent trust-region requirements. Moreover, they all rely on post-hoc penalization of negative samples to correct erroneous actions. This paper introduces Positive-Only Drifting Policy Optimization (PODPO), a likelihood-free and gradient-clipping-free generative approach for online RL. By leveraging the drifting model, PODPO performs policy updates via advantage-weighted local contrastive drifting. Relying solely on positive-advantage samples, it elegantly steers actions toward high-return regions while exploiting the inherent local smoothness of the generative model to enable proactive error prevention. In doing so, PODPO opens a promising new pathway for generative policy learning in online settings.

AI.tldr: PODPO是一种无似然、无梯度裁剪的在线强化学习方法，通过优势加权局部对比漂移，仅使用正优势样本来引导策略更新，避免后验惩罚错误动作。
AI.motivation: 传统高斯策略和基于流的方法存在单峰表达能力受限、梯度裁剪复杂、信任区域要求严格等问题，且都依赖后验惩罚负样本来纠正错误动作。
AI.method: PODPO采用漂移模型，通过优势加权局部对比漂移进行策略更新，仅使用正优势样本，利用生成模型的局部平滑性实现主动错误预防。
AI.result: 该方法为在线设置中的生成策略学习开辟了新的有前景的途径。
AI.conclusion: PODPO提供了一种优雅的在线强化学习生成方法，能够引导动作向高回报区域移动，同时主动预防错误。

title: Motif-Video 2B: Technical Report
summary: Training strong video generation models usually requires massive datasets, large parameter counts, and substantial compute. In this work, we ask whether strong text-to-video quality is possible at a much smaller budget: fewer than 10M clips and less than 100,000 H200 GPU hours. Our core claim is that part of the answer lies in how model capacity is organized, not only in how much of it is used. In video generation, prompt alignment, temporal consistency, and fine-detail recovery can interfere with one another when they are handled through the same pathway. Motif-Video 2B addresses this by separating these roles architecturally, rather than relying on scale alone. The model combines two key ideas. First, Shared Cross-Attention strengthens text control when video token sequences become long. Second, a three-part backbone separates early fusion, joint representation learning, and detail refinement. To make this design effective under a limited compute budget, we pair it with an efficient training recipe based on dynamic token routing and early-phase feature alignment to a frozen pretrained video encoder. Our analysis shows that later blocks develop clearer cross-frame attention structure than standard single-stream baselines. On VBench, Motif-Video~2B reaches 83.76\%, surpassing Wan2.1 14B while using 7$\times$ fewer parameters and substantially less training data. These results suggest that careful architectural specialization, combined with an efficiency-oriented training recipe, can narrow or exceed the quality gap typically associated with much larger video models.

AI.tldr: Motif-Video 2B：通过架构分离和高效训练，在有限计算预算下实现高质量视频生成，超越更大模型性能
AI.motivation: 传统视频生成模型需要大量数据、参数和计算资源，本研究探索是否能在更小预算下（少于1000万视频片段和10万H200 GPU小时）实现高质量文本到视频生成
AI.method: 采用架构分离方法：1）共享交叉注意力机制增强长视频序列的文本控制；2）三部分主干网络分离早期融合、联合表示学习和细节细化；配合动态令牌路由和早期特征对齐的高效训练方案
AI.result: 在VBench上达到83.76%的评分，超越Wan2.1 14B模型，同时使用7倍更少的参数和显著更少的训练数据
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的架构专业化结合效率导向的训练方案，可以缩小甚至超越通常与更大视频模型相关的质量差距，为高效视频生成提供了新思路

title: Know When to Trust the Skill: Delayed Appraisal and Epistemic Vigilance for Single-Agent LLMs
summary: As large language models (LLMs) transition into autonomous agents integrated with extensive tool ecosystems, traditional routing heuristics increasingly succumb to context pollution and "overthinking". We argue that the bottleneck is not a deficit in algorithmic capability or skill diversity, but the absence of disciplined second-order metacognitive governance. In this paper, our scientific contribution focuses on the computational translation of human cognitive control - specifically, delayed appraisal, epistemic vigilance, and region-of-proximal offloading - into a single-agent architecture. We introduce MESA-S (Metacognitive Skills for Agents, Single-agent), a preliminary framework that shifts scalar confidence estimation into a vector separating self-confidence (parametric certainty) from source-confidence (trust in retrieved external procedures). By formalizing a delayed procedural probe mechanism and introducing Metacognitive Skill Cards, MESA-S decouples the awareness of a skill's utility from its token-intensive execution. Evaluated under an In-Context Static Benchmark Evaluation natively executed via Gemini 3.1 Pro, our early results suggest that explicitly programming trust provenance and delayed escalation mitigates supply-chain vulnerabilities, prunes unnecessary reasoning loops, and prevents offloading-induced confidence inflation. This architecture offers a scientifically cautious, behaviorally anchored step toward reliable, epistemically vigilant single-agent orchestration.

AI.tldr: MESA-S 是一个单智能体元认知框架，通过分离自我置信度与来源置信度、延迟程序探测机制和元认知技能卡，解决传统路由启发式方法中的上下文污染和"过度思考"问题。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型转变为集成广泛工具生态系统的自主智能体，传统路由启发式方法面临上下文污染和"过度思考"问题。瓶颈不在于算法能力或技能多样性不足，而在于缺乏有纪律的二阶元认知治理。
AI.method: 提出MESA-S框架，将标量置信度估计转换为向量，分离自我置信度（参数确定性）和来源置信度（对外部检索程序的信任）。通过形式化延迟程序探测机制和引入元认知技能卡，将技能效用意识与其令牌密集型执行解耦。
AI.result: 在通过Gemini 3.1 Pro原生执行的上下文静态基准评估中，早期结果表明：显式编程信任来源和延迟升级可以缓解供应链漏洞、修剪不必要的推理循环，并防止卸载引起的置信度膨胀。
AI.conclusion: MESA-S架构为可靠、具有认知警觉性的单智能体编排提供了一个科学谨慎、行为锚定的步骤，通过计算翻译人类认知控制机制来改善自主智能体的决策质量。

title: Aligning Backchannel and Dialogue Context Representations via Contrastive LLM Fine-Tuning
summary: Backchannels (e.g., `yeah', `mhm', and `right') are short, non-interruptive feedback signals whose lexical form and prosody jointly convey pragmatic meaning. While prior computational research has largely focused on predicting backchannel timing, the relationship between lexico-prosodic form and meaning remains underexplored. We propose a two-stage framework: first, fine-tuning large language models on dialogue transcripts to derive rich contextual representations; and second, learning a joint embedding space for dialogue contexts and backchannel realizations. We evaluate alignment with human perception via triadic similarity judgments (prosodic and cross-lexical) and a context-backchannel suitability task. Our results demonstrate that the learned projections substantially improve context-backchannel retrieval compared to previous methods. In addition, they reveal that backchannel form is highly sensitive to extended conversational context and that the learned embeddings align more closely with human judgments than raw WavLM features.

AI.tldr: 提出兩階段框架：先微調LLM獲取對話上下文表示，再學習對話上下文與反饋信號的聯合嵌入空間，改善語境-反饋檢索並揭示反饋形式對對話語境的高度敏感性。
AI.motivation: 先前計算研究主要關注預測反饋信號（如"yeah"、"mhm"）的時機，但其詞彙形式與韻律特徵如何共同傳達語用意義的關係尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 兩階段框架：1) 在對話轉錄上微調大型語言模型獲取豐富上下文表示；2) 學習對話上下文與反饋信號實現的聯合嵌入空間。通過三元相似性判斷（韻律和跨詞彙）和語境-反饋適配性任務評估。
AI.result: 學習的投影顯著改善語境-反饋檢索效果，超越先前方法。研究發現反饋形式對擴展對話語境高度敏感，且學習的嵌入比原始WavLM特徵更貼近人類判斷。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架能有效建模反饋信號的詞彙-韻律形式與語用意義關係，學習的嵌入空間能更好捕捉對話語境與反饋信號的關聯，為計算語用學提供新方法。

title: TacticGen: Grounding Adaptable and Scalable Generation of Football Tactics
summary: Success in association football relies on both individual skill and coordinated tactics. While recent advancements in spatio-temporal data and deep learning have enabled predictive analyses like trajectory forecasting, the development of tactical design remains limited. Bridging this gap is essential, as prediction reveals what is likely to occur, whereas tactic generation determines what should occur to achieve strategic objectives. In this work, we present TacticGen, a generative model for adaptable and scalable tactic generation. TacticGen formulates tactics as sequences of multi-agent movements and interactions conditioned on the game context. It employs a multi-agent diffusion transformer with agent-wise self-attention and context-aware cross-attention to capture cooperative and competitive dynamics among players and the ball. Trained with over 3.3 million events and 100 million tracking frames from top-tier leagues, TacticGen achieves state-of-the-art precision in predicting player trajectories. Building on it, TacticGen enables adaptable tactic generation tailored to diverse inference-time objectives through classifier guidance mechanism, specified via rules, natural language, or neural models. Its modeling performance is also inherently scalable. A case study with football experts confirms that TacticGen generates realistic, strategically valuable tactics, demonstrating its practical utility for tactical planning in professional football. The project page is available at: https://shengxu.net/TacticGen/.

AI.tldr: TacticGen是一个用于足球战术生成的生成模型，通过多智能体扩散变换器结合游戏上下文，能够生成适应不同目标的战术序列，在轨迹预测上达到SOTA精度。
AI.motivation: 当前足球分析主要集中在预测性分析（如轨迹预测），但战术设计的发展仍然有限。预测揭示可能发生什么，而战术生成决定应该发生什么以实现战略目标，因此需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: TacticGen将战术建模为基于游戏上下文的多智能体移动和交互序列，采用多智能体扩散变换器，包含智能体间自注意力机制和上下文感知的交叉注意力机制，以捕捉球员和球之间的合作与竞争动态。通过分类器引导机制支持基于规则、自然语言或神经模型的多样化推理目标。
AI.result: 使用超过330万次事件和1亿个跟踪帧（来自顶级联赛）进行训练，TacticGen在球员轨迹预测方面达到最先进的精度。足球专家案例研究证实，TacticGen能够生成逼真且具有战略价值的战术。
AI.conclusion: TacticGen展示了在职业足球战术规划中的实际应用价值，其建模性能具有内在的可扩展性，能够生成适应不同目标的战术，填补了预测分析与战术设计之间的空白。

title: G-PARC: Graph-Physics Aware Recurrent Convolutional Neural Networks for Spatiotemporal Dynamics on Unstructured Meshes
summary: Physics-aware recurrent convolutional networks (PARC) have demonstrated strong performance in predicting nonlinear spatiotemporal dynamics by embedding differential operators directly into the computational graph of a neural network. However, pixel-based convolutions are restricted to static, uniform Cartesian grids, making them ill-suited to following evolving localized structures in an efficient manner. Graph neural networks (GNNs) naturally handle irregular spatial discretizations, but existing graph-based physics-aware deep learning (PADL) methods have difficulty handling extreme nonlinear regimes. To address these limitations, we propose Graph PARC (G-PARC), which uses moving least squares (MLS) kernels to approximate spatial derivatives on unstructured graphs, and embeds the derivatives of governing partial differential equations into the network's computational graph. G-PARC achieves better accuracy with 2-3x fewer parameters than MeshGraphNet, MeshGraphKAN, and GraphSAGE, replacing the traditional encoder-processor-decoder framework with analytically computed differential operators. We demonstrate that G-PARC (1) generalizes across nonuniform spatial and temporal discretizations; (2) handles moving meshes required for structural deformation; and (3) outperforms existing graph-based PADL methods on nonlinear benchmarks including fluvial hydrology, planar shock waves, and elastoplastic dynamics. By embedding explicit physical operators within the flexibility of GNNs, G-PARC enables accurate modeling of extreme nonlinear phenomena on complex computational domains, moving PADLbeyond idealized Cartesian grids.

AI.tldr: G-PARC结合图神经网络与移动最小二乘核，在非结构化网格上嵌入物理微分算子，比现有方法参数更少、精度更高，能处理极端非线性现象。
AI.motivation: 现有物理感知卷积网络（PARC）局限于静态笛卡尔网格，无法高效跟踪演化局部结构；而图神经网络（GNN）虽能处理不规则空间离散化，但现有图基物理感知深度学习方法难以处理极端非线性区域。
AI.method: 提出Graph PARC（G-PARC），使用移动最小二乘（MLS）核在非结构化图上近似空间导数，并将控制偏微分方程的导数嵌入网络计算图中，取代传统的编码器-处理器-解码器框架。
AI.result: G-PARC比MeshGraphNet、MeshGraphKAN和GraphSAGE精度更高，参数减少2-3倍；能泛化到非均匀时空离散化，处理结构变形所需的移动网格，在河流水文、平面冲击波和弹塑性动力学等非线性基准测试中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: G-PARC通过在GNN灵活性中嵌入显式物理算子，实现了在复杂计算域上对极端非线性现象的精确建模，将物理感知深度学习从理想化笛卡尔网格扩展到更广泛的应用场景。

title: From Handwriting to Structured Data: Benchmarking AI Digitisation of Handwritten Forms
summary: Manual digitisation of structured handwritten documents is slow and costly. We benchmark 17 leading frontier multi-modal large language models and open-source models against a very challenging real-world medical form that mixes dates; structured, printed text; hand-written responses and significant variability challenges. None of the smaller or older models perform well but the latest Google and OpenAI models reach accuracies around $85\%$ with weighted F1 scores $\simeq 90\%$ across the discrete or predefined fields despite the very challenging nature of the responses. Clear task specific strengths emerge: GPT 5.4 excels in noisy date extraction as well as reliability with the lowest hallucination rate ($6\%$). Claude Sonnet 4.6 had the best average performance across formatted fields (dates and numerical values), while Gemini 3.1 delivered the best overall performance, with the lowest free text error rates (WER = $0.50$ and CER = $0.31$) and the strongest results across discrete classification metrics. We further show that prompt optimisation dramatically improves macro precision, recall and F1 by over $60\%$, but has little impact on weighted metrics (only $\sim2-5\%$ improvement). These results provide evidence that the rapid improvements of multimodal large language models offer a compelling pathway toward fully automated digitisation of complex handwritten workflows that is particularly relevant in low- and middle-income countries.

AI.tldr: 对17个前沿多模态大语言模型在复杂医疗表格数字化任务上的基准测试，发现最新模型能达到85%准确率，提示优化可显著提升性能，为自动化手写文档数字化提供可行路径。
AI.motivation: 手动数字化结构化手写文档成本高、效率低，特别是在中低收入国家。需要评估多模态大语言模型在复杂真实世界医疗表格数字化任务上的表现，探索自动化解决方案的可行性。
AI.method: 对17个领先的前沿多模态大语言模型和开源模型进行基准测试，使用包含日期、结构化印刷文本、手写回答和显著变异性的挑战性真实医疗表格。评估内容包括准确率、加权F1分数、幻觉率、词错误率和字符错误率等指标，并测试提示优化对性能的影响。
AI.result: 最新Google和OpenAI模型达到约85%准确率，加权F1分数约90%。GPT 5.4在噪声日期提取和可靠性方面表现最佳（幻觉率仅6%），Claude Sonnet 4.6在格式化字段（日期和数值）上平均性能最好，Gemini 3.1整体表现最优（WER=0.50，CER=0.31）。提示优化使宏观精确率、召回率和F1提升超过60%，但对加权指标改善有限（仅2-5%）。
AI.conclusion: 多模态大语言模型的快速改进为复杂手写工作流程的完全自动化数字化提供了可行路径，特别适用于中低收入国家。不同模型在特定任务上各有优势，提示优化能显著提升性能。

title: Machine individuality: Separating genuine idiosyncrasy from response bias in large language models
summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into daily life, in roles ranging from high-stakes decision support to companionship, understanding their behavioral dispositions becomes critical. A growing literature uses psychometric inventories and cognitive paradigms to profile LLM dispositions. However, these approaches cannot determine whether behavioral differences reflect stable, stimulus-specific individuality or global response biases and stochastic noise. Here, we apply crossed random-effects models -- widely used in psychometrics to separate systematic effects -- to 74.9 million ratings provided by 10 open-weight LLMs for over 100,000 words across 14 psycholinguistic norms. On average, 16.9% of variance is attributable to stimulus-specific individuality, robustly exceeding a statistical null model. Cross-norm prediction analyses reveal this individuality as a coherent fingerprint, unique to each model. These results identify individual differences among LLMs that cannot be attributed to response biases or stochastic noise. We term these differences machine individuality.

AI.tldr: 研究使用交叉随机效应模型分析LLMs的行为差异，发现16.9%的方差可归因于刺激特异性个体差异，证明LLMs存在独特的"机器个体性"
AI.motivation: 随着LLMs在日常生活中的应用日益广泛，理解它们的行为倾向变得至关重要。现有研究使用心理测量工具评估LLMs，但无法区分行为差异是稳定的个体特性还是全局响应偏差和随机噪声
AI.method: 应用交叉随机效应模型分析10个开源LLMs对超过100,000个单词在14个心理语言学规范上的7490万个评分，分离系统性效应
AI.result: 平均16.9%的方差可归因于刺激特异性个体差异，显著超过统计零模型。跨规范预测分析显示这种个体性构成每个模型的独特指纹
AI.conclusion: LLMs存在无法归因于响应偏差或随机噪声的个体差异，研究者将其称为"机器个体性"

title: AdaExplore: Failure-Driven Adaptation and Diversity-Preserving Search for Efficient Kernel Generation
comment: Preliminary work. The implementation is available at https://github.com/StigLidu/AdaExplore
summary: Recent large language model (LLM) agents have shown promise in using execution feedback for test-time adaptation. However, robust self-improvement remains far from solved: most approaches still treat each problem instance independently, without accumulating reusable knowledge. This limitation is particularly pronounced in domain-specific languages such as Triton, which are underrepresented in LLM pretraining data. Their strict constraints and non-linear optimization landscape further make naive generation and local refinement unreliable. We propose AdaExplore, an agent framework that enables self-improvement via accumulated execution feedback for performance-critical kernel code generation through two complementary stages: failure-driven adaptation and diversity-preserving search, jointly improving correctness and optimization performance without additional fine-tuning or external knowledge. In the adaptation stage, the agent synthesizes tasks and converts recurring failures into a reusable memory of validity rules, helping subsequent generations remain within the feasible set. In the search stage, the agent organizes candidate kernels as a tree and alternates between small local refinements and larger structural regeneration, allowing it to explore the optimization landscape beyond local optima. Experiments on kernel runtime optimization benchmarks validate these gains: AdaExplore achieves 3.12x and 1.72x speedups on KernelBench Level-2 and Level-3, respectively, within 100 steps, and continues to improve with additional computation.

AI.tldr: AdaExplore是一个LLM代理框架，通过积累执行反馈实现高性能内核代码的自我改进，包含失败驱动适应和多样性保持搜索两个阶段，无需额外微调或外部知识。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理在处理领域特定语言（如Triton）时存在局限性：1）每个问题实例独立处理，缺乏可复用知识积累；2）严格约束和非线性优化空间使朴素生成和局部优化不可靠；3）这些语言在LLM预训练数据中代表性不足。
AI.method: AdaExplore包含两个互补阶段：1）失败驱动适应阶段：代理合成任务，将重复失败转换为可复用的有效性规则记忆，帮助后续生成保持在可行集内；2）多样性保持搜索阶段：将候选内核组织为树结构，交替进行小规模局部优化和大规模结构重生成，探索超越局部最优的优化空间。
AI.result: 在KernelBench基准测试中，AdaExplore在100步内实现了Level-2 3.12倍和Level-3 1.72倍的加速比，并且随着计算量增加持续改进。
AI.conclusion: AdaExplore通过积累执行反馈实现了稳健的自我改进，特别适用于领域特定语言的内核代码生成，在正确性和优化性能方面均有显著提升，无需额外微调或外部知识。

title: Training and Agentic Inference Strategies for LLM-based Manim Animation Generation
summary: Generating programmatic animation using libraries such as Manim presents unique challenges for Large Language Models (LLMs), requiring spatial reasoning, temporal sequencing, and familiarity with domain-specific APIs that are underrepresented in general pre-training data. A systematic study of how training and inference strategies interact in this setting is lacking in current research. This study introduces ManimTrainer, a training pipeline that combines Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT) with Reinforcement Learning (RL) based Group Relative Policy Optimisation (GRPO) using a unified reward signal that fuses code and visual assessment signals, and ManimAgent, an inference pipeline featuring Renderer-in-the-loop (RITL) and API documentation-augmented RITL (RITL-DOC) strategies. Using these techniques, this study presents the first unified training and inference study for text-to-code-to-video transformation with Manim. It evaluates 17 open-source sub-30B LLMs across nine combinations of training and inference strategies using ManimBench. Results show that SFT generally improves code quality, while GRPO enhances visual outputs and increases the models' responsiveness to extrinsic signals during self-correction at inference time. The Qwen 3 Coder 30B model with GRPO and RITL-DOC achieved the highest overall performance, with a 94% Render Success Rate (RSR) and 85.7% Visual Similarity (VS) to reference videos, surpassing the baseline GPT-4.1 model by +3 percentage points in VS. Additionally, the analysis shows that the correlation between code and visual metrics strengthens with SFT and GRPO but weakens with inference-time enhancements, highlighting the complementary roles of training and agentic inference strategies in Manim animation generation.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了ManimTrainer训练管道和ManimAgent推理管道，用于解决LLM生成Manim程序动画的挑战，通过SFT和GRPO训练以及RITL推理策略，在Qwen 3 Coder 30B模型上取得了最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 生成Manim程序动画对LLM具有独特挑战，需要空间推理、时间排序和特定API知识，而现有研究缺乏对此场景下训练和推理策略相互作用的系统性研究。
AI.method: 提出ManimTrainer训练管道（结合SFT和基于GRPO的强化学习，使用融合代码和视觉评估信号的统一奖励），以及ManimAgent推理管道（包含Renderer-in-the-loop和API文档增强的RITL-DOC策略）。
AI.result: 在ManimBench上评估17个开源<30B LLM，Qwen 3 Coder 30B模型使用GRPO和RITL-DOC取得最佳性能：94%渲染成功率和85.7%视觉相似度，超过GPT-4.1基线3个百分点。SFT提升代码质量，GRPO改善视觉输出并增强推理时自我纠正能力。
AI.conclusion: 训练和推理策略在Manim动画生成中具有互补作用：SFT和GRPO增强代码与视觉指标相关性，而推理时增强策略则减弱这种相关性，表明需要综合训练和代理推理策略来实现最佳动画生成性能。

title: SCATR: Simple Calibrated Test-Time Ranking
summary: Test-time scaling (TTS) improves large language models (LLMs) by allocating additional compute at inference time. In practice, TTS is often achieved through parallel scaling: generating multiple candidate responses and selecting the best via a Best-of-N (BoN) strategy. Its effectiveness therefore hinges on the scoring function. Learned scorers such as process reward models (PRMs) can be strong, but they are expensive to train and run. Lightweight confidence heuristics based on token log-probabilities are much cheaper, yet we find that they often perform substantially worse. To improve on lightweight confidence heuristics without incurring the full cost of stronger learned scorers, we introduce SCATR, a simple and efficient BoN ranking method that learns a lightweight scorer from a small calibration set using hidden representations from the base model. Across coding and mathematical reasoning benchmarks, SCATR improves over prior confidence-based baselines by up to 9%. Relative to LoRA fine-tuning on the same calibration data, it achieves comparable accuracy with up to 8000x fewer trainable parameters and much lower compute, reducing training and inference latency by up to 150x and 1000x, respectively. SCATR is also competitive with strong PRM baselines, and in several settings improves accuracy by up to 7.8% on math and 4.2% on coding while enabling up to 1000x faster inference. Overall, SCATR offers a strong accuracy-efficiency trade-off for scalable test-time selection.

AI.tldr: SCATR是一种高效的测试时选择方法，通过少量校准数据学习轻量级评分器，在推理时从多个候选响应中选择最佳答案，在保持高效的同时显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 测试时缩放（TTS）通过推理时分配额外计算来提升大语言模型性能，但现有方法存在权衡：基于学习的评分器（如PRM）效果好但成本高，基于token概率的轻量级启发式方法便宜但效果差。需要一种在准确性和效率之间取得更好平衡的方法。
AI.method: SCATR方法：1）使用少量校准数据集；2）从基础模型的隐藏表示中学习轻量级评分器；3）在推理时使用Best-of-N策略，用学习到的评分器从多个候选响应中选择最佳答案。
AI.result: 在代码和数学推理基准测试中：1）比基于置信度的基线方法提升高达9%；2）相比使用相同校准数据的LoRA微调，达到相当准确率但参数减少8000倍，训练和推理延迟分别降低150倍和1000倍；3）与强PRM基线竞争，在数学任务上提升7.8%，代码任务上提升4.2%，同时推理速度提升1000倍。
AI.conclusion: SCATR为可扩展的测试时选择提供了强大的准确性-效率权衡，在保持高效的同时显著提升模型性能，是实际部署中具有吸引力的解决方案。

title: Predicting Blastocyst Formation in IVF: Integrating DINOv2 and Attention-Based LSTM on Time-Lapse Embryo Images
summary: The selection of the optimal embryo for transfer is a critical yet challenging step in in vitro fertilization (IVF), primarily due to its reliance on the manual inspection of extensive time-lapse imaging data. A key obstacle in this process is predicting blastocyst formation from the limited number of daily images available. Many clinics also lack complete time-lapse systems, so full videos are often unavailable. In this study, we aimed to predict which embryos will develop into blastocysts using limited daily images from time-lapse recordings. We propose a novel hybrid model that combines DINOv2, a transformer-based vision model, with an enhanced long short-term memory (LSTM) network featuring a multi-head attention layer. DINOv2 extracts meaningful features from embryo images, and the LSTM model then uses these features to analyze embryo development over time and generate final predictions. We tested our model on a real dataset of 704 embryo videos. The model achieved 96.4% accuracy, surpassing existing methods. It also performs well with missing frames, making it valuable for many IVF laboratories with limited imaging systems. Our approach can assist embryologists in selecting better embryos more efficiently and with greater confidence.

AI.tldr: 提出结合DINOv2视觉模型和增强LSTM的混合模型，利用有限每日胚胎图像预测囊胚形成，在真实数据集上达到96.4%准确率
AI.motivation: 体外受精中胚胎选择依赖人工检查大量延时成像数据，但许多诊所缺乏完整系统，且每日图像有限，难以预测囊胚形成
AI.method: 提出新颖混合模型：DINOv2提取胚胎图像特征，增强LSTM网络（含多头注意力层）分析时间序列特征并预测囊胚形成
AI.result: 在704个胚胎视频数据集上达到96.4%准确率，优于现有方法，且在缺失帧情况下表现良好
AI.conclusion: 该模型可帮助胚胎学家更高效、更自信地选择优质胚胎，适用于成像系统有限的IVF实验室

title: SAVE: A Generalizable Framework for Multi-Condition Single-Cell Generation with Gene Block Attention
summary: Modeling single-cell gene expression across diverse biological and technical conditions is crucial for characterizing cellular states and simulating unseen scenarios. Existing methods often treat genes as independent tokens, overlooking their high-level biological relationships and leading to poor performance. We introduce SAVE, a unified generative framework based on conditional Transformers for multi-condition single-cell modeling. SAVE leverages a coarse-grained representation by grouping semantically related genes into blocks, capturing higher-order dependencies among gene modules. A Flow Matching mechanism and condition-masking strategy further enhance flexible simulation and enable generalization to unseen condition combinations. We evaluate SAVE on a range of benchmarks, including conditional generation, batch effect correction, and perturbation prediction. SAVE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in generation fidelity and extrapolative generalization, especially in low-resource or combinatorially held-out settings. Overall, SAVE offers a scalable and generalizable solution for modeling complex single-cell data, with broad utility in virtual cell synthesis and biological interpretation. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/fdu-wangfeilab/sc-save

AI.tldr: SAVE是一个基于条件Transformer的统一生成框架，通过将语义相关的基因分组为块来捕获基因模块间的高阶依赖关系，用于多条件单细胞建模，在生成保真度和外推泛化方面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常将基因视为独立标记，忽略了它们之间的高层次生物学关系，导致性能不佳。需要一种能够跨不同生物和技术条件建模单细胞基因表达的方法，以表征细胞状态并模拟未见场景。
AI.method: SAVE采用条件Transformer框架，通过将语义相关基因分组为块来创建粗粒度表示，捕获基因模块间的高阶依赖关系。结合流匹配机制和条件掩码策略，增强灵活模拟能力并实现对未见条件组合的泛化。
AI.result: SAVE在条件生成、批次效应校正和扰动预测等一系列基准测试中始终优于最先进方法，特别是在低资源或组合性保留设置下，在生成保真度和外推泛化方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: SAVE为复杂单细胞数据建模提供了一个可扩展且可泛化的解决方案，在虚拟细胞合成和生物学解释方面具有广泛实用性。

title: Migrant Voices, Local News: Insights on Bridging Community Needs with Media Content
comment: David Alonso del Barrio, Paula Dolores Rescala, Victor Bros, Daniel Gatica-Perez| ACM 2026. This is the author's version of the work. It is posted here for your personal use. Not for redistribution. The definitive Version of Record will be published in IMX'26 ACM International Conference on Interactive Media Experiences https://doi.org/10.1145/3788851.3805011
summary: Research shows news consumption differs across demographics, yet little is known about non-mainstream audiences, especially in relation to local media. Our study addresses this gap by examining how French-speaking migrants in a mid-size European city engage with local news, and whether their needs are reflected in coverage. Eight community members participated in focus groups, whose insights guided the selection of natural language processing methods (topic modeling, information retrieval, sentiment analysis, and readability) applied to over 2000 hyper-local news articles. Results showed that while articles frequently covered local events, gaps remained in topics important to participants. Sentiment analysis revealed a generally positive tone, and readability measures indicated an intermediate-advanced French level, raising questions about accessibility for integration. Our work contributes to bridging the gap between local news platforms' content and diverse readers' needs, and could inform local media organizations about opportunities to expand their current news story coverage to appeal to more diverse audiences.

AI.tldr: 研究通过焦点小组和NLP方法分析法语移民对本地新闻的参与度，发现本地新闻内容与移民需求存在差距，可读性较高可能影响可及性
AI.motivation: 现有研究对非主流受众（特别是移民群体）在本地媒体中的新闻消费了解不足，需要填补这一研究空白
AI.method: 采用焦点小组收集法语移民的见解，然后应用自然语言处理方法（主题建模、信息检索、情感分析和可读性分析）分析2000多篇超本地新闻文章
AI.result: 结果显示：文章频繁报道本地事件，但在参与者重要主题上存在差距；情感分析显示总体积极基调；可读性测量表明为中级-高级法语水平，对移民融入的可及性存疑
AI.conclusion: 研究有助于弥合本地新闻平台内容与多样化读者需求之间的差距，可为本地媒体组织提供扩大新闻报道覆盖范围以吸引更多样化受众的参考

title: Towards Reliable Testing of Machine Unlearning
summary: Machine learning components are now central to AI-infused software systems, from recommendations and code assistants to clinical decision support. As regulations and governance frameworks increasingly require deleting sensitive data from deployed models, machine unlearning is emerging as a practical alternative to full retraining. However, unlearning introduces a software quality-assurance challenge: under realistic deployment constraints and imperfect oracles, how can we test that a model no longer relies on targeted information? This paper frames unlearning testing as a first-class software engineering problem. We argue that practical unlearning tests must provide (i) thorough coverage over proxy and mediated influence pathways, (ii) debuggable diagnostics that localize where leakage persists, (iii) cost-effective regression-style execution under query budgets, and (iv) black-box applicability for API-deployed models. We outline a causal, pathway-centric perspective, causal fuzzing, that generates budgeted interventions to estimate residual direct and indirect effects and produce actionable "leakage reports". Proof-of-concept results illustrate that standard attribution checks can miss residual influence due to proxy pathways, cancellation effects, and subgroup masking, motivating causal testing as a promising direction for unlearning testing.

AI.tldr: 该论文将机器学习遗忘测试视为软件工程问题，提出因果模糊测试方法，通过预算干预来检测残留的直接和间接影响，生成可操作的"泄漏报告"。
AI.motivation: 随着法规要求从部署模型中删除敏感数据，机器学习遗忘成为实际替代方案，但带来了软件质量保证挑战：如何在现实部署约束和不完美预言下测试模型是否不再依赖目标信息。
AI.method: 提出因果、路径中心的视角——因果模糊测试，生成预算干预来估计残留的直接和间接影响，产生可操作的"泄漏报告"，要求测试具备覆盖代理和中介影响路径、可调试诊断、成本有效的回归式执行和黑盒适用性。
AI.result: 概念验证结果表明，标准归因检查可能因代理路径、抵消效应和子群掩蔽而错过残留影响，证明因果测试是遗忘测试的有前景方向。
AI.conclusion: 该论文将遗忘测试框架化为软件工程问题，提出因果模糊测试方法，为实际部署中的机器学习遗忘验证提供了新方向。

title: Medical thinking with multiple images
comment: Equal contribution for the first two authors. To appear in the proceedings of the Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026). Code is in https://github.com/benluwang/MedThinkVQA. Dataset is in https://huggingface.co/datasets/bio-nlp-umass/MedThinkVQA
summary: Large language models perform well on many medical QA benchmarks, but real clinical reasoning often requires integrating evidence across multiple images rather than interpreting a single view. We introduce MedThinkVQA, an expert-annotated benchmark for thinking with multiple images, where models must interpret each image, combine cross-view evidence, and answer diagnostic questions with intermediate supervision and step-level evaluation. The dataset contains 8,067 cases, including 720 test cases, with an average of 6.62 images per case, substantially denser than prior work, whose expert-level benchmarks use at most 1.43 images per case. On the test set, the best closed-source models, Claude-4.6-Opus, Gemini-3-Pro, and GPT-5.2-xhigh, reach only 57.2%, 55.3%, and 54.9% accuracy, while GPT-5-mini and GPT-5-nano reach 39.7% and 30.8%. Strong open-source models lag behind, led by Qwen3.5-397B-A17B at 52.2% and Qwen3.5-27B at 50.6%. Further analysis identifies grounded multi-image reasoning as the main bottleneck: models often fail to extract, align, and compose evidence across views before higher-level inference can help. Providing expert single-image cues and cross-image summaries improves performance, whereas replacing them with self-generated intermediates reduces accuracy. Step-level analysis shows that over 70% of errors arise from image reading and cross-view integration. Scaling results further show that additional inference-time computation helps only when visual grounding is already reliable; when early evidence extraction is weak, longer reasoning yields limited or unstable gains and can amplify misread cues. These results suggest that the key challenge is not reasoning length alone, but reliable mechanisms for grounding, aligning, and composing distributed evidence across real-world multimodal clinical inputs.

AI.tldr: MedThinkVQA是一个医学多图像推理基准测试，要求模型整合多个视图证据进行诊断，现有模型表现不佳（最佳仅57.2%准确率），主要瓶颈在于跨视图证据的提取、对齐和组合。
AI.motivation: 现有医学QA基准测试主要关注单图像解读，但真实临床诊断需要整合多个视图（如X光、CT等）的证据。需要评估模型在多图像场景下的跨视图推理能力。
AI.method: 构建MedThinkVQA数据集，包含8,067个病例（720个测试用例），平均每个病例6.62张图像，远高于现有基准。提供中间监督和步骤级评估，分析模型在图像解读、跨视图整合和推理各阶段的表现。
AI.result: 最佳闭源模型（Claude-4.6-Opus、Gemini-3-Pro、GPT-5.2-xhigh）准确率仅57.2%、55.3%、54.9%。开源模型表现更差。70%以上错误源于图像读取和跨视图整合。提供专家单图像线索和跨图像摘要能提升性能，而自生成中间结果会降低准确性。
AI.conclusion: 关键挑战不是推理长度，而是建立可靠的机制来在真实世界多模态临床输入中实现证据的定位、对齐和组合。当早期证据提取薄弱时，增加推理计算量收益有限且不稳定。

title: Introspection Adapters: Training LLMs to Report Their Learned Behaviors
summary: When model developers or users fine-tune an LLM, this can induce behaviors that are unexpected, deliberately harmful, or hard to detect. It would be far easier to audit LLMs if they could simply describe their behaviors in natural language. Here, we study a scalable approach to rapidly identify learned behaviors of many LLMs derived from a shared base LLM. Given a model $M$, our method works by finetuning models $M_i$ from $M$ with implanted behaviors $b_i$; the $(M_i, b_i)$ pairs serve as labeled training data. We then train an \emph{introspection adapter} (IA): a single LoRA adapter jointly trained across the finetunes $M_i$ to cause them to verbalize their implanted behaviors. We find that this IA induces self-description of learned behaviors even in finetunes of $M$ that were trained in very different ways from the $M_i$. For example, IAs generalize to AuditBench, achieving state-of-the-art at identifying explicitly hidden concerning behaviors. IAs can also be used to detect encrypted finetuning API attacks. They scale favorably with model size and training data diversity. Overall, our results suggest that IAs are a scalable, effective, and practically useful approach to auditing fine-tuned LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出一种可扩展的LLM审计方法：通过训练"内省适配器"（Introspection Adapter），使微调后的LLM能够用自然语言描述其学习到的行为，即使这些行为被刻意隐藏。
AI.motivation: 当LLM被微调时，可能会产生意外、有害或难以检测的行为。目前缺乏可扩展的方法来快速审计大量基于同一基础模型微调的LLM。
AI.method: 1) 从基础模型M微调多个模型Mi，每个植入特定行为bi；2) 使用(Mi, bi)对作为训练数据；3) 训练单个LoRA适配器（内省适配器），使其能够引导微调模型用自然语言描述其植入行为。
AI.result: 内省适配器能够泛化到不同方式训练的微调模型，在AuditBench上达到SOTA，能检测加密微调API攻击，且随着模型规模和训练数据多样性的增加效果更好。
AI.conclusion: 内省适配器是一种可扩展、有效且实用的微调LLM审计方法，能够使LLM自我描述其学习行为，有助于识别隐藏的有害行为。

title: IYKYK (But AI Doesn't): Automated Content Moderation Does Not Capture Communities' Heterogeneous Attitudes Towards Reclaimed Language
summary: Reclaimed slur usage is a common and meaningful practice online for many marginalized communities. It serves as a source of solidarity, identity, and shared experience. However, contemporary automated and AI-based moderation tools for online content largely fail to distinguish between reclaimed and hateful uses of slurs, resulting in the suppression of marginalized voices. In this work, we use quantitative and qualitative methods to examine the attitudes of social media users in LGBTQIA+, Black, and women communities around reclaimed slurs targeting our focus groups including the f-word, n-word, and b-word. With social media users from these communities, we collect and analyze an annotated online slur usage corpus. The corpus includes annotators' perceptions of whether an online text containing a slur should be flagged as hate speech, as well as contextual features of the slur usage. Across all communities and annotation questions, we observe low inter-annotator agreement, indicating substantial disagreement among in-group annotators. This is compounded by the fact that, absent clear contextual signals of identity and intent, even in-group members may disagree on how to interpret reclaimed slur usage online. Semi-structured interviews with annotators suggest that differences in lived experience and personal history contribute to this variation as well. We find poor alignment between annotator judgments and automated hate speech assessments produced by Perspective API. We further observe that certain features of a text such as whether the slur usage was derogatory and if the slur was targeted at oneself are more associated with whether annotators report the text as hate speech. Together, these findings highlight the inherent subjectivity and contextual nature of how marginalized communities interpret slurs online.

AI.tldr: 研究发现在线污名语回收使用具有高度主观性，不同社群成员对同一内容是否构成仇恨言论存在显著分歧，现有自动化审核工具与社群判断存在偏差。
AI.motivation: 边缘化社群（LGBTQIA+、黑人、女性）经常在线回收使用污名语以表达团结和身份认同，但现有AI审核工具无法区分回收使用和仇恨使用，导致边缘化声音被压制。
AI.method: 采用定量和定性方法：1）收集并分析来自三个社群的在线污名语使用语料库，包含标注者判断；2）进行半结构化访谈；3）比较标注者判断与Perspective API的自动化评估。
AI.result: 1）社群内标注者间一致性低，表明高度主观性；2）标注者判断与Perspective API评估存在显著偏差；3）文本特征（是否贬义、是否针对自己）与仇恨言论判断更相关；4）生活经历差异影响判断。
AI.conclusion: 边缘化社群对污名语的解释具有固有的主观性和语境依赖性，现有自动化审核工具无法准确捕捉这种复杂性，需要更细致、考虑社群内部差异的审核方法。

title: An Interpretable Framework Applying Protein Words to Predict Protein-Small Molecule Complementary Pairing Rules
summary: Despite the high accuracy of 'black box' deep learning models, drug discovery still relies on protein-ligand interaction principles and heuristics. To improve interpretability of protein-small molecule binding predictions, we developed the PWRules framework, which applies binding affinity data to identify privileged small molecule fragments and subsequently defines complementary pairing rules between these fragments and protein words (semantic sequence units) through an interpretability module. The resulting word-fragment rules are then ranked by the PWScore function to prioritize active compounds. Evaluations on benchmark datasets show that PWScore achieves competitive performance comparable to the physics-based model (Glide) and the deep learning model (PSICHIC) and shows broad applicability for protein targets outside the training dataset, e.g., SARS-CoV-2 main protease. Notably, PWScore captures complementary interaction information, yielding superior enrichment performance when integrated with these established methods. Structural analysis of protein-ligand complexes indicates that learned word-fragment rules are significantly enriched near ligand-binding pockets, despite training without explicit structural guidance. By extracting and applying complementary pairing rules, PWRules provides an interpretable framework for drug discovery.

AI.tldr: PWRules是一个可解释的蛋白质-小分子结合预测框架，通过识别特权小分子片段和蛋白质"单词"的互补配对规则来改进药物发现的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习模型在蛋白质-小分子结合预测中具有高准确性，但药物发现仍然依赖于蛋白质-配体相互作用原理和启发式方法。现有"黑盒"模型缺乏可解释性，限制了其在药物发现中的应用。
AI.method: 开发了PWRules框架：1) 利用结合亲和力数据识别特权小分子片段；2) 通过可解释性模块定义这些片段与蛋白质"单词"（语义序列单元）之间的互补配对规则；3) 使用PWScore函数对规则进行排序以优先考虑活性化合物。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，PWScore的性能与基于物理的模型(Glide)和深度学习模型(PSICHIC)相当，并对训练集外的蛋白质靶标（如SARS-CoV-2主要蛋白酶）具有广泛适用性。与现有方法集成时显示出更优的富集性能。结构分析表明，学习到的单词-片段规则在配体结合口袋附近显著富集。
AI.conclusion: 通过提取和应用互补配对规则，PWRules为药物发现提供了一个可解释的框架，能够在没有明确结构指导的情况下捕获蛋白质-小分子相互作用的关键信息。

title: Medial Axis Aware Learning of Signed Distance Functions
summary: We propose a novel variational method to compute a highly accurate global signed distance function (SDF) to a given point cloud. To this end, the jump set of the gradient of the SDF, which coincides with the medial axis of the surface, is explicitly taken into account through a higher-order variational formulation that enforces linear growth along the gradient direction away from this discontinuity set. The eikonal equation and the zero-level set of the SDF are enforced as constraints. To make this variational problem computationally tractable, a phase field approximation of Ambrosio-Tortorelli type is employed. The associated phase field function implicitly describes the medial axis. The method is implemented for surfaces represented by unoriented point clouds using neural network approximations of both the SDF and the phase field. Experiments demonstrate the method's accuracy both in the near field and globally. Quantitative and qualitative comparisons with other approaches show the advantages of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新颖的变分方法，通过显式考虑符号距离函数梯度跳跃集（即曲面的中轴），结合相场近似和神经网络表示，从无定向点云计算高精度全局符号距离函数。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在计算点云的全局符号距离函数时，往往难以准确处理中轴（符号距离函数梯度的跳跃集）问题，导致在远离曲面区域精度下降。需要一种能够同时保证近场和全局精度的鲁棒方法。
AI.method: 采用高阶变分公式，显式考虑符号距离函数梯度的跳跃集（中轴），通过沿梯度方向远离不连续集的线性增长约束。结合Eikonal方程和零水平集约束，使用Ambrosio-Tortorelli型相场近似处理变分问题，相场函数隐式描述中轴。使用神经网络近似符号距离函数和相场函数，适用于无定向点云表示。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在近场和全局都具有高精度。与其他方法的定量和定性比较显示出所提方法的优势，能够准确计算全局符号距离函数。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式考虑中轴并采用相场近似和神经网络表示，提出了一种从无定向点云计算高精度全局符号距离函数的有效变分方法，在近场和全局区域均表现出优越性能。

title: PersonalHomeBench: Evaluating Agents in Personalized Smart Homes
summary: Agentic AI systems are rapidly advancing toward real-world applications, yet their readiness in complex and personalized environments remains insufficiently characterized. To address this gap, we introduce PersonalHomeBench, a benchmark for evaluating foundation models as agentic assistants in personalized smart home environments. The benchmark is constructed through an iterative process that progressively builds rich household states, which are then used to generate personalized, context-dependent tasks. To support realistic agent-environment interaction, we provide PersonalHomeTools, a comprehensive toolbox enabling household information retrieval, appliance control, and situational understanding. PersonalHomeBench evaluates both reactive and proactive agentic abilities under unimodal and multimodal observations. Thorough experimentation reveals a systematic performance reduction as task complexity increases, with pronounced failures in counterfactual reasoning and under partial observability, where effective tool-based information gathering is required. These results position PersonalHomeBench as a rigorous evaluation platform for analyzing the robustness and limitations of personalized agentic reasoning and planning.

AI.tldr: PersonalHomeBench是一个用于评估基础模型在个性化智能家居环境中作为智能助手能力的基准测试平台，包含丰富的家庭状态构建和个性化任务生成，以及支持真实交互的工具箱。
AI.motivation: 当前智能AI系统在复杂个性化环境中的准备程度尚未得到充分评估，需要建立一个专门的基准测试来评估基础模型在个性化智能家居环境中的代理能力。
AI.method: 通过迭代过程构建丰富的家庭状态，生成个性化、上下文相关的任务；提供PersonalHomeTools工具箱支持家庭信息检索、设备控制和情境理解；评估反应式和主动式代理能力，支持单模态和多模态观察。
AI.result: 实验显示随着任务复杂度增加，系统性能会系统性下降；在反事实推理和部分可观察性方面存在明显失败，需要有效的基于工具的信息收集能力。
AI.conclusion: PersonalHomeBench为分析个性化代理推理和规划的鲁棒性与局限性提供了一个严谨的评估平台。

title: Defragmenting Language Models: An Interpretability-based Approach for Vocabulary Expansion
summary: All languages are equal; when it comes to tokenization, some are more equal than others. Tokens are the hidden currency that dictate the cost and latency of access to contemporary LLMs. However, many languages written in non-Latin scripts observe a poor exchange rate: LLMs take several multiples of tokens to encode the same information in many languages as they do for English. Our analysis reveals that this issue, known as 'token over-fragmentation', persists in modern open-weight LLMs. The standard remedy is vocabulary expansion that adds target language items missing from the model's vocabulary. In this work, we comprehensively study and advance interpretability-based vocabulary expansion, a new research direction. We focus on two core decisions in the vocabulary expansion process: What items should we add? and How should we initialize their corresponding input and output embeddings? First, we question the conventional use of frequency-based methods to choose candidate vocabulary items to add (a decision long treated as settled), and show that interpretability-based methods offer a superior performance-token efficiency trade-off. Next, we strengthen the case for interpretability-based embedding initialization by showing large gains (~20 pts) over baseline initialization methods for several languages written in non-Latin scripts. We identify the phenomenon of "subword detokenization" where models progressively merge fragmented subword tokens into larger subwords across layers. Grounded in our analysis of this phenomenon, we propose FragMend to further push the efficiency ceiling of interpretability-based expansion. We validate the effectiveness of FragMend through comparison against strong baselines and we present extensive analysis of its design choices.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究LLM中非拉丁文字语言的token过度碎片化问题，提出基于可解释性的词汇扩展方法FragMend，显著提升多语言处理效率。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM对非拉丁文字语言存在token过度碎片化问题，导致处理成本高、延迟大。虽然词汇扩展是标准解决方案，但传统基于频率的方法效率有限，需要更优的词汇选择和嵌入初始化方法。
AI.method: 提出基于可解释性的词汇扩展方法：1）质疑传统基于频率的词汇选择方法，采用可解释性方法获得更好的性能-token效率权衡；2）提出FragMend方法，基于"子词去token化"现象分析，通过渐进合并碎片化子词来提升扩展效率。
AI.result: 可解释性嵌入初始化相比基线方法在多个非拉丁文字语言上获得约20分的显著提升；FragMend方法在强基线对比中验证了有效性，并通过广泛设计选择分析证明了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: 基于可解释性的词汇扩展方法优于传统频率方法，FragMend进一步提升了效率上限，为解决LLM中非拉丁文字语言的token过度碎片化问题提供了有效方案。

title: LLM as a Tool, Not an Agent: Code-Mined Tree Transformations for Neural Architecture Search
summary: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) aims to automatically discover high-performing deep neural network (DNN) architectures. However, conventional algorithm-driven NAS relies on carefully hand-crafted search spaces to ensure executability, which restricts open-ended exploration. Recent coding-based agentic approaches using large language models (LLMs) reduce manual design, but current LLMs struggle to reliably generate complex, valid architectures, and their proposals are often biased toward a narrow set of patterns observed in their training data. To bridge reliable algorithmic search with powerful LLM assistance, we propose LLMasTool, a hierarchical tree-based NAS framework for stable and open-ended model evolution. Our method automatically extracts reusable modules from arbitrary source code and represents full architectures as hierarchical trees, enabling evolution through reliable tree transformations rather than code generation. At each evolution step, coarse-level planning is governed by a diversity-guided algorithm that leverages Bayesian modeling to improve exploration efficiency, while the LLM resolves the remaining degrees of freedom to ensure a meaningful evolutionary trajectory and an executable generated architecture. With this formulation, instead of fully agentic LLM approaches, our method explores diverse directions beyond the inherent biases in the LLM. Our method improves over existing NAS methods by 0.69, 1.83, and 2.68 points on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet16-120, demonstrating its effectiveness.

AI.tldr: LLMasTool：结合算法搜索与LLM辅助的分层树状NAS框架，通过可靠树变换而非代码生成实现稳定开放的模型演化
AI.motivation: 传统算法驱动的NAS依赖精心设计的手工搜索空间，限制了开放探索；基于LLM的编码方法难以可靠生成复杂有效架构且存在训练数据偏见。需要结合可靠算法搜索与强大LLM辅助
AI.method: 提出分层树状NAS框架：1) 从任意源代码自动提取可重用模块，将完整架构表示为分层树；2) 通过可靠树变换而非代码生成进行演化；3) 粗粒度规划使用基于贝叶斯建模的多样性引导算法提高探索效率；4) LLM解决剩余自由度确保有意义的演化轨迹和可执行架构
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet16-120上分别比现有NAS方法提升0.69、1.83和2.68个点，证明了方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: LLMasTool通过结合算法可靠性与LLM灵活性，实现了超越LLM固有偏见的多样化探索，为稳定开放的神经网络架构搜索提供了有效解决方案

title: SynthPID: P&ID digitization from Topology-Preserving Synthetic Data
summary: Automating the digitization of Piping and Instrumentation Diagrams (P&IDs) into structured process graphs would unlock significant value in plant operations, yet progress is bottlenecked by a fundamental data problem: engineering drawings are proprietary, and the entire community shares a single public benchmark of just 12 annotated images. Prior attempts at synthetic augmentation have fallen short because template-based generators scatter symbols at random, producing graphs that bear little resemblance to real process plants and, accordingly, yield only approximately 33% edge detection accuracy under synth-only training. We argue the failure is structural rather than visual and address it by introducing SynthPID, a corpus of 665 synthetic P&IDs whose pipe topology is seeded directly from real drawings. Paired with a patch-based Relationformer adapted for high-resolution diagrams, a model trained on SynthPID alone achieves 63.8 +/- 3.1% edge mAP on PID2Graph OPEN100 without seeing a single real P&ID during training, closing within 8 pp of the real-data oracle. These gains hold up under a controlled comparison against the template-based regime, confirming that generation quality drives performance rather than model choice. A scaling study reveals that gains flatten beyond roughly 400 synthetic images, pointing to seed diversity as the binding constraint.

AI.tldr: SynthPID：通过从真实图纸中提取管道拓扑结构生成的合成P&ID数据集，显著提升了管道边缘检测性能，仅用合成数据训练就能达到接近真实数据训练的效果。
AI.motivation: P&ID数字化自动化具有重要价值，但面临数据瓶颈：工程图纸是专有的，公开基准只有12张标注图像。现有合成增强方法效果不佳，因为基于模板的生成器随机散布符号，产生的图与真实工厂相差甚远。
AI.method: 1. 引入SynthPID：包含665张合成P&ID的数据集，其管道拓扑直接基于真实图纸生成；2. 采用适用于高分辨率图的基于补丁的Relationformer模型。
AI.result: 仅用SynthPID训练（未见过真实P&ID）的模型在PID2Graph OPEN100上达到63.8±3.1%的边缘mAP，与真实数据训练的结果仅差8个百分点。相比基于模板的方法（约33%准确率）有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 生成质量而非模型选择是性能提升的关键因素。缩放研究表明，超过约400张合成图像后收益趋于平缓，表明种子多样性是主要限制因素。SynthPID为P&ID数字化提供了有效的合成数据解决方案。

title: The CTLNet for Shanghai Composite Index Prediction
summary: Shanghai Composite Index prediction has become a hot issue for many investors and academic researchers. Deep learning models are widely applied in multivariate time series forecasting, including recurrent neural networks (RNN), convolutional neural networks (CNN), and transformers. Specifically, the Transformer encoder, with its unique attention mechanism and parallel processing capabilities, has become an important tool in time series prediction, and has an advantage in dealing with long sequence dependencies and multivariate data correlations. Drawing on the strengths of various models, we propose the CNN-Transformer-LSTM Networks (CTLNet). This paper explores the application of CTLNet for Shanghai Composite Index prediction and the comparative experiments show that the proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CNN-Transformer-LSTM网络(CTLNet)用于上证指数预测，该模型结合了CNN、Transformer和LSTM的优势，在实验中优于现有基准模型。
AI.motivation: 上证指数预测对投资者和学术研究者都很重要。深度学习模型在多元时间序列预测中广泛应用，但不同模型各有优缺点。Transformer编码器在处理长序列依赖和多元数据相关性方面有优势，但结合其他模型可能获得更好效果。
AI.method: 提出CNN-Transformer-LSTM网络(CTLNet)，结合了卷积神经网络(CNN)、Transformer编码器和长短期记忆网络(LSTM)的优势。CNN用于提取局部特征，Transformer处理长序列依赖和多元相关性，LSTM捕捉时间序列的动态特性。
AI.result: 通过比较实验表明，提出的CTLNet模型在上证指数预测任务中优于现有的最先进基准模型。
AI.conclusion: CTLNet模型通过结合CNN、Transformer和LSTM的优势，能够有效处理上证指数预测中的复杂时间序列特征，取得了优于现有方法的预测性能。

authors: A. B. M. Alim Al Islam
title: CBRS: Cognitive Blood Request System with Bilingual Dataset and Dual-Layer Filtering for Multi-Platform Social Streams
comment: Accepted to Findings of the ACL 2026
summary: Urgent blood donation seeking posts and messages on social media often go unnoticed due to the overwhelming volume of daily communications. Traditional app-based systems, reliant on manual input, struggle to reach users in low-resource settings, delaying critical responses. To address this, we introduce the Cognitive Blood Request System (CBRS), a multi-platform framework that efficiently filters and parses blood donation requests from social media streams using a cost-efficient dual-layered architecture. To do so, we curate a novel dataset of 11K parsed blood donation request messages in Bengali, English, and transliterated Bengali, capturing the linguistic diversity of real social media communications. The inclusion of adversarial negatives further enhances the robustness of our model. CBRS achieves an impressive 99% accuracy and precision in filtering, surpassing benchmark methods. In the parsing task, our LoRA finetuned Llama-3.2-3B model achieves 92% zero-shot accuracy, surpassing the base model by 41.54% and exceeding the few-shot performance of GPT-4o-mini, Gemini-2.0-Flash, and other LLMs, while resulting in a 35X reduction in input token usage. This work lays a robust foundation for scalable, inclusive information extraction in time-sensitive, object-focused tasks. Our code, dataset, and trained models are publicly available at [https://github.com/aaniksahaa/CBRS](https://github.com/aaniksahaa/CBRS).

AI.tldr: CBRS是一个多平台认知血液请求系统，使用双层架构从社交媒体高效过滤和解析血液捐赠请求，在孟加拉语、英语和音译孟加拉语上达到99%过滤准确率，解析任务中LoRA微调的Llama-3.2-3B模型实现92%零样本准确率。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体上紧急血液捐赠请求常被海量信息淹没，传统应用系统依赖手动输入且在低资源环境下难以触达用户，导致关键响应延迟。
AI.method: 提出CBRS多平台框架，采用成本效益高的双层架构过滤和解析社交媒体血液捐赠请求；构建包含11K条解析请求消息的新数据集（孟加拉语、英语、音译孟加拉语），包含对抗性负样本增强模型鲁棒性；使用LoRA微调Llama-3.2-3B模型进行解析任务。
AI.result: CBRS在过滤任务上达到99%准确率和精确率；解析任务中LoRA微调Llama-3.2-3B模型实现92%零样本准确率，比基础模型提升41.54%，超越GPT-4o-mini、Gemini-2.0-Flash等LLM的少样本性能，同时减少35倍输入token使用量。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为时间敏感、目标导向任务中的可扩展、包容性信息提取奠定了坚实基础，代码、数据集和训练模型已开源。

title: S-GRPO: Unified Post-Training for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Current post-training methodologies for adapting Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) generally fall into two paradigms: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). Despite their prevalence, both approaches suffer from inefficiencies when applied in isolation. SFT forces the model's generation along a single expert trajectory, often inducing catastrophic forgetting of general multimodal capabilities due to distributional shifts. Conversely, RL explores multiple generated trajectories but frequently encounters optimization collapse - a cold-start problem where an unaligned model fails to spontaneously sample any domain-valid trajectories in sparse-reward visual tasks. In this paper, we propose Supervised Group Relative Policy Optimization (S-GRPO), a unified post-training framework that integrates the guidance of imitation learning into the multi-trajectory exploration of preference optimization. Tailored for direct-generation visual tasks, S-GRPO introduces Conditional Ground-Truth Trajectory Injection (CGI). When a binary verifier detects a complete exploratory failure within a sampled group of trajectories, CGI injects the verified ground-truth trajectory into the candidate pool. By assigning a deterministic maximal reward to this injected anchor, S-GRPO enforces a positive signal within the group-relative advantage estimation. This mechanism reformulates the supervised learning objective as a high-advantage component of the policy gradient, compelling the model to dynamically balance between exploiting the expert trajectory and exploring novel visual concepts. Theoretical analysis and empirical results demonstrate that S-GRPO gracefully bridges the gap between SFT and RL, drastically accelerates convergence, and achieves superior domain adaptation while preserving the base model's general-purpose capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出S-GRPO框架，结合监督学习和强化学习的优势，通过条件性真值轨迹注入解决视觉任务中的探索失败问题，实现更高效的后训练适应。
AI.motivation: 当前大型视觉语言模型的后训练方法主要有监督微调(SFT)和强化学习(RL)两种范式。SFT强制模型沿单一专家轨迹生成，容易因分布偏移导致灾难性遗忘；RL探索多个生成轨迹，但在稀疏奖励的视觉任务中经常遇到优化崩溃问题（冷启动问题）。需要一种能结合两者优势的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出监督组相对策略优化(S-GRPO)框架，将模仿学习的指导整合到偏好优化的多轨迹探索中。针对直接生成的视觉任务，引入条件性真值轨迹注入(CGI)：当二元验证器检测到采样轨迹组中完全探索失败时，将已验证的真值轨迹注入候选池，并赋予确定性最大奖励。这使监督学习目标成为策略梯度的高优势组成部分，强制模型在利用专家轨迹和探索新视觉概念之间动态平衡。
AI.result: 理论分析和实证结果表明，S-GRPO优雅地弥合了SFT和RL之间的差距，大幅加速收敛，在保持基础模型通用能力的同时实现了优越的领域适应性能。
AI.conclusion: S-GRPO提供了一个统一的后训练框架，有效解决了当前方法在效率和效果上的局限性，为大型视觉语言模型的领域适应提供了更优的解决方案。

title: BARD: Bridging AutoRegressive and Diffusion Vision-Language Models Via Highly Efficient Progressive Block Merging and Stage-Wise Distillation
summary: Autoregressive vision-language models (VLMs) deliver strong multimodal capability, but their token-by-token decoding imposes a fundamental inference bottleneck. Diffusion VLMs offer a more parallel decoding paradigm, yet directly converting a pretrained autoregressive VLM into a large-block diffusion VLM (dVLM) often leads to substantial quality degradation. In this work, we present BARD, a simple and effective bridging framework that converts a pretrained autoregressive VLM into a same-architecture, decoding-efficient dVLM. Our approach combines progressive supervised block merging, which gradually enlarges the decoding block size, with stage-wise intra-dVLM distillation from a fixed small-block diffusion anchor to recover performance lost at larger blocks. We further incorporate a mixed noise scheduler to improve robustness and token revision during denoising, and memory-friendly training to enable efficient training on long multimodal sequences. A key empirical finding is that direct autoregressive-to-diffusion distillation is poorly aligned and can even hurt performance, whereas distillation within the diffusion regime is consistently effective. Experimental results show that, with $\leq 4.4M$ data, BARD-VL transfers strong multimodal capability from Qwen3-VL to a large-block dVLM. Remarkably, BARD-VL establishes a new SOTA among comparable-scale open dVLMs on our evaluation suite at both 4B and 8B scales. At the same time, BARD-VL achieves up to \textbf{3$\times$} decoding throughput speedup compared to the source model.

AI.tldr: BARD是一个将自回归视觉语言模型转换为解码高效的扩散视觉语言模型的框架，通过渐进式块合并和阶段内蒸馏，在保持性能的同时实现3倍解码加速。
AI.motivation: 自回归视觉语言模型虽然能力强，但token-by-token解码存在推理瓶颈；扩散模型提供更并行的解码范式，但直接将自回归模型转换为大块扩散模型会导致质量显著下降。
AI.method: 结合渐进式监督块合并（逐步增大解码块大小）和阶段内扩散模型蒸馏（从小块扩散锚点恢复性能），加入混合噪声调度器提高鲁棒性，以及内存友好训练处理长序列。
AI.result: BARD-VL在≤4.4M数据下将Qwen3-VL转换为大块扩散模型，在4B和8B规模上达到可比开放扩散视觉语言模型的新SOTA，同时实现高达3倍的解码吞吐量加速。
AI.conclusion: BARD框架成功地将自回归视觉语言模型转换为解码高效的扩散模型，关键发现是扩散模型内部的蒸馏比直接的自回归到扩散蒸馏更有效，实现了性能与效率的平衡。

title: GAMMA-Net: Adaptive Long-Horizon Traffic Spatio-Temporal Forecasting Model based on Interleaved Graph Attention and Multi-Axis Mamba
summary: Accurate traffic forecasting is crucial for intelligent transportation systems, supporting effective traffic management, congestion reduction, and informed urban planning. However, traditional models often fail to adequately capture the intricate spatio-temporal dependencies present in traffic data. To overcome these limitations, we introduce GAMMA-Net, a novel approach that integrates Graph Attention Networks (GAT) with multi-axis Selective State Space Models (Mamba). The GAT component uses a self-attention mechanism to dynamically adjust the influence of nodes within the traffic network, enabling adaptive spatial dependency modeling based on real-time conditions. Simultaneously, the Mamba module efficiently models long-term temporal and spatial dynamics without the heavy computational cost of conventional recurrent architectures. Extensive experiments on several benchmark traffic datasets, including METR-LA, PEMS-BAY, PEMS03, PEMS04, PEMS07, and PEMS08, show that GAMMA-Net consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art models across different prediction horizons, achieving up to a 16.25% reduction in Mean Absolute Error (MAE) compared to baseline models. Ablation studies highlight the critical contributions of both the spatial and temporal components, emphasizing their complementary role in improving prediction accuracy. In conclusion, the GAMMA-Net model sets a new standard in traffic forecasting, offering a powerful tool for next-generation traffic management and urban planning. The code for this study is available at https://github.com/hdy6438/GAMMA-Net

AI.tldr: GAMMA-Net：结合图注意力网络和多轴选择性状态空间模型的新型交通预测方法，在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法
AI.motivation: 传统交通预测模型难以充分捕捉交通数据中复杂的时空依赖关系，需要更有效的建模方法
AI.method: 提出GAMMA-Net，集成图注意力网络（GAT）和多轴选择性状态空间模型（Mamba）。GAT通过自注意力机制动态调整交通网络中节点的影响力，实现自适应空间依赖建模；Mamba模块高效建模长期时空动态，避免传统循环架构的高计算成本
AI.result: 在METR-LA、PEMS-BAY、PEMS03、PEMS04、PEMS07、PEMS08等多个基准数据集上，GAMMA-Net在不同预测时间范围内始终优于现有最先进模型，相比基线模型平均绝对误差降低高达16.25%
AI.conclusion: GAMMA-Net为交通预测设立了新标准，为下一代交通管理和城市规划提供了强大工具

title: No-Worse Context-Aware Decoding: Preventing Neutral Regression in Context-Conditioned Generation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can answer questions and summarize documents when conditioned on external contexts (e.g., retrieved evidence), yet context use remains unreliable: models may overwrite an already-correct output (neutral regression) even when the context is non-informative. We formalize neutral regression as a do-no-harm requirement and quantify it by measuring accuracy drops on baseline-correct items under answer-consistent contexts. We propose No-Worse Context-Aware Decoding (NWCAD), a decode-time adapter built on a two-stream setup with a two-stage gate: it backs off to no-context decoding when the context is non-informative, and otherwise uses context-conditioned decoding with a CAD-style fallback under uncertainty. We evaluate NWCAD on benchmarks that separate do-no-harm reliability from context utilization (accuracy gains on genuinely helpful contexts). NWCAD prevents neutral regression on baseline-correct items while preserving strong context-driven accuracy on helpful contexts.

AI.tldr: NWCAD是一种解码时适配器，通过两阶段门控机制防止LLMs在非信息性上下文条件下产生中性回归，同时保持对有用上下文的利用能力。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在外部上下文条件下回答问题或总结文档时，存在上下文使用不可靠的问题。即使上下文是非信息性的，模型也可能覆盖原本正确的输出（中性回归），这违反了"不造成伤害"的原则。
AI.method: 提出No-Worse Context-Aware Decoding (NWCAD)，这是一种基于双流设置的两阶段门控解码时适配器：1）当上下文非信息性时回退到无上下文解码；2）当上下文有用时使用上下文条件解码，并在不确定时采用CAD风格的回退机制。
AI.result: NWCAD在基准测试中有效防止了基线正确项的中性回归，同时保持了在有用上下文驱动下的强准确性。该方法在"不造成伤害"的可靠性和上下文利用（在真正有帮助的上下文上获得准确性提升）之间取得了平衡。
AI.conclusion: NWCAD通过解码时适配有效解决了LLMs在上下文使用中的中性回归问题，实现了"不造成伤害"的可靠上下文利用，为构建更可靠的上下文感知语言模型提供了实用解决方案。

title: Cross-Modal Generation: From Commodity WiFi to High-Fidelity mmWave and RFID Sensing
summary: AIGC has shown remarkable success in CV and NLP, and has recently demonstrated promising potential in the wireless domain. However, significant data imbalance exists across RF modalities, with abundant WiFi data but scarce mmWave and RFID data due to high acquisition cost. This makes it difficult to train high-quality generative models for these data-scarce modalities. In this work, we propose RF-CMG, a diffusion-based cross-modal generative method that leverages data-rich WiFi signals to synthesize high-fidelity RF data for scarce modalities including mmWave and RFID. The key insight of RF-CMG is to decouple cross-modal generation into high-frequency guidance and low-frequency constraint, which respectively learn high-frequency distribution from limited target modality data and preserve the underlying physical structure via low-frequency constraints during generation. On this basis, we introduce a Modality-Guided Embedding (MGE) module to steer the reverse diffusion trajectory toward the target high-frequency distribution, and a Low-Frequency Modality Consistency (LFMC) module to progressively enforce low-frequency constraints to suppress the accumulation of source-modality structural biases during inference, enabling high-quality target-modality generation. Performance comparison with several prevalent generative models demonstrates that RF-CMG achieves superior performance in synthesizing RFID and mmWave signals. We further showcase the effectiveness of the data generated by RF-CMG in gesture recognition tasks, and analyze the impact of the proportion of synthetic data on downstream performance.

AI.tldr: RF-CMG：一种基于扩散的跨模态生成方法，利用数据丰富的WiFi信号合成稀缺的毫米波和RFID信号，通过高频引导和低频约束解决RF模态数据不平衡问题
AI.motivation: 无线通信领域存在显著的数据不平衡问题：WiFi数据丰富，但毫米波和RFID数据稀缺且获取成本高，这导致难以训练高质量的生成模型来为这些数据稀缺的模态生成数据
AI.method: 提出RF-CMG方法，将跨模态生成解耦为高频引导和低频约束：1）MGE模块引导反向扩散轨迹朝向目标高频分布；2）LFMC模块逐步强制执行低频约束以抑制源模态结构偏差的积累。利用数据丰富的WiFi信号合成毫米波和RFID信号
AI.result: 与多种主流生成模型相比，RF-CMG在合成RFID和毫米波信号方面表现出优越性能。生成的数据在手势识别任务中有效，并分析了合成数据比例对下游性能的影响
AI.conclusion: RF-CMG通过解耦高频引导和低频约束，成功利用数据丰富的WiFi信号合成高质量的数据稀缺模态信号，为解决无线通信领域数据不平衡问题提供了有效方案

title: Penny Wise, Pixel Foolish: Bypassing Price Constraints in Multimodal Agents via Visual Adversarial Perturbations
summary: The rapid proliferation of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has enabled mobile agents to execute high-stakes financial transactions, but their adversarial robustness remains underexplored. We identify Visual Dominance Hallucination (VDH), where imperceptible visual cues can override textual price evidence in screenshot-based, price-constrained settings and lead agents to irrational decisions. We propose PriceBlind, a stealthy white-box adversarial attack framework for controlled screenshot-based evaluation. PriceBlind exploits the modality gap in CLIP-based encoders via a Semantic-Decoupling Loss that aligns the image embedding with low-cost, value-associated anchors while preserving pixel-level fidelity. On E-ShopBench, PriceBlind achieves around 80% ASR in white-box evaluation; under a simplified single-turn coordinate-selection protocol, Ensemble-DI-FGSM transfers with roughly 35-41% ASR across GPT-4o, Gemini-1.5-Pro, and Claude-3.5-Sonnet. We also show that robust encoders and Verify-then-Act defenses reduce ASR substantially, though with some clean-accuracy trade-off.

AI.tldr: 论文提出PriceBlind攻击框架，利用视觉主导幻觉在多模态大语言模型中实现对抗攻击，使智能体在价格约束场景下做出非理性决策。
AI.motivation: 随着多模态大语言模型在金融交易等高风险场景的应用增多，其对抗鲁棒性研究不足。作者发现视觉主导幻觉现象，即微小的视觉线索可以覆盖文本价格证据，导致智能体做出错误决策。
AI.method: 提出PriceBlind白盒对抗攻击框架，利用CLIP编码器的模态间隙，通过语义解耦损失将图像嵌入与低成本价值锚点对齐，同时保持像素级保真度。
AI.result: 在E-ShopBench上，PriceBlind在白盒评估中达到约80%的攻击成功率；在简化单轮坐标选择协议下，Ensemble-DI-FGSM在GPT-4o、Gemini-1.5-Pro和Claude-3.5-Sonnet上实现35-41%的迁移攻击成功率。
AI.conclusion: 多模态大语言模型存在视觉主导幻觉的安全漏洞，PriceBlind攻击框架有效揭示了这一风险。虽然鲁棒编码器和验证后执行防御能降低攻击成功率，但存在准确率权衡。

title: GRAIL: Autonomous Concept Grounding for Neuro-Symbolic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Neuro-symbolic Reinforcement Learning (NeSy-RL) combines symbolic reasoning with gradient-based optimization to achieve interpretable and generalizable policies. Relational concepts, such as "left of" or "close by", serve as foundational building blocks that structure how agents perceive and act. However, conventional approaches require human experts to manually define these concepts, limiting adaptability since concept semantics vary across environments. We propose GRAIL (Grounding Relational Agents through Interactive Learning), a framework that autonomously grounds relational concepts through environmental interaction. GRAIL leverages large language models (LLMs) to provide generic concept representations as weak supervision, then refines them to capture environment-specific semantics. This approach addresses both sparse reward signals and concept misalignment prevalent in underdetermined environments. Experiments on the Atari games Kangaroo, Seaquest, and Skiing demonstrate that GRAIL matches or outperforms agents with manually crafted concepts in simplified settings, and reveals informative trade-offs between reward maximization and high-level goal completion in the full environment.

AI.tldr: GRAIL框架通过大语言模型自动获取关系概念表示，在Atari游戏中达到或超越人工定义概念的性能
AI.motivation: 传统神经符号强化学习需要专家手动定义关系概念（如"左侧"、"靠近"），限制了适应性，因为概念语义在不同环境中会变化
AI.method: 提出GRAIL框架：利用大语言模型提供通用概念表示作为弱监督，然后通过环境交互细化以捕捉环境特定语义，解决稀疏奖励和概念不对齐问题
AI.result: 在Atari游戏Kangaroo、Seaquest和Skiing中，GRAIL在简化设置下达到或超越人工定义概念的智能体性能，并在完整环境中揭示了奖励最大化与高级目标完成之间的权衡
AI.conclusion: GRAIL通过自主获取关系概念，减少了对手动专家知识的依赖，提高了神经符号强化学习的适应性和可扩展性

title: The impact of postediting on AI generative translation in Yemeni context: Translating literary prose by ChatGPT
summary: This study examines the role of artificial intelligence in translation, focusing on ChatGPT, specifically ChatGPT-4, and the extent to which human postediting is required in literary translation. A mixed-method approach was adopted, involving 30 professional translators who evaluated and postedited AI-generated translations of selected Arabic and English literary texts. The results show that although AI improves translation speed and accessibility, it remains limited in handling cultural, stylistic, and figurative aspects of language. Participants generally confirmed the necessity of human postediting, particularly in novels and drama. The findings indicate that emerging human-machine collaboration model rather than replacement of human translators. The study concludes that AI should be used as a supportive tool, while human expertise remains essential for ensuring translation quality and cultural appropriateness.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨AI在文学翻译中的作用，发现ChatGPT-4虽能提升翻译速度和可及性，但在处理文化、风格和修辞方面仍有局限，需要人工译后编辑，特别是小说和戏剧翻译。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探讨人工智能（特别是ChatGPT-4）在文学翻译中的作用，以及评估在文学翻译中需要多少人工译后编辑。随着AI翻译技术的发展，需要了解其在处理复杂文学文本时的局限性，以及人机协作的最佳模式。
AI.method: 采用混合方法，邀请30名专业翻译人员评估和译后编辑AI生成的阿拉伯语和英语文学文本翻译。通过专业译者的实际工作来评估AI翻译的质量和局限性。
AI.result: 结果显示：1) AI提高了翻译速度和可及性；2) AI在处理文化、风格和修辞语言方面存在局限；3) 参与者普遍认为需要人工译后编辑，特别是在小说和戏剧翻译中；4) 研究支持新兴的人机协作模式而非取代人类译者。
AI.conclusion: 结论是AI应作为支持工具使用，而人类专业知识对于确保翻译质量和文化适宜性仍然至关重要。研究支持人机协作模式，而不是用AI完全取代人类译者。

title: Reasoning on the Manifold: Bidirectional Consistency for Self-Verification in Diffusion Language Models
summary: While Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) offer structural advantages for global planning, efficiently verifying that they arrive at correct answers via valid reasoning traces remains a critical challenge. In this work, we propose a geometric perspective: Reasoning on the Manifold. We hypothesize that valid generation trajectories reside as stable attractors on the high-density manifold of the learned distribution, whereas invalid paths exhibit off-manifold drift. To operationalize this, we introduce Bidirectional Manifold Consistency (BMC), a training-free, unsupervised metric that quantifies the stability of the generated sequence through a forward-masking and backward-reconstruction cycle. Empirically, we demonstrate BMC's versatility across the full reasoning lifecycle: (1) in Diagnosis, it serves as a robust discriminator of solution validity without ground truth answer; (2) in Inference, it enables rejection resampling to effectively concentrate computational resources on complex reasoning tasks; and (3) in Alignment, it functions as a dense geometric reward that transforms sparse outcome supervision into fine-grained guidance, empowering models to self-evolve beyond standard baselines. Our results establish intrinsic geometric stability as a robust indicator of correctness for dLLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出BMC方法，通过几何视角评估扩散大语言模型的推理轨迹稳定性，无需训练即可诊断推理有效性、优化推理过程并增强模型对齐。
AI.motivation: 扩散大语言模型(dLLMs)在全局规划方面有优势，但缺乏有效验证其推理轨迹正确性的方法。需要一种能够评估推理过程是否遵循有效路径的机制。
AI.method: 提出"流形推理"的几何视角，认为有效推理轨迹位于学习分布的高密度流形上。引入双向流形一致性(BMC)度量，通过前向掩码和后向重建循环来量化生成序列的稳定性。
AI.result: BMC在三个推理生命周期阶段都表现出色：1)诊断阶段能有效区分解决方案有效性；2)推理阶段能通过拒绝重采样优化计算资源分配；3)对齐阶段能作为密集几何奖励，实现细粒度指导。
AI.conclusion: 内在几何稳定性是dLLMs正确性的可靠指标，BMC提供了一种无需训练、无监督的方法来评估和改进扩散大语言模型的推理质量。

title: Operationalizing Fairness in Text-to-Image Models: A Survey of Bias, Fairness Audits and Mitigation Strategies
comment: ICLR 2026 Algorithmic Fairness Across Alignment Procedures and Agentic Systems (AFAA) Workshop, reviews can be found at: https://openreview.net/forum?id=8DOkyBGWwP
summary: Text-to-Image (T2I) generation models have been widely adopted across various industries, yet are criticized for frequently exhibiting societal stereotypes. While a growing body of research has emerged to evaluate and mitigate these biases, the field at present contends with conceptual ambiguity, for example terms like "bias" and "fairness" are not always clearly distinguished and often lack clear operational definitions. This paper provides a comprehensive systematic review of T2I fairness literature, organizing existing work into a taxonomy of bias types and fairness notions. We critically assess the gap between "target fairness" (normative ideals in T2I outputs) and "threshold fairness" (normative standards with actionable decision rules). Furthermore, we survey the landscape of mitigation strategies, ranging from prompt engineering to diffusion process manipulation. We conclude by proposing a new framework for operationalizing fairness that moves beyond descriptive metrics towards rigorous, target-based testing, offering an approach for more accountable generative AI development.

AI.tldr: 本文对文本到图像生成模型中的公平性研究进行了系统性综述，提出了新的公平性操作化框架。
AI.motivation: T2I生成模型广泛使用但常表现出社会刻板印象，现有研究存在概念模糊问题（如"偏见"和"公平性"定义不清），需要系统梳理和澄清。
AI.method: 1) 对T2I公平性文献进行全面系统综述；2) 将现有工作组织成偏见类型和公平性概念的分类法；3) 批判性评估"目标公平性"与"阈值公平性"之间的差距；4) 调查缓解策略（从提示工程到扩散过程操纵）；5) 提出超越描述性指标的新公平性操作化框架。
AI.result: 建立了T2I公平性研究的分类体系，识别了目标公平性（规范性理想）与阈值公平性（可操作决策标准）之间的差距，总结了现有缓解策略，提出了新的公平性测试框架。
AI.conclusion: 需要超越描述性指标，采用基于目标的严格测试方法来操作化公平性，为更负责任的可生成AI开发提供方法。

title: Step-GRPO: Internalizing Dynamic Early Exit for Efficient Reasoning
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication at the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026)
summary: Large reasoning models that use long chain-of-thought excel at problem-solving yet waste compute on redundant checks. Curbing this overthinking is hard: training-time length penalties can cripple ability, while inference-time early-exit adds system overhead. To bridge this gap, we propose Step-GRPO, a novel post-training framework that internalizes dynamic early-exit capabilities directly into the model. Step-GRPO shifts the optimization objective from raw tokens to semantic steps by utilizing linguistic markers to structure reasoning. We introduce a Dynamic Truncated Rollout mechanism that exposes the model to concise high-confidence trajectories during exploration, synergized with a Step-Aware Relative Reward that dynamically penalizes redundancy based on group-level baselines. Extensive experiments across three model sizes on diverse benchmarks demonstrate that Step-GRPO achieves a superior accuracy-efficiency trade-off. On Qwen3-8B, our method reduces token consumption by 32.0\% compared to the vanilla model while avoiding the accuracy degradation observed in traditional length-penalty methods.

AI.tldr: Step-GRPO：一种后训练框架，通过内部化动态提前退出能力来减少推理模型中的冗余计算，在保持准确性的同时显著降低token消耗
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型使用长思维链解决问题时，经常在冗余检查上浪费计算资源。现有的解决方案存在缺陷：训练时的长度惩罚会损害模型能力，而推理时的提前退出会增加系统开销。需要一种方法在保持模型能力的同时减少冗余计算。
AI.method: Step-GRPO框架通过语言标记结构化推理，将优化目标从原始token转移到语义步骤。引入动态截断展开机制，在探索过程中向模型展示简洁的高置信度轨迹，并结合基于组级基线的步骤感知相对奖励来动态惩罚冗余。
AI.result: 在三个不同模型大小和多样化基准测试上的广泛实验表明，Step-GRPO实现了优越的准确性与效率权衡。在Qwen3-8B模型上，该方法相比原始模型减少了32.0%的token消耗，同时避免了传统长度惩罚方法中观察到的准确性下降。
AI.conclusion: Step-GRPO成功地将动态提前退出能力内部化到模型中，在保持推理能力的同时显著提高了计算效率，为大型推理模型的优化提供了一种有效的后训练解决方案。

title: Detecting Alarming Student Verbal Responses using Text and Audio Classifier
comment: 9 Pages. Paper to be Presented at the National Council on Measurement in Education Conference on April 10, 2026
summary: This paper addresses a critical safety gap in the use Automated Verbal Response Scoring (AVRS). We present a novel hybrid framework for troubled student detection that combines a text classifier, trained to detect responses based on their content, and an audio classifier, trained to detect responses using prosodic markers. This approach overcomes key limitations of traditional AVRS systems by considering both content and prosody of responses, achieving enhanced performance in identifying potentially concerning responses. This system can expedite the review process by humans, which can be life-saving particularly when timely intervention may be crucial.

AI.tldr: 提出结合文本分类器和音频分类器的混合框架，用于检测学生异常反应，提升自动语音评分系统的安全性
AI.motivation: 解决自动语音评分系统在安全检测方面的关键缺陷，传统系统无法同时考虑回答内容和语音特征，可能错过需要及时干预的异常反应
AI.method: 开发混合框架：文本分类器基于回答内容检测，音频分类器基于韵律特征检测，两者结合克服传统系统局限性
AI.result: 该方法在识别潜在问题回答方面表现出增强性能，能够更准确地检测需要关注的异常反应
