Complementing this, we design a Multi-Resolution Wavelet Mixing (MR-WM) module for the frequency modality, which explicitly decouples non-stationary signals into trend and noise components to achieve fine-grained time-frequency localization. Finally, a streaming linear branch is retained in the time domain to anchor numerical stability. By dynamically fusing these three complementary representations, TriTS effectively adapts to diverse data contexts. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that TriTS achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance, fundamentally outperforming existing vision-based forecasters by drastically reducing both parameter count and inference latency.

AI.tldr: TriTS：一种跨模态解缠框架，将1D时间序列投影到正交的时间、频率和2D视觉空间，通过多模态融合实现长期时间序列预测的SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 长期时间序列预测（LTSF）面临挑战，因为现实世界信号包含高度纠缠的时间动态，难以从纯1D视角完全捕捉。需要打破这种表示瓶颈。
AI.method: 1）提出TriTS框架，将1D时间序列投影到三个正交空间：时间、频率和2D视觉；2）引入Period-Aware Reshaping策略和Visual Mamba，以线性计算复杂度建模跨周期依赖；3）设计多分辨率小波混合模块，将非平稳信号解耦为趋势和噪声成分；4）保留时间域中的流式线性分支以保持数值稳定性；5）动态融合这三种互补表示。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，TriTS实现了最先进的性能，通过大幅减少参数数量和推理延迟，从根本上优于现有的基于视觉的预测器。
AI.conclusion: TriTS通过跨模态解缠和多模态融合，有效解决了长期时间序列预测中的表示瓶颈问题，在保持计算效率的同时实现了优异的预测性能。

title: Formal Foundations of Agentic Business Process Management
summary: Just like traditional BPM systems, agentic BPM systems are built around a specification of the process under consideration. Their distinguishing feature, however, is that the execution of the process is driven by multiple autonomous decision-makers, referred to as agents. Since such agents cannot be fully controlled, the process specification is augmented with explicit objectives, or goals, assigned to the participating agents. Agents then pursue these goals, at least to the best of their efforts, under suitable assumptions on the behavior of others, by adopting appropriate strategies. Centrally, the organization enacting the process can use these specifications to provide guardrails on the decision-making capabilities of agents at the strategy level. This paper sets up the mathematical foundations of such systems in three key settings and analyzes four foundational problems of agentic BPM.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了智能体化业务流程管理（agentic BPM）的数学基础，分析了四个核心问题，通过多智能体决策框架为业务流程执行提供保障。
AI.motivation: 传统BPM系统由集中式控制器驱动，而智能体化BPM系统由多个自主决策者（智能体）驱动。由于智能体无法完全控制，需要建立数学框架来确保流程规范在自主决策环境下的可靠执行。
AI.method: 在三种关键设置下建立数学基础：1）为流程规范增强明确的目标/目标分配；2）智能体在他人行为假设下采用适当策略追求目标；3）组织在策略层面为智能体决策能力提供保障。
AI.result: 建立了智能体化BPM系统的数学框架，分析了四个基础问题，为自主智能体驱动的业务流程管理提供了理论基础和保障机制。
AI.conclusion: 智能体化BPM系统通过多智能体决策框架扩展了传统BPM，为自主决策环境下的业务流程执行提供了数学基础和保障机制，解决了智能体不可完全控制带来的挑战。

title: Abstain-R1: Calibrated Abstention and Post-Refusal Clarification via Verifiable RL
summary: Reinforcement fine-tuning improves the reasoning ability of large language models, but it can also encourage them to answer unanswerable queries by guessing or hallucinating missing information. Existing abstention methods either train models to produce generic refusals or encourage follow-up clarifications without verifying whether those clarifications identify the key missing information. We study queries that are clear in meaning but cannot be reliably resolved from the given information, and argue that a reliable model should not only abstain, but also explain what is missing. We propose a clarification-aware RLVR reward that, while rewarding correct answers on answerable queries, jointly optimizes explicit abstention and semantically aligned post-refusal clarification on unanswerable queries. Using this reward, we train Abstain-R1, a 3B model that improves abstention and clarification on unanswerable queries while preserving strong performance on answerable ones. Experiments on Abstain-Test, Abstain-QA, and SelfAware show that Abstain-R1 substantially improves over its base model and achieves unanswerable-query behavior competitive with larger systems including DeepSeek-R1, suggesting that calibrated abstention and clarification can be learned through verifiable rewards rather than emerging from scale alone.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的强化学习奖励机制，用于训练语言模型在面对无法回答的问题时，不仅能够拒绝回答，还能提供语义对齐的澄清说明，指出缺失的关键信息。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在局限性：要么训练模型产生通用的拒绝回答，要么鼓励后续澄清但不验证澄清是否识别了关键缺失信息。对于含义明确但无法从给定信息可靠解决的问题，可靠模型不仅应拒绝回答，还应解释缺失什么。
AI.method: 提出了clarification-aware RLVR奖励机制，在可回答问题上奖励正确答案，同时在无法回答的问题上联合优化显式拒绝和语义对齐的拒绝后澄清。使用此奖励训练了Abstain-R1模型（3B参数）。
AI.result: 在Abstain-Test、Abstain-QA和SelfAware等基准测试中，Abstain-R1显著优于其基础模型，在无法回答问题的处理上与包括DeepSeek-R1在内的更大系统竞争，表明校准的拒绝和澄清可以通过可验证的奖励学习，而不仅仅是规模扩展的副产品。
AI.conclusion: 通过可验证的强化学习奖励机制，可以训练模型在面对无法回答的问题时表现出校准的拒绝和澄清行为，这种能力不一定需要大规模模型才能获得，而是可以通过专门的训练方法实现。

title: Self-Reinforcing Controllable Synthesis of Rare Relational Data via Bayesian Calibration
comment: Accepted to appear at: Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026 (ACL 2026 Findings), San Diego, California, USA, July 2-7, 2026
summary: Imbalanced data is commonly present in real-world applications. While data synthesis can effectively mitigate the data scarcity problem of rare-classes, and LLMs have revolutionized text generation, the application of LLMs to relational/structured tabular data synthesis remains underexplored. Moreover, existing approaches lack an effective feedback mechanism that can guide LLMs towards continuously optimizing the quality of the generated data throughout the synthesis process. In this work, we propose RDDG, Relational Data generator with Dynamic Guidance, which is a unified in-context learning framework that employs progressive chain-of-thought (CoT) steps to generate tabular data for enhancing downstream imbalanced classification performance. RDDG first uses core set selection to identify representative samples from the original data, then utilizes in-context learning to discover the inherent patterns and correlations among attributes within the core set, and subsequently generates tabular data while preserving the aforementioned constraints. More importantly, it incorporates a self-reinforcing feedback mechanism that provides automatic assessments on the quality of the generated data, enabling continuous quality optimization throughout the generation process. Experimental results on multiple real and synthetic datasets demonstrate that RDDG outperforms existing approaches in both data fidelity and downstream imbalanced classification performance. We make our code available at https://github.com/cszhangLMU/RDDG.

AI.tldr: RDDG：基于动态指导的关系数据生成框架，利用LLM通过上下文学习和自增强反馈机制生成高质量表格数据，提升不平衡分类性能
AI.motivation: 现实应用中普遍存在数据不平衡问题，虽然数据合成能缓解稀有类数据稀缺问题，但LLM在关系/结构化表格数据生成方面的应用仍未被充分探索，且现有方法缺乏有效的反馈机制来持续优化生成数据质量
AI.method: 提出RDDG框架：1) 使用核心集选择从原始数据中识别代表性样本；2) 通过上下文学习发现核心集中属性间的内在模式和相关性；3) 生成表格数据并保持上述约束；4) 引入自增强反馈机制，自动评估生成数据质量，实现持续优化
AI.result: 在多个真实和合成数据集上的实验表明，RDDG在数据保真度和下游不平衡分类性能方面均优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: RDDG是一个统一的上下文学习框架，通过渐进式思维链步骤和自增强反馈机制，有效生成高质量表格数据，显著提升不平衡分类任务的性能

title: Frozen Vision Transformers for Dense Prediction on Small Datasets: A Case Study in Arrow Localization
summary: We present a system for automated detection, localization, and scoring of arrow punctures on 40\,cm indoor archery target faces, trained on only 48 annotated photographs (5{,}084 punctures). Our pipeline combines three components: a color-based canonical rectification stage that maps perspective-distorted photographs into a standardized coordinate system where pixel distances correspond to known physical measurements; a frozen self-supervised vision transformer (DINOv3 ViT-L/16) paired with AnyUp guided feature upsampling to recover sub-millimeter spatial precision from $32 \times 32$ patch tokens; and lightweight CenterNet-style detection heads for arrow-center heatmap prediction. Only 3.8\,M of 308\,M total parameters are trainable. Across three cross-validation folds, we achieve a mean F1 score of $0.893 \pm 0.011$ and a mean localization error of $1.41 \pm 0.06$\,mm, comparable to or better than prior fully-supervised approaches that require substantially more training data. An ablation study shows that the CenterNet offset regression head, typically essential for sub-pixel refinement, provides negligible detection improvement while degrading localization in our setting. This suggests that guided feature upsampling already resolves the spatial precision lost through patch tokenization. On downstream archery metrics, the system recovers per-image average arrow scores with a median error of 1.8\% and group centroid positions to within a median of 4.00\,mm. These results demonstrate that frozen foundation models with minimal task-specific adaptation offer a practical paradigm for dense prediction in small-data regimes.

AI.tldr: 基于48张标注照片训练的系统，用于自动检测、定位和评分40厘米室内射箭靶面上的箭孔，使用冻结的DINOv3 ViT-L/16模型和轻量级检测头，在少量数据下达到高精度。
AI.motivation: 解决在少量标注数据下实现高精度箭孔检测的问题，探索冻结基础模型在密集预测任务中的潜力，减少对大量训练数据的依赖。
AI.method: 1) 基于颜色的规范化校正阶段，将透视失真照片映射到标准化坐标系；2) 冻结的自监督视觉变换器(DINOv3 ViT-L/16)配合AnyUp引导特征上采样，从32×32补丁标记恢复亚毫米空间精度；3) 轻量级CenterNet风格检测头进行箭孔中心热图预测。
AI.result: 在三次交叉验证中，平均F1分数为0.893±0.011，平均定位误差为1.41±0.06毫米，优于或媲美需要更多训练数据的全监督方法。在箭术指标上，每张图像平均箭分恢复的中位误差为1.8%，组质心位置中位误差为4.00毫米。
AI.conclusion: 冻结的基础模型配合最小任务特定适配，为小数据密集预测任务提供了实用范式，引导特征上采样已能解决补丁标记化带来的空间精度损失问题。

title: SOCIA-EVO: Automated Simulator Construction via Dual-Anchored Bi-Level Optimization
comment: This paper has been accepted to the ACL 2026 Main Conference
summary: Automated simulator construction requires distributional fidelity, distinguishing it from generic code generation. We identify two failure modes in long-horizon LLM agents: contextual drift and optimization instability arising from conflating structural and parametric errors. We propose SOCIA-EVO, a dual-anchored evolutionary framework. SOCIA-EVO introduces: (1) a static blueprint to enforce empirical constraints; (2) a bi-level optimization to decouple structural refinement from parameter calibration; and (3) a self-curating Strategy Playbook that manages remedial hypotheses via Bayesian-weighted retrieval. By falsifying ineffective strategies through execution feedback, SOCIA-EVO achieves robust convergence, generating simulators that are statistically consistent with observational data. The code and data of SOCIA-EVO are available here: https://github.com/cruiseresearchgroup/SOCIA/tree/evo.

AI.tldr: SOCIA-EVO：一个双锚定进化框架，通过静态蓝图、双层优化和策略手册解决LLM智能体在长时程任务中的上下文漂移和优化不稳定问题，生成与观测数据统计一致的模拟器。
AI.motivation: 自动化模拟器构建需要分布保真度，这与通用代码生成不同。研究发现长时程LLM智能体存在两种失效模式：上下文漂移和优化不稳定，这些源于结构误差与参数误差的混淆。
AI.method: 提出SOCIA-EVO双锚定进化框架：1）静态蓝图强制执行经验约束；2）双层优化解耦结构精炼与参数校准；3）自管理策略手册通过贝叶斯加权检索管理补救假设。通过执行反馈证伪无效策略。
AI.result: SOCIA-EVO实现了稳健收敛，生成的模拟器与观测数据统计一致。代码和数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: SOCIA-EVO通过解耦结构优化与参数校准，解决了长时程LLM智能体的关键失效模式，为自动化模拟器构建提供了有效的双锚定进化框架。

title: Auditing Support Strategies in LLMs through Grounded Multi-Turn Social Simulation
summary: When users seek social support from chatbots, they disclose their situation gradually, yet most evaluations of supportive LLMs rely on single-turn, fully specified prompts. We introduce a multi-turn simulation framework that closes this gap. Support-seeking narratives from five Reddit communities are decomposed into ordered fragments and revealed turn by turn to a language model. Each response is coded with the Social Support Behavior Code (SSBC), an established multi-label taxonomy that captures the composition of support, rather than a single quality score. To ask whether support choices track the model's own construal of user distress, we use linear probes on hidden representations to estimate this internal signal without altering the generation context. Across two mid-scale models (Llama-3.1-8B, OLMo-3-7B) and more than 6,200 turns, support composition shifts systematically with estimated distress: teaching declines as estimated distress rises, a finding that replicates across architectures, while increases in affective and esteem-oriented strategies (such as validation) are suggestive but model-specific and rest on noisier annotations. Community context independently shapes behavior, tracking topic and discourse norms rather than demographic categories. These trajectory-level dynamics, invisible to single-turn evaluation, motivate multi-turn auditing frameworks for socially sensitive applications.

AI.tldr: 论文提出多轮模拟框架评估支持性LLM，发现支持策略随用户痛苦程度变化：教学减少，情感支持增加，社区背景影响行为
AI.motivation: 用户向聊天机器人寻求社会支持时会逐步披露情况，但现有评估多基于单轮、完全指定的提示，缺乏多轮交互的真实性评估
AI.method: 1) 从五个Reddit社区收集支持寻求叙事，分解为有序片段逐轮呈现给语言模型；2) 使用社会支持行为代码(SSBC)多标签分类法编码响应；3) 使用线性探针估计模型内部痛苦信号而不改变生成上下文
AI.result: 1) 支持策略随估计痛苦程度系统变化：教学随痛苦上升而减少（跨架构可复现）；2) 情感和自尊导向策略（如验证）增加但模型特定且注释噪声大；3) 社区背景独立影响行为，反映话题和话语规范而非人口统计类别
AI.conclusion: 多轮动态在单轮评估中不可见，需要为社交敏感应用开发多轮审计框架，以更真实地评估支持性语言模型的行为模式

title: R&F-Inventory: A Large-Scale Dataset for Monotonic Inventory Estimation in Reach and Frequency Advertising
summary: Reach and Frequency (R&F) contract advertising is an important form of widely used brand advertising. Unlike performance advertising, R&F contracts emphasize controllable delivery of UV and PV under given targeting, scheduling, and frequency control constraints. In practical systems, advertisers typically need to view the UV, PV change curves at different budget levels in real time when creating an R&F contract. However, most existing publicly available advertising datasets are based on independent samples, lacking a characterization of the core structure of the "budget-performance curve" (including UV and PV) in R&F contracts.This paper proposes and releases a large-scale R&F contract inventory estimation dataset. This dataset uses the R&F contract context consisting of "targeting-scheduling-frequency control" as the basic context, providing observations of UV and PV corresponding to multiple budget points within the same context, thus forming a complete budget-performance curve. The dataset explicitly includes a time-window-based frequency control mechanism (e.g.,"no more than 3 times within 5 days") and naturally satisfies the monotonicity and diminishing marginal returns characteristics in the budget and scheduling dimensions. We further derive the theoretical maximum exposure ceiling and use it as a consistency check to evaluate data quality and the feasibility of model predictions. Using this data set, this paper defines two standardized benchmark tasks: single-point performance prediction and reconstruction of budget-performance curves, and provides a set of reproducible baseline methods and evaluation protocols. This dataset can support systematic research on problems such as structural constraint learning, monotonic regression, curve consistency modeling, and R&F contract planning.The code for our experiments can be found at https://github.com/pengyunshan/RF-Inventory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并发布了一个大规模R&F合约库存估计数据集，该数据集以"定向-排期-频控"为基本上下文，提供同一上下文中多个预算点对应的UV和PV观测值，形成完整的预算-性能曲线，支持R&F合约广告研究。
AI.motivation: 现有公开广告数据集大多基于独立样本，缺乏对R&F合约中"预算-性能曲线"核心结构的刻画。广告主在创建R&F合约时需要实时查看不同预算水平下的UV、PV变化曲线，但现有数据无法满足这一需求。
AI.method: 构建大规模R&F合约库存估计数据集，以"定向-排期-频控"为基本上下文，提供同一上下文中多个预算点对应的UV和PV观测值，形成完整的预算-性能曲线。数据集包含基于时间窗口的频控机制，并满足预算和排期维度的单调性和边际收益递减特性。推导理论最大曝光上限用于数据质量评估和模型预测可行性检验。
AI.result: 发布了大规模R&F合约库存估计数据集，定义了单点性能预测和预算-性能曲线重构两个标准化基准任务，提供了一套可复现的基线方法和评估协议。数据集支持结构约束学习、单调回归、曲线一致性建模和R&F合约规划等问题的系统性研究。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了R&F合约广告研究领域的数据空白，为广告库存估计、预算分配优化等实际问题提供了标准化研究平台，有助于推动R&F合约广告算法的研究和应用。

title: FairNVT: Improving Fairness via Noise Injection in Vision Transformers
comment: ICLR 2026 Algorithmic Fairness Across Alignment Procedures and Agentic Systems (AFAA) Workshop
summary: This paper presents FairNVT, a lightweight debiasing framework for pretrained transformer-based encoders that improves both representation and prediction level fairness while preserving task accuracy. Unlike many existing debiasing approaches that address these notions separately, we argue they are inherently connected: suppressing sensitive information at the representation level can facilitate fairer predictions. Our approach learns task-relevant and sensitive embeddings via lightweight adapters, applies calibrated Gaussian noise to the sensitive embedding, and fuses it with the task representation. Together with orthogonality constraints and fairness regularization, these components jointly reduce sensitive-attribute leakage in the learned embeddings and encourage fairer downstream predictions. The framework is compatible with a wide range of pretrained transformer encoders. Across three datasets spanning vision and language, FairNVT reduces sensitive-attribute attacker accuracy, improves demographic-parity and equalized-odds metrics, and maintains high task performance.

AI.tldr: FairNVT是一个轻量级的去偏框架，通过适配器学习任务相关和敏感嵌入，应用校准高斯噪声，结合正交约束和公平性正则化，在保持任务准确性的同时改善表示层和预测层的公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏方法通常单独处理表示层和预测层的公平性，但作者认为这两者本质上是相互关联的：在表示层抑制敏感信息可以促进更公平的预测。
AI.method: 通过轻量级适配器学习任务相关和敏感嵌入，对敏感嵌入应用校准高斯噪声，然后与任务表示融合。结合正交约束和公平性正则化，共同减少学习嵌入中的敏感属性泄漏并鼓励更公平的下游预测。
AI.result: 在涵盖视觉和语言的三个数据集上，FairNVT降低了敏感属性攻击者准确率，改善了人口统计平等和机会均等指标，同时保持了高任务性能。
AI.conclusion: FairNVT提供了一个兼容多种预训练Transformer编码器的轻量级去偏框架，能够同时改善表示层和预测层的公平性，同时保持任务准确性，证明了两个公平性层面之间的内在联系。

title: Hive: A Multi-Agent Infrastructure for Algorithm- and Task-Level Scaling
summary:
Large language models are increasingly deployed as complex agentic systems that scale with task complexity. While prior work has extensively explored model- and system-level scaling, algorithm- and task-level scaling remain largely unaddressed, constraining the full potential of agentic systems. At the algorithm level, allocating additional inference-time computation can enhance workflow capacity but introduces cross-path redundancy: overlapping computations across multiple reasoning branches. At the task level, complex tasks can be decomposed into subproblems and delegated across multiple agents for improved scalability and parallelism. However, existing infrastructures' scheduling is unaware of the existence of multiple agents, missing opportunities to optimize resource allocation.
  We propose Hive, a multi-agent infrastructure that enables algorithm- and task-level scaling. Hive features a description frontend that captures per-agent behavior and supports test-time scaling algorithms. Leveraging this specification, our backend introduces two key mechanisms: Logits Cache that reuses intermediate logits across redundant sampling paths to mitigate cross-path redundancy at the algorithm level, and Agent-Aware Scheduling that efficiently allocates compute and KV-cache resources according to agent contributions at the task level. Experiments show that Logits Cache achieves an average speedup of $1.11\times$-$1.76\times$ for re-sampling, and Agent-Aware Scheduling reduces the hotspot miss rate by $33\%$-$51\%$.

AI.tldr: Hive是一个多智能体基础设施，支持算法级和任务级扩展，通过Logits Cache减少跨路径冗余计算，通过Agent-Aware Scheduling优化资源分配。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体系统主要关注模型和系统级扩展，而算法级和任务级扩展未被充分探索，限制了智能体系统的潜力。算法级上，增加推理计算会引入跨路径冗余；任务级上，现有基础设施调度不了解多智能体存在，无法优化资源分配。
AI.method: 提出Hive多智能体基础设施：1) 描述前端捕获每个智能体行为并支持测试时扩展算法；2) Logits Cache重用中间logits减少跨路径冗余；3) Agent-Aware Scheduling根据智能体贡献高效分配计算和KV-cache资源。
AI.result: Logits Cache在重采样任务中实现1.11×-1.76×的平均加速；Agent-Aware Scheduling将热点缺失率降低33%-51%。
AI.conclusion: Hive通过算法级和任务级扩展机制，有效解决了多智能体系统中的计算冗余和资源分配问题，提升了智能体系统的整体性能。

title: Comparing Human and Large Language Model Interpretation of Implicit Information
summary: The interpretation of implicit meanings is an integral aspect of human communication. However, this framework may not transfer to interactions with Large Language Models (LLMs). To investigate this, we introduce the task of Implicit Information Extraction (IIE) and propose an LLM-based IIE pipeline that builds a structured knowledge graph from a context sentence by extracting relational triplets, validating implicit inferences, and analyzing temporal relations. We evaluate two LLMs against crowdsourced human judgments on two datasets. We find that humans agree with most model triplets yet consistently propose many additions, indicating limited coverage in current LLM-based IIE. Moreover, in our experiments, models appear to be more conservative about implicit inferences than humans in socially rich contexts, whereas humans become more conservative in shorter, fact-oriented contexts. Our code is available at https://github.com/Antonio-Dee/IIE_from_LLM.

AI.tldr: 论文提出隐式信息抽取任务，构建基于LLM的IIE流程来从上下文句子中提取关系三元组、验证隐式推理和分析时间关系，发现LLM在隐式信息抽取方面覆盖有限且比人类更保守。
AI.motivation: 隐式意义理解是人类交流的重要部分，但大型语言模型是否具备类似能力尚不清楚。需要研究LLM在隐式信息抽取方面的表现，并与人类判断进行比较。
AI.method: 提出隐式信息抽取任务，设计基于LLM的IIE流程：从上下文句子中提取关系三元组、验证隐式推理、分析时间关系，构建结构化知识图谱。在两个数据集上评估两个LLM，并与众包人类判断进行比较。
AI.result: 人类同意大多数模型提取的三元组，但会提出更多补充，表明当前LLM-based IIE覆盖有限。在社交丰富的上下文中，模型比人类更保守于隐式推理；而在简短事实导向的上下文中，人类变得更保守。
AI.conclusion: LLM在隐式信息抽取方面仍有局限，覆盖范围有限且推理保守性因上下文类型而异。需要进一步改进LLM的隐式理解能力。

title: The Illusion of Certainty: Decoupling Capability and Calibration in On-Policy Distillation
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) is an increasingly important paradigm for post-training language models. However, we identify a pervasive Scaling Law of Miscalibration: while OPD effectively improves task accuracy, it systematically traps models in severe overconfidence. We trace this failure to an information mismatch: teacher supervision is formed under privileged context available during training, whereas the deployed model must report confidence using only deployment-time information. We formalize this perspective theoretically, showing that teacher-conditioned success is generally not a valid target for deployment-time confidence and that helpful privileged context induces entropy collapse and a systematic optimism bias. To address this, we propose a calibration-aware OPD framework, CaOPD, that estimates empirical confidence from model rollouts, replaces self-reported confidence with this student-grounded target, and distills the revised response through the same self-distillation pipeline. Experiments across various models and domains show that CaOPD achieves Pareto-optimal calibration while maintaining competitive capability, generalizing robustly under out-of-distribution and continual learning. Our findings highlight that capability distillation does not imply calibrated confidence, and that confidence should be treated as an essential objective in post-training. Code: https://github.com/SalesforceAIResearch/CaOPD

AI.tldr: OPD提升任务准确率但导致严重过度自信，作者提出CaOPD框架通过基于模型rollout的置信度估计实现帕累托最优校准
AI.motivation: 发现在线蒸馏存在普遍的比例误校准定律：虽然能有效提升任务准确率，但系统性地使模型陷入严重过度自信。这源于信息不匹配问题——教师监督基于训练时的特权上下文，而部署模型只能使用部署时信息报告置信度。
AI.method: 提出校准感知的在线蒸馏框架CaOPD：1) 从模型rollout估计经验置信度；2) 用学生接地气的目标替换自报告的置信度；3) 通过相同的自蒸馏流程蒸馏修订后的响应。
AI.result: 在各种模型和领域上的实验表明，CaOPD实现了帕累托最优校准，同时保持竞争力，在分布外和持续学习场景下具有鲁棒泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 能力蒸馏并不意味着校准的置信度，置信度应被视为后训练中的重要目标。CaOPD框架有效解决了在线蒸馏中的误校准问题。

title: EdgeVTP: Exploration of Latency-efficient Trajectory Prediction for Edge-based Embedded Vision Applications
summary: Vehicle trajectory prediction is central to highway perception, but deployment on roadside edge devices necessitates bounded, deterministic end-to-end latency. We present EdgeVTP, an embedded-first trajectory predictor that combines interaction-aware graph modeling with a lightweight transformer backbone and a one-shot curve decoder. By predicting future motion as compact curve parameters (anchored at the last observed position) rather than horizon-scaled autoregressive waypoints, EdgeVTP reduces decoding overhead while producing smooth trajectories. To keep runtime predictable in crowded scenes, we explicitly bound interaction complexity via a locality graph with a hard neighbor cap. Across three highway benchmarks and two Jetson-class platforms, EdgeVTP achieves the lowest measured end-to-end latency under a protocol that includes graph construction and post-processing, while attaining state-of-the-art (SotA) prediction accuracy on two of the three datasets and competitive error on other benchmarks. Our code is available at https://github.com/SeungjinStevenKim/EdgeVTP.

AI.tldr: EdgeVTP：一种面向边缘设备的车辆轨迹预测模型，通过交互感知图建模、轻量级Transformer主干和一次性曲线解码器，在保证预测精度的同时实现确定性的端到端低延迟。
AI.motivation: 高速公路感知中的车辆轨迹预测需要在路边边缘设备上部署，这要求有界、确定性的端到端延迟。现有方法在拥挤场景中运行时延不可预测，且解码开销较大。
AI.method: 1. 结合交互感知图建模与轻量级Transformer主干；2. 使用一次性曲线解码器，将未来运动预测为紧凑的曲线参数（锚定在最后观测位置），而非按时间步自回归预测路径点；3. 通过带有硬邻居上限的局部性图显式限制交互复杂度，确保运行时延可预测。
AI.result: 在三个高速公路基准测试和两个Jetson级平台上，EdgeVTP在包含图构建和后处理的协议下实现了最低的端到端延迟。在两个数据集上达到最先进的预测精度，在其他基准测试上具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: EdgeVTP通过紧凑的曲线参数预测和硬邻居限制，在边缘设备上实现了确定性低延迟和高精度的车辆轨迹预测，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

title: T-DuMpRa: Teacher-guided Dual-path Multi-prototype Retrieval Augmented framework for fine-grained medical image classification
summary: Fine-grained medical image classification is challenged by subtle inter-class variations and visually ambiguous cases, where confidence estimates often exhibit uncertainty rather than being overconfident. In such scenarios, purely discriminative classifiers may achieve high overall accuracy yet still fail to distinguish between highly similar categories, leading to miscalibrated predictions. We propose T-DuMpRa, a teacher-guided dual-path multi-prototype retrieval-augmented framework, where discriminative classification and multi-prototype retrieval jointly drive both training and prediction. During training, we jointly optimize cross-entropy and supervised contrastive objectives to learn a cosine-compatible embedding geometry for reliable prototype matching. We further employ an exponential moving average (EMA) teacher to obtain smoother representations and build a multi-prototype memory bank by clustering teacher embeddings in the teacher embedding space. Our framework is plug-and-play: it can be easily integrated into existing classification models by constructing a compact prototype bank, thereby improving performance on visually ambiguous cases. At inference, we combine the classifier's predicted distribution with a similarity-based distribution computed via cosine matching to prototypes, and apply a conservative confidence-gated fusion that activates retrieval only when the classifier's prediction is uncertain and the retrieval evidence is decisive and conflicting, otherwise keeping confident predictions unchanged. On HAM10000 and ISIC2019, our method yields 0.68%-0.21% and 0.44%-2.69% improvements on 5 different backbones. And visualization analysis proves our model can enhance the model's ability to handle visually ambiguous cases.

AI.tldr: T-DuMpRa是一个教师引导的双路径多原型检索增强框架，通过结合判别分类和多原型检索来处理医学图像分类中的视觉模糊案例，提高模型对相似类别的区分能力。
AI.motivation: 细粒度医学图像分类面临类间差异细微和视觉模糊案例的挑战，传统判别分类器虽然能达到高准确率，但在区分高度相似类别时容易产生错误校准的预测，需要处理预测不确定性的问题。
AI.method: 提出教师引导的双路径多原型检索增强框架，联合优化交叉熵和监督对比学习目标，学习余弦兼容的嵌入几何。使用EMA教师获得平滑表示，在教师嵌入空间通过聚类构建多原型记忆库。推理时结合分类器预测分布和基于余弦匹配的原型相似性分布，采用保守的置信门控融合策略。
AI.result: 在HAM10000和ISIC2019数据集上，在5种不同骨干网络上分别获得0.68%-0.21%和0.44%-2.69%的性能提升。可视化分析证明模型能够增强处理视觉模糊案例的能力。
AI.conclusion: T-DuMpRa是一个即插即用的框架，可轻松集成到现有分类模型中，通过构建紧凑的原型库来改善视觉模糊案例的性能，有效处理医学图像分类中的不确定性问题。

title: GenericAgent: A Token-Efficient Self-Evolving LLM Agent via Contextual Information Density Maximization (V1.0)
summary: Long-horizon large language model (LLM) agents are fundamentally limited by context. As interactions become longer, tool descriptions, retrieved memories, and raw environmental feedback accumulate and push out the information needed for decision-making. At the same time, useful experience gained from tasks is often lost across episodes. We argue that long-horizon performance is determined not by context length, but by how much decision-relevant information is maintained within a finite context budget. We present GenericAgent (GA), a general-purpose, self-evolving LLM agent system built around a single principle: context information density maximization. GA implements this through four closely connected components: a minimal atomic tool set that keeps the interface simple, a hierarchical on-demand memory that only shows a small high-level view by default, a self-evolution mechanism that turns verified past trajectories into reusable SOPs and executable code, and a context truncation and compression layer that maintains information density during long executions. Across task completion, tool use efficiency, memory effectiveness, self-evolution, and web browsing, GA consistently outperforms leading agent systems while using significantly fewer tokens and interactions, and it continues to evolve over time. Project: https://github.com/lsdefine/GenericAgent

AI.tldr: GenericAgent (GA) 是一个通过最大化上下文信息密度来提升长时程LLM智能体性能的系统，它使用最小化工具集、分层按需记忆、自我进化机制和上下文压缩技术，在减少token使用的同时持续提升性能。
AI.motivation: 长时程LLM智能体受限于上下文长度，随着交互变长，工具描述、记忆检索和环境反馈会挤占决策所需信息，同时有用的任务经验在多次执行中丢失。作者认为性能不应由上下文长度决定，而应由有限上下文预算内保持的决策相关信息量决定。
AI.method: GA围绕"上下文信息密度最大化"原则构建，包含四个组件：1) 最小原子工具集保持接口简洁；2) 分层按需记忆默认只显示高层视图；3) 自我进化机制将已验证的过往轨迹转化为可重用SOP和可执行代码；4) 上下文截断和压缩层在执行过程中保持信息密度。
AI.result: 在任务完成、工具使用效率、记忆有效性、自我进化和网页浏览等方面，GA持续优于领先的智能体系统，同时使用显著更少的token和交互次数，并且能够随时间持续进化。
AI.conclusion: 长时程LLM智能体的性能瓶颈在于上下文信息密度而非长度，通过最大化信息密度的系统设计可以显著提升性能并减少资源消耗，同时实现持续自我进化。

title: Applications of deep generative models to DNA reaction kinetics and to cryogenic electron microscopy
summary: This dissertation explores how deep generative models can advance the analysis of challenging biological problems by integrating domain knowledge with deep learning. It focuses on two areas: DNA reaction kinetics and cryogenic electron microscopy (cryo-EM). In the first part, we present ViDa, a biophysics-informed framework leveraging variational autoencoders (VAEs) and geometric scattering transforms to generate biophysically-plausible embeddings of DNA reaction kinetics simulations. These embeddings are reduced to a two-dimensional space to visualize DNA hybridization and toehold-mediated strand displacement reactions. ViDa preserves structure and clusters trajectory ensembles into reaction pathways, making simulation results more interpretable and revealing new mechanistic insights. In the second part, we address key challenges in cryo-EM density map interpretation and protein structure modeling. We provide a comprehensive review and benchmarking of deep learning methods for atomic model building, with improved evaluation metrics and practical guidance. We then present Struc2mapGAN, a generative adversarial network that synthesizes high-fidelity experimental-like cryo-EM density maps from protein structures. Finally, we present CryoSAMU, a structure-aware multimodal U-Net that enhances intermediate-resolution cryo-EM maps by integrating density features with structural embeddings from protein language models via cross-attention. Overall, these contributions demonstrate the potential of deep generative models to interpret DNA reaction mechanisms and advance cryo-EM density map analysis and protein structure modeling.

AI.tldr: 该论文探索深度生成模型如何通过整合领域知识与深度学习来推进生物问题分析，重点研究DNA反应动力学和冷冻电镜两个领域，提出了多种创新方法。
AI.motivation: 解决生物学中具有挑战性的问题，特别是DNA反应动力学可视化和冷冻电镜密度图分析中的困难，需要将领域专业知识与深度学习相结合，以提高解释性和分析能力。
AI.method: 1. 针对DNA反应动力学：开发ViDa框架，结合变分自编码器(VAE)和几何散射变换，生成生物物理学可信的DNA反应动力学模拟嵌入表示；2. 针对冷冻电镜：提供深度学习方法的全面综述和基准测试，开发Struc2mapGAN从蛋白质结构生成高质量冷冻电镜密度图，以及CryoSAMU通过跨注意力机制整合密度特征和蛋白质语言模型的结构嵌入来增强中间分辨率密度图。
AI.result: ViDa能够将DNA杂交和脚趾介导的链置换反应轨迹集合聚类为反应路径，提高了模拟结果的可解释性并揭示了新的机制见解。冷冻电镜方面的方法改进了原子模型构建的评估指标，提供了实用指导，并能够生成高保真密度图。
AI.conclusion: 深度生成模型在解释DNA反应机制和推进冷冻电镜密度图分析及蛋白质结构建模方面具有巨大潜力，展示了领域知识与深度学习整合的价值。

title: Bridging Coarse and Fine Recognition: A Hybrid Approach for Open-Ended Multi-Granularity Object Recognition in Interactive Educational Games
summary: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have enabled open-ended object recognition, yet they struggle with fine-grained tasks. In contrast, CLIP-style models excel at fine-grained recognition but lack broad coverage of general object categories. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{HyMOR}, a \textbf{Hy}brid \textbf{M}ulti-granularity open-ended \textbf{O}bject \textbf{R}ecognition framework that integrates an MLLM with a CLIP model. In HyMOR, the MLLM performs open-ended and coarse-grained object recognition, while the CLIP model specializes in fine-grained identification of domain-specific objects such as animals and plants. This hybrid design enables accurate object understanding across multiple semantic granularities, serving as a robust perceptual foundation for downstream multi-modal content generation and interactive gameplay. To support evaluation in content-rich and educational scenarios, we introduce TBO (TextBook Objects), a dataset containing 20,942 images annotated with 8,816 object categories extracted from textbooks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HyMOR narrows the fine-grained recognition gap with CLIP to 0.2\% while improving general object recognition by 2.5\% over a baseline MLLM, measured by average Sentence-BERT (SBert) similarity. Overall, HyMOR achieves a 23.2\% improvement in average SBert across all evaluated datasets, highlighting its effectiveness in enabling accurate perception for multi-modal game content generation and interactive learning applications.

AI.tldr: HyMOR是一个混合多粒度开放目标识别框架，通过结合MLLM的开放识别能力和CLIP的细粒度识别能力，解决了现有模型在开放识别与细粒度识别之间的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 当前MLLM在开放目标识别方面表现良好但细粒度识别能力不足，而CLIP模型擅长细粒度识别但缺乏对通用目标类别的广泛覆盖。需要一种能够同时处理多粒度语义识别的框架，为多模态内容生成和交互式应用提供更强大的感知基础。
AI.method: 提出HyMOR混合框架，将MLLM用于开放和粗粒度目标识别，CLIP模型专门处理特定领域（如动植物）的细粒度识别。同时构建了TBO数据集，包含20,942张图像和8,816个从教科书中提取的目标类别，用于评估内容丰富的教育场景。
AI.result: HyMOR将细粒度识别与CLIP的差距缩小到0.2%，同时将通用目标识别性能比基线MLLM提高了2.5%。在所有评估数据集上，平均SBert相似度提高了23.2%，显著提升了多粒度识别的准确性。
AI.conclusion: HyMOR通过混合设计有效解决了多粒度目标识别问题，为多模态游戏内容生成和交互式学习应用提供了准确的感知基础，在开放识别和细粒度识别之间取得了良好平衡。

title: How Tokenization Limits Phonological Knowledge Representation in Language Models and How to Improve Them
summary: Tokenization is the first step in every language model (LM), yet it never takes the sounds of words into account. We investigate how tokenization influences text-only LMs' ability to represent phonological knowledge. Through a series of probing experiments, we show that subword-based tokenization systematically weakens the encoding of both local (e.g., rhyme) and global (e.g., syllabification) phonological features. To quantify this effect, we introduce the syllabification-tokenization alignment distance (STAD), a metric that measures the misalignment between a model's tokenization and the natural syllable boundaries of words, and find that higher misalignment correlates with poorer phonological representations, providing a simple diagnostic for phonology-aware tokenization. To address these limitations, we propose a lightweight IPA-based fine-tuning method that infuses phonological awareness into LMs, leading to consistent improvements across three phonology-related tasks while largely preserving math and general reasoning ability, with 1.1\% and 0.9\% drops on GSM8K and MMLU, respectively.

AI.tldr: 研究发现子词分词会削弱语言模型对语音特征的编码，提出音节-分词对齐距离指标来衡量这种影响，并提出基于IPA的轻量微调方法来增强模型的语音意识。
AI.motivation: 虽然分词是语言模型的第一步，但现有方法从未考虑词语的语音特征。研究者希望探究分词如何影响文本语言模型表示语音知识的能力，特别是子词分词对局部和全局语音特征的编码影响。
AI.method: 通过一系列探测实验分析分词对语音特征编码的影响；提出音节-分词对齐距离（STAD）指标来量化分词与自然音节边界的不对齐程度；提出基于国际音标（IPA）的轻量微调方法，将语音意识注入语言模型。
AI.result: 子词分词系统性地削弱了局部（如押韵）和全局（如音节划分）语音特征的编码；STAD指标显示分词与音节边界的不对齐程度越高，语音表示能力越差；IPA微调方法在三个语音相关任务上带来一致改进，同时基本保持数学和一般推理能力（GSM8K下降1.1%，MMLU下降0.9%）。
AI.conclusion: 分词对语言模型的语音表示能力有显著影响，子词分词会削弱语音特征的编码。提出的STAD指标可作为语音感知分词的有效诊断工具，而基于IPA的轻量微调方法能有效增强模型的语音意识，且不影响核心推理能力。

title: CCAR: Intrinsic Robustness as an Emergent Geometric Property
summary: Standard supervised learning optimizes for predictive accuracy but remains agnostic to the internal geometry of learned features, often yielding representations that are entangled and brittle. We propose Class-Conditional Activation Regularization (CCAR) to explicitly engineer the feature space, imposing a block-diagonal structure via a soft inductive bias. By shaping the latent representation to confine class energy to orthogonal subspaces, we create an intrinsic geometric scaffold that naturally filters noise and adversarial perturbations. We provide theoretical analysis linking this structural constraint to the maximization of the Fisher Discriminant Ratio, establishing a formal connection between geometric disentanglement and algorithmic stability. Empirically, this approach demonstrates that robustness is an emergent property of a well-engineered feature space, significantly outperforming baselines on label noise and input corruption benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出Class-Conditional Activation Regularization (CCAR)方法，通过软归纳偏置在特征空间中施加块对角结构，将类别能量限制在正交子空间，从而创建内在几何支架以过滤噪声和对抗扰动。
AI.motivation: 标准监督学习只优化预测准确率，但忽略了学习特征的内部几何结构，导致表示纠缠且脆弱。需要显式地设计特征空间几何结构以提高鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出类条件激活正则化(CCAR)，通过软归纳偏置在特征空间中施加块对角结构，将不同类别的特征能量限制在正交子空间中，创建几何支架来过滤噪声和对抗扰动。
AI.result: 理论分析表明该结构约束与Fisher判别比最大化相关，建立了几何解缠与算法稳定性之间的形式化联系。在标签噪声和输入损坏基准测试中显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒性是良好设计的特征空间涌现属性，通过显式地设计特征几何结构（块对角正交子空间），可以自然过滤噪声和对抗扰动，提高模型稳定性。

title: Improving Radio Interferometry Imaging by Explicitly Modeling Cross-Domain Consistency in Reconstruction
summary: Radio astronomy plays a crucial role in understanding the universe, particularly within the realm of non-thermal astrophysics. Images of celestial objects are derived from the signals (called visibility) measured by radio telescopes. Such imaging results, called dirty images, contain artifacts due to factors such as sparsity and therefore require reconstruction to improve imaging quality. Existing methods typically restrict reconstruction to a unimodal domain, either to the dirty image after imaging or to the sparse visibility prior to imaging. Focusing solely on each unimodal reconstruction results in the loss of complementary in-context information in either the visibility or image domain, leading to an incomplete modeling of mutual dependency and consistency. To address these challenges, we propose CDCRec, a multimodal radio interferometric data reconstruction method that explicitly models cross-domain consistency. We design a hierarchical multi-task and multi-stage framework to enhance the exploration of interplays between domains during reconstruction. Our experimental results demonstrate that CDCRec improves imaging performance through enhanced cross-domain correlation extraction. In particular, our self-supervised complementary modeling strategy is better than current methods at interferometric domain translations that rely heavily on recovering dense information from constrained source-domain data.

AI.tldr: CDCRec：一种多模态射电干涉数据重建方法，通过显式建模跨域一致性来改善射电天文图像质量
AI.motivation: 现有射电天文图像重建方法通常局限于单一模态域（脏图像域或稀疏可见度域），导致丢失互补的上下文信息，无法完整建模相互依赖性和一致性
AI.method: 提出CDCRec方法，设计分层多任务多阶段框架，显式建模跨域一致性，增强重建过程中域间相互作用的探索
AI.result: 实验结果表明CDCRec通过增强跨域相关性提取改善了成像性能，其自监督互补建模策略在从受限源域数据恢复密集信息的干涉域转换方面优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 多模态跨域一致性建模能有效提升射电干涉数据重建质量，为射电天文图像处理提供了新思路

title: Beyond Meta-Reasoning: Metacognitive Consolidation for Self-Improving LLM Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong reasoning capabilities, and as existing approaches for enhancing LLM reasoning continue to mature, increasing attention has shifted toward meta-reasoning as a promising direction for further improvement. However, most existing meta-reasoning methods remain episodic: they focus on executing complex meta-reasoning routines within individual instances, but ignore the accumulation of reusable meta-reasoning skills across instances, leading to recurring failure modes and repeatedly high metacognitive effort. In this paper, we introduce Metacognitive Consolidation, a novel framework in which a model consolidates metacognitive experience from past reasoning episodes into reusable knowledge that improves future meta-reasoning. We instantiate this framework by structuring instance-level problem solving into distinct roles for reasoning, monitoring, and control to generate rich, attributable meta-level traces. These traces are then consolidated through a hierarchical, multi-timescale update mechanism that gradually forms evolving meta-knowledge. Experimental results demonstrate consistent performance gains across benchmarks and backbone models, and show that performance improves as metacognitive experience accumulates over time.

AI.tldr: 提出Metacognitive Consolidation框架，通过将过去推理经验整合为可重用知识来改进元推理，实现跨实例的技能积累
AI.motivation: 现有元推理方法大多是片段式的，专注于单个实例内的复杂元推理流程，但忽略了跨实例可重用元推理技能的积累，导致重复的失败模式和高昂的元认知成本
AI.method: 将实例级问题解决结构化分为推理、监控和控制三个角色，生成丰富的可追溯元级轨迹；通过分层、多时间尺度的更新机制将这些轨迹整合为不断演化的元知识
AI.result: 实验结果显示在多个基准测试和骨干模型上都取得了持续的性能提升，并且性能随着元认知经验的积累而不断提高
AI.conclusion: Metacognitive Consolidation框架通过积累和整合元认知经验，能够有效提升大语言模型的元推理能力，为元推理研究提供了新的方向

title: Beyond Word Boundaries: A Hebrew Coreference Benchmark and an Evaluation Protocol for Morphologically Complex Text
summary: Coreference Resolution (CR) is a fundamental NLP task critical for long-form tasks as information extraction, summarization, and many business applications. However, CR methods originally designed for English struggle with Morphologically Rich Languages (MRLs), where mention boundaries do not necessarily align with word boundaries, and a single token may consist of multiple anaphors. CR modeling and evaluation protocols standardly assume that, as in English, words and mentions mostly align. However, this assumption breaks down in MRLs, particularly in the context of LLMs' raw-text processing and end-to-end tasks. To assess and address this challenge, we introduce {\em KibutzR}, the first comprehensive CR dataset for Modern Hebrew, an MRL rich with complex words and pronominal clitics. We deliver an annotated dataset that identifies mentions at word, sub-word and multi-word levels, and propose an evaluation protocol that directly addresses word/morpheme boundary discrepancies. Our experiments show that contemporary LLMs perform significantly worse on Hebrew than on English, and that performance degrades on raw unsegmented text. Crucially, we show an inverse performance-trend in Hebrew relative to English, where smaller encoders perform far better than contemporary decoder models, leaving ample space for investigation and improvement. We deliver a new benchmark for Hebrew coreference resolution and a segmentation-aware evaluation protocol to inform future work on other MRLs.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了KibutzR，首个现代希伯来语指代消解数据集，解决了形态丰富语言中词边界与指代边界不对齐的问题，并设计了新的评估协议。
AI.motivation: 指代消解是NLP基础任务，但现有方法主要针对英语设计，在形态丰富语言（如希伯来语）中表现不佳，因为词边界与指代边界不对齐，单个词可能包含多个指代项。
AI.method: 构建KibutzR数据集，在词、子词和多词层面标注指代；提出新的评估协议直接处理词/语素边界差异；测试当代LLM在希伯来语指代消解上的表现。
AI.result: 当代LLM在希伯来语上表现显著差于英语；在未分词原始文本上性能下降；希伯来语中呈现与英语相反的趋势：小型编码器模型表现优于大型解码器模型。
AI.conclusion: 为希伯来语指代消解提供了新基准和分词感知的评估协议，为其他形态丰富语言的研究提供了参考，表明需要专门针对MRLs设计更好的指代消解方法。

title: Learning to Trade Like an Expert: Cognitive Fine-Tuning for Stable Financial Reasoning in Language Models
summary: Recent deployments of large language models (LLMs) as autonomous trading agents raise questions about whether financial decision-making competence generalizes beyond specific market patterns and how it should be trained and evaluated in noisy markets lacking ground truth. We propose a structured framework for training and evaluating such models. Central to our approach is a curated, multiple-choice question (MCQ) dataset derived from classic textbooks and historical markets, verified by an AI committee, enriched with structured reasoning traces, and augmented to reduce shortcut learning. To evaluate whether performance on isolated MCQs generalizes to real-world trading, we introduce a two-stage protocol combining test-set evaluation with an MCQ-based chronological trading simulation. Extensive evaluations across market regimes provide statistically robust evidence that open models trained with our framework exhibit competitive, risk-aware behavior over time, outperform open-source baselines, and approach frontier-model performance at smaller scale. We release the dataset and evaluation framework to support further research.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个用于训练和评估大型语言模型作为自主交易代理的结构化框架，包括基于经典教材和历史市场的选择题数据集，以及结合测试集评估和时序交易模拟的两阶段评估协议。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型作为自主交易代理的部署引发了两个关键问题：1）金融决策能力是否能够超越特定市场模式进行泛化；2）在缺乏真实基准的嘈杂市场中，如何有效地训练和评估这些模型。
AI.method: 1）构建一个经过AI委员会验证的、基于经典教材和历史市场的选择题数据集，包含结构化推理轨迹，并进行增强以减少捷径学习；2）引入两阶段评估协议：测试集评估和基于选择题的时序交易模拟。
AI.result: 经过广泛的市场机制评估，使用该框架训练的开源模型表现出具有竞争力的风险感知行为，优于开源基线模型，并在较小规模下接近前沿模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架为训练和评估LLM作为交易代理提供了有效方法，证明了在金融决策中泛化能力的可能性，并发布了数据集和评估框架以支持进一步研究。

title: Generative Semantic Communication via Alternating Dual-Domain Posterior Sampling
summary: Generative semantic communication (SemCom) harnesses pretrained generative priors to improve the perceptual quality of wireless image transmission. Existing generative SemCom receivers, however, rely on maximum a posteriori (MAP) estimation, which fundamentally cannot preserve the data distribution and thus limits achievable perceptual quality. Moreover, current diffusion-based approaches using single-domain guidance face significant limitations: latent-domain guidance is sensitive to channel noise, while image-domain guidance inherits decoder bias. Simply combining both domains simultaneously yields an overconfident pseudo-posterior. In this paper, we formulate semantic decoding as a Bayesian inverse problem and prove that posterior sampling achieves optimal perceptual quality by preserving the data distribution. Building on this insight, we propose alternating dual-domain posterior sampling (ADDPS), a diffusion-based SemCom receiver that alternately enforces latent-domain and image-domain consistency during the sampling process. This alternating strategy decomposes joint posterior sampling into simpler subproblems, avoiding gradient conflicts while retaining the complementary strengths of both domains. Experiments on FFHQ demonstrate that the proposed ADDPS achieves superior perceptual quality compared with existing methods.

AI.tldr: 提出交替双域后验采样(ADDPS)方法，通过交替执行潜在域和图像域一致性约束，解决生成式语义通信中后验采样问题，提升感知质量。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式语义通信接收器依赖MAP估计，无法保持数据分布，限制了感知质量。同时，当前基于扩散的方法面临单域引导的局限性：潜在域引导对信道噪声敏感，图像域引导继承解码器偏差。简单组合两域会导致过度自信的伪后验。
AI.method: 将语义解码建模为贝叶斯逆问题，证明后验采样通过保持数据分布实现最优感知质量。提出交替双域后验采样(ADDPS)，在采样过程中交替执行潜在域和图像域一致性约束，将联合后验采样分解为更简单的子问题。
AI.result: 在FFHQ数据集上的实验表明，ADDPS相比现有方法实现了更优的感知质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过交替双域后验采样策略，成功解决了生成式语义通信中的分布保持问题，避免了梯度冲突，同时保留了两域的互补优势，实现了感知质量的显著提升。

title: Phase-Scheduled Multi-Agent Systems for Token-Efficient Coordination
summary:
Multi-agent systems (MAS) powered by large language models suffer from severe token inefficiency arising from two compounding sources: (i) unstructured parallel execution, where all agents activate simultaneously irrespective of input readiness; and (ii) unrestricted context sharing, where every agent receives the full accumulated context regardless of relevance. Existing mitigation strategies - static pruning, hierarchical decomposition, and learned routing - treat coordination as a structural allocation problem and fundamentally ignore its temporal dimension. We propose Phase-Scheduled Multi-Agent Systems (PSMAS), a framework that reconceptualizes agent activation as continuous control over a shared attention space modeled on a circular manifold.
  Each agent i is assigned a fixed angular phase theta_i in the range [0, 2*pi], derived from the task dependency topology; a global sweep signal phi(t) rotates at velocity omega, activating only agents within an angular window epsilon. Idle agents receive compressed context summaries, reducing per-step token consumption. We implement PSMAS on LangGraph, evaluate on four structured benchmarks (HotPotQA-MAS, HumanEval-MAS, ALFWorld-Multi, WebArena-Coord) and two unstructured conversational settings, and prove stability, convergence, and optimality results for the sweep dynamics. PSMAS achieves a mean token reduction of 27.3 percent (range 21.4-34.8 percent) while maintaining task performance within 2.1 percentage points of a fully activated baseline (p < 0.01, n = 500 per configuration), and outperforms the strongest learned routing baseline by 5.6 percentage points in token reduction with 2.0 percentage points less performance drop. Crucially, we show that scheduling and compression are independent sources of gain: scheduling alone accounts for 18-20 percentage points of reduction, robust to compression degradation up to alpha = 0.40.

AI.tldr: PSMAS框架通过相位调度机制解决多智能体系统的令牌效率问题，将智能体激活建模为圆形流形上的连续控制，实现27.3%的令牌减少，同时保持任务性能。
AI.motivation: 基于大语言模型的多智能体系统存在严重的令牌效率问题，主要源于两个因素：非结构化的并行执行（所有智能体同时激活）和无限制的上下文共享（每个智能体接收完整上下文）。现有方法将协调视为结构分配问题，忽略了时间维度。
AI.method: 提出相位调度多智能体系统（PSMAS）框架，将智能体激活重新概念化为共享注意力空间的连续控制。每个智能体被分配固定的角度相位θ_i，全局扫描信号φ(t)以速度ω旋转，仅激活角度窗口ε内的智能体。空闲智能体接收压缩的上下文摘要。
AI.result: 在四个结构化基准和两个非结构化对话设置上评估，平均减少27.3%的令牌使用（范围21.4-34.8%），任务性能仅比完全激活基线下降2.1个百分点。调度和压缩是独立的增益来源，仅调度就能贡献18-20个百分点的减少。
AI.conclusion: PSMAS通过引入时间维度的调度机制，有效解决了多智能体系统的令牌效率问题，证明了调度和压缩作为独立增益来源的有效性，为大规模多智能体系统提供了实用的效率提升方案。

title: The Provenance Gap in Clinical AI: Evidence-Traceable Temporal Knowledge Graphs for Rare Disease Reasoning
comment: 32 pages, 9 figures, 7 tables. Will submit to npj Digital Medicine. Supplementary materials included
summary: Frontier large language models generate clinically accurate outputs, but their citations are often fabricated. We term this the Provenance Gap. We tested five frontier LLMs across 36 clinician-validated scenarios for three rare neuromuscular disease pairs. No model produced a clinically relevant PubMed identifier without prompting. When explicitly asked to cite, the best model achieved 15.3% relevant PMIDs; the majority resolved to real publications in unrelated fields. We present HEG-TKG (Hierarchical Evidence-Grounded Temporal Knowledge Graphs), a system that grounds clinical claims in temporal knowledge graphs built from 4,512 PubMed records and curated sources with quality-tier stratification and 1,280 disease-trajectory milestones. In a controlled three-arm comparison using the same synthesis model, HEG-TKG matches baseline clinical feature coverage while achieving 100% evidence verifiability with 203 inline citations. Guideline-RAG, given overlapping source documents as raw text, produces zero verifiable citations. LLM judges cannot distinguish fabricated from verified citations without PubMed audit data. Independent clinician evaluation confirms the verifiability advantage (Cohen's d = 1.81, p < 0.001) with no degradation on safety or completeness. A counterfactual experiment shows 80% resistance to injected clinical errors with 100% detectability via citation trace. The system deploys on-premise via open-source models so patient data never leaves institutional infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 论文提出HEG-TKG系统解决LLM临床引用造假问题，通过分层证据基础的时间知识图谱实现100%可验证引用，显著优于传统RAG方法。
AI.motivation: 前沿大语言模型虽然能生成临床准确输出，但其引用经常是捏造的（来源性差距）。现有LLM在罕见神经肌肉疾病案例中无法提供相关PubMed标识符，即使明确要求引用，最佳模型也只有15.3%的相关PMID，多数引用指向无关领域的真实出版物。
AI.method: 提出HEG-TKG（分层证据基础的时间知识图谱）系统，从4,512条PubMed记录和精选来源构建时间知识图谱，采用质量层级分层和1,280个疾病轨迹里程碑。系统通过三臂对照实验，使用相同的合成模型进行比较，并与Guideline-RAG方法对比。
AI.result: HEG-TKG在保持基线临床特征覆盖的同时，实现100%证据可验证性（203个内联引用）。Guideline-RAG即使有重叠源文档作为原始文本，也无法产生可验证引用。临床医生评估确认可验证性优势（Cohen's d = 1.81, p < 0.001），安全性和完整性无下降。反事实实验显示对注入临床错误有80%抵抗力，通过引用追踪100%可检测。
AI.conclusion: HEG-TKG系统有效解决LLM临床引用造假问题，通过时间知识图谱实现完全可验证的引用，可在本地部署保护患者数据隐私，为临床决策支持提供可靠证据基础。

title: Untrained CNNs Match Backpropagation at V1: A Systematic RSA Comparison of Four Learning Rules Against Human fMRI
summary: A central question in computational neuroscience is whether the learning rule used to train a neural network determines how well its internal representations align with those of the human visual cortex. We present a systematic comparison of four learning rules -- backpropagation (BP), feedback alignment (FA), predictive coding (PC), and spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP) -- applied to identical convolutional architectures and evaluated against human fMRI data from the THINGS-fMRI dataset (720 stimuli, 3 subjects) using Representational Similarity Analysis (RSA). Crucially, we include an untrained random-weights baseline that reveals the dominant role of architecture. We find that early visual alignment (V1/V2) is primarily architecture-driven: an untrained CNN achieves rho = 0.071, statistically indistinguishable from BP (rho = 0.072, p = 0.43). Learning rules only differentiate at higher visual areas: BP dominates at LOC/IT, and PC with local Hebbian updates achieves IT alignment statistically indistinguishable from BP (p = 0.18). FA consistently impairs representations below the random baseline at V1. Partial RSA confirms all effects survive pixel-similarity control. These results demonstrate that the relationship between learning rules and cortical alignment is region-specific: architecture determines early alignment, while supervised objectives drive late alignment.

AI.tldr: 学习规则对神经表示与视觉皮层对齐的影响具有区域特异性：架构决定早期视觉区域对齐，监督目标驱动晚期区域对齐。
AI.motivation: 研究学习规则如何影响神经网络内部表示与人类视觉皮层表示的对齐程度，这是计算神经科学的核心问题。
AI.method: 系统比较四种学习规则（反向传播、反馈对齐、预测编码、脉冲时序依赖可塑性）在相同卷积架构上的表现，使用THINGS-fMRI数据集（720个刺激，3名被试）和表征相似性分析，并包含随机权重基线。
AI.result: 早期视觉区域（V1/V2）对齐主要由架构驱动：未训练CNN与BP表现无统计学差异。学习规则仅在高级视觉区域区分：BP在LOC/IT区域占优，PC在IT区域与BP无统计学差异。FA在V1区域表现低于随机基线。
AI.conclusion: 学习规则与皮层对齐的关系具有区域特异性：架构决定早期视觉区域对齐，监督学习目标驱动晚期视觉区域对齐。

title: Frequency-Decomposed INR for NIR-Assisted Low-Light RGB Image Denoising
summary: Addressing the issues of severe noise and high frequency structural degradation in visible images under low-light conditions, this paper proposes a Near Infrared (NIR) aided low light image restoration method based on Frequency Decoupled Implicit Neural Representation (FDINR). Based on the statistical prior of RGB-NIR cross-modal frequency correlations, specifically that low-frequency RGB signals are more reliable, whereas high frequency NIR signals exhibit higher correlation, we explicitly decompose images into distinct frequency components via multi-scale wavelet transforms and construct a dual-branch implicit neural representation framework. Within this framework, we design a cross modal differentiated frequency supervision mechanism, leveraging low light RGB to guide the reconstruction of low frequency luminance and color, and utilizing high-SNR NIR signals to constrain the generation of high frequency texture details, thereby achieving complementary advantages in the frequency domain. Furthermore, an uncertainty-based adaptive weighting loss function is introduced to automatically balance the contributions of different frequency tasks, solving the problems of color distortion and artifacts caused by rigid fusion in the spatial domain common in traditional methods. Experimental results demonstrate that FD-INR not only effectively restores image luminance consistency and structural details but also, benefitting from its implicit continuous representation, outperforms existing methods in arbitrary-resolution reconstruction tasks, significantly enhancing the reliability of low light perception.

AI.tldr: 提出基于频率解耦隐式神经表示（FD-INR）的近红外辅助低光图像恢复方法，通过多尺度小波变换分解频率分量，利用RGB-NIR跨模态频率相关性，实现低频色彩与高频纹理的互补恢复。
AI.motivation: 解决低光条件下可见光图像存在的严重噪声和高频结构退化问题，传统方法在空间域刚性融合常导致色彩失真和伪影。
AI.method: 基于RGB-NIR跨模态频率相关性统计先验，通过多尺度小波变换将图像分解为不同频率分量，构建双分支隐式神经表示框架，设计跨模态差异化频率监督机制：用低光RGB指导低频亮度和色彩重建，用高信噪比NIR约束高频纹理细节生成，并引入基于不确定性的自适应加权损失函数。
AI.result: FD-INR不仅能有效恢复图像亮度一致性和结构细节，得益于隐式连续表示特性，在任意分辨率重建任务中优于现有方法，显著提升低光感知可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的频率解耦隐式神经表示方法通过利用RGB-NIR跨模态频率相关性，实现了低光图像恢复中低频色彩与高频纹理的互补优势，解决了传统空间域融合方法的局限性。

title: STRIDE: Strategic Iterative Decision-Making for Retrieval-Augmented Multi-Hop Question Answering
comment: Accepted by SIGIR 2026 Full Paper. The code repository is available at https://github.com/fanshu6hao/STRIDE
summary: Multi-hop question answering (MHQA) enables accurate answers to complex queries by retrieving and reasoning over evidence dispersed across multiple documents. Existing MHQA approaches mainly rely on iterative retrieval-augmented generation, which suffer from the following two major issues. 1) Existing methods prematurely commit to surface-level entities rather than underlying reasoning structures, making question decomposition highly vulnerable to lexical ambiguity. 2) Existing methods overlook the logical dependencies among reasoning steps, resulting in uncoordinated execution. To address these issues, we propose STRIDE, a framework that separates strategic planning, dynamic control, and grounded execution. At its core, a Meta-Planner first constructs an entity-agnostic reasoning skeleton to capture the abstract logic of the query, thereby deferring entity grounding until after the reasoning structure is established, which mitigates disambiguation errors caused by premature lexical commitment. A Supervisor then orchestrates sub-question execution in a dependency-aware manner, enabling efficient parallelization where possible and sequential coordination when necessary. By dynamically deciding whether to retrieve new evidence or infer from existing facts, it avoids redundant queries and error propagation, while fusing cross-branch information and reformulating failed queries to enhance robustness. Grounded fact extraction and logical inference are delegated to specialized execution modules, ensuring faithfulness through explicit separation of retrieval and reasoning. We further propose STRIDE-FT, a modular fine-tuning framework that uses self-generated execution trajectories from STRIDE, requiring neither human annotations nor stronger teacher models. Experiments show that STRIDE achieves robust and accurate reasoning, while STRIDE-FT effectively enhances open-source LLMs.

AI.tldr: STRIDE框架通过分离策略规划、动态控制和基础执行来解决多跳问答中的过早实体承诺和逻辑依赖问题，提高推理准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有多跳问答方法存在两个主要问题：1) 过早承诺于表面实体而非底层推理结构，导致问题分解易受词汇歧义影响；2) 忽视推理步骤间的逻辑依赖，导致执行不协调。
AI.method: 提出STRIDE框架：1) Meta-Planner构建实体无关的推理骨架，推迟实体定位；2) Supervisor以依赖感知方式协调子问题执行，动态决定检索新证据或从现有事实推断；3) 专用执行模块处理基础事实提取和逻辑推理。还提出STRIDE-FT微调框架，使用自生成的执行轨迹。
AI.result: 实验表明STRIDE实现了鲁棒且准确的推理，而STRIDE-FT有效增强了开源大语言模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过分离策略规划、动态控制和基础执行，STRIDE框架解决了多跳问答中的关键问题，提高了推理的准确性和鲁棒性，同时STRIDE-FT为模型微调提供了有效方法。

title: Please refuse to answer me! Mitigating Over-Refusal in Large Language Models via Adaptive Contrastive Decoding
summary: Safety-aligned large language models (LLMs) often generate refusal responses to harmless queries due to the over-refusal problem. However, existing methods for mitigating over-refusal cannot maintain a low refusal ratio for harmless queries while keeping a high refusal ratio for malicious ones. In this paper, we analyze how system prompts with varying safety levels affect LLM refusal behaviors when facing over-refusal queries. A key observation is that, when LLMs suffer from the over-refusal issue, non-refusal tokens remain present in the next-token candidate list, but the model systematically fails to select them, despite the generation of refusal tokens. Based on this observation, we propose a training-free and model-agnostic approach, Adaptive Contrastive Decoding (AdaCD), to mitigate over-refusal while maintaining LLM safety. First, AdaCD compares the output distributions of the LLM with or without an extreme safety system prompt to refine the refusal token distribution. Second, we introduce an adaptive contrastive decoding strategy that dynamically incorporates or removes the refusal token distribution, adaptively boosting the probability of selecting refusal or non-refusal tokens. Experimental results on five benchmark datasets show that, on average, AdaCD reduces the refusal ratio for over-refusal queries by 10.35%, yet still increases the refusal ratio for malicious queries by 0.13%. Code is available at https://github.com/OutdoorManofML/AdaCD.

AI.tldr: 提出Adaptive Contrastive Decoding (AdaCD)方法，通过对比不同安全级别系统提示的输出分布，自适应调整拒绝token的概率，解决LLM过度拒绝问题。
AI.motivation: 安全对齐的大型语言模型在面对无害查询时经常产生过度拒绝响应，现有方法难以在降低无害查询拒绝率的同时保持对恶意查询的高拒绝率。
AI.method: 提出无需训练的模型无关方法AdaCD：1) 对比有/无极端安全系统提示的输出分布来精炼拒绝token分布；2) 引入自适应对比解码策略，动态调整拒绝token分布，自适应提升选择拒绝或非拒绝token的概率。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上的实验结果显示，AdaCD平均将过度拒绝查询的拒绝率降低10.35%，同时仍将恶意查询的拒绝率提高0.13%。
AI.conclusion: AdaCD能有效缓解LLM的过度拒绝问题，同时保持模型的安全性，是一种无需训练且模型无关的解决方案。

title: OC-Distill: Ontology-aware Contrastive Learning with Cross-Modal Distillation for ICU Risk Prediction
summary: Early prediction of severe clinical deterioration and remaining length of stay can enable timely intervention and better resource allocation in high-acuity settings such as the ICU. This has driven the development of machine learning models that leverage continuous streams of vital signs and other physiological signals for real-time risk prediction. Despite their promise, existing methods have important limitations. Contrastive pretraining treats all patients as equally strong negatives, failing to capture clinically meaningful similarity between patients with related diagnoses. Meanwhile, downstream fine-tuning typically ignores complementary modalities such as clinical notes, which provide rich contextual information unavailable in physiological signals alone. To address these challenges, we propose OC-Distill, a two-stage framework that leverages multimodal supervision during training while requiring only vital signs at inference. In the first stage, we introduce an ontology-aware contrastive objective that exploits the ICD hierarchy to quantify patient similarity and learn clinically grounded representations. In the second stage, we fine-tune the pretrained encoder via cross-modal knowledge distillation, transferring complementary information from clinical notes into the model. Across multiple ICU prediction tasks on MIMIC, OC-Distill demonstrates improved label efficiency and achieves state-of-the-art performance among methods that use only vital signs at inference.

AI.tldr: OC-Distill：一种两阶段框架，通过本体感知对比学习和跨模态知识蒸馏，利用ICD层次结构量化患者相似性，将临床笔记的补充信息转移到仅使用生命体征的模型中，在ICU预测任务中实现最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 早期预测严重临床恶化和剩余住院时间对于ICU等高风险环境至关重要。现有方法存在局限性：对比预训练将所有患者视为同等强度的负样本，未能捕捉相关诊断患者之间的临床相似性；下游微调通常忽略临床笔记等补充模态，而这些模态提供了生理信号无法提供的丰富上下文信息。
AI.method: 提出OC-Distill两阶段框架：第一阶段引入本体感知对比目标，利用ICD层次结构量化患者相似性，学习临床基础表示；第二阶段通过跨模态知识蒸馏微调预训练编码器，将临床笔记的补充信息转移到模型中。该框架在训练时利用多模态监督，但推理时仅需生命体征。
AI.result: 在MIMIC数据集上的多个ICU预测任务中，OC-Distill展示了改进的标签效率，并在仅使用生命体征进行推理的方法中实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: OC-Distill通过结合本体感知对比学习和跨模态知识蒸馏，有效解决了现有方法的局限性，能够学习更有临床意义的患者表示，并将多模态信息整合到仅使用生命体征的模型中，为ICU预测任务提供了更有效的解决方案。

title: Channel Attention-Guided Cross-Modal Knowledge Distillation for Referring Image Segmentation
summary: Referring image segmentation (RIS) requires accurate segmentation of target regions in images according to language descriptions, which is a cross-modal task integrating vision and language. Existing RIS methods typically employ large-scale vision and language encoding models to improve performance, but their enormous parameter size severely restricts deployment in scenarios with limited computing resources. To solve this problem, this paper proposes a channel attention-guided cross-modal knowledge distillation method, which transfers the high-order fine-grained correlations between vision and language learned by the teacher network, as well as the correlations between semantic components represented by each channel, to the student network. Compared with the traditional pixel-wise relational distillation, this method not only enables the student to learn the knowledge of the teacher, but also retains part of its independent learning ability, alleviating the transfer of learning bias. Experimental results on two public datasets show that the proposed distillation method does not introduce additional parameters during inference and can achieve significant performance improvement for the student model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通道注意力引导的跨模态知识蒸馏方法，用于轻量级指代图像分割，在保持性能的同时减少计算资源需求。
AI.motivation: 现有指代图像分割方法通常使用大规模视觉和语言编码模型来提高性能，但其巨大的参数量严重限制了在计算资源有限场景下的部署。需要一种方法能够在保持性能的同时减少模型复杂度。
AI.method: 提出通道注意力引导的跨模态知识蒸馏方法，将教师网络学习到的视觉与语言之间的高阶细粒度相关性，以及每个通道表示的语义组件之间的相关性，传递给学生网络。与传统像素级关系蒸馏相比，该方法不仅让学生学习教师的知识，还保留其部分独立学习能力，减轻学习偏差的传递。
AI.result: 在两个公共数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的蒸馏方法在推理时不引入额外参数，能够显著提升学生模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了指代图像分割模型在资源受限场景下的部署问题，通过知识蒸馏实现了轻量化而不牺牲性能。

title: EvoMaster: A Foundational Agent Framework for Building Evolving Autonomous Scientific Agents at Scale
summary: The convergence of large language models and agents is catalyzing a new era of scientific discovery: Agentic Science. While the scientific method is inherently iterative, existing agent frameworks are predominantly static, narrowly scoped, and lack the capacity to learn from trial and error. To bridge this gap, we present EvoMaster, a foundational evolving agent framework engineered specifically for Agentic Science at Scale. Driven by the core principle of continuous self-evolution, EvoMaster empowers agents to iteratively refine hypotheses, self-critique, and progressively accumulate knowledge across experimental cycles, faithfully mirroring human scientific inquiry. Crucially, as a domain-agnostic base harness, EvoMaster is exceptionally easy to scale up -- enabling developers to build and deploy highly capable, self-evolving scientific agents for arbitrary disciplines in approximately 100 lines of code. Built upon EvoMaster, we incubated the SciMaster ecosystem across domains such as machine learning, physics, and general science. Evaluations on four authoritative benchmarks (Humanity's Last Exam, MLE-Bench Lite, BrowseComp, and FrontierScience) demonstrate that EvoMaster achieves state-of-the-art scores of 41.1%, 75.8%, 73.3%, and 53.3%, respectively. It comprehensively outperforms the general-purpose baseline OpenClaw with relative improvements ranging from +159% to +316%, robustly validating its efficacy and generality as the premier foundational framework for the next generation of autonomous scientific discovery. EvoMaster is available at https://github.com/sjtu-sai-agents/EvoMaster.

AI.tldr: EvoMaster是一个用于规模化Agentic Science的基础性演化代理框架，通过持续自我进化机制，使代理能够迭代优化假设、自我批判并积累知识，仅需约100行代码即可构建任意学科的自演化科学代理。
AI.motivation: 现有代理框架大多是静态的、范围狭窄且缺乏从试错中学习的能力，而科学方法本质上是迭代的。需要弥合这一差距，为规模化Agentic Science提供基础框架。
AI.method: 提出EvoMaster框架，基于持续自我进化的核心原则，使代理能够迭代精炼假设、自我批判并在实验周期中逐步积累知识。作为领域无关的基础框架，仅需约100行代码即可构建和部署自演化科学代理。
AI.result: 在四个权威基准测试（Humanity's Last Exam, MLE-Bench Lite, BrowseComp, FrontierScience）上分别获得41.1%、75.8%、73.3%和53.3%的SOTA分数。相比通用基线OpenClaw，相对改进幅度从+159%到+316%，全面验证了其有效性和通用性。
AI.conclusion: EvoMaster作为下一代自主科学发现的基础框架，通过持续自我进化机制，成功实现了规模化Agentic Science，在多个学科领域表现出卓越性能，为科学发现自动化提供了强大工具。

title: RoIt-XMASA: Multi-Domain Multilingual Sentiment Analysis Dataset for Romanian and Italian
comment: Accepted at the International AAAI Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM 2026)
summary: We present RoIt-XMASA, a multilingual dataset that extends the Cross-lingual Multi-domain Amazon Sentiment Analysis to Italian and Romanian, comprising 36,000 labeled reviews across three domains (books, movies, and music) and 202,141 unlabeled samples. To address cross-lingual and cross-domain challenges, we propose a multi-target adversarial training framework that employs loss reversal with meta-learned coefficients to dynamically balance sentiment discrimination with domain and language invariance. XLM-R achieves an F1-score of 66.23% with our approach, outperforming the baseline by 4.64%. Few-shot evaluation shows that Llama-3.1-8B achieves 58.43% F1-score, revealing a meaningful trade-off between the efficiency of prompting-based approaches and the higher performance of task-specific fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 扩展多语言情感分析数据集至意大利语和罗马尼亚语，提出多目标对抗训练框架提升跨语言跨领域性能
AI.motivation: 现有跨语言情感分析数据集覆盖语言有限，需要扩展到更多语言（意大利语和罗马尼亚语），同时解决跨语言和跨领域的双重挑战
AI.method: 1) 构建RoIt-XMASA数据集，包含36,000标注评论和202,141未标注样本；2) 提出多目标对抗训练框架，使用元学习系数进行损失反转，动态平衡情感判别与领域/语言不变性
AI.result: XLM-R使用该方法获得66.23% F1分数，比基线提升4.64%；Llama-3.1-8B在少样本评估中获得58.43% F1分数，显示提示方法与微调方法的性能权衡
AI.conclusion: 扩展多语言数据集和提出的对抗训练框架有效提升了跨语言跨领域情感分析性能，同时揭示了大型语言模型在少样本场景下的潜力与限制

title: SinkRouter: Sink-Aware Routing for Efficient Long-Context Decoding in Large Language and Multimodal Models
summary: In long-context decoding for LLMs and LMMs, attention becomes increasingly memory-bound because each decoding step must load a large amount of KV-cache data from GPU memory. Existing acceleration strategies often trade efficiency for accuracy by relying on heuristic pruning that may discard useful information. At a deeper level, they also tend to indiscriminately preserve all high-scoring tokens, treat early tokens as indispensable anchors, or rely on heuristic head routing, reflecting an insufficient mechanistic understanding of the attention sink phenomenon. In this paper, we show that the attention sink phenomenon corresponds to a stable, reachable, and error-controllable fixed point constructed during training. Based on this insight, we propose SinkRouter, a training-free selective routing framework that detects the sink signal and skips computations that would otherwise produce near-zero output. To translate this mechanism into real-world acceleration, we develop a hardware-aware Triton kernel with block-level branching and Split-K parallelism. We conduct extensive evaluations on a diverse suite of long-context benchmarks, including LongBench, InfiniteBench, CVBench, MileBench, and MMVP, using both text-only and multimodal backbones such as Llama-3.1-8B, Llama-3.1-70B, Yi-9B-200K, LLaVA-1.5-7B, and LLaVA-1.5-13B. Across these settings, SinkRouter consistently improves decoding efficiency while maintaining competitive accuracy, and reaches 2.03x speedup with a 512K context.

AI.tldr: SinkRouter：一种基于注意力汇聚点固定点理论的无训练选择性路由框架，通过检测汇聚信号跳过近零输出计算，在保持精度的同时提升长上下文解码效率，在512K上下文上达到2.03倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有长上下文解码加速方法存在效率与精度权衡问题，通常依赖启发式剪枝可能丢弃有用信息，且对注意力汇聚现象缺乏机制性理解。需要一种既能保持精度又能显著提升效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于注意力汇聚点对应训练中构建的稳定、可达、误差可控固定点的理论洞察，提出SinkRouter框架：1）检测汇聚信号；2）跳过产生近零输出的计算；3）开发硬件感知的Triton内核，采用块级分支和Split-K并行化。
AI.result: 在多样化长上下文基准测试（LongBench、InfiniteBench、CVBench、MileBench、MMVP）上，使用Llama-3.1-8B/70B、Yi-9B-200K、LLaVA-1.5-7B/13B等模型进行评估，SinkRouter在保持竞争性精度的同时持续提升解码效率，在512K上下文上达到2.03倍加速。
AI.conclusion: SinkRouter通过机制性理解注意力汇聚现象，实现了无需训练的选择性路由，在保持模型精度的同时显著加速长上下文解码，为实际应用提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Modeling Biomechanical Constraint Violations for Language-Agnostic Lip-Sync Deepfake Detection
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. Keywords: deepfake detection, lip-sync forgery, biomechanical constraints, temporal kinematics, cross-lingual generalization, privacy-preserving detection, geometric features
summary: Current lip-sync deepfake detectors rely on pixel-level artifacts or audio-visual correspondence, failing to generalize across languages because these cues encode data-dependent patterns rather than universal physical laws. We identify a more fundamental principle: generative models do not enforce the biomechanical constraints of authentic orofacial articulation, producing measurably elevated temporal lip variance -- a signal we term temporal lip jitter -- that is empirically consistent across the speaker's language, ethnicity, and recording conditions. We instantiate this principle through BioLip, a lightweight framework operating on 64 perioral landmark coordinates extracted by MediaPipe.

AI.tldr: BioLip检测器通过分析唇部时间方差（唇部抖动）来识别深度伪造视频，该方法基于生物力学约束原理，不依赖像素级伪影或音频-视觉对应关系，具有跨语言泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有唇部同步深度伪造检测器依赖像素级伪影或音频-视觉对应关系，这些线索编码的是数据依赖模式而非通用物理规律，导致跨语言泛化能力不足。需要找到更基础的物理原理来检测伪造视频。
AI.method: 提出BioLip框架，基于生成模型不强制执行真实口面部发音的生物力学约束这一原理。通过MediaPipe提取64个唇周关键点坐标，分析时间维度上的唇部方差（称为"时间唇部抖动"），这种信号在说话者的语言、种族和录制条件下具有一致性。
AI.result: 识别出生成模型产生的唇部运动具有可测量的时间唇部方差升高（唇部抖动），这种信号是跨语言、跨种族和跨录制条件一致的，为检测深度伪造提供了更基础可靠的线索。
AI.conclusion: 基于生物力学约束的时间唇部抖动是检测唇部同步深度伪造的更基础原理，BioLip框架通过分析唇部关键点的时间方差实现了跨语言泛化能力，相比现有方法更具普适性。

title: Compiling Deterministic Structure into SLM Harnesses
summary: Enterprise deployment of small language models (SLMs) is constrained by epistemic asymmetry: SLMs cannot self-correct reasoning errors, while frontier LLMs are prohibitively costly and face data sovereignty limits for high-volume use. We propose Semantic Gradient Descent (SGDe), a teacher-student framework that compiles agentic workflows into discrete execution plans comprising DAG topologies, system prompts, and deterministic executable code. The trailing "e" distinguishes SGDe from stochastic gradient descent. SGDe operates in a discrete semantic space where a frontier teacher generates natural-language critiques acting as directional gradients to iteratively refine the SLM's workflow artefacts. We formalise SGDe within a PAC learning framework, establishing sample-complexity bounds that enable convergence with as few as three training examples on targeted synthetic tasks by leveraging the teacher as a statistical prior. On a GSM-Hard-derived test set built via adversarial synthesis, compiled workflows reach 91.3% accuracy at m=5 and 99.3% at m=3 within the small-m regime motivated by Corollary 1, a +26.3% to +34.3% absolute improvement over state-of-the-art prompt optimisers. In the emerging paradigm of harness engineering, SGDe treats placement of deterministic code (which subtasks to delegate to a Python runtime versus retain as LLM calls) as a trace-driven, per-node optimisation target, generalising the whole-problem offloading of PAL and PoT. The teacher compiles two complementary deterministic structures: capability offloading, which delegates subtasks to Python when the SLM cannot execute them reliably, and structural consensus, which wraps variance-limited reasoning steps in fan-out/fan-in subgraphs aggregated by deterministic voting.

AI.tldr: SGDe是一种教师-学生框架，将智能体工作流编译为包含DAG拓扑、系统提示和确定性可执行代码的执行计划，利用前沿LLM生成自然语言批评作为语义梯度来迭代优化小型语言模型的工作流。
AI.motivation: 企业部署小型语言模型面临认知不对称问题：SLMs无法自我纠正推理错误，而前沿LLMs成本过高且受数据主权限制。需要一种方法让SLMs获得前沿LLMs的指导能力。
AI.method: 提出语义梯度下降(SGDe)框架，将智能体工作流编译为离散执行计划。前沿教师模型生成自然语言批评作为语义梯度，迭代优化SLM的工作流构件。在PAC学习框架中形式化SGDe，建立样本复杂度界限，利用教师作为统计先验。
AI.result: 在GSM-Hard衍生的对抗合成测试集上，编译的工作流在m=5时达到91.3%准确率，m=3时达到99.3%准确率，比最先进的提示优化器绝对提升26.3%到34.3%。
AI.conclusion: SGDe通过将确定性代码放置作为跟踪驱动的每节点优化目标，在约束工程范式中实现了能力卸载和结构共识两种互补的确定性结构，显著提升了小型语言模型在复杂任务上的性能。

title: Towards Fully Parameter-Free Stochastic Optimization: Grid Search with Self-Bounding Analysis
summary: Parameter-free stochastic optimization aims to design algorithms that are agnostic to the underlying problem parameters while still achieving convergence rates competitive with optimally tuned methods. While some parameter-free methods do not require the specific values of the problem parameters, they still rely on prior knowledge, such as the lower or upper bounds of them. We refer to such methods as ``partially parameter-free''. In this work, we target achieving ``fully parameter-free'' methods, i.e., the algorithmic inputs do not need to satisfy any unverifiable condition related to the true problem parameters. We propose a powerful and general grid search framework, named \textsc{Grasp}, with a novel self-bounding analysis technique that effectively determines the search ranges of parameters, in contrast to previous work. Our method demonstrates generality in: (i) the non-convex case, where we propose a fully parameter-free method that achieves near-optimal convergence rate, up to logarithmic factors; (ii) the convex case, where our parameter-free methods are competitive with strong performance in terms of acceleration and universality. Finally, we contribute a sharper guarantee for the model ensemble, a final step of the grid search framework, under interpolated variance characterization.

AI.tldr: 提出GRASP框架，实现完全参数自由的随机优化方法，无需任何问题参数的先验知识，在非凸和凸情况下均能获得接近最优的收敛速率。
AI.motivation: 现有参数自由方法仍依赖问题参数的上下界等先验知识，属于"部分参数自由"。本文旨在实现"完全参数自由"方法，即算法输入无需满足任何与真实问题参数相关的不可验证条件。
AI.method: 提出GRASP网格搜索框架，采用新颖的自边界分析技术，有效确定参数的搜索范围。框架具有通用性，适用于非凸和凸优化问题，并改进了模型集成步骤的保证。
AI.result: 在非凸情况下，提出的完全参数自由方法达到接近最优的收敛速率（对数因子内）；在凸情况下，参数自由方法在加速和通用性方面具有竞争力。模型集成步骤在插值方差特征下获得更尖锐的保证。
AI.conclusion: GRASP框架实现了真正完全参数自由的随机优化，无需任何问题参数的先验知识，在多种优化场景下均能获得接近最优的性能，为参数自由优化提供了通用解决方案。

title: Hierarchical Vision Transformer Enhanced by Graph Convolutional Network for Image Classification
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT) has brought new breakthroughs to the field of image classification by introducing the self-attention mechanism and Graph Convolutional Networks(GCN) have been proposed and successfully applied in data representation and analysis. However, there are key challenges which limit their further development: (1) The patch size selected by ViT is crucial for accurate predictions, which raises a natural question: How to select the size of patches properly or how to comprehensively combine small patches and larger patches; (2) While the spatial structure information is important in vision tasks, the 1D position embeddings fails to capture the spatial structure information of patches more accurately; (3) The GCN can capture the local connectivity relationships between image nodes, but it lacks the ability to capture global graph structural information. On the contrary, the self-attention mechanism of ViT can draw the global relation on image patches, but it is unable to model the local structure of image. To overcome such limitations, we propose the Hierarchical Vision Transformer Enhanced by Graph Convolutional Network (GCN-HViT) for image classification. Specifically, the Hierarchical ViT we designed can model patch-wise information interactions on a global scale within each level and model hierarchical relationships between small patches and large patches across multiple levels. In addition, the proposed GCN method functions as a local feature extractor to obtain the local representation of each image patch which serves as a 2D position embedding of each patch in the 2D space. Meanwhile, it models patch-wise information interactions on a local scale within each level. Extensive experiments on 3 real-world datasets demonstrate that GCN-HViT achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 提出GCN-HViT模型，结合层次化ViT和GCN，解决ViT中patch大小选择、空间结构信息缺失以及局部-全局信息建模问题，在图像分类任务上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: ViT在图像分类中取得突破，但存在三个关键挑战：1) patch大小选择困难；2) 1D位置编码无法准确捕捉patch的空间结构信息；3) GCN能捕捉局部连接关系但缺乏全局信息，ViT能捕捉全局关系但缺乏局部结构建模能力。
AI.method: 提出GCN-HViT模型：1) 设计层次化ViT，在每层内全局建模patch信息交互，在多层间建模小patch与大patch的层次关系；2) 使用GCN作为局部特征提取器，获取每个图像patch的局部表示，作为2D空间中的2D位置嵌入；3) GCN在每层内局部尺度上建模patch信息交互。
AI.result: 在3个真实世界数据集上的大量实验表明，GCN-HViT达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: GCN-HViT通过结合层次化ViT和GCN，有效解决了ViT和GCN各自的局限性，在图像分类任务中取得了优异性能，实现了局部与全局信息的互补建模。

title: TrafficClaw: Generalizable Urban Traffic Control via Unified Physical Environment Modeling
summary: Urban traffic control is a system-level coordination problem spanning heterogeneous subsystems, including traffic signals, freeways, public transit, and taxi services. Existing optimization-based, reinforcement learning (RL), and emerging LLM-based approaches are largely designed for isolated tasks, limiting both cross-task generalization and the ability to capture coupled physical dynamics across subsystems. We argue that effective system-level control requires a unified physical environment in which subsystems share infrastructure, mobility demand, and spatiotemporal constraints, allowing local interventions to propagate through the network. To this end, we propose TrafficClaw, a framework for general urban traffic control built upon a unified runtime environment. TrafficClaw integrates heterogeneous subsystems into a shared dynamical system, enabling explicit modeling of cross-subsystem interactions and closed-loop agent-environment feedback. Within this environment, we develop an LLM agent with executable spatiotemporal reasoning and reusable procedural memory, supporting unified diagnostics across subsystems and continual strategy refinement. Furthermore, we introduce a multi-stage training pipeline with supervised initialization and agentic RL with system-level optimization, further enabling coordinated and system-aware performance. Experiments demonstrate that TrafficClaw achieves robust, transferable, and system-aware performance across unseen traffic scenarios, dynamics, and task configurations. Our project is available at https://github.com/usail-hkust/TrafficClaw.

AI.tldr: TrafficClaw是一个基于统一运行时环境的城市交通控制框架，通过整合异构子系统、引入LLM智能体进行时空推理，以及多阶段训练，实现了系统级协调控制。
AI.motivation: 现有交通控制方法（优化、强化学习、LLM）大多针对孤立任务设计，缺乏跨任务泛化能力，且难以捕捉异构子系统间的耦合物理动态。需要统一的物理环境来支持系统级协调控制。
AI.method: 1. 构建统一运行时环境，整合交通信号、高速公路、公共交通、出租车服务等异构子系统；2. 开发具有可执行时空推理和可重用程序记忆的LLM智能体；3. 采用多阶段训练管道（监督初始化+智能体强化学习+系统级优化）。
AI.result: 实验表明TrafficClaw在未见过的交通场景、动态和任务配置中实现了稳健、可迁移和系统感知的性能。
AI.conclusion: TrafficClaw通过统一环境框架和LLM智能体，解决了城市交通系统级协调控制的关键挑战，为异构子系统间的协同优化提供了有效解决方案。

title: SciImpact: A Multi-Dimensional, Multi-Field Benchmark for Scientific Impact Prediction
