Instead, they often blindly favor the more informative answer, even when they can recognize it conflicts with the image content. We call this problem informativeness bias, which significantly undermines judge reliability. To address it, we propose BIRCH (Balanced Informativeness and CoRrectness with a Truthful AnCHor), a judging paradigm that first corrects inconsistencies with the image content in candidate answers, and then compares the answers against this corrected version. This shifts the judge's focus from informativeness to image-grounded correctness. Experiments on multiple models and benchmarks show that BIRCH reduces informativeness bias by up to 17%, resulting in performance gains of up to 9.8%. Our work reveals an overlooked but fundamental flaw in current VLM-as-a-Judge systems and highlights the need for more principled designs.

AI.tldr: 本文发现VLM-as-a-Judge存在信息量偏见问题，即倾向于选择信息量更大的答案而非图像内容一致的答案，并提出BIRCH方法通过引入修正后的参考答案来纠正这一偏见。
AI.motivation: 当前VLM-as-a-Judge系统在自动评估视觉语言模型时存在可靠性问题。研究发现这些评判系统往往忽视图像内容，盲目偏好信息量更大的答案，即使这些答案与图像内容相冲突。这种信息量偏见严重影响了评判的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出BIRCH方法：首先修正候选答案中与图像内容不一致的部分，然后将修正后的版本作为参考答案，让评判系统基于这个修正后的参考答案来比较候选答案。这种方法将评判焦点从信息量转移到基于图像内容的正确性上。
AI.result: 在多个模型和基准测试上的实验表明，BIRCH能够将信息量偏见降低高达17%，带来高达9.8%的性能提升。这证实了BIRCH能够有效纠正VLM-as-a-Judge的偏见问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了当前VLM-as-a-Judge系统中被忽视但根本性的缺陷——信息量偏见，并强调了需要更原则性的设计。BIRCH方法为解决这一问题提供了有效途径，将评判系统的关注点重新聚焦到图像内容的正确性上。

title: Calibrated? Not for Everyone: How Sexual Orientation and Religious Markers Distort LLM Accuracy and Confidence in Medical QA
summary: Safe clinical deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) requires not only high accuracy but also robust uncertainty calibration to ensure models defer to clinicians when appropriate. Our paper investigates how social descriptors of a patient (specifically sexual orientation and religious affiliation) distort these uncertainty signals and model accuracy. Evaluating nine general-purpose and biomedical LLMs on 2,364 medical questions and their counterfactual variants, we demonstrate that identity markers cause a "calibration crisis". "Homosexual" markers consistently trigger performance drops, and intersectional identities produce idiosyncratic, non-additive harms to calibration. Moreover, a clinician-validated case study in an open-ended generation setting confirms that these failures are not an artifact of the multiple-choice format. Our results demonstrate that the presence of social identity cues does not merely shift predictions; it affects the reliability of confidence signals, posing a significant risk to equitable care and safe deployment in confidence-based clinical workflows.

AI.tldr: 研究发现患者的社会身份标识（性取向和宗教信仰）会扭曲LLM的不确定性校准信号，导致"校准危机"，影响医疗决策的可靠性
AI.motivation: LLM在临床部署中不仅需要高准确性，还需要可靠的不确定性校准，以确保模型在适当时能够将决策权交给临床医生。需要研究患者社会身份描述符如何影响这些不确定性信号和模型准确性。
AI.method: 评估9个通用和生物医学LLM在2,364个医学问题及其反事实变体上的表现，分析性取向和宗教信仰标识对模型性能的影响，并通过临床医生验证的案例研究在开放式生成环境中确认发现
AI.result: 身份标识导致"校准危机"："同性恋"标识持续引发性能下降，交叉身份产生特异性的非叠加伤害。这些失败不是多项选择题格式的假象，社会身份线索不仅改变预测，还影响置信度信号的可靠性
AI.conclusion: 患者社会身份线索的存在会扭曲LLM的置信度信号，对公平护理和基于置信度的临床工作流程的安全部署构成重大风险，需要解决这些校准问题以确保临床LLM的安全部署

title: Guardrails in Logit Space: Safety Token Regularization for LLM Alignment
summary: Fine-tuning well-aligned large language models (LLMs) on new domains often degrades their safety alignment, even when using benign datasets. Existing safety alignment techniques primarily focus on pretraining, leaving fine-tuned models vulnerable to behavioral shifts. In this work, we introduce safety token regularization (STR), a lightweight method designed to preserve safety properties during fine-tuning. Our approach identifies salient tokens from rejection templates of well-aligned models and constrains their associated logits during training, preventing the loss of critical safety behaviors. Unlike reinforcement learning or preference optimization methods, STR requires minimal additional computation and seamlessly integrates with parameter-efficient fine-tuning techniques such as LoRA. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves safety performance on par with state-of-the-art methods, while preserving task-specific utility and requiring minimal implementation overhead. Furthermore, we show that safety token regularization enhances training stability and overall performance beyond safety considerations alone. This work offers a practical and readily deployable strategy for continual safety alignment in fine-tuned LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出安全令牌正则化(STR)方法，在微调LLMs时通过约束拒绝模板中的关键令牌来保持模型的安全对齐性
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注预训练阶段的安全对齐，但在新领域微调对齐良好的LLMs时，即使使用良性数据集也会降低其安全对齐性，使微调后的模型容易受到行为偏移的影响
AI.method: 安全令牌正则化(STR)：识别对齐良好模型的拒绝模板中的显著令牌，在训练过程中约束其相关logits，防止关键安全行为的丢失。该方法计算开销小，可与LoRA等参数高效微调技术无缝集成
AI.result: 综合实验表明，该方法的安全性能与最先进方法相当，同时保持任务特定效用且实现开销最小。此外，安全令牌正则化还能提高训练稳定性和整体性能
AI.conclusion: 为微调LLMs中的持续安全对齐提供了一个实用且易于部署的策略

title: Hyperspectral Unmixing Hierarchies
summary:
Unmixing reveals the spatial distribution and spectral details of different constituents, called endmembers, in a hyperspectral image. Because unmixing has limited ground truth requirements, can accommodate mixed pixels, and is closely tied to light propagation, it is a uniquely powerful tool for analyzing hyperspectral images. However, spectral variability inhibits unmixing performance, the proper way to determine the number of endmembers is ambiguous, and the clarity of the endmembers degrades as more are included. Hierarchical structure is a possible solution to all three problems.
  Here, hierarchical unmixing is defined by imposing a hierarchical abundance sum constraint on Deep Nonnegative Matrix Factorization. Binary Linear Unmixing Tactile Hierarchies (BLUTHs) solve the hierarchical unmixing problem with a simple network architecture. Sparsity modulation unmixing growth tailors the topology of a BLUTH to each scene. The structure imposed by BLUTHs allows endmembers with varying levels of spectral contrast to be revealed, mitigating the challenge of spectral variability.
  The performance of BLUTHs exceeds state-of-the-art unmixing algorithms on laboratory scenes, particularly with regard to abundance estimation, while their performance remains competitive on remote sensing scenes. In addition, ocean color unmixing by BLUTHs is demonstrated on hyperspectral scenes from the HYPSO and PACE satellites.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BLUTHs（二元线性解混触觉层次结构）方法，通过层次化非负矩阵分解解决高光谱图像解混中的光谱变异性、端元数量确定和端元清晰度问题。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像解混面临三个主要挑战：光谱变异性抑制解混性能、端元数量确定方法不明确、端元数量增加时清晰度下降。层次结构是解决这些问题的可能方案。
AI.method: 提出BLUTHs方法，在深度非负矩阵分解上施加层次丰度和约束，通过简单网络架构解决层次解混问题，并使用稀疏调制解混增长为每个场景定制BLUTH拓扑结构。
AI.result: BLUTHs在实验室场景中超越现有最先进的解混算法（特别是在丰度估计方面），在遥感场景中保持竞争力，并在HYPSO和PACE卫星的高光谱海洋颜色解混中得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 层次解混通过BLUTHs方法有效解决了高光谱图像解混中的关键挑战，特别是光谱变异性问题，为实验室和遥感场景提供了强大的解混工具。

title: Prompt Optimization Enables Stable Algorithmic Collusion in LLM Agents
summary: LLM agents in markets present algorithmic collusion risks. While prior work shows LLM agents reach supracompetitive prices through tacit coordination, existing research focuses on hand-crafted prompts. The emerging paradigm of prompt optimization necessitates new methodologies for understanding autonomous agent behavior. We investigate whether prompt optimization leads to emergent collusive behaviors in market simulations. We propose a meta-learning loop where LLM agents participate in duopoly markets and an LLM meta-optimizer iteratively refines shared strategic guidance. Our experiments reveal that meta-prompt optimization enables agents to discover stable tacit collusion strategies with substantially improved coordination quality compared to baseline agents. These behaviors generalize to held-out test markets, indicating discovery of general coordination principles. Analysis of evolved prompts reveals systematic coordination mechanisms through stable shared strategies. Our findings call for further investigation into AI safety implications in autonomous multi-agent systems.

AI.tldr: 研究通过元学习优化提示，发现LLM智能体在双寡头市场中能自发形成稳定的隐性合谋策略，协调质量显著提升，且策略可泛化到新市场，揭示了AI多智能体系统中的安全风险。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注手工设计的提示如何导致LLM智能体达成超竞争价格，但随着提示优化范式的兴起，需要新方法来理解自主智能体行为。本研究旨在探究提示优化是否会导致市场模拟中出现新兴的合谋行为。
AI.method: 提出元学习循环框架：LLM智能体参与双寡头市场模拟，LLM元优化器迭代优化共享战略指导（元提示）。通过这种元提示优化，让智能体自主发现协调策略。
AI.result: 实验显示元提示优化使智能体发现了稳定的隐性合谋策略，协调质量相比基线智能体显著提升。这些行为能泛化到保留的测试市场，表明发现了通用的协调原则。对演化提示的分析揭示了通过稳定共享策略的系统性协调机制。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明提示优化能导致LLM智能体在市场环境中自发形成合谋行为，这呼吁进一步研究自主多智能体系统中的AI安全问题。

title: A Universal Avoidance Method for Diverse Multi-branch Generation
summary: Modern generative models still lack human-level creativity, particularly in multi-branch diversity. Prior approaches to address this problem often incur heavy computation or strong dependency on model architecture. Therefore, we introduce UAG(Universal Avoidance Generation), a model-agnostic and computationally efficient generation strategy that penalizes similarity among previously generated outputs. Thus, UAG can enhance multi-branch diversity across both diffusion and transformer models, with minimal additional computation. In experiments, our method achieves up to 1.9 times higher diversity, runs 4.4 times faster, and requires only 1/64 of the FLOPs compared to state-of-the-art methods. The full code is https://anonymous.4open.science/r/2026_ACL_Universal/.

AI.tldr: UAG是一种模型无关的高效生成策略，通过惩罚已生成输出的相似性来增强多分支多样性，在扩散和Transformer模型中都能显著提升多样性，计算开销极小。
AI.motivation: 现代生成模型仍缺乏人类水平的创造力，特别是在多分支多样性方面。现有方法通常计算开销大或对模型架构依赖性强，需要一种更通用高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出UAG（通用避免生成）策略，这是一种模型无关的方法，通过惩罚已生成输出之间的相似性来增强多样性。该方法计算效率高，适用于扩散模型和Transformer模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，UAG相比最先进方法能实现高达1.9倍的多样性提升，运行速度快4.4倍，仅需1/64的FLOPs计算量。
AI.conclusion: UAG是一种有效的模型无关生成策略，能显著提升生成多样性且计算开销极小，为增强生成模型的创造力提供了实用解决方案。

title: Continual Safety Alignment via Gradient-Based Sample Selection
summary: Large language models require continuous adaptation to new tasks while preserving safety alignment. However, fine-tuning on even benign data often compromises safety behaviors, including refusal of harmful requests, truthfulness, and commonsense reasoning. We investigate which training samples cause alignment drift through a data-centric lens. Our empirical analysis shows samples contribute unequally: high-gradient samples cause greater safety degradation and drive models toward pretrained distributions, while moderate-gradient samples enable task learning with minimal alignment loss. We propose gradient-based sample selection that filters high-gradient samples during fine-tuning. Across multiple model families on continual domain tasks, our method substantially improves alignment preservation while maintaining competitive task performance, without requiring curated safe data or architectural modifications. Our method is robust across selection ratios, task orderings, and diverse attack benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出基于梯度筛选的样本选择方法，在微调时过滤高梯度样本，有效保持LLM的安全对齐性同时维持任务性能
AI.motivation: 大语言模型需要持续适应新任务同时保持安全对齐，但微调即使是良性数据也常常损害安全行为（如拒绝有害请求、真实性、常识推理）。需要研究哪些训练样本导致对齐漂移
AI.method: 通过数据中心视角分析样本贡献不均：高梯度样本导致更大安全退化并驱动模型趋向预训练分布，中等梯度样本实现任务学习且对齐损失最小。提出基于梯度的样本选择方法，在微调时过滤高梯度样本
AI.result: 在多个模型家族和持续领域任务上，该方法显著改善对齐保持同时保持竞争力的任务性能，无需精心策划的安全数据或架构修改。方法在选择比例、任务顺序和多样化攻击基准上表现稳健
AI.conclusion: 基于梯度的样本选择是保持LLM安全对齐的有效方法，通过识别和过滤导致对齐漂移的高梯度样本，实现任务适应与安全保持的平衡

title: UGD: An Unsupervised Geometric Distance for Evaluating Real-world Noisy Point Cloud Denoising
comment: to be published in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
summary: Point cloud denoising is a fundamental and crucial challenge in real-world point cloud applications. Existing quantitative evaluation metrics for point cloud denoising methods are implemented in a supervised manner, which requires both the denoised point cloud and the corresponding ground-truth clean point cloud to compute a representative geometric distance. This requirement is highly problematic in real-world scenarios, where ground-truth clean point clouds are often unavailable. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective unsupervised geometric distance (UGD) for real-world noisy point cloud denoising, calculated solely from noisy point clouds. The core idea of UGD is to learn a patch-wise prior model from a set of clean point clouds and then employ this prior model as the ground-truth to quantify the degradation by measuring the geometric variations of the denoised point cloud. To this end, we first learn a pristine Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) with extracted patch-wise quality-aware features from a set of pristine clean point clouds by a patch-wise feature extraction network, which serves as the ground-truth for the quantitative evaluation. Then, the UGD is defined as the weighted sum of distances between each patch of the denoised point cloud and the learned pristine GMM model in the patch space. To train the employed patch-wise feature extraction network, we propose a self-supervised training framework through multi-task learning, which includes pair-wise quality ranking, distortion classification, and distortion distribution prediction. Quantitative experiments with synthetic noise confirm that the proposed UGD achieves comparable performance to supervised full-reference metrics. Moreover, experimental results on real-world data demonstrate that the proposed UGD enables unsupervised evaluation of point cloud denoising methods based exclusively on noisy point clouds.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需真值点云的UGD无监督几何距离评估指标，通过学习干净点云的补丁先验模型来量化去噪质量
AI.motivation: 现有点云去噪评估方法需要真值干净点云进行监督计算，这在真实场景中往往不可得，因此需要开发无监督评估指标
AI.method: 1) 从干净点云学习补丁级GMM先验模型作为"真值"；2) 定义UGD为去噪点云补丁与GMM模型的距离加权和；3) 通过多任务自监督训练补丁特征提取网络
AI.result: 在合成噪声实验中，UGD达到与有监督全参考指标相当的性能；在真实数据上，UGD能仅基于噪声点云进行无监督评估
AI.conclusion: UGD为真实场景点云去噪提供了一种有效的无监督评估方案，解决了真值点云不可得的问题

title: Adversarial Arena: Crowdsourcing Data Generation through Interactive Competition
summary: Post-training Large Language Models requires diverse, high-quality data which is rare and costly to obtain, especially in low resource domains and for multi-turn conversations. Common solutions are crowdsourcing or synthetic generation, but both often yield low-quality or low-diversity data. We introduce Adversarial Arena for building high quality conversational datasets by framing data generation as an adversarial task: attackers create prompts, and defenders generate responses. This interactive competition between multiple teams naturally produces diverse and complex data. We validated this approach by conducting a competition with 10 academic teams from top US and European universities, each building attacker or defender bots. The competition, focused on safety alignment of LLMs in cybersecurity, generated 19,683 multi-turn conversations. Fine-tuning an open-source model on this dataset produced an 18.47% improvement in secure code generation on CyberSecEval-Instruct and 29.42% improvement on CyberSecEval-MITRE.

AI.tldr: 通过对抗竞技场框架，让攻击者创建提示、防御者生成响应，构建高质量对话数据集，在网络安全领域显著提升了LLM的安全对齐能力
AI.motivation: 后训练大型语言模型需要多样化的高质量数据，但在低资源领域和多轮对话中难以获取。众包或合成生成方法通常产生低质量或低多样性的数据。
AI.method: 引入对抗竞技场框架，将数据生成构建为对抗性任务：攻击者创建提示，防御者生成响应。通过多个团队之间的交互竞争自然产生多样化和复杂的数据。
AI.result: 在网络安全领域组织10个顶尖大学团队的竞赛，生成了19,683个多轮对话。使用该数据集微调开源模型，在CyberSecEval-Instruct上安全代码生成提升了18.47%，在CyberSecEval-MITRE上提升了29.42%。
AI.conclusion: 对抗竞技场框架能够有效生成高质量、多样化的对话数据集，显著提升LLM在特定领域的安全对齐能力，为低资源领域的数据收集提供了新方法。

title: Align Documents to Questions: Question-Oriented Document Rewriting for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhances the factuality of Large Language Models (LLMs) by incorporating retrieved documents and/or generated context. However, LLMs often exhibit a stylistic bias when presented with mixed contexts, favoring fluent but hallucinated generated content over factually grounded yet disorganized retrieved evidence. This phenomenon reveals that the utility of retrieved information is bottlenecked by its presentation. To bridge this gap, we propose QREAM, a style-controlled rewriter that aligns retrieved documents with a question-oriented style while preserving facts, better for LLM readers to utilize. Our framework consists of two stages: (1) QREAM-ICL, which uses stylistic seeds to guide iterative rewriting exploration; and (2) QREAM-FT, a lightweight student model distilled from denoised ICL outputs. QREAM-FT employs dual-criteria rejection sampling, filtering based on answer correctness and factual consistency to ensure high-quality supervision. QREAM seamlessly integrates into existing RAG pipelines as a plug-and-play module. Experiments demonstrate that QREAM consistently enhances advanced RAG pipelines, yielding up to 8% relative improvement with negligible latency overhead, effectively balancing question relevance with factual grounding.

AI.tldr: QREAM是一个风格控制的重写器，通过将检索文档与问题导向的风格对齐来增强RAG系统，解决LLMs在混合上下文中偏向流畅但幻觉生成内容的问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在RAG系统中存在风格偏见，倾向于选择流畅但可能产生幻觉的生成内容，而不是事实基础扎实但组织混乱的检索证据。检索信息的效用受其呈现方式的瓶颈限制。
AI.method: 提出QREAM框架，包含两个阶段：1) QREAM-ICL使用风格种子指导迭代重写探索；2) QREAM-FT是从去噪ICL输出中蒸馏出的轻量级学生模型，采用基于答案正确性和事实一致性的双标准拒绝采样。
AI.result: QREAM能持续增强先进的RAG管道，实现高达8%的相对改进，且延迟开销可忽略不计，有效平衡问题相关性与事实基础。
AI.conclusion: QREAM作为即插即用模块无缝集成到现有RAG管道中，通过风格控制的重写使检索文档更易于LLM读者利用，提升RAG系统的整体性能。

title: LASER: Low-Rank Activation SVD for Efficient Recursion
comment: Accepted to the Latent and Implicit Thinking Workshop at ICLR 2026
summary: Recursive architectures such as Tiny Recursive Models (TRMs) perform implicit reasoning through iterative latent computation, yet the geometric structure of these reasoning trajectories remains poorly understood. We investigate the activation manifold of TRMs during recursive unrolling and find that activations occupy an effectively linear, low-dimensional subspace whose principal directions can be tracked dynamically with cheap power iterations. This suggests that weight-sharing concentrates iterative computation along a small number of dominant eigendirections, and we find that this concentration varies sharply across computational sites. We exploit this structure through LASER (Low-Rank Activation SVD for Efficient Recursion), a dynamic compression framework that maintains an evolving low-rank basis via matrix-free subspace tracking with a fidelity-triggered reset mechanism, achieving ${\sim}60\%$ activation memory savings with no statistically significant accuracy degradation. Our analysis raises questions about how recursive architectures allocate representational capacity during implicit reasoning, and whether this concentration can be exploited to improve the efficiency and stability of latent computation.

AI.tldr: TRMs的递归展开过程中，激活占据了一个有效的线性低维子空间，可通过动态低秩压缩节省约60%的内存而不损失精度。
AI.motivation: 研究递归架构（如TRMs）在隐式推理过程中激活流形的几何结构，理解权重共享如何影响迭代计算在特征方向上的分布。
AI.method: 提出LASER框架：通过无矩阵子空间跟踪和保真度触发的重置机制，动态维护演化的低秩基，实现激活的实时压缩。
AI.result: 发现激活占据线性低维子空间，计算站点间的特征方向集中度差异显著；LASER实现了约60%的激活内存节省，无统计显著精度损失。
AI.conclusion: 递归架构在隐式推理过程中将表示能力集中在少数主导特征方向上，这种结构可被利用来提高潜在计算的效率和稳定性。

title: DOSE: Data Selection for Multi-Modal LLMs via Off-the-Shelf Models
summary: High-quality and diverse multimodal data are essential for improving vision-language models (VLMs), yet existing datasets often contain noisy, redundant, and poorly aligned samples. To address these problems, data filtering is commonly used to enhance the efficiency and performance of multimodal learning, but it introduces extra computational cost because filtering models are usually trained on the same data they are meant to screen. To reduce this cost, we study DOSE, which explores whether off-the-shelf pretrained models that have never seen the target data can be used to select training samples for larger and stronger multimodal models without any task-specific training. Even without fine-tuning, these models can effectively assess text quality and image-text alignment to guide data selection. Based on this, we build a joint quality-alignment distribution and apply adaptive weighted sampling to select informative samples while maintaining long-tail diversity. This approach enhances data diversity, enabling models trained on DOSE-filtered data to match or surpass those trained on the full dataset on standard VQA and math benchmarks. Extensive experiments demonstrate its effectiveness, efficiency, and scalability.

AI.tldr: DOSE：利用现成预训练模型进行多模态数据筛选，无需任务特定训练即可提升视觉语言模型性能
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型数据集存在噪声、冗余和对齐不良问题，传统数据筛选方法需要额外计算成本，因为筛选模型通常需要在目标数据上训练。研究探索能否使用从未见过目标数据的现成预训练模型来筛选训练样本。
AI.method: 使用现成预训练模型评估文本质量和图文对齐，无需微调；构建联合质量-对齐分布，应用自适应加权采样来选择信息丰富样本，同时保持长尾多样性。
AI.result: 在标准VQA和数学基准测试中，使用DOSE筛选数据训练的模型能够匹配甚至超越在全数据集上训练的模型，证明了方法的有效性、效率和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: DOSE展示了现成预训练模型可以有效用于多模态数据筛选，无需任务特定训练，能够提升数据多样性并提高模型性能，同时降低计算成本。

title: WebUncertainty: Dual-Level Uncertainty Driven Planning and Reasoning For Autonomous Web Agent
summary: Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have empowered autonomous web agents to execute natural language instructions directly on real-world webpages. However, existing agents often struggle with complex tasks involving dynamic interactions and long-horizon execution due to rigid planning strategies and hallucination-prone reasoning. To address these limitations, we propose WebUncertainty, a novel autonomous agent framework designed to tackle dual-level uncertainty in planning and reasoning. Specifically, we design a Task Uncertainty-Driven Adaptive Planning Mechanism that adaptively selects planning modes to navigate unknown environments. Furthermore, we introduce an Action Uncertainty-Driven Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS) Reasoning Mechanism. This mechanism incorporates the Confidence-induced Action Uncertainty (ConActU) strategy to quantify both aleatoric uncertainty (AU) and epistemic uncertainty (EU), thereby optimizing the search process and guiding robust decision-making. Experimental results on the WebArena and WebVoyager benchmarks demonstrate that WebUncertainty achieves superior performance compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: WebUncertainty是一个处理规划和推理双重不确定性的自主网页代理框架，通过自适应规划机制和基于MCTS的推理机制，在网页交互任务中实现更优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言模型驱动的自主网页代理在处理动态交互和长时程执行任务时存在困难，主要原因是僵化的规划策略和容易产生幻觉的推理过程。
AI.method: 提出WebUncertainty框架：1) 任务不确定性驱动的自适应规划机制，根据环境动态选择规划模式；2) 动作不确定性驱动的MCTS推理机制，采用ConActU策略量化偶然不确定性和认知不确定性，优化搜索过程。
AI.result: 在WebArena和WebVoyager基准测试中，WebUncertainty相比最先进的基线方法取得了更优的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过处理规划和推理中的双重不确定性，WebUncertainty框架能够有效提升自主网页代理在复杂动态环境中的执行能力，为实际网页交互任务提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: Neuro-Symbolic Resolution of Recommendation Conflicts in Multimorbidity Clinical Guidelines
comment: Accepted by Proceedings of the 40th Annual AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (Bridge Program on Logic & AI: Logical and Symbolic Reasoning in Language Models)
summary: Clinical guidelines, typically developed by independent specialty societies, inherently exhibit substantial fragmentation, redundancy, and logical contradiction. These inconsistencies, particularly when applied to patients with multimorbidity, not only cause cognitive dissonance for clinicians but also introduce catastrophic noise into AI systems, rendering the standard Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system fragile and prone to hallucination. To address this fundamental reliability crisis, we introduce a Neuro-Symbolic framework that automates the detection of recommendation redundancies and conflicts. Our pipeline employs a multi-agent system to translate unstructured clinical natural language into rigorous symbolic logic language, which is then verified by a Satisfiability (SAT) solver. By formulating a hierarchical taxonomy of logical rule interactions, we identify a critical category termed Local Conflict - a decision conflict arising from the intersection of comorbidities. Evaluating our system on a curated benchmark of 12 authoritative SGLT2 inhibitor guidelines, we reveal that 90.6% of conflicts are Local, a structural complexity that single-disease guidelines fail to address. While state-of-the-art LLMs fail in detecting these conflicts, our neuro-symbolic approach achieves an F1 score of 0.861. This work demonstrates that logical verification must precede retrieval, establishing a new technical standard for automated knowledge coordination in medical AI.

AI.tldr: 论文提出神经符号框架，自动检测临床指南中的冗余和冲突，特别针对多病共患情况，通过逻辑验证提升医疗AI可靠性
AI.motivation: 临床指南由不同专业学会独立制定，存在碎片化、冗余和逻辑矛盾，特别是应用于多病共患患者时，不仅造成临床医生认知失调，还会给AI系统引入灾难性噪声，使标准RAG系统脆弱且易产生幻觉
AI.method: 引入神经符号框架，采用多智能体系统将非结构化临床自然语言转换为严格的符号逻辑语言，然后通过可满足性(SAT)求解器进行验证，制定逻辑规则交互的层次分类法
AI.result: 在12个权威SGLT2抑制剂指南的基准测试中，发现90.6%的冲突是局部冲突（由共病交集引起的决策冲突），神经符号方法F1分数达到0.861，而最先进的LLMs无法检测这些冲突
AI.conclusion: 逻辑验证必须先于检索，为医疗AI中的自动化知识协调建立了新的技术标准，神经符号方法能有效解决临床指南中的逻辑不一致问题

title: Revisiting Auxiliary Losses for Conditional Depth Routing: An Empirical Study
comment: 23 pages, 4 figures. Preprint. Controlled empirical study with 3-seed runs at 157.5M parameters; includes a negative result on oracle-style utility/rank supervision for conditional depth routing
summary:
Conditional depth execution routes a subset of tokens through a lightweight cheap FFN while the remainder execute the standard full FFN at each controlled layer. The central difficulty is gate training: the gate decision must propagate through many layers before it influences the language modeling (LM) loss, so the resulting gradients are weak and noisy. Auxiliary losses are commonly stacked to stabilise training, yet the interactions among them -- particularly between a predictive auxiliary and explicit score supervision -- have not been systematically compared under controlled conditions.
  We evaluate two gate designs under a 157.5M-parameter decoder-only model with controller-only training, 50% full-path budget, and 3-seed runs on a fineweb-edu subset. The MLP gate (G1) maps the current hidden state to a utility score; the JEPA-guided gate (G3) adds an action-conditional predictor that forecasts, in a low-dimensional latent space, the outcome of executing full vs. cheap per token, aligned against a fixed target head. Under the standard recipe with oracle-style utility regression and pairwise rank supervision (util/rank), G3 improves early-to-mid optimisation over G1 in 3/3 seeds (lower avg LM, faster threshold hits, ~10.3x lower grad norms), with 20k-step endpoint LM within a 0.005 heuristic reference.
  A key finding (ablation A3): jointly removing util/rank improves best/avg LM and threshold-hit speed in 3/3 seeds for both gates, and the early-to-mid advantage of G3 over G1 disappears. We trace this to an off-policy oracle label that assumes all subsequent layers execute full, whereas gated execution routes only a fraction through full -- making util/rank net-negative under the current recipe. Removing util/rank also cuts the training FLOPs proxy from ~1.53x to ~1.07x full-only (2.87h to 1.75h on a V100-32GB, ~39%). Conclusions are scoped to the studied regime.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了条件深度执行中门控训练问题，发现传统辅助损失（效用回归和成对排序监督）在门控执行下会产生负面效果，移除这些损失反而能提升模型性能并大幅降低训练成本。
AI.motivation: 条件深度执行中，门控训练面临梯度弱且噪声大的问题。传统方法使用辅助损失来稳定训练，但这些损失之间的相互作用（特别是预测性辅助损失和显式分数监督）在受控条件下尚未得到系统比较。
AI.method: 在157.5M参数解码器模型上评估两种门控设计：MLP门控（G1）和JEPA引导门控（G3）。使用控制器专用训练、50%全路径预算，在FineWeb-edu子集上进行3次随机种子实验。对比了标准配方（包含效用回归和成对排序监督）与移除这些辅助损失的消融实验。
AI.result: 在标准配方下，G3在早期到中期优化中优于G1（更低的平均LM损失、更快达到阈值、梯度范数约低10.3倍）。但关键发现是：移除效用回归和成对排序监督后，两种门控的最佳/平均LM损失和阈值达到速度在3/3种子中都得到改善，且G3相对于G1的优势消失。训练FLOPs代理从约1.53倍降至约1.07倍全模型训练（训练时间从2.87小时降至1.75小时，减少约39%）。
AI.conclusion: 传统辅助损失在门控执行下会产生负面效果，因为其基于"所有后续层都执行全路径"的假设与实际情况不符。移除这些损失能显著提升性能并降低训练成本。结论适用于所研究的特定配置。

title: Adverse-to-the-eXtreme Panoptic Segmentation: URVIS 2026 Study and Benchmark
summary: This paper presents the report of the URVIS 2026 challenge on adverse-to-extreme panoptic segmentation. As the first challenge of its kind, it attracted 17 registered participants and 47 submissions, with 4 teams reaching the final phase. The challenge is based on the MUSES dataset, a multi-sensor benchmark for panoptic segmentation in adverse-to-extreme weather, including RGB frame camera, LiDAR, radar, and event camera data. Weighted Panoptic Quality (wPQ) is designed and adopted as the official ranking metric for fair evaluation across weather conditions. In this report, we summarise the challenge setting and benchmark results, analyse the performance of the submitted methods, and discuss current progress and remaining challenges for robust multimodal panoptic segmentation. Link: https://urvis-workshop.github.io/challenge-Muses.html

AI.tldr: URVIS 2026挑战赛报告，这是首个恶劣到极端天气条件下的全景分割挑战，基于MUSES多传感器数据集，采用加权全景质量(wPQ)作为评估指标，吸引了17个团队参与。
AI.motivation: 推动恶劣到极端天气条件下的鲁棒全景分割研究，解决自动驾驶等实际应用中多传感器融合在复杂天气条件下的感知挑战。
AI.method: 基于MUSES多传感器数据集（RGB相机、LiDAR、雷达、事件相机），设计加权全景质量(wPQ)作为公平评估指标，组织挑战赛并分析参赛方法。
AI.result: 挑战赛吸引了17个注册团队和47份提交，4个团队进入最终阶段，展示了多传感器融合在恶劣天气全景分割方面的进展，但也揭示了现有方法的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛为恶劣天气条件下的全景分割建立了基准，展示了多传感器融合的潜力，但仍需进一步研究来提高在极端天气条件下的鲁棒性和准确性。

title: Polysemantic Experts, Monosemantic Paths: Routing as Control in MoEs
summary: An LLM's residual stream is both state and instruction: it encodes the current context and determines the next transformation. We introduce a parameter-free decomposition for Mixture-of-Experts models that splits each layer's hidden state into a control signal that causally drives routing and an orthogonal content channel invisible to the router. Across six MoE architectures, we find that models preserve surface-level features (language, token identity, position) in the content channel, while the control signal encodes an abstract function that rotates from layer to layer. Because each routing decision is low-bandwidth, this hand-off forces compositional specialization across layers. While individual experts remain polysemantic, expert paths become monosemantic, clustering tokens by semantic function across languages and surface forms. The same token (e.g., ":") follows distinct trajectories depending on whether it serves as a type annotation, an introductory colon, or a time separator. Our decomposition identifies the source of this structure: clusters in the control subspace are substantially more monosemantic than those in the full representation. As a result, the natural unit of interpretability in MoEs is not the expert but the trajectory.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种无参数的MoE模型分解方法，将隐藏状态分为控制信号和内容通道，揭示了专家路径而非单个专家是MoE的可解释性基本单元。
AI.motivation: LLM的残差流既是状态也是指令，它编码当前上下文并决定下一个转换。为了理解MoE模型中的路由机制和表示结构，需要一种方法来分解隐藏状态，区分控制路由的信号和实际内容。
AI.method: 提出了一种无参数的分解方法，将每个MoE层的隐藏状态分为两个正交子空间：控制信号（驱动路由决策）和内容通道（对路由器不可见）。该方法在六种不同的MoE架构上进行了验证。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）内容通道保留表面特征（语言、token身份、位置）；2）控制信号编码抽象函数，在不同层间旋转；3）路由决策的低带宽特性迫使跨层组合专业化；4）单个专家保持多义性，但专家路径变得单义性；5）同一token根据语义功能不同会遵循不同轨迹；6）控制子空间中的聚类比完整表示中的聚类更加单义。
AI.conclusion: MoE模型中可解释性的自然单元不是单个专家，而是轨迹（专家路径）。控制信号和内容通道的分离揭示了MoE如何通过跨层组合实现语义专业化。

title: Logical Computational Linguistics
summary:
In this book we promote logical computational linguistics as opposed to statistical computational linguistics. In particular, we provide a logical semantic interface. This book assembles more than twenty years of research work on type logical grammar, and adds new ideas and material.
  Chains of statistical dependencies of less than one hundred per cent confidence tend monotonically to zero. Chains of logical dependencies of any length maintain one hundred per cent confidence end to end.
  We aspire to enable perfect syntactic and semantic processing in life-critical NLP applications.

AI.tldr: 本书倡导逻辑计算语言学而非统计计算语言学，提供逻辑语义接口，汇集20多年类型逻辑语法研究并加入新思想
AI.motivation: 作者认为统计计算语言学存在置信度衰减问题（统计依赖链的置信度会单调递减至零），而逻辑依赖链能保持100%置信度。目标是实现生命关键NLP应用中的完美句法和语义处理
AI.method: 采用逻辑计算语言学方法，特别是类型逻辑语法（Type Logical Grammar），提供逻辑语义接口。基于20多年的研究积累，并加入新的思想和方法
AI.result: 本书系统整理了类型逻辑语法的研究成果，建立了逻辑语义接口框架，为生命关键NLP应用提供了理论基础
AI.conclusion: 逻辑计算语言学比统计方法更适合生命关键NLP应用，因为逻辑依赖链能保持100%置信度，而统计依赖链的置信度会衰减至零

title: Fully Analog Resonant Recurrent Neural Network via Metacircuit
summary: Physical neural networks offer a transformative route to edge intelligence, providing superior inference speed and energy efficiency compared to conventional digital architectures. However, realizing scalable, end-to-end, fully analog recurrent neural networks for temporal information processing remains challenging due to the difficulty of faithfully mapping trained network models onto physical hardware. Here we present a fully analog resonant recurrent neural network (R$^2$NN) implemented via a metacircuit architecture composed of coupled electrical local resonators. A reformulated mechanical-electrical analogy establishes a direct mapping between the R$^2$NN model and metacircuit elements, enabling accurate physical implementation of trained neural network parameters. By integrating jointly trainable global resistive coupling and local resonances, which generate effective frequency-dependent negative resistances, the architecture shapes an impedance landscape that steers currents along frequency-selective pathways. This mechanism enables direct extraction of discriminative spectral features, facilitating real-time temporal classification of raw analog inputs while bypassing analog-to-digital conversion. We demonstrate the cross-domain versatility of this framework using integrated hardware for tactile perception, speech recognition, and condition monitoring. This work establishes a scalable, fully analog paradigm for intelligent temporal processing and paves the way for low-latency, resource-efficient physical neural hardware for edge intelligence.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种完全模拟的谐振递归神经网络（R²NN），通过元电路架构实现，能够直接处理原始模拟信号，无需模数转换，在边缘智能应用中实现低延迟、高能效的时间分类任务。
AI.motivation: 物理神经网络在边缘智能中具有推理速度快、能效高的优势，但实现可扩展的、端到端的完全模拟递归神经网络仍然面临挑战，主要困难在于如何将训练好的网络模型准确映射到物理硬件上。
AI.method: 采用元电路架构，由耦合的电气局部谐振器组成。通过重新表述的机械-电气类比，建立R²NN模型与元电路元件之间的直接映射。整合可联合训练的全局电阻耦合和局部谐振，产生有效的频率相关负电阻，形成阻抗景观，引导电流沿频率选择性路径流动。
AI.result: 该框架展示了跨领域的多功能性，通过集成硬件实现了触觉感知、语音识别和状态监测。能够直接从原始模拟输入中提取判别性频谱特征，实现实时时间分类。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作建立了一个可扩展的、完全模拟的智能时间处理范式，为边缘智能的低延迟、资源高效的物理神经硬件铺平了道路。

title: DVAR: Adversarial Multi-Agent Debate for Video Authenticity Detection
summary: The rapid evolution of video generation technologies poses a significant challenge to media forensics, as conventional detection methods often fail to generalize beyond their training distributions. To address this, we propose DVAR (Debate-based Video Authenticity Reasoning), a training-free framework that reformulates video detection as a structured multi-agent forensic reasoning process. Moving beyond the paradigm of pattern matching, DVAR orchestrates a competition between a Generative Hypothesis Agent and a Natural Mechanism Agent. Through iterative rounds of cross-examination, these agents defend their respective explanations against abnormal evidence, driving a logical convergence where the truth emerges from rigorous stress-testing. To adjudicate these conflicting claims, we apply Occam's Razor through the Minimum Description Length (MDL) framework, defining an Explanatory Cost to quantify the "logical burden" of each reasoning path. Furthermore, we integrate GenVideoKB, a dynamic knowledge repository that provides high-level reasoning heuristics on generative boundaries and failure modes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DVAR achieves competitive performance against supervised state-of-the-art methods while exhibiting superior generalization to unseen generative architectures. By transforming detection into a transparent debate, DVAR provides explicit, interpretable reasoning traces for robust video authenticity assessment.

AI.tldr: DVAR是一个无需训练的框架，将视频真实性检测重构为结构化多智能体辩论过程，通过生成假设代理与自然机制代理的交叉质证，结合最小描述长度原则和知识库，实现可解释的泛化检测。
AI.motivation: 视频生成技术快速发展，传统检测方法难以泛化到训练分布之外，需要新的检测范式来应对不断演变的生成技术。
AI.method: 提出DVAR框架：1) 构建生成假设代理和自然机制代理进行结构化辩论；2) 通过迭代交叉质证让双方为异常证据辩护；3) 应用最小描述长度原则计算解释成本；4) 集成GenVideoKB动态知识库提供高级推理启发。
AI.result: 实验表明DVAR在性能上与有监督的SOTA方法相当，同时在未见过的生成架构上表现出优越的泛化能力，并提供透明可解释的推理轨迹。
AI.conclusion: DVAR通过将检测转变为透明辩论过程，超越了模式匹配范式，实现了鲁棒且可解释的视频真实性评估，为媒体取证提供了新思路。

title: On the Reliability of Computer Use Agents
summary: Computer-use agents have rapidly improved on real-world tasks such as web navigation, desktop automation, and software interaction, in some cases surpassing human performance. Yet even when the task and model are unchanged, an agent that succeeds once may fail on a repeated execution of the same task. This raises a fundamental question: if an agent can succeed at a task once, what prevents it from doing so reliably? In this work, we study the sources of unreliability in computer-use agents through three factors: stochasticity during execution, ambiguity in task specification, and variability in agent behavior. We analyze these factors on OSWorld using repeated executions of the same task together with paired statistical tests that capture task-level changes across settings. Our analysis shows that reliability depends on both how tasks are specified and how agent behavior varies across executions. These findings suggest the need to evaluate agents under repeated execution, to allow agents to resolve task ambiguity through interaction, and to favor strategies that remain stable across runs.

AI.tldr: 研究计算机使用代理的不可靠性来源，发现任务规范模糊、执行随机性和代理行为变异是主要因素，建议通过重复执行评估、允许交互澄清任务、采用稳定策略来提高可靠性。
AI.motivation: 尽管计算机使用代理在网页导航、桌面自动化等任务上表现优异，甚至超越人类，但同一任务重复执行时成功率不稳定。这引发了一个核心问题：如果代理能成功一次，什么阻碍了它可靠地重复成功？需要系统分析不可靠性的根源。
AI.method: 通过三个因素分析不可靠性：执行过程中的随机性、任务规范的模糊性、代理行为的变异性。在OSWorld环境中重复执行相同任务，使用配对统计测试捕捉不同设置下的任务级变化。
AI.result: 分析表明可靠性既取决于任务如何规范，也取决于代理行为在不同执行中的变异程度。执行随机性、任务模糊性和代理行为变异共同影响成功率。
AI.conclusion: 需要在重复执行下评估代理，允许代理通过交互解决任务模糊性，并优先采用跨运行保持稳定的策略。这对提高计算机使用代理的可靠性至关重要。

title: More Than Meets the Eye: Measuring the Semiotic Gap in Vision-Language Models via Semantic Anchorage
comment: 16 pages, 4 figures. Accepted to the Main Conference of ACL 2026
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) excel at photorealistic generation, yet often struggle to represent abstract meaning such as idiomatic interpretations of noun compounds. To study whether high visual fidelity interferes with idiomatic compositionality under visual abstraction, we introduce DIVA, a controlled benchmark that replaces high-fidelity visual detail with schematic iconicity by generating paired, sense-anchored visualizations for literal and idiomatic readings. We further propose Semantic Alignment Gap ($Δ$), an architecture-agnostic metric that quantifies divergence between literal and idiomatic visual grounding. We additionally introduce a directional signed bias $b(t)$ to separately measure the direction and strength of literal preference. Evaluating 8 recent VLMs, we reveal a consistent Literal Superiority Bias: model scale alone does not resolve literal preference, and increased visual fidelity is associated with weaker symbolic alignment, suggesting cognitive interference from hyper-realistic imagery. Our findings suggest that improving compositional understanding requires iconographic abstraction of visual input and anchoring interpretation and generation in intended meaning.

AI.tldr: VLMs在具象生成表现出色，但在抽象语义（如成语理解）上存在困难。研究发现高视觉保真度会干扰成语组合性，提出DIVA基准和Δ度量揭示VLMs存在字面义偏好偏差。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索视觉语言模型在抽象语义理解上的局限性，特别是高视觉保真度是否干扰成语等抽象意义的组合性理解。当前VLMs擅长生成逼真图像，但在表达抽象概念时存在困难。
AI.method: 提出DIVA基准测试，用示意性图标代替高保真视觉细节，为字面义和成语义生成配对的可视化。引入语义对齐差距Δ（架构无关度量）量化字面义和成语义视觉接地的差异，以及方向性符号偏置b(t)测量字面义偏好的方向和强度。
AI.result: 评估8个最新VLMs，发现一致的字面义优越性偏置：模型规模本身不能解决字面义偏好，高视觉保真度与弱符号对齐相关，表明超写实图像会产生认知干扰。
AI.conclusion: 改进组合性理解需要视觉输入的图标化抽象，并将解释和生成锚定在意向意义上。高保真视觉细节会阻碍抽象语义理解，需要更抽象的视觉表示来支持语义组合。

title: REALM: Reliable Expertise-Aware Language Model Fine-Tuning from Noisy Annotations
summary: Supervised fine-tuning of large language models relies on human-annotated data, yet annotation pipelines routinely involve multiple crowdworkers of heterogeneous expertise. Standard practice aggregates labels via majority vote or simple averaging, discarding annotator identity and causing the model to absorb the errors of unreliable annotators directly into its parameters. We propose REALM, a method that jointly learns the model parameters and a scalar expertise value for each annotator entirely unsupervised, requiring no supervision beyond annotator identity. The key idea is to model each observed label as a mixture between the model's prediction and a uniform random guess, weighted by the annotator's learned expertise. We extend REALM to a multi-task setting via a learned expertise matrix that captures per-annotator reliability across tasks. We evaluate on five question answering benchmarks, fine-tuning three sizes of Flan-T5 under simulated noisy annotations. The proposed algorithm consistently outperforms the naive noisy SFT in the large majority of single- and multi-task settings, across datasets, model sizes, and noise types, with accuracy improvements of up to $50\%$ in the most adversarial regime and gains that grow with model capacity.

AI.tldr: REALM：一种无监督学习方法，通过为每个标注者学习专业度值，在微调大语言模型时减少不可靠标注者的影响，提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 当前监督微调方法通常使用多数投票或简单平均来聚合标注，这忽略了标注者身份和专业知识差异，导致模型直接吸收不可靠标注者的错误。
AI.method: REALM方法联合学习模型参数和每个标注者的标量专业度值，将每个观察到的标签建模为模型预测和均匀随机猜测的混合，权重由标注者的学习专业度决定。在多任务设置中，使用学习到的专业度矩阵来捕捉每个标注者在不同任务上的可靠性。
AI.result: 在五个问答基准测试中，使用三种规模的Flan-T5模型在模拟噪声标注下进行微调。REALM在大多数单任务和多任务设置中持续优于朴素的噪声监督微调，在最具对抗性的情况下准确率提升高达50%，且增益随模型容量增长而增加。
AI.conclusion: REALM提供了一种有效的方法来处理标注者专业知识异质性，通过无监督学习标注者专业度，显著提升了模型在噪声标注下的性能，特别是在大规模模型上效果更明显。

title: Inductive Convolution Nuclear Norm Minimization for Tensor Completion with Arbitrary Sampling
summary: The recently established Convolution Nuclear Norm Minimization (CNNM) addresses the problem of \textit{tensor completion with arbitrary sampling} (TCAS), which involves restoring a tensor from a subset of its entries sampled in an arbitrary manner. Despite its promising performance, the optimization procedure of CNNM needs performing Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) multiple times, which is computationally expensive and hard to parallelize. To address the issue, we reformulate the optimization objective of CNNM from the perspective of convolution eigenvectors. By introducing pre-learned convolution eigenvectors which are shared among different tensors, we propose a novel method called Inductive Convolution Nuclear Norm Minimization (ICNNM), which bypasses the SVD step so as to decrease significantly the computational time. In addition, due to the extra prior knowledge encoded in the pre-learned convolution eigenvectors, ICNNM also outperforms CNNM in terms of recovery performance. Extensive experiments on video completion, prediction and frame interpolation verify the superiority of ICNNM over CNNM and several other competing methods.

AI.tldr: 提出ICNNM方法，通过引入预学习的卷积特征向量避免SVD计算，显著提升张量补全的计算效率和恢复性能
AI.motivation: 现有的CNNM方法虽然能处理任意采样的张量补全问题，但需要多次执行SVD分解，计算成本高且难以并行化，限制了其实际应用
AI.method: 从卷积特征向量角度重新表述CNNM优化目标，引入预学习的卷积特征向量（在不同张量间共享），提出ICNNM方法，绕过SVD步骤
AI.result: ICNNM显著减少了计算时间，同时由于预学习卷积特征向量提供的额外先验知识，在恢复性能上也优于CNNM；在视频补全、预测和帧插值实验中表现优于CNNM和其他竞争方法
AI.conclusion: ICNNM通过预学习卷积特征向量有效解决了CNNM的计算瓶颈问题，在计算效率和恢复性能上都取得了显著提升，为张量补全问题提供了更实用的解决方案

title: SPREG: Structured Plan Repair with Entropy-Guided Test-Time Intervention for Large Language Model Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are prone to logical hallucinations and stochastic drifts during long-chain reasoning. While Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) can improve instruction adherence, standard static implementations often cause semantic dilution and linguistic degradation. We propose SPREG (Structured Plan-guided Real-time Entropy Gating), a lightweight inference-time framework for surgical error rectification. SPREG employs an adaptive dual-threshold mechanism to monitor real-time entropy, identifying sudden ``entropy spikes'' as reliable indicators of logical failure. Upon detection, it triggers a dynamic repair by replacing uninformative null-priors with reference distributions synthesized from historical high-confidence states. By modulating guidance intensity according to structured reasoning stages (e.g., Action, Observation), SPREG steers the model back to a stable manifold without compromising fluency. Our experiments demonstrate significant gains, notably a 20.0% absolute accuracy improvement on AIME25, while effectively suppressing uncontrolled entropy drift in complex tasks.

AI.tldr: SPREG：一个轻量级推理时框架，通过实时熵门控和结构化计划引导来纠正大语言模型在长链推理中的逻辑幻觉和随机漂移问题
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在长链推理中容易出现逻辑幻觉和随机漂移，而传统的无分类器引导方法存在语义稀释和语言退化问题，需要更精细的推理时错误纠正机制
AI.method: SPREG采用自适应双阈值机制监控实时熵，将"熵尖峰"作为逻辑失败的可靠指标，触发动态修复：用历史高置信状态合成的参考分布替换无信息的空先验，并根据结构化推理阶段（如行动、观察）调节引导强度
AI.result: 实验显示显著提升，特别是在AIME25上获得20.0%的绝对准确率提升，同时有效抑制复杂任务中的不受控熵漂移
AI.conclusion: SPREG是一个有效的推理时框架，能够在不影响流畅性的情况下将模型引导回稳定流形，显著改善大语言模型的长链推理性能

title: Still Between Us? Evaluating and Improving Voice Assistant Robustness to Third-Party Interruptions
summary: While recent Spoken Language Models (SLMs) have been actively deployed in real-world scenarios, they lack the capability to discern Third-Party Interruptions (TPI) from the primary user's ongoing flow, leaving them vulnerable to contextual failures. To bridge this gap, we introduce TPI-Train, a dataset of 88K instances designed with speaker-aware hard negatives to enforce acoustic cue prioritization for interruption handling, and TPI-Bench, a comprehensive evaluation framework designed to rigorously measure the interruption-handling strategy and precise speaker discrimination in deceptive contexts. Experiments demonstrate that our dataset design mitigates semantic shortcut learning-a critical pitfall where models exploit semantic context while neglecting acoustic signals essential for discerning speaker changes. We believe our work establishes a foundational resource for overcoming text-dominated unimodal reliance in SLMs, paving the way for more robust multi-party spoken interaction. The code for the framework is publicly available at https://tpi-va.github.io

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TPI-Train数据集和TPI-Bench评估框架，用于解决语音语言模型无法区分第三方打断的问题，通过强调声学线索来避免语义捷径学习。
AI.motivation: 当前的语音语言模型在真实场景中部署时，缺乏区分第三方打断与主要用户持续对话的能力，容易导致上下文失败。现有方法过度依赖文本语义而忽视声学信号，无法准确识别说话者变化。
AI.method: 1. 构建TPI-Train数据集（88K实例），包含说话者感知的困难负样本，强制模型优先考虑声学线索来处理打断；2. 开发TPI-Bench评估框架，全面评估打断处理策略和欺骗性语境下的说话者辨别能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该数据集设计有效缓解了语义捷径学习问题（即模型过度利用语义上下文而忽视关键的声学信号）。TPI-Bench提供了全面的评估指标，能够准确衡量模型在复杂多说话者场景中的表现。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为克服语音语言模型中文本主导的单模态依赖奠定了基础，为更鲁棒的多方语音交互铺平了道路。代码已公开提供。

title: Interpolating Discrete Diffusion Models with Controllable Resampling
summary: Discrete diffusion models form a powerful class of generative models across diverse domains, including text and graphs. However, existing approaches face fundamental limitations. Masked diffusion models suffer from irreversible errors due to early unmasking, while uniform diffusion models, despite enabling self-correction, often yield low-quality samples due to their strong reliance on intermediate latent states. We introduce IDDM, an Interpolating Discrete Diffusion Model, that improves diffusion by reducing dependence on intermediate latent states. Central to IDDM is a controllable resampling mechanism that partially resets probability mass to the marginal distribution, mitigating error accumulation and enabling more effective token corrections. IDDM specifies a generative process whose transitions interpolate between staying at the current state, resampling from a prior, and flipping toward the target state, while enforcing marginal consistency and fully decoupling training from inference. We benchmark our model against state-of-the-art discrete diffusion models across molecular graph generation as well as text generation tasks, demonstrating competitive performance.

AI.tldr: IDDM是一种插值离散扩散模型，通过可控重采样机制减少对中间潜在状态的依赖，在分子图生成和文本生成任务中表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有离散扩散模型存在根本性限制：掩码扩散模型因早期解掩码导致不可逆错误，而均匀扩散模型虽然支持自校正，但过度依赖中间潜在状态导致样本质量低下。
AI.method: 提出IDDM模型，核心是可控重采样机制，将部分概率质量重置到边缘分布，减少错误累积并实现更有效的标记校正。生成过程的转移在保持当前状态、从先验重采样和向目标状态翻转之间进行插值，同时保持边缘一致性并完全解耦训练与推理。
AI.result: 在分子图生成和文本生成任务上，IDDM与最先进的离散扩散模型相比表现出竞争性性能。
AI.conclusion: IDDM通过减少对中间潜在状态的依赖，改进了离散扩散模型，在保持自校正能力的同时提高了样本质量。

title: TeMuDance: Contrastive Alignment-Based Textual Control for Music-Driven Dance Generation
summary: Existing music-driven dance generation approaches have achieved strong realism and effective audio-motion alignment. However, they generally lack semantic controllability, making it difficult to guide specific movements through natural language descriptions. This limitation primarily stems from the absence of large-scale datasets that jointly align music, text, and motion for supervised learning of text-conditioned control. To address this challenge, we propose TeMuDance, a framework that enables text-based control for music-conditioned dance generation without requiring any manually annotated music-text-motion triplet dataset. TeMuDance introduces a motion-centred bridging paradigm that leverages motion as a shared semantic anchor to align disjoint music-dance and text-motion datasets within a unified embedding space, enabling cross-modal retrieval of missing modalities for end-to-end training. A lightweight text control branch is then trained on top of a frozen music-to-dance diffusion backbone, preserving rhythmic fidelity while enabling fine-grained semantic guidance. To further suppress noise inherent in the retrieved supervision, we design a dual-stream fine-tuning strategy with confidence-based filtering. We also propose a novel task-aligned metric that quantifies whether textual prompts induce the intended kinematic attributes under music conditioning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TeMuDance achieves competitive dance quality while substantially improving text-conditioned control over existing methods.

AI.tldr: TeMuDance是一个无需人工标注三元组数据集即可实现文本控制的音乐驱动舞蹈生成框架，通过运动作为语义桥梁对齐音乐-舞蹈和文本-运动数据，在保持音乐节奏保真度的同时实现细粒度语义控制。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐驱动舞蹈生成方法缺乏语义可控性，难以通过自然语言描述指导特定动作，主要原因是缺乏大规模对齐音乐、文本和运动的三元组数据集进行监督学习。
AI.method: 提出运动中心桥接范式，利用运动作为共享语义锚点，在对齐的嵌入空间中桥接不相交的音乐-舞蹈和文本-运动数据集；在冻结的音乐到舞蹈扩散主干上训练轻量级文本控制分支；设计双流微调策略进行置信度过滤以抑制检索监督中的噪声。
AI.result: TeMuDance在保持竞争性舞蹈质量的同时，在文本条件控制方面显著优于现有方法；提出了新的任务对齐度量标准来量化文本提示在音乐条件下是否诱导了预期的运动学属性。
AI.conclusion: TeMuDance框架成功解决了无需人工标注三元组数据集即可实现文本控制的音乐驱动舞蹈生成问题，通过创新的桥接范式和训练策略实现了语义可控的舞蹈生成。

title: Physics-Informed Causal MDPs for Sequential Constraint Repair in Engineering Simulation Pipelines
summary: Off-policy learning in constrained MDPs with large binary state spaces faces a fundamental tension: causal identification of transition dynamics requires structural assumptions, while sample-efficient policy learning requires state-space compression. We introduce PI-CMDP, a framework for CMDPs whose constraint dependencies form a layered DAG under a Lifecycle Ordering Assumption (LOA). We propose an Identify-Compress-Estimate pipeline: (i) Identify: LOA enables backdoor identification of causal edge weights for cross-layer pairs, with formal partial-identification bounds when LOA is violated; (ii) Compress: a Markov abstraction compresses state cardinality from 2^(WL) to (W+1)^L under layer-priority regularity and exchangeability; and (iii) Estimate: a physics-guided doubly-robust estimator remains unbiased and reduces the variance constant when the physics prior outperforms a learned model. We instantiate PI-CMDP on constraint repair in engineering simulation pipelines. On the TPS benchmark (4,206 episodes), PI-CMDP achieves 76.2% repair success rate with only 300 training episodes versus 70.8% for the strongest baseline (+5.4 pp), narrowing to +2.8 pp (83.4% vs. 80.6%) in the full-data regime, while substantially reducing cascade failure rates. All improvements are consistent across 5 independent seeds (paired t-test p < 0.02).

AI.tldr: PI-CMDP框架通过分层DAG结构假设，提出识别-压缩-估计三步法，在约束MDP中实现高效的离策略学习，应用于工程仿真约束修复任务，显著提升修复成功率。
AI.motivation: 在具有大规模二进制状态空间的约束MDP中进行离策略学习面临根本矛盾：因果识别需要结构假设，而样本高效策略学习需要状态空间压缩。现有方法难以同时满足这两个需求。
AI.method: 提出PI-CMDP框架，基于生命周期排序假设（LOA）构建分层DAG约束依赖结构。采用识别-压缩-估计三步法：1）识别：LOA支持跨层因果边权重的后门识别；2）压缩：通过马尔可夫抽象将状态基数从2^(WL)压缩到(W+1)^L；3）估计：使用物理引导的双鲁棒估计器保持无偏性并降低方差。
AI.result: 在TPS基准测试（4,206个episodes）中，PI-CMDP仅用300个训练episodes就达到76.2%的修复成功率，比最强基线提升5.4个百分点。在全数据机制下达到83.4%成功率，比基线高2.8个百分点，同时显著降低级联故障率。所有改进在5个独立种子中保持一致（配对t检验p<0.02）。
AI.conclusion: PI-CMDP框架成功解决了约束MDP中因果识别与状态压缩的矛盾，通过分层DAG结构和三步法实现了高效的离策略学习，在工程仿真约束修复任务中表现出优越性能。

title: ArgBench: Benchmarking LLMs on Computational Argumentation Tasks
summary: Argumentation skills are an essential toolkit for large language models (LLMs). These skills are crucial in various use cases, including self-reflection, debating collaboratively for diverse answers, and countering hate speech. In this paper, we create the first benchmark for a standardized evaluation of LLM-based approaches to computational argumentation, encompassing 33 datasets from previous work in unified form. Using the benchmark, we evaluate the generalizability of five LLM families across 46 computational argumentation tasks that cover mining arguments, assessing perspectives, assessing argument quality, reasoning about arguments, and generating arguments. On the benchmark, we conduct an extensive systematic analysis of the contribution of few-shot examples, reasoning steps, model size, and training skills to the performance of LLMs on the computational argumentation tasks in the benchmark.

AI.tldr: 该论文创建了首个用于评估LLM在计算论证方面能力的基准测试，包含33个统一格式的数据集，评估了5个LLM家族在46个计算论证任务上的表现，并分析了few-shot示例、推理步骤、模型规模和训练技能对性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 论证能力是大型语言模型的重要技能，在自我反思、协作辩论、反对仇恨言论等多种应用场景中至关重要。目前缺乏标准化的评估基准来系统评估LLM在计算论证任务上的表现。
AI.method: 创建了首个计算论证基准测试，整合了33个先前工作中的数据集并统一格式。使用该基准评估了5个LLM家族在46个计算论证任务上的表现，包括论证挖掘、视角评估、论证质量评估、论证推理和论证生成等任务。进行了系统性分析，考察了few-shot示例、推理步骤、模型规模和训练技能对性能的影响。
AI.result: 建立了首个全面的计算论证评估基准，提供了LLM在计算论证任务上的性能评估结果，并揭示了few-shot示例、推理步骤、模型规模和训练技能等因素对LLM论证能力的影响规律。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为LLM在计算论证领域的标准化评估提供了重要工具，有助于理解LLM论证能力的影响因素，为未来LLM论证能力的提升和改进提供了基础。

title: A Survey of Reinforcement Learning for Large Language Models under Data Scarcity: Challenges and Solutions
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful post-training paradigm for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, reinforcement learning for LLMs faces substantial data scarcity challenges, including the limited availability of high-quality external supervision and the constrained volume of model-generated experience. These limitations make data-efficient reinforcement learning a critical research direction. In this survey, we present the first systematic review of reinforcement learning for LLMs under data scarcity. We propose a bottom-up hierarchical framework built around three complementary perspectives: the data-centric perspective, the training-centric perspective, and the framework-centric perspective. We develop a taxonomy of existing methods, summarize representative approaches in each category, and analyze their strengths and limitations. Our taxonomy aims to provide a clear conceptual foundation for understanding the design space of data-efficient RL for LLMs and to guide researchers working in this emerging area. We hope this survey offers a comprehensive roadmap for future research and inspires new directions toward more efficient and scalable reinforcement learning post-training for LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统综述了数据稀缺条件下大语言模型的强化学习，提出了一个围绕数据、训练和框架三个视角的层次化框架，为数据高效的LLM强化学习提供了分类体系和未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 强化学习作为增强大语言模型推理能力的后训练范式面临严重的数据稀缺挑战，包括高质量外部监督的有限性和模型生成经验的约束性，这使得数据高效的强化学习成为关键研究方向。
AI.method: 提出了一个自底向上的层次化框架，围绕三个互补视角：数据中心视角（关注数据获取和利用）、训练中心视角（关注训练算法和优化）、框架中心视角（关注整体系统架构）。建立了现有方法的分类体系，总结了各类别的代表性方法，并分析了其优缺点。
AI.result: 开发了一个清晰的分类体系，为理解数据高效RL for LLMs的设计空间提供了概念基础，为这一新兴领域的研究人员提供了指导。该综述为未来研究提供了全面的路线图。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统性地综述了数据稀缺条件下LLM的强化学习，提出的分类框架为理解该领域的设计空间提供了清晰基础，旨在激发更高效、可扩展的LLM强化学习后训练的新方向。

title: MobileAgeNet: Lightweight Facial Age Estimation for Mobile Deployment
summary: Mobile deployment of facial age estimation requires models that balance predictive accuracy with low latency and compact size. In this work, we present MobileAgeNet, a lightweight age-regression framework that achieves an MAE of 4.65 years on the UTKFace held-out test set while maintaining efficient on-device inference with an average latency of 14.4 ms measured using the AI Benchmark application. The model is built on a pretrained MobileNetV3-Large backbone combined with a compact regression head, enabling real-time prediction on mobile devices. The training and evaluation pipeline is integrated into the NN LEMUR Dataset framework, supporting reproducible experimentation, structured hyperparameter optimization, and consistent evaluation. We employ bounded age regression together with a two-stage fine-tuning strategy to improve training stability and generalization. Experimental results show that MobileAgeNet achieves competitive accuracy with 3.23M parameters, and that the deployment pipeline from PyTorch training through ONNX export to TensorFlow Lite conversion - preserves predictive behavior without measurable degradation under practical on-device conditions. Overall, this work provides a practical, deployment-ready baseline for mobile-oriented facial age estimation.

AI.tldr: MobileAgeNet：基于MobileNetV3-Large的轻量级年龄回归框架，在UTKFace测试集上MAE为4.65年，参数量3.23M，移动端平均延迟14.4ms，提供完整的部署流程。
AI.motivation: 移动端面部年龄估计需要平衡预测精度、低延迟和模型大小的模型，现有方案在移动设备上的效率和准确性有待优化。
AI.method: 使用预训练的MobileNetV3-Large作为骨干网络，结合紧凑回归头；采用有界年龄回归和两阶段微调策略；集成到NN LEMUR Dataset框架进行可重复实验和超参数优化；提供从PyTorch训练到ONNX导出再到TensorFlow Lite转换的完整部署流程。
AI.result: 在UTKFace测试集上MAE为4.65年，参数量3.23M，移动端平均延迟14.4ms（通过AI Benchmark测量）；部署流程保持预测性能无显著下降。
AI.conclusion: MobileAgeNet为移动端面部年龄估计提供了一个实用、可部署的基准方案，在准确性和效率之间取得了良好平衡。

title: LiteResearcher: A Scalable Agentic RL Training Framework for Deep Research Agent
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful training paradigm for LLM-based agents. However, scaling agentic RL for deep research remains constrained by two coupled challenges: hand-crafted synthetic data fails to elicit genuine real-world search capabilities, and real-world search dependency during RL training introduces instability and prohibitive cost, which limits the scalability of Agentic RL. LiteResearcher is a training framework that makes Agentic RL scalable: by constructing a lite virtual world that mirrors real-world search dynamics, we enable a continuously improving training recipe that empowers a tiny search agent to outperform large-scale open-source and commercial models (e.g., Tongyi DeepResearch and Claude-4.5 Sonnet). Specifically, on common benchmarks such as GAIA and Xbench, our LiteResearcher-4B achieves open-source state-of-the-art results of 71.3% and 78.0% respectively, demonstrating that scalable RL training is a key enabler for Deep Research Agents.

AI.tldr: LiteResearcher是一个可扩展的Agentic RL训练框架，通过构建轻量级虚拟世界模拟真实搜索动态，使小型搜索代理超越大型开源和商业模型，在GAIA和Xbench基准上达到SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 当前基于LLM的智能体强化学习面临两个耦合挑战：手工制作的合成数据无法激发真实的现实世界搜索能力，而RL训练期间对真实世界搜索的依赖导致不稳定和高成本，限制了Agentic RL的可扩展性。
AI.method: 构建一个轻量级虚拟世界来模拟真实世界的搜索动态，实现持续改进的训练方案，使小型搜索代理能够在虚拟环境中进行高效训练，而不依赖昂贵的真实世界搜索。
AI.result: LiteResearcher-4B在GAIA和Xbench基准上分别达到71.3%和78.0%的准确率，超越通义DeepResearch和Claude-4.5 Sonnet等大型商业模型，创造了开源模型的最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 可扩展的RL训练是深度研究智能体的关键推动因素，通过虚拟世界模拟的方法可以克服真实世界搜索的成本和不稳定性问题，使小型模型也能实现卓越的深度研究能力。

title: AnchorMem: Anchored Facts with Associative Contexts for Building Memory in Large Language Models
summary: While large language models have achieved remarkable performance in complex tasks, they still need a memory system to utilize historical experience in long-term interactions. Existing memory methods (e.g., A-Mem, Mem0) place excessive emphasis on organizing interactions by frequently rewriting them, however, this heavy reliance on summarization risks diluting essential contextual nuances and obscuring key retrieval features. To bridge this gap, we introduce AnchorMem, a novel memory framework inspired by the Proust Phenomenon in cognitive science, where a specific anchor triggers a holistic recollection. We propose a method that decouples the retrieval unit from the generation context. AnchorMem extracts atomic facts from interaction history to serve as retrieval anchors, while preserving the original context as the immutable context. To reveal implicit narrative cues, we construct an associative event graph that uses higher-order event links that bind sets of related facts into shared event representations, strengthening cross-memory integration without relying on generic entities as bridges. During retrieval, the system anchors queries to specific facts and events to locate relevant memories, but reconstructs the context using the associated raw chunks and events. Our method reconciles fine-grained retrieval with the contextual integrity of interactions. Experiments across three closed-source and open-source models on the LoCoMo benchmark demonstrate that AnchorMem significantly outperforms baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/RayNeo-AI-2025/AnchorMem.

AI.tldr: AnchorMem是一个新颖的记忆框架，通过提取原子事实作为检索锚点，同时保留原始上下文作为不可变内容，解决了现有记忆方法过度依赖总结而丢失关键上下文细节的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆方法（如A-Mem、Mem0）过度强调通过频繁重写来组织交互，这种对总结的严重依赖会稀释重要的上下文细微差别并模糊关键检索特征。需要一种能够平衡细粒度检索与上下文完整性的记忆系统。
AI.method: AnchorMem受认知科学中普鲁斯特现象的启发，将检索单元与生成上下文解耦。它从交互历史中提取原子事实作为检索锚点，同时保留原始上下文作为不可变内容。构建关联事件图，使用高阶事件链接将相关事实绑定到共享事件表示中，增强跨记忆集成。检索时，系统将查询锚定到特定事实和事件以定位相关记忆，但使用关联的原始块和事件重建上下文。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo基准测试中，对三个闭源和开源模型的实验表明，AnchorMem显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: AnchorMem通过解耦检索单元和生成上下文，实现了细粒度检索与交互上下文完整性的调和，为语言模型提供了更有效的长期记忆系统。

title: SigGate-GT: Taming Over-Smoothing in Graph Transformers via Sigmoid-Gated Attention
summary: Graph transformers achieve strong results on molecular and long-range reasoning tasks, yet remain hampered by over-smoothing (the progressive collapse of node representations with depth) and attention entropy degeneration. We observe that these pathologies share a root cause with attention sinks in large language models: softmax attention's sum-to-one constraint forces every node to attend somewhere, even when no informative signal exists. Motivated by recent findings that element-wise sigmoid gating eliminates attention sinks in large language models, we propose SigGate-GT, a graph transformer that applies learned, per-head sigmoid gates to the attention output within the GraphGPS framework. Each gate can suppress activations toward zero, enabling heads to selectively silence uninformative connections. On five standard benchmarks, SigGate-GT matches the prior best on ZINC (0.059 MAE) and sets new state-of-the-art on ogbg-molhiv (82.47% ROC-AUC), with statistically significant gains over GraphGPS across all five datasets ($p < 0.05$). Ablations show that gating reduces over-smoothing by 30% (mean relative MAD gain across 4-16 layers), increases attention entropy, and stabilizes training across a $10\times$ learning rate range, with about 1% parameter overhead on OGB.

AI.tldr: 提出SigGate-GT图变换器，通过可学习的sigmoid门控机制解决图变换器中的过平滑和注意力熵退化问题，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 图变换器在分子和长距离推理任务上表现优异，但存在过平滑（节点表示随深度逐渐崩溃）和注意力熵退化问题。这些问题与大型语言模型中的注意力下沉现象有共同根源：softmax注意力的求和为一约束迫使每个节点都必须关注某些地方，即使不存在信息信号。
AI.method: 提出SigGate-GT图变换器，在GraphGPS框架内应用可学习的每头sigmoid门控到注意力输出。每个门可以将激活抑制到零，使注意力头能够选择性地屏蔽无信息连接。
AI.result: 在五个标准基准测试中，SigGate-GT在ZINC上达到0.059 MAE（与先前最佳持平），在ogbg-molhiv上达到82.47% ROC-AUC（新SOTA）。在所有五个数据集上相比GraphGPS都有统计显著提升（p<0.05）。消融研究表明门控机制将过平滑减少30%，增加注意力熵，并在10倍学习率范围内稳定训练，在OGB上参数开销约1%。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入可学习的sigmoid门控机制，SigGate-GT有效解决了图变换器中的过平滑和注意力熵退化问题，在多个基准测试中实现了SOTA性能，同时保持了较低的计算开销。

title: Towards Universal Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
summary: With the development of robotics, skeleton-based action recognition has become increasingly important, as human-robot interaction requires understanding the actions of humans and humanoid robots. Due to different sources of human skeletons and structures of humanoid robots, skeleton data naturally exhibit heterogeneity. However, previous works overlook the data heterogeneity of skeletons and solely construct models using homogeneous skeletons. Moreover, open-vocabulary action recognition is also essential for real-world applications. To this end, this work studies the challenging problem of heterogeneous skeleton-based action recognition with open vocabularies. We construct a large-scale Heterogeneous Open-Vocabulary (HOV) Skeleton dataset by integrating and refining multiple representative large-scale skeleton-based action datasets. To address universal skeleton-based action recognition, we propose a Transformer-based model that comprises three key components: unified skeleton representation, motion encoder for skeletons, and multi-grained motion-text alignment. The motion encoder feeds multi-modal skeleton embeddings into a two-stream Transformer-based encoder to learn spatio-temporal action representations, which are then mapped to a semantic space to align with text embeddings. Multi-grained motion-text alignment incorporates contrastive learning at three levels: global instance alignment, stream-specific alignment, and fine-grained alignment. Extensive experiments on popular benchmarks with heterogeneous skeleton data demonstrate both the effectiveness and the generalization ability of the proposed method. Code is available at https://github.com/jidongkuang/Universal-Skeleton.

AI.tldr: 提出一个用于异构骨架数据开放词汇动作识别的Transformer模型，包含统一骨架表示、运动编码器和多粒度运动-文本对齐三个关键组件
AI.motivation: 随着机器人技术的发展，骨架动作识别变得越来越重要，但现有方法忽略了骨架数据的异构性（来自不同来源的人类骨架和人形机器人结构差异），且现实应用需要开放词汇识别能力
AI.method: 提出Transformer模型，包含：1）统一骨架表示；2）运动编码器（将多模态骨架嵌入输入双流Transformer编码器学习时空动作表示）；3）多粒度运动-文本对齐（全局实例对齐、流特定对齐和细粒度对齐三个层次的对比学习）
AI.result: 在异构骨架数据的流行基准测试上进行了广泛实验，证明了方法的有效性和泛化能力
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了异构骨架数据的开放词汇动作识别问题，构建了大规模异构开放词汇骨架数据集，提出的模型在多个基准测试上表现出色

title: ContraPrompt: Contrastive Prompt Optimization via Dyadic Reasoning Trace Analysis
summary: Prompt optimization methods either analyze individual failures in isolation or compare prompt variants across examples, operating on single execution traces with no access to the reasoning process distinguishing success from failure on the same input. We introduce ContraPrompt, built on the observation that when a model fails but succeeds on a retry with feedback, the difference between its two chain-of-thought traces constitutes an optimization signal not captured by prior methods. Unlike prior contrastive methods, we compare complete intermediate reasoning processes: the two traces share model, input, and base prompt, so remaining differences reflect reasoning strategy and appended error feedback -- we call this dyadic reasoning trace analysis. The multi-attempt solving phase is an instrumented agentic retry loop that generates contrastive data automatically without human annotation. Extracted rules are organized into an input-aware decision tree routing instructions by observable input characteristics. On four reasoning and compliance benchmarks, ContraPrompt outperforms GEPA (Agrawal et al., 2026) on all four, with absolute gains of +8.29 pp on HotPotQA (+20.8% rel.), +2.21 pp on GDPR-Bench (+18.2% rel.), +7.14 pp on GPQA Diamond (+10.6% rel.), and +0.74 pp on BBH (+0.85% rel.). Ablations confirm dyadic trace contrastivity is the critical component, with a -16% relative average drop upon its removal. On 53 EvalSet black-box optimization problems, ContraPrompt beats GEPA on 11, ties on 41, and loses on 1 at equal budget. On FiNER-139 financial named entity recognition (Loukas et al., 2022), ContraPrompt achieves +7.77 pp over the unoptimized baseline (+11.6% rel.) and +1.94 pp over GEPA (+2.66% rel.), with branch conditions aligning with standard US GAAP financial-instrument categories.

AI.tldr: ContraPrompt通过对比同一模型在同一输入上成功与失败两次推理过程的差异来优化提示，无需人工标注，在多个推理和合规基准测试中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有提示优化方法要么孤立分析单个失败案例，要么跨示例比较提示变体，无法获取区分同一输入上成功与失败推理过程的信号。当模型失败但在反馈后重试成功时，两次推理链的差异包含了现有方法未捕获的优化信号。
AI.method: ContraPrompt采用对比性推理轨迹分析：1）多尝试求解阶段：通过带反馈的代理重试循环自动生成对比数据；2）对比分析：比较同一模型、同一输入、相同基础提示下成功与失败的完整推理过程差异；3）规则提取：将差异组织成基于输入特征的路由决策树。
AI.result: 在四个推理和合规基准测试中全面优于GEPA：HotPotQA (+8.29pp/+20.8%)、GDPR-Bench (+2.21pp/+18.2%)、GPQA Diamond (+7.14pp/+10.6%)、BBH (+0.74pp/+0.85%)。在53个EvalSet黑盒优化问题中，11个胜出，41个平局，仅1个落后。在FiNER-139金融命名实体识别任务中，比未优化基线提升+7.77pp，比GEPA提升+1.94pp。
AI.conclusion: 对比性推理轨迹分析是ContraPrompt的关键组件，移除该组件会导致性能相对下降16%。该方法能够自动从模型自身成功与失败的推理差异中提取优化规则，无需人工标注，且提取的分支条件与领域知识（如US GAAP金融工具分类）一致。

title: Who Watches the Watchmen? Humans Disagree With Translation Metrics on Unseen Domains
summary:
Automatic evaluation metrics are central to the development of machine translation systems, yet their robustness under domain shift remains unclear. Most metrics are developed on the Workshop on Machine Translation (WMT) benchmarks, raising concerns about their robustness to unseen domains. Prior studies that analyze unseen domains vary translation systems, annotators, or evaluation conditions, confounding domain effects with human annotation noise.
  To address these biases, we introduce a systematic multi-annotator Cross-Domain Error-Span-Annotation dataset (CD-ESA), comprising 18.8k human error span annotations across three language pairs, where we fix annotators within each language pair and evaluate translations of the same six translation systems across one seen news domain and two unseen technical domains. Using this dataset, we first find that automatic metrics appear surprisingly robust to domain-shifts at the segment level (up to 0.69 agreement), but this robustness largely disappears once we account for human label variation. Averaging annotations increases inter-annotator agreement by up to +0.11. Metrics struggle on the unseen chemical domain compared to humans (inter-annotator agreement of 0.78-0.83 vs. 0.96).
  We recommend comparing metric-human agreement against inter-annotator agreement, rather than comparing raw metric-human agreement alone, when evaluating across different domains.

AI.tldr: 自动评估指标在领域迁移下的鲁棒性研究：通过跨领域错误标注数据集发现，指标在考虑人类标注变异后鲁棒性显著下降，建议使用指标-人类一致性对比人类间一致性来评估跨领域性能。
AI.motivation: 机器翻译自动评估指标在领域迁移下的鲁棒性尚不明确。现有研究通常在WMT基准上开发指标，但对其在未见领域的表现存在担忧。先前分析未见领域的研究存在翻译系统、标注者或评估条件的变化，混淆了领域效应与人类标注噪声。
AI.method: 引入系统性的多标注者跨领域错误标注数据集(CD-ESA)，包含3个语言对的18.8k个人类错误标注。在每个语言对内固定标注者，评估相同6个翻译系统在一个已见新闻领域和两个未见技术领域的翻译。通过该数据集分析自动指标的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 自动指标在片段级别对领域迁移表现出惊人的鲁棒性(一致性达0.69)，但考虑人类标注变异后这种鲁棒性基本消失。平均标注可将标注者间一致性提高+0.11。指标在未见化学领域表现较差(标注者间一致性0.78-0.83 vs 0.96)。
AI.conclusion: 建议在不同领域评估时，将指标-人类一致性对比人类间一致性，而非仅比较原始指标-人类一致性。这能更准确地评估自动指标在跨领域场景下的性能。

title: Rethinking the Comparison Unit in Sequence-Level Reinforcement Learning: An Equal-Length Paired Training Framework from Loss Correction to Sample Construction
summary: This paper investigates the length problem in sequence-level relative reinforcement learning. We observe that, although existing methods partially alleviate length-related phenomena, a more fundamental issue remains insufficiently characterized: the comparison units used during training lack inherent comparability. Building on this observation, we propose a new perspective: the length problem should not be viewed merely as a loss-scaling or normalization bias, but rather as a \emph{comparison unit construction} problem. We further establish a sample-construction-based training framework that, instead of applying post-hoc corrections to unequal-length responses, proactively constructs equal-length, alignable, and comparable training segments during generation. Within this framework, we propose EqLen, a concrete method applicable to group-relative comparison algorithms such as GRPO, GSPO, and RLOO. Through dual-track synchronous generation, prefix inheritance, and segment masking, EqLen efficiently collects effective equal-length training segments and enables stable

AI.tldr: 论文提出EqLen方法解决序列级相对强化学习中的长度问题，通过构建可比较的等长训练片段而非事后修正
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅部分缓解长度相关问题，但根本问题在于训练中使用的比较单元缺乏内在可比性。长度问题不应被视为损失缩放或归一化偏差，而应视为比较单元构建问题
AI.method: 提出基于样本构建的训练框架，主动构建等长、可对齐、可比较的训练片段。具体方法EqLen通过双轨同步生成、前缀继承和片段掩码，高效收集有效的等长训练片段
AI.result: EqLen方法适用于GRPO、GSPO、RLOO等组相对比较算法，能够实现稳定的训练
AI.conclusion: 将长度问题重新定义为比较单元构建问题，并提出主动构建等长训练片段的解决方案，为序列级相对强化学习提供了更根本的解决方法

title: LIVE: Leveraging Image Manipulation Priors for Instruction-based Video Editing
summary: Video editing aims to modify input videos according to user intent. Recently, end-to-end training methods have garnered widespread attention, constructing paired video editing data through video generation or editing models. However, compared to image editing, the high annotation costs of video data severely constrain the scale, quality, and task diversity of video editing datasets when relying on video generative models or manual annotation. To bridge this gap, we propose LIVE, a joint training framework that leverages large-scale, high-quality image editing data alongside video datasets to bolster editing capabilities. To mitigate the domain discrepancy between static images and dynamic videos, we introduce a frame-wise token noise strategy, which treats the latents of specific frames as reasoning tokens, leveraging large pretrained video generative models to create plausible temporal transformations. Moreover, through cleaning public datasets and constructing an automated data pipeline, we adopt a two-stage training strategy to anneal video editing capabilities. Furthermore, we curate a comprehensive evaluation benchmark encompassing over 60 challenging tasks that are prevalent in image editing but scarce in existing video datasets. Extensive comparative and ablation experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. The source code will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: LIVE是一个联合训练框架，利用大规模高质量图像编辑数据和视频数据集来增强视频编辑能力，通过帧级token噪声策略解决图像与视频领域差异，在60多个挑战性任务上实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 视频编辑需要根据用户意图修改输入视频，但相比图像编辑，视频数据的高标注成本严重限制了视频编辑数据集的规模、质量和任务多样性，现有方法依赖视频生成模型或人工标注难以满足需求。
AI.method: 提出LIVE联合训练框架：1) 利用大规模高质量图像编辑数据和视频数据集；2) 引入帧级token噪声策略，将特定帧的潜在表示作为推理token，利用预训练视频生成模型创建合理的时间变换；3) 通过清理公共数据集和构建自动化数据管道，采用两阶段训练策略来增强视频编辑能力。
AI.result: 构建了包含60多个挑战性任务的综合评估基准，这些任务在图像编辑中常见但在现有视频数据集中稀缺。大量比较和消融实验表明，该方法实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: LIVE框架通过联合利用图像和视频数据，有效解决了视频编辑数据稀缺问题，提出的帧级token噪声策略成功缓解了静态图像与动态视频之间的领域差异，在多样化任务上取得了优异表现。

title: CADMAS-CTX: Contextual Capability Calibration for Multi-Agent Delegation
summary: We revisit multi-agent delegation under a stronger and more realistic assumption: an agent's capability is not fixed at the skill level, but depends on task context. A coding agent may excel at short standalone edits yet fail on long-horizon debugging; a planner may perform well on shallow tasks yet degrade on chained dependencies. Static skill-level capability profiles therefore average over heterogeneous situations and can induce systematic misdelegation. We propose CADMAS-CTX, a framework for contextual capability calibration. For each agent, skill, and coarse context bucket, CADMAS-CTX maintains a Beta posterior that captures stable experience in that part of the task space. Delegation is then made by a risk-aware score that combines the posterior mean with an uncertainty penalty, so that agents delegate only when a peer appears better and that assessment is sufficiently well supported by evidence. This paper makes three contributions. First, a hierarchical contextual capability profile replaces static skill-level confidence with context-conditioned posteriors. Second, based on contextual bandit theory, we formally prove context-aware routing achieves lower cumulative regret than static routing under sufficient context heterogeneity, formalizing the bias-variance tradeoff. Third, we empirically validate our method on GAIA and SWE-bench benchmarks. On GAIA with GPT-4o agents, CADMAS-CTX achieves 0.442 accuracy, outperforming static baseline 0.381 and AutoGen 0.354 with non-overlapping 95% confidence intervals. On SWE-bench Lite, it improves resolve rate from 22.3% to 31.4%. Ablations show the uncertainty penalty improves robustness against context tagging noise. Our results demonstrate contextual calibration and risk-aware delegation significantly improve multi-agent teamwork compared with static global skill assignments.

AI.tldr: CADMAS-CTX框架通过上下文感知的能力校准和风险感知的委托，改进了多智能体协作，在GAIA和SWE-bench基准测试中显著优于静态基线方法。
AI.motivation: 传统多智能体委托假设智能体能力是固定的技能水平，但现实中智能体能力随任务上下文变化。例如，编码智能体可能在短期独立编辑上表现出色，但在长期调试中表现不佳。静态技能水平配置文件平均了异构情境，可能导致系统性委托错误。
AI.method: 提出CADMAS-CTX框架进行上下文能力校准：为每个智能体、技能和粗粒度上下文桶维护Beta后验分布，捕捉任务空间中该部分的稳定经验。委托使用风险感知评分，结合后验均值和不确定性惩罚，仅在同伴表现更好且评估有足够证据支持时才进行委托。
AI.result: 在GAIA基准测试中，CADMAS-CTX使用GPT-4o智能体达到0.442准确率，优于静态基线0.381和AutoGen 0.354（95%置信区间不重叠）。在SWE-bench Lite中，解决率从22.3%提升至31.4%。消融实验显示不确定性惩罚提高了对上下文标记噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 上下文校准和风险感知委托相比静态全局技能分配显著改善了多智能体团队协作。分层上下文能力配置文件替代了静态技能水平置信度，基于上下文多臂老虎机理论证明了上下文感知路由在足够上下文异质性下具有更低累积遗憾。

title: Representation-Guided Parameter-Efficient LLM Unlearning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often memorize sensitive or harmful information, necessitating effective machine unlearning techniques. While existing parameter-efficient unlearning methods have shown promise, they still struggle with the forget-retain trade-off. This can be attributed to their reliance on parameter importance metrics to identify parameters that are important exclusively for the forget set, which is fundamentally limited by the superposition phenomenon. Due to the polysemantic nature of LLM parameters, such an importance metric may struggle to disentangle parameters associated with the forget and retain sets. In this work, we propose Representation-Guided Low-rank Unlearning (REGLU), a novel approach that leverages the geometric properties of representation spaces to achieve robust and precise unlearning. First, we develop a representation-guided initialization for LoRA that identifies the optimal subspace for selective forgetting. Second, we introduce a regularization loss that constrains the outputs of the LoRA update to lie in the orthogonal complement of the retain set's representation subspace, thereby minimizing interference with the model's performance on the retain set. We evaluate REGLU on the TOFU and WMDP benchmarks across multiple models. Our results demonstrate that REGLU consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving superior unlearning quality while maintaining higher model utility.

AI.tldr: REGLU是一种基于表示空间几何特性的低秩遗忘学习方法，通过表示引导的LoRA初始化和正交约束正则化，在保持模型性能的同时实现精确遗忘。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型会记忆敏感或有害信息，需要有效的机器遗忘技术。现有参数高效遗忘方法依赖于参数重要性指标，但由于参数的多义性（叠加现象），难以区分遗忘集和保留集相关的参数，导致遗忘-保留权衡困难。
AI.method: 提出表示引导的低秩遗忘学习（REGLU）：1）开发表示引导的LoRA初始化，识别选择性遗忘的最优子空间；2）引入正则化损失，约束LoRA更新输出位于保留集表示子空间的正交补空间中，最小化对保留集性能的干扰。
AI.result: 在TOFU和WMDP基准测试中，REGLU在多个模型上始终优于最先进的基线方法，实现了更优的遗忘质量，同时保持了更高的模型效用。
AI.conclusion: REGLU通过利用表示空间的几何特性，解决了现有参数高效遗忘方法在遗忘-保留权衡上的局限性，为LLM的安全遗忘提供了更有效的解决方案。

title: FLARE: Task-agnostic embedding model evaluation through a normalization process
summary: When task-specific labels are not available, it becomes difficult to select an embedding model for a specific target corpus. Existing labelless measures based on kernel estimators or Gaussian mixes fail in high-dimensional space, resulting in unstable rankings. We propose a flow-based labelless representation embedding evaluation (FLARE), which utilizes normalized streams to estimate information sufficiency directly from log-likelihood and avoid distance-based density estimation. We give a finite sample boundary, indicating that the estimation error depends on the intrinsic dimension of the data manifold rather than the original embedding dimension. On 11 datasets and 8 embedders, FLARE reached Spearman's $ρ$ of 0.90 under the supervised benchmark and remained stable in high-dimensional embeddings ($d \geq 3{,}584$) as the existing labelless baseline collapsed.

AI.tldr: 提出FLARE方法，通过归一化流直接估计信息充分性来评估无标签嵌入模型，避免高维空间中的距离密度估计问题
AI.motivation: 当缺乏任务特定标签时，难以为目标语料库选择合适的嵌入模型。现有的无标签评估方法在高维空间中失效，导致排名不稳定
AI.method: 提出基于流的无标签表示嵌入评估(FLARE)，利用归一化流直接从对数似然估计信息充分性，避免基于距离的密度估计
AI.result: 在11个数据集和8个嵌入器上，FLARE在监督基准下达到Spearman相关系数0.90，在高维嵌入(d≥3,584)中保持稳定，而现有无标签基线方法失效
AI.conclusion: FLARE通过流模型有效评估无标签嵌入表示，估计误差取决于数据流形的内在维度而非原始嵌入维度，在高维空间中表现稳定

title: CAM3DNet: Comprehensively mining the multi-scale features for 3D Object Detection with Multi-View Cameras
summary: Query-based 3D object detection methods using multi-view images often struggle to efficiently leverage dynamic multi-scale information, e.g., the relationship between the object features and the geometric of the queries are not sufficiently learned, directly exploring the multi-scale spatiotemporal features will pay too many costs.
