AI.tldr: OGER框架通过统一离线教师指导和在线强化学习，结合多教师协作训练和熵感知奖励调制，显著提升LLM推理能力，在数学推理和泛化任务上超越现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法虽然改进了LLM推理，但模型难以探索超出初始潜在空间的新轨迹。离线教师指导和熵驱动策略要么缺乏深度整合，要么受限于模型固有容量。
AI.method: 提出OGER框架，通过专门的奖励建模视角统一离线教师指导和在线强化学习。采用多教师协作训练，构建辅助探索奖励，结合离线轨迹和模型自身熵来激励自主探索。
AI.result: 在数学和通用推理基准测试中，OGER显著优于竞争基线，在数学推理上取得实质性提升，同时保持对域外任务的鲁棒泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: OGER通过熵感知奖励调制有效解决了LLM推理中的探索问题，验证了离线教师指导与在线强化学习统一框架的有效性。

title: Forget What Matters, Keep the Rest: Selective Unlearning of Informative Tokens
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Main Conference. 17 pages, 9 figures
summary: Unlearning in large language models (LLMs) has emerged as a promising safeguard against adversarial behaviors. When the forgetting loss is applied uniformly without considering token-level semantic importance, model utility can be unnecessarily degraded. Recent studies have explored token-wise loss regularizers that prioritize informative tokens, but largely rely on ground-truth confidence or external linguistic parsers, which limits their ability to capture contextual information or the model's overall predictive state. Intuitively, function words like "the" primarily serve syntactic roles and are highly predictable with little ambiguity, but informative words admit multiple plausible alternatives with greater uncertainty. Based on this intuition, we propose Entropy-guided Token Weighting (ETW), a token-level unlearning regularizer that uses entropy of the predictive distribution as a proxy for token informativeness. We demonstrate that informative tokens tend to have higher entropy, whereas structural tokens tend to have lower entropy. This behavior enables ETW to achieve more effective unlearning while better preserving model utility than existing token-level approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出基于熵的令牌加权方法ETW，通过预测分布的熵作为令牌信息量的代理，在LLM遗忘学习中更好地保护模型效用
AI.motivation: 现有LLM遗忘学习方法在应用遗忘损失时未考虑令牌级别的语义重要性，导致模型效用不必要地降低。现有令牌级损失正则化方法依赖真实置信度或外部语言解析器，限制了其捕捉上下文信息或模型整体预测状态的能力
AI.method: 提出熵引导的令牌加权方法ETW，使用预测分布的熵作为令牌信息量的代理。基于直觉：功能词如"the"主要起句法作用且高度可预测，而信息词则有多个合理替代方案且不确定性更大
AI.result: 证明信息性令牌倾向于具有更高的熵，而结构性令牌倾向于具有更低的熵。ETW能够比现有令牌级方法实现更有效的遗忘学习，同时更好地保护模型效用
AI.conclusion: ETW通过熵作为令牌信息量的代理，在LLM遗忘学习中实现了更好的效用保护效果，为令牌级遗忘学习提供了更有效的正则化方法

title: LLM-AUG: Robust Wireless Data Augmentation with In-Context Learning in Large Language Models
summary: Data scarcity remains a fundamental bottleneck in applying deep learning to wireless communication problems, particularly in scenarios where collecting labeled Radio Frequency (RF) data is expensive, time-consuming, or operationally constrained. This paper proposes LLM-AUG, a data augmentation framework that leverages in-context learning in large language models (LLMs) to generate synthetic training samples directly in a learned embedding space. Unlike conventional generative approaches that require training task-specific models, LLM-AUG performs data generation through structured prompting, enabling rapid adaptation in low-shot regimes. We evaluate LLM-AUG on two representative tasks: modulation classification and interference classification using the RadioML 2016.10A dataset, and the Interference Classification (IC) dataset respectively. Results show that LLM-AUG consistently outperforms traditional augmentation and deep generative baselines across low-shot settings and reaches near oracle performance using only 15% labeled data. LLM-AUG further demonstrates improved robustness under distribution shifts, yielding a 29.4% relative gain over diffusion-based augmentation at a lower SNR value. On the RadioML and IC datasets, LLM-AUG yields a relative gain of 67.6% and 35.7% over the diffusion-based baseline. The t-SNE visualizations further validate that synthetic samples generated by better preserve class structure in the embedding space, leading to more consistent and informative augmentations. These results demonstrate that LLMs can serve as effective and practical data augmenters for wireless machine learning, enabling robust and data-efficient learning in evolving wireless environments.

AI.tldr: LLM-AUG：利用大语言模型进行无线通信数据增强的框架，通过上下文学习在嵌入空间生成合成训练样本，在低样本场景下显著提升性能
AI.motivation: 无线通信中标记RF数据稀缺是深度学习应用的主要瓶颈，数据收集成本高、耗时长或受操作限制，需要高效的数据增强方法
AI.method: 提出LLM-AUG框架，利用大语言模型的上下文学习能力，通过结构化提示在学习的嵌入空间中直接生成合成训练样本，无需训练特定任务生成模型
AI.result: 在调制分类和干扰分类任务上，LLM-AUG在低样本设置下始终优于传统增强和深度生成基线，仅用15%标记数据达到接近oracle性能；在分布偏移下表现出更强鲁棒性，相对扩散基线提升29.4%-67.6%
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型可作为无线机器学习中有效实用的数据增强器，在动态无线环境中实现鲁棒且数据高效的学习

title: Enhancing Zero-shot Personalized Image Aesthetics Assessment with Profile-aware Multimodal LLM
summary: Personalized image aesthetics assessment (PIAA) aims to predict an individual user's subjective rating of an image, which requires modeling user-specific aesthetic preferences. Existing methods rely on historical user ratings for this modeling and therefore struggle when such data are unavailable. We address this zero-shot setting by using user profiles as contextual signals for personalization and adopting a profile-based personalization paradigm. We introduce P-MLLM, a profile-aware multimodal LLM that augments a frozen LLM with selective fusion modules for controlled visual integration. These modules selectively integrate visual information into the model's evolving hidden states during profile-conditioned reasoning, allowing visual information to be incorporated in a profile-aware manner. Experiments on recent PIAA benchmarks show that P-MLLM achieves competitive zero-shot performance and remains effective even with coarse profile information, highlighting the potential of profile-based personalization for zero-shot PIAA.

AI.tldr: P-MLLM：基于用户画像的多模态大语言模型，用于零样本个性化图像美学评估，通过选择性融合模块实现画像感知的视觉信息整合。
AI.motivation: 现有个性化图像美学评估方法依赖用户历史评分数据，在零样本场景（无历史数据）下表现不佳。需要利用用户画像作为上下文信号来实现零样本个性化评估。
AI.method: 提出P-MLLM模型，在冻结的LLM基础上添加选择性融合模块，在画像条件推理过程中有选择地将视觉信息整合到模型的隐藏状态中，实现画像感知的视觉信息融合。
AI.result: 在最近的PIAA基准测试中，P-MLLM取得了有竞争力的零样本性能，即使在粗糙的画像信息下仍保持有效，展示了基于画像的个性化方法在零样本PIAA中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 基于用户画像的个性化范式能够有效解决零样本个性化图像美学评估问题，P-MLLM通过选择性视觉融合机制实现了画像感知的个性化评估。

title: ClawEnvKit: Automatic Environment Generation for Claw-Like Agents
summary: Constructing environments for training and evaluating claw-like agents remains a manual, human-intensive process that does not scale. We argue that what is needed is not just a dataset, but an automated pipeline capable of generating diverse, verified environments on demand. To this end, we introduce ClawEnvKit, an autonomous generation pipeline that instantiates this formalism from natural language descriptions. The pipeline comprises three modules: (1) a parser that extracts structured generation parameters from natural language input; (2) a generator that produces the task specification, tool interface, and scoring configuration; and (3) a validator that enforces feasibility, diversity, structural validity, and internal consistency across the generated environments. Using ClawEnvKit, we construct Auto-ClawEval, the first large-scale benchmark for claw-like agents, comprising 1,040 environments across 24 categories. Empirically, Auto-ClawEval matches or exceeds human-curated environments on coherence and clarity at 13,800x lower cost. Evaluated across 4 model families and 8 agent harness frameworks, we find that harness engineering boosts performance by up to 15.7 percentage points over a bare ReAct baseline, completion remains the primary axis of variation with no model saturating the benchmark, and automated generation enables evaluation at a scale previously infeasible. Beyond static benchmarking, ClawEnvKit enables live evaluation: users describe a desired capability in natural language and obtain a verified environment on demand, turning evaluation into a continuous, user-driven process. The same mechanism serves as an on-demand training environment generator, producing task distributions that adapt to an agent's current weaknesses rather than being bounded by existing user logs.

AI.tldr: 提出ClawEnvKit自动化环境生成管道，从自然语言描述创建多样、验证过的爪状智能体训练/评估环境，构建首个大规模基准Auto-ClawEval，成本降低13800倍。
AI.motivation: 当前构建爪状智能体训练和评估环境需要大量人工，无法规模化。需要自动化管道来按需生成多样且经过验证的环境。
AI.method: ClawEnvKit包含三个模块：1) 从自然语言输入提取结构化参数的解析器；2) 生成任务规范、工具接口和评分配置的生成器；3) 验证环境可行性、多样性、结构有效性和内部一致性的验证器。
AI.result: 构建了Auto-ClawEval基准，包含24个类别的1040个环境。成本比人工构建低13800倍，在连贯性和清晰度上匹配或超越人工环境。评估4个模型家族和8个代理框架，发现框架工程提升性能15.7个百分点，完成度仍是主要差异维度。
AI.conclusion: ClawEnvKit实现了从静态基准测试到动态按需评估的转变，支持用户驱动的持续评估和针对智能体弱点的自适应训练环境生成，突破了现有用户日志的限制。

title: Bridging the Reasoning Gap in Vietnamese with Small Language Models via Test-Time Scaling
summary: The democratization of ubiquitous AI hinges on deploying sophisticated reasoning capabilities on resource-constrained devices. However, Small Language Models (SLMs) often face a "reasoning gap", particularly in non-English languages like Vietnamese, where they struggle to maintain coherent chains of thought. This paper investigates Test-Time Scaling strategies for the Qwen3-1.7B architecture within the context of Vietnamese Elementary Mathematics. We introduce Vi-S1K, a high-fidelity reasoning dataset localized via a Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite powered pipeline, and Vi-Elementary-Bench, a dual-resource benchmark for rigorous evaluation. Using an LLM-as-a-Judge protocol, we reveal that the base model possesses robust latent knowledge (Accuracy: 4.05/5.00) but suffers from a severe "formatting gap" in communication. Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) acts as a critical "reasoning unlocker", yielding a 77% improvement in Explanation Quality and bridging the gap between raw calculation and pedagogical coherence. Furthermore, our analysis of prompting strategies uncovers a significant trade-off: structured frameworks like ReAct impose a "cognitive tax" on the 1.7B parameter capacity, degrading performance relative to pure Chain-of-Thought (CoT) combined with Self-Consistency. These findings establish a deployment hierarchy for SLMs, demonstrating that SFT combined with simplified test-time scaling is superior to complex agentic workflows for edge-based reasoning.

AI.tldr: 该研究探索了在资源受限设备上部署小型语言模型（SLM）的推理能力，针对越南小学数学任务，通过监督微调和简化测试时缩放策略，显著提升了模型性能。
AI.motivation: 小型语言模型在非英语语言（如越南语）中面临"推理鸿沟"，特别是在保持连贯思维链方面存在困难。研究旨在解决SLM在资源受限设备上的推理能力部署问题。
AI.method: 1. 创建Vi-S1K高保真推理数据集和Vi-Elementary-Bench双资源基准；2. 使用Qwen3-1.7B架构；3. 采用监督微调作为"推理解锁器"；4. 分析不同提示策略（ReAct vs Chain-of-Thought + Self-Consistency）；5. 使用LLM-as-a-Judge协议进行评估。
AI.result: 1. 基础模型具有强大的潜在知识（准确率：4.05/5.00），但存在严重的"格式化鸿沟"；2. 监督微调使解释质量提升77%，弥合了原始计算与教学连贯性之间的差距；3. 结构化框架（如ReAct）对1.7B参数容量施加"认知税"，性能低于纯CoT+Self-Consistency组合。
AI.conclusion: 对于边缘推理任务，监督微调结合简化的测试时缩放策略优于复杂的代理工作流程，为SLM部署建立了层次结构，表明简化方法更适合资源受限环境。

title: TeleEmbedBench: A Multi-Corpus Embedding Benchmark for RAG in Telecommunications
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in the telecommunications domain for critical tasks, relying heavily on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to adapt general-purpose models to continuously evolving standards. However, a significant gap exists in evaluating the embedding models that power these RAG pipelines, as general-purpose benchmarks fail to capture the dense, acronym-heavy, and highly cross-referential nature of telecommunications corpora. To address this, we introduce TeleEmbedBench, the first large-scale, multi-corpus embedding benchmark designed specifically for telecommunications. The benchmark spans three heterogeneous corpora: O-RAN Alliance specifications, 3GPP release documents, and the srsRAN open-source codebase, comprising 9,000 question-chunk pairs across three standard chunk sizes (512, 1024, and 2048 tokens). To construct this dataset at scale without manual annotation bottlenecks, we employ a novel automated pipeline where one LLM generates specific queries from text chunks and a secondary LLM validates them across strict criteria. We comprehensively evaluate eight embedding models, spanning standard sentence-transformers and LLM-based embedders. Our results demonstrate that LLM-based embedders, such as Qwen3 and EmbeddingGemma, consistently and significantly outperform traditional sentence-transformers in both retrieval accuracy and robustness against cross-domain interference. Additionally, we introduce TeleEmbedBench-Clean to evaluate model robustness against noisy, incomplete user queries. Finally, our analysis reveals that while domain-specific task instructions improve embedder performance for raw source code, they paradoxically degrade retrieval performance for natural language telecommunications specifications.

AI.tldr: TeleEmbedBench：首个针对电信领域的大规模多语料嵌入基准，用于评估RAG系统中的嵌入模型性能
AI.motivation: 现有通用基准无法准确评估电信领域嵌入模型性能，因为电信语料具有密集、缩略语多、高度交叉引用的特点，而LLM在电信关键任务中越来越依赖RAG系统
AI.method: 创建TeleEmbedBench基准，包含O-RAN联盟规范、3GPP发布文档和srsRAN开源代码库三个异构语料，共9000个问题-文本块对；采用自动化流水线，用一个LLM从文本块生成查询，另一个LLM根据严格标准验证
AI.result: LLM-based嵌入模型（如Qwen3和EmbeddingGemma）在检索准确性和跨域干扰鲁棒性方面显著优于传统sentence-transformers；领域特定任务指令对原始源代码有益，但对自然语言电信规范反而降低检索性能
AI.conclusion: TeleEmbedBench填补了电信领域嵌入模型评估的空白，揭示了LLM-based嵌入模型的优势，并发现了领域特定指令对不同类型电信内容的矛盾影响

title: RemoteShield: Enable Robust Multimodal Large Language Models for Earth Observation
summary: A robust Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) for Earth Observation should maintain consistent interpretation and reasoning under realistic input variations. However, current Remote Sensing MLLMs fail to meet this requirement. Trained on carefully curated clean datasets, they learn brittle mappings that do not generalize to noisy conditions in operational Earth Observation. Consequently, their performance degrades when confronted with imperfect inputs in deployment. To quantify this vulnerability, we construct a realistic set of multimodal perturbations, including visual degradations such as cloud and fog cover, together with diverse human-centric textual variations ranging from colloquialisms to vague or omitted instructions. Empirical evaluations show that these perturbations significantly impair the visual-semantic reasoning capabilities of leading RS foundation models. To address this limitation, we introduce RemoteShield, a robust Remote Sensing MLLM trained to maintain consistent outputs across realistic input variations. During training, each clean sample is paired with its image-text perturbed variants to form a semantic equivalence cluster. Rather than directly fitting noisy samples, RemoteShield is optimized through preference learning over clean and perturbed conditions within the same cluster. By comparing model responses to clean and corrupted inputs, the model is encouraged to favor stable responses over perturbation-induced failures. This cross-condition alignment helps the model focus on underlying task semantics despite visual degradations and textual noise. Experiments on three Earth Observation tasks show that RemoteShield consistently delivers stronger robustness and cross-condition consistency than representative baselines under realistic multimodal perturbations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出RemoteShield，一种用于地球观测的鲁棒多模态大语言模型，通过偏好学习在干净和扰动输入之间进行跨条件对齐，以应对现实中的视觉退化（如云、雾）和文本噪声，提升模型在真实部署条件下的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 当前遥感多模态大语言模型在精心策划的干净数据集上训练，学习到脆弱的映射关系，无法泛化到实际地球观测中的噪声条件。当面对部署中的不完美输入时，其性能会显著下降，需要构建能够应对现实多模态扰动的鲁棒模型。
AI.method: 提出RemoteShield模型，将每个干净样本与其图像-文本扰动变体配对形成语义等价簇。通过偏好学习优化模型，比较模型对干净和扰动输入的反应，鼓励模型选择稳定响应而非扰动诱导的失败。这种跨条件对齐帮助模型专注于底层任务语义，忽略视觉退化和文本噪声。
AI.result: 在三个地球观测任务上的实验表明，RemoteShield在现实多模态扰动下比代表性基线模型表现出更强的鲁棒性和跨条件一致性。模型能够有效应对云、雾等视觉退化以及口语化、模糊或省略指令等文本变化。
AI.conclusion: RemoteShield通过语义等价簇和跨条件偏好学习，成功构建了能够应对现实地球观测中多模态扰动的鲁棒遥感MLLM，为实际部署中的稳定性能提供了有效解决方案。

title: Benchmarking System Dynamics AI Assistants: Cloud Versus Local LLMs on CLD Extraction and Discussion
summary:
We present a systematic evaluation of large language model families -- spanning both proprietary cloud APIs and locally-hosted open-source models -- on two purpose-built benchmarks for System Dynamics AI assistance: the \textbf{CLD Leaderboard} (53 tests, structured causal loop diagram extraction) and the \textbf{Discussion Leaderboard} (interactive model discussion, feedback explanation, and model building coaching).
  On CLD extraction, cloud models achieve 77--89\% overall pass rates; the best local model reaches 77\% (Kimi~K2.5~GGUF~Q3, zero-shot engine), matching mid-tier cloud performance. On Discussion, the best local models achieve 50--100\% on model building steps and 47--75\% on feedback explanation, but only 0--50\% on error fixing -- a category dominated by long-context prompts that expose memory limits in local deployments.
  A central contribution of this paper is a systematic analysis of \textit{model type effects} on performance: we compare reasoning vs.\ instruction-tuned architectures, GGUF (llama.cpp) vs.\ MLX (mlx\_lm) backends, and quantization levels (Q3 / Q4\_K\_M / MLX-3bit / MLX-4bit / MLX-6bit) across the same underlying model families. We find that backend choice has larger practical impact than quantization level: mlx\_lm does not enforce JSON schema constraints, requiring explicit prompt-level JSON instructions, while llama.cpp grammar-constrained sampling handles JSON reliably but causes indefinite generation on long-context prompts for dense models.
  We document the full parameter sweep ($t$, $p$, $k$) for all local models, cleaned timing data (stuck requests excluded), and a practitioner guide for running 671B--123B parameter models on Apple~Silicon.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了大型语言模型在系统动力学AI辅助任务上的表现，包括专有云API和本地开源模型，使用两个专门基准测试：CLD排行榜（因果循环图提取）和讨论排行榜（交互式模型讨论）。
AI.motivation: 系统动力学领域需要AI辅助工具，但目前缺乏对不同类型语言模型在该领域性能的系统评估。研究旨在比较专有云模型和本地开源模型在系统动力学任务上的表现，为实践者提供指导。
AI.method: 构建了两个专门基准测试：CLD排行榜（53个测试，结构化因果循环图提取）和讨论排行榜（交互式模型讨论、反馈解释和模型构建指导）。评估了专有云API和本地开源模型，分析了模型类型、推理架构与指令调优架构、GGUF与MLX后端、量化级别等因素对性能的影响。
AI.result: 在CLD提取任务上，云模型达到77-89%通过率；最佳本地模型达到77%（Kimi K2.5 GGUF Q3，零样本引擎），匹配中端云性能。在讨论任务上，最佳本地模型在模型构建步骤达到50-100%，反馈解释达到47-75%，但错误修复仅0-50%。研究发现后端选择比量化级别影响更大：mlx_lm不强制执行JSON模式约束，而llama.cpp语法约束采样能可靠处理JSON但在长上下文提示上存在问题。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为系统动力学AI辅助提供了全面的模型性能评估，揭示了云模型与本地模型的性能差异，以及后端选择对实际应用的重要影响。提供了完整的参数扫描、清理后的时序数据和在Apple Silicon上运行671B-123B参数模型的实践指南。

title: PDDL-Mind: Large Language Models are Capable on Belief Reasoning with Reliable State Tracking
summary: Large language models (LLMs) perform substantially below human level on existing theory-of-mind (ToM) benchmarks, even when augmented with chain-of-thought prompting or probabilistic belief updates. We argue that these failures primarily arise from unreliable implicit state tracking rather than limitations in high-level reasoning. We introduce PDDL-Mind, a neuro-symbolic framework that decouples environment state evolution from belief inference. By translating narrative descriptions into explicit states and actions expressed in Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL), and by verifying action-induced state transitions against a predefined domain, PDDL-Mind provides LLMs with a logically consistent and explicit representation of world states for ToM tasks. Experiments on MMToM-QA, MuMA and FanToM show that PDDL-Mind achieves over 5% absolute accuracy gain over the best existing state-of-the-art method on ToM benchmark questions.

AI.tldr: PDDL-Mind是一个神经符号框架，通过将叙事描述转换为PDDL中的显式状态和动作，为LLMs提供逻辑一致的世界状态表示，显著提升心理理论任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有心理理论基准测试中，即使使用思维链或概率信念更新，大语言模型表现仍远低于人类水平。作者认为失败主要源于不可靠的隐式状态跟踪，而非高层推理能力限制。
AI.method: 提出PDDL-Mind神经符号框架，将环境状态演化与信念推理解耦。将叙事描述转换为规划领域定义语言中的显式状态和动作，验证动作引发的状态转换是否符合预定义领域，为LLMs提供逻辑一致的世界状态表示。
AI.result: 在MMToM-QA、MuMA和FanToM等心理理论基准测试中，PDDL-Mind相比现有最佳方法获得了超过5%的绝对准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过提供逻辑一致和显式的世界状态表示，PDDL-Mind框架显著提升了大语言模型在心理理论任务上的表现，验证了可靠状态跟踪对ToM推理的重要性。

title: Ranking Abuse via Strategic Pairwise Data Perturbations
summary:
Pairwise ranking systems based on Maximum Likelihood Estimation (MLE), such as the Bradley-Terry model, are widely used to aggregate preferences from pairwise comparisons. However, their robustness under strategic data manipulation remains insufficiently understood.
  In this paper, we study the vulnerability of MLE-based ranking systems to adversarial perturbations. We formulate the manipulation task as a constrained combinatorial optimization problem and propose an Adaptive Subset Selection Attack (ASSA) to efficiently identify high-impact perturbations.
  Experimental results on both synthetic data and real-world election datasets show that MLE-based rankings exhibit a sharp phase-transition behavior: beyond a small perturbation budget, a limited number of strategic voters can significantly alter the global ranking. In particular, our method consistently outperforms random and greedy baselines under constrained budgets.
  These findings reveal a fundamental sensitivity of MLE-based ranking mechanisms to structured perturbations and highlight the need for more robust aggregation methods in collective decision-making systems.

AI.tldr: MLE-based排名系统（如Bradley-Terry模型）对对抗性扰动存在脆弱性，本文提出自适应子集选择攻击(ASSA)揭示其敏感性，发现少量策略性投票者即可显著改变全局排名。
AI.motivation: 研究基于最大似然估计(MLE)的成对排名系统（如Bradley-Terry模型）在策略性数据操纵下的鲁棒性不足问题，探索这些系统对对抗性扰动的脆弱性。
AI.method: 将操纵任务建模为约束组合优化问题，提出自适应子集选择攻击(ASSA)来高效识别高影响力扰动，并在合成数据和真实选举数据集上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验显示MLE排名呈现急剧的相变行为：超过小扰动预算后，有限数量的策略性投票者能显著改变全局排名。ASSA方法在约束预算下持续优于随机和贪婪基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MLE排名机制对结构化扰动存在基本敏感性，揭示了集体决策系统中需要更鲁棒的聚合方法。

title: Fractal Characterization of Low-Correlation Signals in AI-Generated Image Detection
summary: AI-generated imagery has reached near-photorealistic fidelity, yet this technology poses significant threats to information security and societal trust. Existing deepfake detection methods often exhibit limited robustness in open-world scenarios. To address this limitation, this paper investigates intrinsic discrepancies between synthetic and authentic images from a signal-level perspective. Our analysis reveals that low-correlation signals serve as distinctive markers for differentiating AI-generated imagery from real photographs. Building on this insight, we introduce a novel method for quantifying these signals based on fractal theory. By analyzing the fractal characteristics of low-correlation signals, our method effectively captures the subtle statistical anomalies inherent to the synthesis process. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the method's robustness and superior detection performance. This work emphasizes the need to shift research focus to a new signal-level direction for deepfake detection. Theoretically, this proposed approach is not limited to face image identification but can be applied to all AI-generated image detection tasks. This study provides a new research direction for deepfake detection.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于分形理论的新方法，通过分析低相关性信号的统计特征来检测AI生成图像，解决了现有深度伪造检测方法在开放世界场景中鲁棒性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: AI生成图像已达到接近真实照片的保真度，这对信息安全和社会信任构成重大威胁。现有的深度伪造检测方法在开放世界场景中往往表现出有限的鲁棒性，需要从信号层面寻找新的解决方案。
AI.method: 从信号层面分析合成图像与真实图像的内在差异，发现低相关性信号可作为区分AI生成图像与真实照片的独特标记。基于分形理论，提出量化这些信号的新方法，通过分析低相关性信号的分形特征来捕捉合成过程中固有的细微统计异常。
AI.result: 广泛的实验结果表明，该方法具有鲁棒性和优越的检测性能。该方法理论上不仅限于人脸图像识别，可应用于所有AI生成图像的检测任务。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作强调了将研究重点转向信号层面新方向的重要性，为深度伪造检测提供了新的研究方向。基于分形理论的方法能够有效捕捉AI生成图像的统计特征，具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Agentic Forecasting using Sequential Bayesian Updating of Linguistic Beliefs
summary:
We present BLF (Bayesian Linguistic Forecaster), an agentic system for binary forecasting that achieves state-of-the-art performance on the ForecastBench benchmark. The system is built on three ideas. (1) A Bayesian linguistic belief state: a semi-structured representation combining numerical probability estimates with natural-language evidence summaries, updated by the LLM at each step of an iterative tool-use loop. This contrasts with the common approach of appending all retrieved evidence to an ever-growing context. (2) Hierarchical multi-trial aggregation: running $K$ independent trials and combining them using logit-space shrinkage with a data-dependent prior. (3) Hierarchical calibration: Platt scaling with a hierarchical prior, which avoids over-shrinking extreme predictions for sources with skewed base rates.
  On 400 backtesting questions from the ForecastBench leaderboard, BLF outperforms all the top public methods, including Cassi, GPT-5, Grok~4.20, and Foresight-32B. Ablation studies show that the structured belief state is as impactful as web search access, and that shrinkage aggregation and hierarchical calibration each provide significant additional gains.
  In addition, we develop a robust back-testing framework with a leakage rate below 1.5\%, and use rigorous statistical methodology to compare different methods while controlling for various sources of noise.

AI.tldr: BLF是一个用于二元预测的智能系统，在ForecastBench基准测试中达到最先进性能。它基于贝叶斯语言信念状态、分层多试验聚合和分层校准三个核心思想。
AI.motivation: 现有预测方法通常将所有检索到的证据附加到不断增长的上下文中，这种方法效率低下且可能产生噪声。需要一种更结构化的方法来整合概率估计和自然语言证据，同时需要更好的聚合和校准技术来提高预测准确性。
AI.method: 1. 贝叶斯语言信念状态：结合数值概率估计和自然语言证据摘要的半结构化表示，在迭代工具使用循环中更新。2. 分层多试验聚合：运行K个独立试验，使用具有数据依赖先验的logit空间收缩进行组合。3. 分层校准：使用分层先验的Platt缩放，避免对具有偏斜基础率的来源过度收缩极端预测。
AI.result: 在ForecastBench排行榜的400个回测问题上，BLF超越了所有顶级公共方法，包括Cassi、GPT-5、Grok~4.20和Foresight-32B。消融研究表明，结构化信念状态与网络搜索访问同样重要，收缩聚合和分层校准各自提供了显著的额外增益。
AI.conclusion: BLF通过创新的贝叶斯语言信念状态表示、分层聚合和校准技术，在二元预测任务中实现了最先进的性能。同时开发了泄漏率低于1.5%的稳健回测框架，并使用严格的统计方法比较不同方法。

title: Learning to Seek Help: Dynamic Collaboration Between Small and Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) offer strong capabilities but raise cost and privacy concerns, whereas small language models (SLMs) facilitate efficient and private local inference yet suffer from limited capacity. To synergize the complementary strengths, we introduce a dynamic collaboration framework, where an SLM learns to proactively decide how to request an LLM during multi-step reasoning, while the LLM provides adaptive feedback instead of acting as a passive tool. We further systematically investigate how collaboration strategies are shaped by SLM and LLM capabilities as well as efficiency and privacy constraints. Evaluation results reveal a distinct scaling effect: stronger SLMs become more self-reliant, while stronger LLMs enable fewer and more informative interactions. In addition, the learned dynamic collaboration strategies significantly outperform static pipelines and standalone inference, and transfer robustly to unseen LLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出动态协作框架，让小语言模型学习在多步推理中主动决定何时请求大语言模型，大语言模型提供自适应反馈而非被动工具，实现能力互补。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型能力强但存在成本和隐私问题，小语言模型本地推理高效私密但能力有限，需要协同两者的互补优势。
AI.method: 引入动态协作框架，让小语言模型学习主动决策何时请求大语言模型，大语言模型提供自适应反馈，并系统研究协作策略如何受模型能力、效率和隐私约束影响。
AI.result: 发现明显的缩放效应：更强的小语言模型更自立，更强的大语言模型需要更少但信息量更大的交互；动态协作策略显著优于静态流程和独立推理，并能稳健迁移到未见的大语言模型。
AI.conclusion: 动态协作框架有效协同了大语言模型和小语言模型的互补优势，通过自适应决策机制实现了性能、效率和隐私的平衡。

title: Efficient Diffusion Models under Nonconvex Equality and Inequality constraints via Landing
summary: Generative modeling within constrained sets is essential for scientific and engineering applications involving physical, geometric, or safety requirements (e.g., molecular generation, robotics). We present a unified framework for constrained diffusion models on generic nonconvex feasible sets $Σ$ that simultaneously enforces equality and inequality constraints throughout the diffusion process. Our framework incorporates both overdamped and underdamped dynamics for forward and backward sampling. A key algorithmic innovation is a computationally efficient landing mechanism that replaces costly and often ill-defined projections onto $Σ$, ensuring feasibility without iterative Newton solves or projection failures. By leveraging underdamped dynamics, we accelerate mixing toward the prior distribution, effectively alleviating the high simulation costs typically associated with constrained diffusion. Empirically, this approach reduces function evaluations and memory usage during both training and inference while preserving sample quality. On benchmarks featuring equality and mixed constraints, our method achieves comparable sample quality to state-of-the-art baselines while significantly reducing computational cost, providing a practical and scalable solution for diffusion on nonconvex feasible sets.

AI.tldr: 提出一个统一的约束扩散模型框架，用于在非凸可行集上生成满足等式和不等式约束的样本，通过高效的着陆机制替代昂贵的投影操作，显著降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 科学和工程应用中需要在满足物理、几何或安全约束的条件下进行生成建模（如分子生成、机器人学）。现有方法在处理非凸可行集上的约束时，通常使用昂贵的投影操作，计算成本高且可能失败。
AI.method: 提出统一的约束扩散模型框架，支持过阻尼和欠阻尼动力学的前向和后向采样。关键创新是计算高效的着陆机制，替代传统昂贵的投影操作，确保可行性而无需迭代牛顿求解。利用欠阻尼动力学加速向先验分布的混合。
AI.result: 在包含等式和混合约束的基准测试中，该方法达到与最先进基线相当的样本质量，同时显著降低计算成本。在训练和推理阶段都减少了函数评估和内存使用。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为在非凸可行集上进行扩散建模提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案，通过高效的着陆机制和欠阻尼动力学，在保持样本质量的同时大幅降低计算开销。

title: Instinct vs. Reflection: Unifying Token and Verbalized Confidence in Multimodal Large Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated exceptional capabilities in various perception and reasoning tasks. Despite this success, ensuring their reliability in practical deployment necessitates robust confidence estimation. Prior works have predominantly focused on text-only LLMs, often relying on computationally expensive self-consistency sampling. In this paper, we extend this to multimodal settings and conduct a comprehensive evaluation of MLLMs' response confidence estimation. Our analysis reveals a significant instinct-reflection misalignment: the model's implicit token-level support frequently diverges from its verbal self-assessment confidence. To address this misalignment, we propose a monotone confidence fusion framework to merge dual-channel signals and cross-channel consistency to estimate correctness. Subsequently, an order-preserving mean alignment step is applied to correct global bias, which improves calibration while preserving the risk-coverage trade-off for selective prediction. Experiments on diverse open-source and closed-source MLLMs show that our method consistently yields more reliable confidence estimates and improves both calibration and failure prediction. Code will be available at https://github.com/Yunkaidang/Instinct-vs.-Reflection.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种解决多模态大语言模型中本能-反思错位问题的单调置信度融合框架，通过整合双通道信号和跨通道一致性来提升置信度估计的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大语言模型在各种感知和推理任务中表现出色，但确保其在实际部署中的可靠性需要稳健的置信度估计。现有研究主要关注纯文本LLM，且依赖计算成本高的自一致性采样。在多模态设置中，模型存在显著的本能-反思错位问题：模型的隐式token级支持与其口头自我评估置信度经常不一致。
AI.method: 提出单调置信度融合框架：1) 合并双通道信号（本能通道和反思通道）和跨通道一致性来估计正确性；2) 应用保序均值对齐步骤来校正全局偏差，在保持选择性预测的风险覆盖权衡的同时改进校准。
AI.result: 在多样化的开源和闭源MLLMs上的实验表明，该方法能持续产生更可靠的置信度估计，同时改进校准和失败预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过解决多模态大语言模型中的本能-反思错位问题，提出的单调置信度融合框架显著提升了置信度估计的可靠性，为MLLMs的实际部署提供了更稳健的置信度校准方法。

title: MathNet: a Global Multimodal Benchmark for Mathematical Reasoning and Retrieval
summary:
Mathematical problem solving remains a challenging test of reasoning for large language and multimodal models, yet existing benchmarks are limited in size, language coverage, and task diversity. We introduce MathNet, a high-quality, large-scale, multimodal, and multilingual dataset of Olympiad-level math problems together with a benchmark for evaluating mathematical reasoning in generative models and mathematical retrieval in embedding-based systems. MathNet spans 47 countries, 17 languages, and two decades of competitions, comprising 30,676 expert-authored problems with solutions across diverse domains. In addition to the core dataset, we construct a retrieval benchmark consisting of mathematically equivalent and structurally similar problem pairs curated by human experts.
  MathNet supports three tasks: (i) Problem Solving, (ii) Math-Aware Retrieval, and (iii) Retrieval-Augmented Problem Solving. Experimental results show that even state-of-the-art reasoning models (78.4% for Gemini-3.1-Pro and 69.3% for GPT-5) remain challenged, while embedding models struggle to retrieve equivalent problems. We further show that retrieval-augmented generation performance is highly sensitive to retrieval quality; for example, DeepSeek-V3.2-Speciale achieves gains of up to 12%, obtaining the highest scores on the benchmark. MathNet provides the largest high-quality Olympiad dataset together with the first benchmark for evaluating mathematical problem retrieval, and we publicly release both the dataset and benchmark at https://mathnet.mit.edu.

AI.tldr: MathNet是一个高质量、大规模、多模态、多语言的奥林匹克数学问题数据集和基准测试，包含30,676个专家编写的问题，支持问题求解、数学感知检索和检索增强问题求解三个任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的数学推理基准测试在规模、语言覆盖和任务多样性方面有限，无法充分评估大型语言和多模态模型的数学推理能力，特别是奥林匹克级别的数学问题求解。
AI.method: 构建了包含47个国家、17种语言、跨越20年竞赛的30,676个专家编写问题及其解决方案的数据集，并创建了由人类专家策划的数学等价和结构相似问题对的检索基准。
AI.result: 即使最先进的推理模型（Gemini-3.1-Pro 78.4%，GPT-5 69.3%）仍然面临挑战，嵌入模型在检索等价问题方面表现不佳。检索增强生成性能对检索质量高度敏感，DeepSeek-V3.2-Speciale通过检索增强可获得高达12%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: MathNet提供了最大的高质量奥林匹克数据集和首个评估数学问题检索的基准测试，为评估生成模型的数学推理和嵌入系统的数学检索能力提供了重要资源。

title: How Non-Linguistic Is the Indus Sign System? A Synthetic-Baseline Scorecard
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures, 8 tables. Code available from corresponding author upon request
summary: Whether the Indus Valley sign system (c. 2600-1900 BCE) encodes spoken language has been debated for decades. This paper introduces a multi-metric discrimination framework that tests the observed Indus corpus against two kinds of computer-generated non-linguistic baseline -- one mimicking a heraldic emblem system, the other an administrative coding system -- each calibrated with Zipfian frequency distributions, positional constraints, and bigram dependencies derived from six attested non-linguistic corpora. The scorecard evaluates four properties central to the Farmer-Sproat-Witzel (2004) critique: text brevity, repeated formulaic phrases, hapax legomenon rate, and positional rigidity. Applying this framework to 1,916 deduplicated inscriptions (584 unique signs, 11,110 tokens) from the ICIT/Yajnadevam digitization, we find that the Indus corpus does not match either baseline cleanly. Across the four metrics examined, the Indus corpus occupies an intermediate position relative to the two baseline families, matching neither cleanly. Neither a heraldic nor an administrative generator can reproduce all four properties at once. We also compare against seven real-world non-linguistic corpora including Sproat's (2014) datasets, finding that no attested non-linguistic system reproduces the full Indus statistical profile either. We replicate key prior results including a Zipf slope of -1.49 and conditional entropy of 3.23 bits. All code and data are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个多指标判别框架，将印度河文字系统与计算机生成的非语言基线进行比较，发现印度河文字既不完全符合纹章系统也不完全符合行政编码系统的统计特征，处于中间位置。
AI.motivation: 印度河谷符号系统（约公元前2600-1900年）是否编码口语语言已争论数十年。本文旨在通过系统性的统计分析方法，检验印度河文字是否具有非语言系统的特征，以回应Farmer-Sproat-Witzel（2004）的批评。
AI.method: 开发多指标判别框架，将印度河文字语料库与两种计算机生成的非语言基线（纹章系统和行政编码系统）进行比较。基线使用Zipf频率分布、位置约束和二元依赖关系校准。评估四个关键属性：文本简短性、重复公式化短语、hapax legomenon率和位置刚性。分析1,916条去重铭文（584个独特符号，11,110个标记）。
AI.result: 印度河文字语料库既不与纹章系统基线完全匹配，也不与行政编码系统基线完全匹配，在四个指标上处于中间位置。没有任何一个非语言系统能同时重现印度河文字的所有四个统计特性。复制了先前关键结果：Zipf斜率为-1.49，条件熵为3.23比特。
AI.conclusion: 印度河文字系统在统计特征上既不完全符合纹章系统也不完全符合行政编码系统，处于中间位置。这表明需要更复杂的模型来解释其性质，不能简单归类为已知的非语言系统类型。所有代码和数据已公开。

title: M100: An Orchestrated Dataflow Architecture Powering General AI Computing
comment: Accepted to appear at ISCA 2026 Industry Track. 12 pages, 16 figures
summary: As deep learning-based AI technologies gain momentum, the demand for general-purpose AI computing architectures continues to grow. While GPGPU-based architectures offer versatility for diverse AI workloads, they often fall short in efficiency and cost-effectiveness. Various Domain-Specific Architectures (DSAs) excel at particular AI tasks but struggle to extend across broader applications or adapt to the rapidly evolving AI landscape. M100 is Li Auto's response: a performant, cost-effective architecture for AI inference in Autonomous Driving (AD), Large Language Models (LLMs), and intelligent human interactions, domains crucial to today's most competitive automobile platforms. M100 employs a dataflow parallel architecture, where compiler-architecture co-design orchestrates not only computation but, more critically, data movement across time and space. Leveraging dataflow computing efficiency, our hardware-software co-design improves system performance while reducing hardware complexity and cost. M100 largely eliminates caching: tensor computations are driven by compiler- and runtime-managed data streams flowing between computing elements and on/off-chip memories, yielding greater efficiency and scalability than cache-based systems. Another key principle was selecting the right operational granularity for scheduling, issuing, and execution across compiler, firmware, and hardware. Recognizing commonalities in AI workloads, we chose the tensor as the fundamental data element. M100 demonstrates general AI computing capability across diverse inference applications, including UniAD (for AD) and LLaMA (for LLMs). Benchmarks show M100 outperforms GPGPU architectures in AD applications with higher utilization, representing a promising direction for future general AI computing.

AI.tldr: M100是理想汽车提出的数据流并行架构，通过编译器-架构协同设计优化数据移动，在自动驾驶、大语言模型等AI推理任务中实现高性能和成本效益。
AI.motivation: 当前GPU架构虽然通用但效率不足，而专用架构（DSA）又难以适应快速演进的AI应用需求。理想汽车需要为自动驾驶、大语言模型和智能交互等关键领域设计一个既高效又具通用性的AI计算架构。
AI.method: 采用数据流并行架构，通过编译器-架构协同设计管理数据在时间和空间上的移动。以张量为基本数据单元，消除缓存机制，让张量计算由编译器管理的数椐流驱动。在编译器、固件和硬件层面选择适当的操作粒度进行调度和执行。
AI.result: M100在自动驾驶应用（如UniAD）和大语言模型（如LLaMA）等多样化AI推理任务中展现出通用计算能力。基准测试显示，在AD应用中M100相比GPU架构具有更高的利用率。
AI.conclusion: M100通过数据流计算效率和软硬件协同设计，在降低硬件复杂性和成本的同时提升了系统性能，为未来通用AI计算提供了一个有前景的方向。

title: PestVL-Net: Enabling Multimodal Pest Learning via Fine-grained Vision-Language Interaction
summary: Effective pest recognition and management are crucial for sustainable agricultural development. However, collecting pest data in real scenarios is often challenging. Compared to other domains, pests exhibit a wide variety of species with complex and diverse morphological characteristics. Existing techniques struggle to effectively model the key visual and high-level semantic features of pests in a fine-grained manner. These limitations hinder the practical application of such methods in real agricultural scenarios. To address these critical challenges, we present a synergistic approach that integrates PestVL-Net, a novel vision-language framework, with two multi-species pest datasets to facilitate fine-grained pest learning. The visual pathway of PestVL-Net utilizes the Recurrent Weighted Key Value (RWKV) architecture, incorporating a saliency-guided adaptive window partitioning scheme to effectively model the fine-grained visual characteristics of pests. Concurrently, the linguistic component generates precise pest semantic descriptions by leveraging Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) priors, critically informed by agricultural expert knowledge and structured via multimodal Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning. The deep fusion of these complementary visual and textual representations enables fine-grained multimodal pest learning. Extensive experimental evaluations on multiple pest datasets validate the superior performance of PestVL-Net, highlighting its potential for effective real-world pest management.

AI.tldr: 提出PestVL-Net视觉语言框架，结合RWKV架构和MLLMs先验，通过细粒度多模态学习解决害虫识别难题
AI.motivation: 农业害虫识别面临数据收集困难、物种多样、形态复杂等挑战，现有方法难以有效建模害虫的细粒度视觉和语义特征，限制了实际应用
AI.method: 提出PestVL-Net视觉语言框架：视觉通路采用RWKV架构和显著性引导的自适应窗口划分方案；语言组件利用MLLMs先验生成精确害虫语义描述，结合农业专家知识和多模态思维链推理；深度融合视觉和文本表示实现细粒度多模态学习
AI.result: 在多个害虫数据集上的广泛实验验证了PestVL-Net的优越性能，展示了其在现实害虫管理中的潜力
AI.conclusion: PestVL-Net通过视觉语言协同方法有效解决了害虫识别的细粒度学习挑战，为实际农业应用提供了有前景的解决方案

title: A3-FPN: Asymptotic Content-Aware Pyramid Attention Network for Dense Visual Prediction
summary: Learning multi-scale representations is the common strategy to tackle object scale variation in dense prediction tasks. Although existing feature pyramid networks have greatly advanced visual recognition, inherent design defects inhibit them from capturing discriminative features and recognizing small objects. In this work, we propose Asymptotic Content-Aware Pyramid Attention Network (A3-FPN), to augment multi-scale feature representation via the asymptotically disentangled framework and content-aware attention modules. Specifically, A3-FPN employs a horizontally-spread column network that enables asymptotically global feature interaction and disentangles each level from all hierarchical representations. In feature fusion, it collects supplementary content from the adjacent level to generate position-wise offsets and weights for context-aware resampling, and learns deep context reweights to improve intra-category similarity. In feature reassembly, it further strengthens intra-scale discriminative feature learning and reassembles redundant features based on information content and spatial variation of feature maps. Extensive experiments on MS COCO, VisDrone2019-DET and Cityscapes demonstrate that A3-FPN can be easily integrated into state-of-the-art CNN and Transformer-based architectures, yielding remarkable performance gains. Notably, when paired with OneFormer and Swin-L backbone, A3-FPN achieves 49.6 mask AP on MS COCO and 85.6 mIoU on Cityscapes. Codes are available at https://github.com/mason-ching/A3-FPN.

AI.tldr: 提出A3-FPN网络，通过渐进解耦框架和内容感知注意力模块增强多尺度特征表示，显著提升密集预测任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有特征金字塔网络存在设计缺陷，难以捕获判别性特征和识别小物体。需要改进多尺度表示能力来解决物体尺度变化问题。
AI.method: 采用水平扩展的列网络实现渐进全局特征交互和解耦；在特征融合中使用相邻层内容生成位置偏移和权重进行上下文感知重采样；在特征重组中基于信息内容和空间变化增强判别性特征学习。
AI.result: 在MS COCO、VisDrone2019-DET和Cityscapes数据集上表现优异，与OneFormer和Swin-L主干网络结合时，在MS COCO达到49.6 mask AP，在Cityscapes达到85.6 mIoU。
AI.conclusion: A3-FPN能够有效集成到最先进的CNN和Transformer架构中，显著提升密集预测任务的性能，特别是在小物体识别和多尺度特征表示方面。

title: QuickScope: Certifying Hard Questions in Dynamic LLM Benchmarks
summary: LLM benchmarks are increasingly dynamic: instead of containing a fixed set of questions, they define templates and parameters that can generate an effectively unlimited number of question variants. This flexibility is valuable, but it makes evaluation expensive -- especially when the goal is not just determining an average score, but reliably identifying a model's weak spots. This paper introduces a new methodology for identifying hard questions in dynamic benchmarks. It leverages COUP, a recent Bayesian optimization algorithm (Graham, Velez & Leyton-Brown, 2026), after introducing several substantive modifications to make the algorithm suitable for practical LLM pipelines. We also wrap it in a tool that supports flexible choices of datasets and utility functions, enabling users to target the kinds of questions they care about (e.g., low-accuracy questions; questions that are unusually hard relative to their measured complexity). In experiments across a range of benchmarks, we show that our method, dubbed $\texttt{QuickScope}$, discovers truly difficult questions more sample efficiently than standard baselines, while also reducing false positives from noisy outcomes.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种名为QuickScope的新方法，用于在动态LLM基准测试中高效识别困难问题，相比基线方法更节省样本且减少误报。
AI.motivation: 动态LLM基准测试（包含模板和参数可生成无限问题变体）虽然灵活，但评估成本高昂，特别是在需要可靠识别模型弱点而非仅计算平均分时。
AI.method: 引入基于COUP贝叶斯优化算法的改进方法，进行了实质性修改以适应实际LLM流水线，并封装为支持灵活选择数据集和效用函数的工具，让用户能针对特定类型问题（如低准确率问题、相对于测量复杂度异常困难的问题）。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试实验中，QuickScope方法比标准基线更高效地发现真正困难的问题，同时减少了噪声结果导致的误报。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为动态LLM基准测试提供了一种有效的困难问题识别工具，能够更高效、更可靠地定位模型弱点。

title: LEPO: \underline{L}atent R\underline{e}asoning \underline{P}olicy \underline{O}ptimization for Large Language~Models
summary: Recently, latent reasoning has been introduced into large language models (LLMs) to leverage rich information within a continuous space. However, without stochastic sampling, these methods inevitably collapse to deterministic inference, failing to discover diverse reasoning paths. To bridge the gap, we inject controllable stochasticity into latent reasoning via Gumbel-Softmax, restoring LLMs' exploratory capacity and enhancing their compatibility with Reinforcement Learning (RL). Building on this, we propose \textbf{\underline{L}}atent R\textbf{\underline{e}}asoning \textbf{\underline{P}}olicy \textbf{\underline{O}}ptimization~(\textbf{LEPO}), a novel framework that applies RL directly to continuous latent representations. Specifically, in rollout stage, LEPO maintains stochasticity to enable diverse trajectory sampling, while in optimization stage, LEPO constructs a unified gradient estimation for both latent representations and discrete tokens. Extensive experiments show that LEPO significantly outperforms existing RL methods for discrete and latent reasoning.

AI.tldr: LEPO：通过Gumbel-Softmax向潜在推理注入可控随机性，结合强化学习优化连续潜在表示的新框架
AI.motivation: 现有潜在推理方法缺乏随机采样，导致确定性推理和推理路径单一，限制了探索能力和与强化学习的兼容性
AI.method: 使用Gumbel-Softmax向潜在推理注入可控随机性，提出LEPO框架：在rollout阶段保持随机性实现多样化轨迹采样，在优化阶段构建统一梯度估计同时优化潜在表示和离散token
AI.result: LEPO在离散和潜在推理任务上显著优于现有强化学习方法
AI.conclusion: 通过可控随机性增强潜在推理的探索能力，结合强化学习优化连续表示，为语言模型推理提供了更有效的框架

title: Depth Adaptive Efficient Visual Autoregressive Modeling
summary: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) modeling inefficiently applies a fixed computational depth to each position when generating high-resolution images. While existing methods accelerate inference by pruning tokens using frequency maps, their binary hard-pruning approach is fundamentally limited and fails to improve quality even with better frequency estimation. Observing that VAR models possess significant depth redundancy, we propose a paradigm shift from pruning entire tokens to adaptively allocating per-token computational depth. To this end, we introduce DepthVAR, a training-free framework that dynamically allocates computation. It integrates an adaptive depth scheduler, which assigns computational depth via a cyclic rotated schedule for balanced, non-static refinement, with a dynamic inference process that translates these depths into layer-major masks, selectively applies transformer blocks, and blends the resulting codes to ensure each token's influence is proportional to its processing depth. Extensive experiments show that DepthVAR achieves 2.3$\times$-3.1$\times$ acceleration with minimal quality loss, offering a competitive compute-performance trade-off compared to existing hard-pruning approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/STOVAGtz/DepthVAR

AI.tldr: DepthVAR提出了一种训练免费框架，通过自适应分配每个token的计算深度来加速视觉自回归模型，而不是传统的硬剪枝方法，实现了2.3-3.1倍加速且质量损失最小。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉自回归模型对所有位置使用固定计算深度，导致计算效率低下。虽然已有方法通过频率图进行token剪枝来加速推理，但这种二值硬剪枝方法存在根本限制，即使有更好的频率估计也无法提升质量。
AI.method: 提出DepthVAR框架：1）自适应深度调度器，通过循环旋转调度分配计算深度，实现平衡的非静态细化；2）动态推理过程，将深度转换为层主掩码，选择性应用transformer块，并混合生成的编码，确保每个token的影响力与其处理深度成比例。
AI.result: 实验表明DepthVAR实现了2.3-3.1倍加速，质量损失最小，相比现有硬剪枝方法提供了更具竞争力的计算性能权衡。
AI.conclusion: DepthVAR通过从剪枝整个token转向自适应分配每个token的计算深度，实现了视觉自回归模型的高效加速，为计算资源分配提供了新范式。

title: On the Emergence of Syntax by Means of Local Interaction
summary: Can syntactic processing emerge spontaneously from purely local interaction? We present a concrete instance on a minimal system: an 18,658-parameter two-dimensional neural cellular automaton (NCA), supervised by nothing more than a 1-bit boundary signal, is trained on the membership problem of an arithmetic-expression grammar. After training, its internal $L \times L$ grid spontaneously self-organizes into an ordered, spatially extended representation that we name Proto-CKY. This representation satisfies three operational criteria for syntactic processing: expressive power beyond the regular languages, structural generalization beyond the training distribution, and an internal organization quantitatively aligned with grammatical structure (Pearson $r \approx 0.71$). It emerges independently on four context-free grammars and regenerates spontaneously after perturbation. Proto-CKY is functionally aligned with the CKY algorithm but formally distinct from it: it is a physical prototype, a concrete instantiation of a mathematical ideal on a physical substrate, and the systematic distance between the two carries information about the substrate itself.

AI.tldr: 18,658参数二维神经细胞自动机仅通过1位边界信号监督，在算术表达式语法成员问题上训练后，内部自发组织成名为Proto-CKY的空间扩展表示，满足超越正则语言的表达能力、超越训练分布的结构泛化、以及与语法结构定量对齐三个句法处理标准。
AI.motivation: 探索句法处理是否能从纯局部交互中自发涌现，通过最小化系统验证这一可能性。
AI.method: 使用18,658参数的二维神经细胞自动机，仅用1位边界信号监督，在算术表达式语法成员问题上进行训练。
AI.result: 训练后系统内部自发组织成Proto-CKY表示，在四个上下文无关文法上独立涌现，受扰动后能自发再生，与CKY算法功能对齐但形式不同（皮尔逊相关系数约0.71）。
AI.conclusion: 句法处理可以从纯局部交互中自发涌现，Proto-CKY是数学理想在物理基质上的具体实例化，两者间的系统性距离携带了基质本身的信息。

title: Can Explicit Physical Feasibility Benefit VLA Learning? An Empirical Study
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models map multimodal inputs directly to robot actions and are typically trained through large-scale imitation learning. While this paradigm has shown strong performance, prevailing VLA training procedures do not explicitly supervise hard physical constraints such as obstacle avoidance or kinematic feasibility. As a result, the geometric structure underlying physically feasible behavior must be inferred only implicitly from demonstrations. In this paper, we study whether introducing explicit feasibility supervision can provide effective structured guidance for VLA policies. We formulate a simple geometry-grounded feasibility objective and integrate it into the training stage of a diffusion-based VLA policy. To evaluate this idea systematically, we use obstacle-aware manipulation as a controlled probe of geometry-dependent physical feasibility. Empirical results show that augmenting VLA training with feasibility supervision improves both physical reliability and overall task performance, while also enhancing learning efficiency in the low-data regime. These findings indicate that explicit feasibility signals can effectively complement imitation-based VLA learning, highlighting their potential for developing more reliable VLA policies.

AI.tldr: 在VLA模型中引入显式的物理可行性监督，通过几何约束目标增强训练，提高机器人动作的物理可靠性和任务性能
AI.motivation: 当前VLA模型通过大规模模仿学习训练，但缺乏对物理约束（如避障、运动学可行性）的显式监督，导致几何结构只能从演示中隐式推断，可能影响物理可靠性
AI.method: 提出简单的几何基础可行性目标，将其集成到基于扩散的VLA策略训练阶段，以避障感知操作作为几何依赖物理可行性的受控测试
AI.result: 实验表明，在VLA训练中加入可行性监督能提高物理可靠性和整体任务性能，同时在低数据情况下增强学习效率
AI.conclusion: 显式可行性信号能有效补充基于模仿的VLA学习，为开发更可靠的VLA策略提供了潜力

title: Spectral Forensics of Diffusion Attention Graphs for Copy-Move Forgery Detection
comment: Preprint before NeurIPS main track submission
summary: Copy-move forgery, where a region within an image is duplicated to hide or fabricate content, remains a persistent threat to visual media integrity. We introduce GraphSpecForge, a training-free framework that detects copy-move forgery by analysing the spectral structure of attention graphs from a pretrained Stable Diffusion U-Net. Our central insight is that copy-move manipulation induces approximate subgraph duplication in the self-attention graph, leading to measurable spectral redistribution in the normalized graph Laplacian. We formalise this link with perturbation-based arguments and build an image-level anomaly detector using Wasserstein distances between per-image Laplacian spectra and an authentic reference distribution. We evaluate GraphSpecForge on four copy-move benchmarks without forgery-specific retraining. On RecodAI-LUC (5,128 images), our best configuration achieves AUROC = 0.606 (95% CI: 0.580-0.638; permutation p = 0.005), and the normalized Laplacian outperforms raw attention spectra by +0.057 AUROC. On MICC-F220, CoMoFoD, and COVERAGE, the same pipeline attains AUROCs of 0.752, 0.774, and 0.673, respectively; on CoMoFoD it also reaches AUPRC = 0.833, balanced accuracy = 0.712, MCC = 0.499, and TPR@1%FPR = 32.5%. Additional ablation and falsification experiments confirm the signal's specificity and sensitivity to manipulation strength, while null-graph controls rule out trivial-statistic explanations.

AI.tldr: GraphSpecForge：基于预训练Stable Diffusion U-Net注意力图谱分析的免训练复制-移动伪造检测框架，通过分析归一化图拉普拉斯矩阵的谱分布变化来检测图像中的复制-移动操作。
AI.motivation: 复制-移动伪造（图像区域复制以隐藏或伪造内容）对视觉媒体完整性构成持续威胁，需要有效的检测方法。现有方法通常需要专门的训练，而作者发现复制-移动操作会在自注意力图中产生近似子图复制，导致可测量的谱重分布。
AI.method: 提出GraphSpecForge框架：1）从预训练Stable Diffusion U-Net提取自注意力图；2）分析归一化图拉普拉斯矩阵的谱结构；3）使用Wasserstein距离比较每张图像的拉普拉斯谱与真实参考分布；4）基于扰动理论论证复制-移动操作会导致谱重分布。
AI.result: 在四个复制-移动基准测试中取得良好性能：RecodAI-LUC上AUROC=0.606，MICC-F220上0.752，CoMoFoD上0.774（AUPRC=0.833），COVERAGE上0.673。归一化拉普拉斯谱比原始注意力谱性能提升+0.057 AUROC。消融实验证实信号对操作强度的特异性。
AI.conclusion: GraphSpecForge证明了无需特定伪造训练即可检测复制-移动伪造的可行性，通过分析预训练扩散模型注意力图的谱结构变化，为图像取证提供了新的免训练检测范式。

title: Latent Abstraction for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become a standard approach for enhancing large language models (LLMs) with external knowledge, mitigating hallucinations, and improving factuality. However, existing systems rely on generating natural language queries at each hop and maintaining a strict architectural separation between retriever and generator, preventing them from leveraging the full representational capacity of the LLM. We propose \textbf{LAnR} (Latent Abstraction for RAG), a unified framework in which a single LLM jointly performs encoding, retrieval, and generation entirely within its own latent space. Rather than generating textual queries, LAnR produces dense retrieval vectors from the hidden states of a designated \texttt{[PRED]} token and uses them to match against encoded document representations from the same model. Furthermore, LAnR adaptively decides when sufficient evidence has been retrieved using a lightweight MLP control head over those same hidden states, eliminating both the separate retriever and explicit token-level stopping reasoning. This design is motivated by our empirical observation that answer token entropy reliably signals retrieval sufficiency. Extensive experiments on six QA benchmarks spanning single-hop and multi-hop settings demonstrate that LAnR outperforms existing RAG methods, while achieving improved inference efficiency through reduced number of retrieval calls and tighter model integration.

AI.tldr: LAnR提出了一种统一的RAG框架，让单个LLM在其潜在空间中同时执行编码、检索和生成，无需生成自然语言查询，通过[PRED]令牌的隐藏状态产生检索向量，并使用轻量级MLP头自适应决定何时停止检索。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统依赖生成自然语言查询，并在检索器和生成器之间保持严格的架构分离，这限制了利用LLM完整表示能力。作者观察到答案令牌的熵能可靠指示检索充分性，这启发了更紧密集成的设计。
AI.method: LAnR框架中，单个LLM在其潜在空间中执行所有操作：1) 从指定[PRED]令牌的隐藏状态产生密集检索向量；2) 使用相同模型编码的文档表示进行匹配；3) 通过轻量级MLP控制头基于隐藏状态自适应决定何时停止检索。
AI.result: 在六个QA基准测试（涵盖单跳和多跳设置）上的实验表明，LAnR优于现有RAG方法，同时通过减少检索调用次数和更紧密的模型集成提高了推理效率。
AI.conclusion: LAnR展示了在LLM潜在空间中统一编码、检索和生成的可行性，消除了独立的检索器和显式的停止推理，为更高效、集成的RAG系统提供了新方向。

title: LoReC: Rethinking Large Language Models for Graph Data Analysis
summary: The advent of Large Language Models (LLMs) has fundamentally reshaped the way we interact with graphs, giving rise to a new paradigm called GraphLLM. As revealed in recent studies, graph learning can benefit from LLMs. However, we observe limited benefits when we directly utilize LLMs to make predictions for graph-related tasks within GraphLLM paradigm, which even yields suboptimal results compared to conventional GNN-based approaches. Through in-depth analysis, we find this failure can be attributed to LLMs' limited capability for processing graph data and their tendency to overlook graph information. To address this issue, we propose LoReC (Look, Remember, and Contrast), a novel plug-and-play method for GraphLLM paradigm, which enhances LLM's understanding of graph data through three stages: (1) Look: redistributing attention to graph; (2) Remember: re-injecting graph information into the Feed-Forward Network (FFN); (3) Contrast: rectifying the vanilla logits produced in the decoding process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LoReC brings notable improvements over current GraphLLM methods and outperforms GNN-based approaches across diverse datasets. The implementation is available at https://github.com/Git-King-Zhan/LoReC.

AI.tldr: LoReC是一个用于GraphLLM范式的即插即用方法，通过重新分配注意力、重新注入图信息和对比校正三个步骤，增强LLM对图数据的理解能力，显著提升了GraphLLM在图相关任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 研究发现，在GraphLLM范式中直接使用LLM进行图相关任务预测效果有限，甚至不如传统的GNN方法。这主要是因为LLM处理图数据的能力有限，且容易忽视图信息。
AI.method: 提出LoReC方法，包含三个阶段：1) Look：重新分配注意力到图上；2) Remember：将图信息重新注入到前馈网络中；3) Contrast：在解码过程中校正原始logits。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，LoReC显著超越了当前的GraphLLM方法，并在多个数据集上优于基于GNN的方法。
AI.conclusion: LoReC通过增强LLM对图数据的理解能力，有效解决了GraphLLM范式中LLM处理图数据能力有限的问题，为图学习与LLM的结合提供了有效解决方案。

title: Frequency-guided Multi-level Reasoning for Scene Graph Generation in Video
summary: Video Scene Graph Generation aims to obtain structured semantic representations of objects and their relationships in videos for high-level understanding. However, existing methods still have limitations in handling long-tail distributions. This paper proposes the Frequency-guided Relational Multi-level Reasoning (FReMuRe) model, which enhances the modeling ability of long-tail relationships from a mechanism perspective. We introduce relation-specific branches to deal gradient conflicts, yielding more balanced and tail-aware learning. And we design a frequency-aware dual-branch predicate embedding network to model high-frequency and low-frequency relationships separately and improve the recall rate of tail classes through gated fusion. Meanwhile, we propose two types of interchangeable relation classification heads: Bayesian Head for uncertainty estimation and new Gaussian Mixture Model Head to enhance intra-class diversity. Experimental results show that FReMuRe significantly improves the recall rate of long-tail relationships and overall reasoning robustness on the Action Genome dataset.

AI.tldr: 提出FReMuRe模型，通过频率引导的关系多级推理增强长尾关系建模能力，显著提升视频场景图生成中长尾关系的召回率和整体推理鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频场景图生成方法在处理长尾分布关系时存在局限性，需要从机制角度增强长尾关系建模能力。
AI.method: 1. 引入关系特定分支处理梯度冲突；2. 设计频率感知双分支谓词嵌入网络，分别建模高频和低频关系并通过门控融合提升尾类召回率；3. 提出两种可互换关系分类头：贝叶斯头用于不确定性估计和高斯混合模型头增强类内多样性。
AI.result: 在Action Genome数据集上，FReMuRe显著提升了长尾关系的召回率和整体推理鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: FReMuRe通过频率引导的关系多级推理机制，有效解决了视频场景图生成中的长尾分布问题，为高级视频理解提供了更平衡和鲁棒的语义表示。

title: GraSP: Graph-Structured Skill Compositions for LLM Agents
summary: Skill ecosystems for LLM agents have matured rapidly, yet recent benchmarks show that providing agents with more skills does not monotonically improve performance -- focused sets of 2-3 skills outperform comprehensive documentation, and excessive skills actually hurt. The bottleneck has shifted from skill availability to skill orchestration: agents need not more skills, but a structural mechanism to select, compose, and execute them with explicit causal dependencies. We propose GraSP, the first executable skill graph architecture that introduces a compilation layer between skill retrieval and execution. GraSP transforms flat skill sets into typed directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) with precondition-effect edges, executes them with node-level verification, and performs locality-bounded repair through five typed operators -- reducing replanning from O(N) to O(d^h). Across ALFWorld, ScienceWorld, WebShop, and InterCode with eight LLM backbones, GraSP outperforms ReAct, Reflexion, ExpeL, and flat skill baselines in every configuration, improving reward by up to +19 points over the strongest baseline while cutting environment steps by up to 41%. GraSP's advantage grows with task complexity and is robust to both skill over-retrieval and quality degradation, confirming that structured orchestration -- not larger skill libraries -- is the key to reliable agent execution.

AI.tldr: GraSP提出首个可执行技能图架构，通过编译层将平面技能集转换为带类型的有向无环图，实现结构化编排而非更多技能，显著提升LLM智能体性能。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM智能体技能生态系统已成熟，但研究发现提供更多技能并不会单调提升性能——2-3个聚焦技能集优于全面文档，过多技能反而有害。瓶颈已从技能可用性转向技能编排：智能体需要的不是更多技能，而是选择、组合和执行技能的结构化机制。
AI.method: GraSP在技能检索和执行之间引入编译层，将平面技能集转换为带前提-效果边的类型化有向无环图（DAG），通过节点级验证执行，并使用五种类型化操作符进行局部有界修复，将重新规划从O(N)减少到O(d^h)。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld、ScienceWorld、WebShop和InterCode等八个LLM骨干网络上，GraSP在所有配置中都优于ReAct、Reflexion、ExpeL和平面技能基线，奖励提升高达+19分，环境步骤减少高达41%。优势随任务复杂性增长，对技能过度检索和质量退化具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 结构化编排而非更大的技能库是实现可靠智能体执行的关键。GraSP通过可执行技能图架构有效解决了技能编排瓶颈，为LLM智能体提供了更高效可靠的任务执行框架。

title: Learning to Correct: Calibrated Reinforcement Learning for Multi-Attempt Chain-of-Thought
summary: State-of-the-art reasoning models utilize long chain-of-thought (CoT) to solve increasingly complex problems using more test-time computation. In this work, we explore a long CoT setting where the model makes up to K successive attempts at solving a problem, in which each attempt is allowed to build on earlier ones after the model receives a hard verifier feedback. This motivates RL methods that can harness per-attempt rewards by carefully weighting individual attempts. We study optimizing the Verification@K reward (the model succeeds by the K-th attempt) and show that naively weighing the attempts by their pass/fail results in biased gradients. We introduce Calibrated Attempt-Level (CAL) GRPO by devising a weighing strategy to obtain unbiased gradients while maintaining small variance. Our theory reveals how incorporating per-attempt rewards influence the training and the eventual Verification@K performance. Experiments, baselines, and ablations on synthetic and real data corroborate our theory and the benefits of CAL-GRPO over vanilla GRPO as well as naive weighting.

AI.tldr: 提出CAL-GRPO方法，通过校准的尝试级别权重策略优化Verification@K奖励，解决长链思维推理中多次尝试的强化学习问题
AI.motivation: 现有推理模型使用长链思维解决复杂问题，但需要多次尝试并利用验证反馈。需要开发能够有效利用每次尝试奖励的强化学习方法，优化Verification@K性能
AI.method: 提出校准尝试级别（CAL）GRPO方法，设计权重策略获得无偏梯度同时保持小方差。理论分析每次尝试奖励如何影响训练和最终Verification@K性能
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据上的实验、基准测试和消融研究验证了理论，显示CAL-GRPO优于原始GRPO和朴素加权方法
AI.conclusion: CAL-GRPO通过校准的尝试级别权重策略有效优化Verification@K奖励，为长链思维推理中的多次尝试强化学习提供了理论支持和实用方法

title: The First Challenge on Mobile Real-World Image Super-Resolution at NTIRE 2026: Benchmark Results and Method Overview
summary: This paper provides a review of the NTIRE 2026 challenge on mobile real-world image super-resolution, highlighting the proposed solutions and the resulting outcomes. The challenge aims to recover high-resolution (HR) images from low-resolution (LR) counterparts generated through unknown degradations with a x4 scaling factor while ensuring the models remain executable on mobile devices. The objective is to develop effective and efficient network designs or solutions that achieve state-of-the-art real-world image super-resolution performance. The track of the challenge evaluates performance using a weighted combination of image quality assessment (IQA) score and speedup ratios. The competition attracted 108 registrants, with 16 teams achieving a valid score in the final ranking. This collaborative effort advances the performance of mobile real-world image super-resolution while offering an in-depth overview of the latest trends in the field.

AI.tldr: NTIRE 2026移动端真实世界图像超分辨率挑战赛综述，聚焦移动设备上处理未知退化模型的x4超分辨率任务，评估图像质量和速度的平衡。
AI.motivation: 移动设备上的真实世界图像超分辨率面临双重挑战：需要处理未知的退化模型（而非简单的双三次下采样），同时模型必须在移动设备上高效运行。现有方法往往无法同时满足质量和速度要求。
AI.method: 挑战赛要求参赛者开发能在移动设备上执行的超分辨率模型，处理未知退化过程生成的x4低分辨率图像。评估采用图像质量评估分数和加速比的加权组合，强调性能与效率的平衡。
AI.result: 吸引了108名参赛者注册，最终16支队伍获得有效分数。通过这次合作努力，推动了移动端真实世界图像超分辨率的性能提升，并展示了该领域的最新趋势。
AI.conclusion: NTIRE 2026挑战赛成功促进了移动端真实世界超分辨率技术的发展，强调了在实际应用场景中平衡图像质量和计算效率的重要性，为该领域的未来研究提供了重要参考。

title: Latent Preference Modeling for Cross-Session Personalized Tool Calling
summary: Users often omit essential details in their requests to LLM-based agents, resulting in under-specified inputs for tool use. This poses a fundamental challenge for tool-augmented agents, as API execution typically requires complete arguments, highlighting the need for personalized tool calling. To study this problem, we introduce MPT, a benchmark comprising 265 multi-session dialogues that cover three challenges: Preference Recall, Preference Induction, and Preference Transfer. We also propose PRefine, a test-time memory-augmented method that represents user preferences as evolving hypotheses. Through a generate--verify--refine loop, it extracts reusable constraints from history and improves tool-calling accuracy while using only 1.24% of the tokens required by full-history prompting. These results indicate that robust personalization in agentic systems depends on memory that captures the reasons behind user choices, not just the choices themselves.

AI.tldr: MPT基准测试揭示LLM代理在工具调用时面临用户偏好信息不足的问题，PRefine方法通过记忆增强的假设验证循环，仅用1.24%的token就能显著提升工具调用准确性。
AI.motivation: 用户向LLM代理请求时经常省略关键细节，导致工具调用输入信息不足。API执行通常需要完整参数，这凸显了个性化工具调用的必要性。
AI.method: 提出PRefine方法：基于记忆增强的测试时方法，将用户偏好表示为演化假设，通过生成-验证-精炼循环从历史中提取可重用约束。
AI.result: PRefine显著提升工具调用准确性，同时仅需完整历史提示1.24%的token量。创建了包含265个多会话对话的MPT基准，涵盖偏好回忆、归纳和转移三个挑战。
AI.conclusion: 智能代理系统的稳健个性化依赖于捕捉用户选择背后原因的记忆，而不仅仅是选择本身。记忆增强的假设验证方法能有效解决工具调用中的信息不足问题。

title: Fisher Decorator: Refining Flow Policy via A Local Transport Map
summary: Recent advances in flow-based offline reinforcement learning (RL) have achieved strong performance by parameterizing policies via flow matching. However, they still face critical trade-offs among expressiveness, optimality, and efficiency. In particular, existing flow policies interpret the $L_2$ regularization as an upper bound of the 2-Wasserstein distance ($W_2$), which can be problematic in offline settings. This issue stems from a fundamental geometric mismatch: the behavioral policy manifold is inherently anisotropic, whereas the $L_2$ (or upper bound of $W_2$) regularization is isotropic and density-insensitive, leading to systematically misaligned optimization directions. To address this, we revisit offline RL from a geometric perspective and show that policy refinement can be formulated as a local transport map: an initial flow policy augmented by a residual displacement. By analyzing the induced density transformation, we derive a local quadratic approximation of the KL-constrained objective governed by the Fisher information matrix, enabling a tractable anisotropic optimization formulation. By leveraging the score function embedded in the flow velocity, we obtain a corresponding quadratic constraint for efficient optimization. Our results reveal that the optimality gap in prior methods arises from their isotropic approximation. In contrast, our framework achieves a controllable approximation error within a provable neighborhood of the optimal solution. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across diverse offline RL benchmarks. See project page: https://github.com/ARC0127/Fisher-Decorator.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fisher-Decorator框架，通过几何视角重新审视离线强化学习，将策略优化建模为局部传输映射，利用Fisher信息矩阵实现各向异性优化，解决了现有流策略中L2正则化与Wasserstein距离不匹配的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于流的离线强化学习方法虽然性能强大，但面临表达能力、最优性和效率之间的权衡。特别是，现有方法将L2正则化解释为2-Wasserstein距离的上界，这在离线设置中存在问题。问题的根源在于几何不匹配：行为策略流形本质上是各向异性的，而L2正则化（或W2上界）是各向同性和密度不敏感的，导致优化方向系统性错位。
AI.method: 从几何角度重新审视离线RL，将策略优化表述为局部传输映射：初始流策略加上残差位移。通过分析诱导的密度变换，推导出由Fisher信息矩阵控制的KL约束目标的局部二次近似，实现了可处理的各向异性优化公式。利用流速度中嵌入的得分函数，获得相应的二次约束以进行高效优化。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，先前方法的最优性差距源于它们的各向同性近似。相比之下，本文框架在最优解的可证明邻域内实现了可控的近似误差。在多样化的离线RL基准测试中展示了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何视角重新表述离线RL问题，提出了一种基于Fisher信息矩阵的各向异性优化框架，有效解决了现有流策略中正则化不匹配的问题，在理论上和实验上都取得了显著改进。

title: Generalizable Face Forgery Detection via Separable Prompt Learning
summary: Detecting face forgeries using CLIP has recently emerged as a promising and increasingly popular research direction. Owing to its rich visual knowledge acquired through large-scale pretraining, most existing methods typically rely on the visual encoder of CLIP, while paying limited attention to the text modality. Given the instructive nature of the text modality, we posit that it can be leveraged to instruct Deepfake detection with meticulous design. Accordingly, we shift the focus from the visual modality to the text modality and propose a new Separable Prompt Learning strategy (SePL) that enables CLIP to serve as an effective face forgery detector. The core idea of SePL is to disentangle forgery-specific and forgery-irrelevant information in images via two types of prompt learning, with the former enhancing detection. To achieve this disentangle, we describe a cross-modality alignment strategy and a set of dedicated objectives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that, with this simple adaptation, our method achieves competitive and even superior performance compared to other methods under both cross-dataset and cross-method evaluation, highlighting its strong generalizability. The codes have been released at https://github.com/OUC-YER/SePL-DeepfakeDetection

AI.tldr: 提出SePL方法，通过可分离提示学习策略，利用CLIP的文本模态指导深度伪造检测，实现跨数据集和跨方法评估的优越性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CLIP的深度伪造检测方法主要依赖视觉编码器，对文本模态关注有限。考虑到文本模态的指导性，作者认为可以通过精心设计利用文本模态来指导深度伪造检测。
AI.method: 提出可分离提示学习策略(SePL)，通过两种类型的提示学习来解耦图像中的伪造相关信息和伪造无关信息。采用跨模态对齐策略和专门设计的损失函数来实现这种解耦。
AI.result: 在跨数据集和跨方法评估中，该方法取得了竞争性甚至优于其他方法的性能，显示出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过简单的适应，CLIP可以作为有效的面部伪造检测器，文本模态在深度伪造检测中具有重要指导价值。

title: Automatic Slide Updating with User-Defined Dynamic Templates and Natural Language Instructions
comment: To appear in Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026)
summary: Presentation slides are a primary medium for data-driven reporting, yet keeping complex, analytics-style decks up to date remains labor-intensive. Existing automation methods mostly follow fixed template filling and cannot support dynamic updates for diverse, user-authored slide decks. We therefore define "Dynamic Slide Update via Natural Language Instructions on User-provided Templates" and introduce DynaSlide, a large-scale benchmark with 20,036 real-world instruction-execution triples (source slide, user instruction, target slide) grounded in a shared external database and built from business reporting slides under bring-your-own-template (BYO-template) conditions. To tackle this task, we propose SlideAgent, an agent-based framework that combines multimodal slide parsing, natural language instruction grounding, and tool-augmented reasoning for tables, charts, and textual conclusions. SlideAgent updates content while preserving layout and style, providing a strong reference baseline on DynaSlide. We further design end-to-end and component-level evaluation protocols that reveal key challenges and opportunities for future research. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/XiaoZhou2024/SlideAgent.

AI.tldr: DynaSlide：基于自然语言指令的动态幻灯片更新基准与SlideAgent代理框架
AI.motivation: 数据驱动的演示文稿更新工作量大，现有自动化方法局限于固定模板填充，无法支持用户自定义模板的动态更新
AI.method: 提出DynaSlide基准（20,036个真实指令-执行三元组）和SlideAgent代理框架，结合多模态幻灯片解析、自然语言指令理解和工具增强推理
AI.result: SlideAgent在保持布局和样式的同时更新内容，在DynaSlide基准上提供了强基线，并设计了端到端和组件级评估协议
AI.conclusion: 该研究为动态幻灯片更新任务提供了首个大规模基准和有效解决方案，揭示了未来研究的关键挑战和机会

title: HEALing Entropy Collapse: Enhancing Exploration in Few-Shot RLVR via Hybrid-Domain Entropy Dynamics Alignment
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Reward (RLVR) has proven effective for training reasoning-oriented large language models, but existing methods largely assume high-resource settings with abundant training data. In low-resource scenarios, RLVR is prone to more severe entropy collapse, which substantially limits exploration and degrades reasoning performance. To address this issue, we propose Hybrid-domain Entropy dynamics ALignment (HEAL), a framework tailored for few-shot RLVR. HEAL first selectively incorporates high-value general-domain data to promote more diverse exploration. Then, we introduce Entropy Dynamics Alignment (EDA), a reward mechanism that aligns trajectory-level entropy dynamics between the target and general domains, capturing both entropy magnitude and fine-grained variation. Through this alignment, EDA not only further mitigates entropy collapse but also encourages the policy to acquire more diverse exploration behaviors from the general domain. Experiments across multiple domains show that HEAL consistently improves few-shot RLVR performance. Notably, using only 32 target-domain samples, HEAL matches or even surpasses full-shot RLVR trained with 1K target-domain samples.

AI.tldr: HEAL框架通过引入高价值通用领域数据和熵动态对齐机制，解决低资源场景下RLVR的熵崩溃问题，显著提升少样本推理性能
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法假设高资源环境，但在低资源场景下容易发生严重的熵崩溃，限制了探索能力并降低了推理性能
AI.method: 提出HEAL框架：1）选择性引入高价值通用领域数据促进多样化探索；2）提出熵动态对齐机制，对齐目标领域和通用领域的轨迹级熵动态，捕捉熵大小和细粒度变化
AI.result: 在多个领域的实验表明，HEAL持续提升少样本RLVR性能。仅使用32个目标领域样本，HEAL就能匹配甚至超越使用1K目标领域样本的全样本RLVR
AI.conclusion: HEAL通过混合领域熵动态对齐有效缓解了低资源RLVR中的熵崩溃问题，为少样本强化学习推理提供了有效解决方案

title: When Background Matters: Breaking Medical Vision Language Models by Transferable Attack
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly used in clinical diagnostics, yet their robustness to adversarial attacks remains largely unexplored, posing serious risks. Existing medical attacks focus on secondary objectives such as model stealing or adversarial fine-tuning, while transferable attacks from natural images introduce visible distortions that clinicians can easily detect. To address this, we propose MedFocusLeak, a highly transferable black-box multimodal attack that induces incorrect yet clinically plausible diagnoses while keeping perturbations imperceptible. The method injects coordinated perturbations into non-diagnostic background regions and employs an attention distraction mechanism to shift the model's focus away from pathological areas. Extensive evaluations across six medical imaging modalities show that MedFocusLeak achieves state-of-the-art performance, generating misleading yet realistic diagnostic outputs across diverse VLMs. We further introduce a unified evaluation framework with novel metrics that jointly capture attack success and image fidelity, revealing a critical weakness in the reasoning capabilities of modern clinical VLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出MedFocusLeak攻击方法，针对临床视觉语言模型生成不可察觉但具有临床误导性的对抗样本，揭示医疗AI安全漏洞
AI.motivation: 当前医疗视觉语言模型对抗攻击研究不足，现有方法要么目标次要（如模型窃取），要么产生明显失真易被医生发现，缺乏既能保持图像质量又能诱导错误诊断的有效攻击方法
AI.method: MedFocusLeak方法：1）在非诊断背景区域注入协调扰动；2）采用注意力分散机制将模型焦点从病理区域转移；3）黑盒多模态攻击框架，保持高可迁移性
AI.result: 在六种医学影像模态上评估，MedFocusLeak达到SOTA性能，能生成误导但真实的诊断输出；提出统一评估框架和新指标，揭示现代临床VLM推理能力的关键弱点
AI.conclusion: 医疗AI系统存在严重安全风险，MedFocusLeak攻击方法有效暴露了临床视觉语言模型的脆弱性，强调需要加强医疗AI的鲁棒性和安全性研究

authors: H S V N S Kowndinya Renduchintala
title: Heterogeneity in Formal Linguistic Competence of Language Models: Is Data the Real Bottleneck?
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit a puzzling disparity in their formal linguistic competence: while they learn some linguistic phenomena with near-perfect mastery, they often perform below chance on others, even after training on trillions of tokens. In this work, we investigate whether these failures stem from inherent architectural limitations or simply the scarcity of these specific grammatical constructions in web-scale corpora. We pre-train simple GPT-2 Small (124M) models on a 100M-token random sample of the FineWeb corpus and intervene by injecting a minimal amount (1%) of synthetic data targeting specific linguistic phenomena. We find that this targeted intervention substantially improves model performance in 8 out of the 9 worst-performing BLiMP paradigms - notably the accuracy on a specific paradigm, only_npi_scope, surges from 20.9% to 69.4%. Furthermore, we observe that these interventions generally preserve or slightly improve aggregate performance. However, while we also identify a resistant phenomenon, principle_A_c_command, whose performance remains below chance even after our data augmentation, our findings do serve as an optimistic existence proof that even small language models can substantially improve on those linguistic phenomena on which models typically perform poorly, provided the pre-training data contains sufficient exposure to them. This suggests that efforts towards human-scale language modeling may benefit greatly by focusing on data composition. The code to reproduce our results is open-sourced at https://github.com/kowndinya-renduchintala/heterogeneity-in-formal-linguistic-competence.

AI.tldr: 通过向预训练数据中注入少量（1%）针对特定语言现象的合成数据，可以显著改善小型语言模型在多数BLiMP测试范式上的表现，表明数据组成而非架构限制是模型语言能力差异的主要原因。
AI.motivation: 探究大型语言模型在形式语言能力上表现差异的原因：某些语言现象掌握近乎完美，而另一些即使经过万亿token训练仍表现不佳。研究这种失败是源于固有的架构限制，还是这些特定语法结构在网页规模语料库中的稀缺性。
AI.method: 在FineWeb语料库的1亿token随机样本上预训练GPT-2 Small（124M）模型，并通过注入少量（1%）针对特定语言现象的合成数据进行干预，评估模型在BLiMP测试集上的表现变化。
AI.result: 目标干预显著改善了9个最差BLiMP范式中的8个表现，其中only_npi_scope范式准确率从20.9%提升至69.4%。干预总体上保持或略微改善了聚合性能。但发现principle_A_c_command现象具有抵抗性，即使数据增强后表现仍低于随机水平。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明即使是小型语言模型也能在通常表现不佳的语言现象上大幅改进，前提是预训练数据包含足够的暴露。这表明人类规模的语言建模可能通过关注数据组成而大大受益，数据稀缺而非架构限制是模型语言能力差异的主要原因。

title: How Much Cache Does Reasoning Need? Depth-Cache Tradeoffs in KV-Compressed Transformers
summary:
The key-value (KV) cache is the dominant memory bottleneck during Transformer inference, yet little is known theoretically about how aggressively it can be compressed before multi-step reasoning degrades. We study this through $k$-hop pointer chasing on $n$ tokens under a shared KV cache of size $s$, attention dimension $m$, $H$ heads, $p$-bit precision, and a locality-respecting cache controller (satisfied by all standard KV-compression methods). We give three results.
  (1) Product depth lower bound (conjectured). We conjecture that any such Transformer ($n \geq 4k$, $s \leq \sqrt{n}/4$) requires depth $L = Ω(\lceil k/s \rceil \cdot \lceil \log_2 n/(Hmp) \rceil)$, and isolate the sole remaining gap as a probabilistic step on the joint distribution of cache trace and pointer chain. Unconditionally, we prove a matching upper bound $L = O(\min(k, \lceil k/s \rceil \log s) \cdot \log n/(mp))$ via windowed pointer doubling, and a max-bound $L = Ω(\max(\lceil k/s \rceil, \log n/(Hmp)))$. Closing the conjecture amounts to upgrading max to product.
  (2) Bandwidth barrier. The product bound binds only when $Hmp \lesssim \log n$. Any lower bound provable via per-window distinguishability counting -- including reachability, bandwidth, and combinations -- cannot exceed $\lceil k/s \rceil$ once $Hmp \geq \log_2 n$. Breaking this requires lifting unconditional communication-complexity bounds for pointer chasing to Cache-Transformer depth.
  (3) Adaptive vs oblivious error scaling. Under random cache over $T = \lceil \log_2 k \rceil$ doubling stages, oblivious caches give $\Pr[\mathcal{E}] \leq (s/(n-T))^T + 2T^3/n$ (exponential in $T$), while adaptive locality-respecting caches achieve $\Pr[\mathcal{E}] = s/n$ exactly, independent of $T$. The $Ω((n/s)^{T-1})$ separation explains why heavy-hitter eviction empirically dominates random eviction for multi-hop reasoning.

AI.tldr: 研究Transformer推理中KV缓存的压缩极限，通过k-hop指针追踪分析缓存大小、注意力维度等参数对推理深度的影响，揭示了缓存压缩的理论边界和自适应缓存策略的优势。
AI.motivation: KV缓存是Transformer推理中的主要内存瓶颈，但理论上对其压缩极限了解甚少。本文旨在研究在多步推理性能下降前，KV缓存可以被压缩到何种程度。
AI.method: 通过n个token上的k-hop指针追踪，在共享KV缓存大小s、注意力维度m、H个头、p-bit精度的条件下，分析满足局部性保持的缓存控制器（所有标准KV压缩方法都满足）。提出三个理论结果：乘积深度下界猜想、带宽障碍分析、自适应与无感知错误缩放比较。
AI.result: 1) 提出乘积深度下界猜想并证明匹配上界；2) 发现当Hmp ≥ log₂n时，基于窗口可区分性计数的下界方法存在带宽障碍；3) 证明自适应局部性保持缓存比无感知缓存有指数级优势，错误概率独立于阶段数T。
AI.conclusion: KV缓存的压缩存在理论极限，自适应缓存策略在保持多步推理能力方面显著优于随机策略，这解释了为什么基于热点淘汰的缓存策略在实践中对多跳推理表现更好。

title: E2E-GMNER: End-to-End Generative Grounded Multimodal Named Entity Recognition
summary: Grounded Multimodal Named Entity Recognition (GMNER) aims to jointly identify named entity mentions in text, predict their semantic types, and ground each entity to a corresponding visual region in an associated image. Existing approaches predominantly adopt pipeline-based architectures that decouple textual entity recognition and visual grounding, leading to error accumulation and suboptimal joint optimization. In this paper, we propose E2E-GMNER, a fully end-to-end generative framework that unifies entity recognition, semantic typing, visual grounding, and implicit knowledge reasoning within a single multimodal large language model. We formulate GMNER as an instruction-tuned conditional generation task and incorporate chain-of-thought reasoning to enable the model to adaptively determine when visual evidence or background knowledge is informative, reducing reliance on noisy cues. To further address the instability of generative bounding box prediction, we introduce Gaussian Risk-Aware Box Perturbation (GRBP), which replaces hard box supervision with probabilistically perturbed soft targets to improve robustness against annotation noise and discretization errors. Extensive experiments on the Twitter-GMNER and Twitter-FMNERG benchmarks demonstrate that E2E-GMNER achieves highly competitive performance compared with state of the art methods, validating the effectiveness of unified end-to-end optimization and noise-aware grounding supervision. Code is available at:https://github.com/Finch-coder/E2E-GMNER

AI.tldr: E2E-GMNER：首个端到端生成式框架，统一文本实体识别、语义分类、视觉定位和隐式知识推理，通过链式思维推理和高斯风险感知框扰动提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有GMNER方法采用流水线架构，将文本实体识别和视觉定位解耦，导致错误累积和次优联合优化，需要更统一的端到端方法。
