AI.method: 将GMNER建模为指令调优的条件生成任务，引入链式思维推理自适应决定何时使用视觉证据或背景知识；提出高斯风险感知框扰动（GRBP）替代硬框监督，使用概率扰动软目标提升对标注噪声和离散化误差的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在Twitter-GMNER和Twitter-FMNERG基准测试中，E2E-GMNER达到与最先进方法相当的性能，验证了统一端到端优化和噪声感知定位监督的有效性。
AI.conclusion: E2E-GMNER通过端到端生成式框架成功统一了GMNER的多个子任务，链式思维推理和GRBP机制显著提升了模型性能和对噪声的鲁棒性，为多模态实体识别提供了新范式。

title: Domain-oriented RAG Assessment (DoRA): Synthetic Benchmarking for RAG-based Question Answering on Defense Documents
summary: Open-domain RAG benchmarks over public corpora can overestimate deployment performance due to pretraining overlap and weak attribution requirements. We present DoRA (Domain-oriented RAG Assessment), a domain-grounded benchmark built from defense documents that pairs synthetic, intent-conditioned QA (question answering) with auditable evidence passages for attribution. DoRA covers five question types (find, explain, summarize, generate, provide) and contains 6.5K curated instances. In end-to-end evaluation with a fixed dense retriever, general-purpose Language Models (LMs) perform similarly, while a model trained on DoRA (DoRA SFT) yields large gains over the base model (Llama3.1-8B-Instruct): up to 26% improvement in QA task success, while reducing the hallucination rate by 47% in RAG faithfulness scores, supporting contamination-aware regression testing under domain shift.

AI.tldr: DoRA是一个面向特定领域的RAG评估基准，基于国防文档构建，包含6.5K个合成QA实例，用于评估RAG系统在领域转移下的性能，支持污染感知的回归测试。
AI.motivation: 现有开放域RAG基准存在两个问题：1) 预训练数据重叠导致性能高估；2) 归因要求较弱。需要构建领域特定的基准来更准确评估RAG系统在实际部署中的性能。
AI.method: 从国防文档构建DoRA基准，包含合成、意图驱动的QA对和可审计的证据段落用于归因。涵盖五种问题类型：查找、解释、总结、生成、提供。包含6.5K个精心策划的实例。
AI.result: 在固定密集检索器的端到端评估中，通用语言模型表现相似，而基于DoRA微调的模型(DoRA SFT)相比基础模型(Llama3.1-8B-Instruct)有显著提升：QA任务成功率提高达26%，RAG忠实度分数中的幻觉率降低47%。
AI.conclusion: DoRA基准支持在领域转移下进行污染感知的回归测试，展示了领域特定微调对RAG系统性能的重要提升，特别是在减少幻觉和提高任务成功率方面。

title: Federated Rule Ensemble Method in Medical Data
summary: Machine learning has become integral to medical research and is increasingly applied in clinical settings to support diagnosis and decision-making; however, its effectiveness depends on access to large, diverse datasets, which are limited within single institutions. Although integrating data across institutions can address this limitation, privacy regulations and data ownership constraints hinder these efforts. Federated learning enables collaborative model training without sharing raw data; however, most methods rely on complex architectures that lack interpretability, limiting clinical applicability. Therefore, we proposed a federated RuleFit framework to construct a unified and interpretable global model for distributed environments. It integrates three components: preprocessing based on differentially private histograms to estimate shared cutoff values, enabling consistent rule definitions and reducing heterogeneity across clients; local rule generation using gradient boosting decision trees with shared cutoffs; and coefficient estimation via $\ell_1$-regularized optimization using a Federated Dual Averaging algorithm for sparse and consistent variable selection. In simulation studies, the proposed method achieved a performance comparable to that of centralized RuleFit while outperforming existing federated approaches. Real-world analysis demonstrated its ability to provide interpretable insights with competitive predictive accuracy. Therefore, the proposed framework offers a practical and effective solution for interpretable and reliable modeling in federated learning environments.

AI.tldr: 提出联邦RuleFit框架，在分布式环境中构建统一且可解释的全局模型，通过差分隐私直方图预处理、本地规则生成和联邦双平均算法实现隐私保护下的可解释建模。
AI.motivation: 机器学习在医疗领域应用广泛，但需要大量多样化数据，而单个机构数据有限。跨机构数据整合受隐私法规限制。现有联邦学习方法缺乏可解释性，限制了临床应用。
AI.method: 1) 基于差分隐私直方图的预处理，估计共享截断值以确保规则定义一致性；2) 使用共享截断值的梯度提升决策树进行本地规则生成；3) 通过ℓ1正则化优化和联邦双平均算法进行系数估计，实现稀疏和一致的变量选择。
AI.result: 模拟研究中，该方法性能与集中式RuleFit相当，优于现有联邦学习方法。真实世界分析显示其能提供可解释的洞察力，同时保持有竞争力的预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为联邦学习环境中的可解释和可靠建模提供了实用有效的解决方案，平衡了隐私保护、模型性能和可解释性。

title: Towards Joint Quantization and Token Pruning of Vision-Language Models
summary: Deploying Vision-Language Models (VLMs) under aggressive low-bit inference remains challenging because inference cost is dominated by the long visual-token prefix during prefill and the growing KV cache during autoregressive decoding. Token pruning and low-bit quantization are complementary for reducing these costs, yet naive stage-wise combinations are often brittle due to a mismatch between quantization calibration and pruning execution. We present a collaborative quantization-and-pruning framework that unifies low-bit inference and deterministic visual-token pruning in a single deployable pipeline. The framework introduces the \textbf{Q}uantization \textbf{U}nified \textbf{O}ffline \textbf{T}oken \textbf{A}llocator (\textbf{QUOTA}), which converts low-bit calibration signals into a layer-wise token allocation schedule and materializes it as a pruning recipe. Token importance is evaluated under deployed W4A4 operators with a quantized KV cache by combining activation magnitude, attention cues, and an explicit low-bit risk signal, enabling consistent budgeted top-$k$ selection. Experiments on standard VLM benchmarks show improved robustness over stage-wise baselines under the same low-bit regime, achieving 95.65\% average retention while retaining only 30\% of visual tokens, compared with about 94.3\% retention for representative stage-wise combinations. The code will be released.

AI.tldr: 提出QUOTA框架，通过量化统一离线令牌分配器，将低比特量化信号转化为层级的令牌分配计划，实现视觉令牌剪枝与低比特推理的协同优化，在保留30%视觉令牌时达到95.65%性能保持率。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在低比特推理部署时面临挑战：推理成本主要由视觉令牌前缀和增长的KV缓存主导。现有的令牌剪枝和低比特量化方法简单组合效果不佳，因为量化校准与剪枝执行之间存在不匹配。
AI.method: 提出协作量化-剪枝框架，统一低比特推理和确定性视觉令牌剪枝。核心是QUOTA（量化统一离线令牌分配器），将低比特校准信号转化为层级的令牌分配计划，并实现为剪枝方案。令牌重要性评估结合激活幅度、注意力线索和显式低比特风险信号。
AI.result: 在标准VLM基准测试中，相比约94.3%保持率的阶段式组合方法，在保留30%视觉令牌时达到95.65%的平均性能保持率，在相同低比特机制下表现出更好的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: QUOTA框架通过统一量化校准和令牌剪枝，有效解决了视觉语言模型在低比特推理部署中的效率问题，实现了更好的性能保持和计算效率平衡。

title: ReCoQA: A Benchmark for Tool-Augmented and Multi-Step Reasoning in Real Estate Question and Answering
summary: Developing agents capable of navigating fragmented, multi-source information remains challenging, primarily due to the scarcity of benchmarks reflecting hybrid workflows combining database querying with external APIs. To bridge this gap, we introduce ReCoQA, a large-scale benchmark of 29,270 real-estate instances featuring machine-verifiable supervision for intermediate steps, including structured intent labels, SQL queries, and API calls. Complementarily, we propose HIRE-Agent, a hierarchical framework instantiating an understand-plan-execute architecture as a strong baseline. By orchestrating a Front-end parser, a planning Supervisor, and execution Specialists, HIRE-Agent effectively integrates heterogeneous evidence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HIRE-Agent constitutes a strong baseline and substantiates the necessity of hierarchical collaboration for complex, real-world reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了ReCoQA基准测试和HIRE-Agent分层框架，用于解决多源信息整合的复杂推理任务
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试缺乏反映混合工作流（数据库查询+外部API）的评估，难以开发能够处理碎片化多源信息的智能体
AI.method: 1) 构建ReCoQA基准测试（29,270个房地产实例），包含可机器验证的中间步骤监督；2) 提出HIRE-Agent分层框架，采用理解-规划-执行架构，包含前端解析器、规划监督器和执行专家
AI.result: HIRE-Agent在ReCoQA基准上表现出色，成为强有力的基线模型，验证了分层协作对复杂现实世界推理任务的必要性
AI.conclusion: ReCoQA基准填补了混合工作流评估的空白，HIRE-Agent的分层框架为复杂多源信息整合任务提供了有效解决方案，证明了分层协作在现实世界推理中的重要性

title: Online Conformal Prediction with Adversarial Semi-bandit Feedback via Regret Minimization
summary: Uncertainty quantification is crucial in safety-critical systems, where decisions must be made under uncertainty. In particular, we consider the problem of online uncertainty quantification, where data points arrive sequentially. Online conformal prediction is a principled online uncertainty quantification method that dynamically constructs a prediction set at each time step. While existing methods for online conformal prediction provide long-run coverage guarantees without any distributional assumptions, they typically assume a full feedback setting in which the true label is always observed. In this paper, we propose a novel learning method for online conformal prediction with partial feedback from an adaptive adversary-a more challenging setup where the true label is revealed only when it lies inside the constructed prediction set. Specifically, we formulate online conformal prediction as an adversarial bandit problem by treating each candidate prediction set as an arm. Building on an existing algorithm for adversarial bandits, our method achieves a long-run coverage guarantee by explicitly establishing its connection to the regret of the learner. Finally, we empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in both independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) and non-i.i.d. settings, showing that it successfully controls the miscoverage rate while maintaining a reasonable size of the prediction set.

AI.tldr: 提出一种在线共形预测的偏反馈学习方法，将在线不确定性量化建模为对抗性赌博机问题，在自适应对手的偏反馈设置下实现长期覆盖保证
AI.motivation: 现有在线共形预测方法通常假设完全反馈设置（真实标签总是可观测），但在实际安全关键系统中，真实标签仅在预测集内时才被揭示，需要处理更困难的偏反馈设置
AI.method: 将在线共形预测建模为对抗性赌博机问题，将每个候选预测集视为一个臂，基于现有对抗性赌博机算法构建方法，通过建立与学习者遗憾的显式连接实现长期覆盖保证
AI.result: 在独立同分布和非独立同分布设置下实证验证了方法的有效性，成功控制了误覆盖率，同时保持了合理的预测集大小
AI.conclusion: 该方法为安全关键系统中的在线不确定性量化提供了有效的偏反馈解决方案，扩展了在线共形预测的应用范围

title: R-FLoRA: Residual-Statistic-Gated Low-Rank Adaptation for Single-Image Face Morphing Attack Detection
comment: Pre-Print; Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (TIFS), 2026
summary: Face morphing attacks pose a substantial risk to the reliability of face recognition systems used in passport issuance, border control, and digital identity verification. Detecting morphing attacks from a single facial image remains challenging owing to the lack of a trusted reference and the diversity of attack generation methods. This paper presents a new Single-Image Face Morphing Attack Detection (S-MAD) framework that integrates high-frequency Laplacian residual statistics with representations from a frozen, foundation-scale vision transformer. The approach employs residual-statistic-gated low-rank adapters (R-FLoRA) and feature-wise residual fusion (Res-FiLM) to enhance sensitivity to local morphing artefacts while preserving the semantic context of the backbone. A novel residual-contrastive alignment loss further regularises the fused token space, improving discrimination under unseen morphing conditions. Comprehensive experiments on four ICAO-compliant datasets, encompassing seven morph generation techniques, demonstrate that the proposed method consistently surpasses nine recent state-of-the-art S-MAD algorithms in detection accuracy and cross-domain (or dataset) generalisation. With a frozen backbone and minimal trainable parameters, the model achieves real-time efficiency and interpretability, making it suitable for real-life scenarios in biometric verification systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的单图像人脸融合攻击检测框架，结合高频拉普拉斯残差统计与冻结基础视觉变换器，通过R-FLoRA和Res-FiLM增强对局部融合伪影的敏感性，在多个数据集上超越现有S-MAD方法。
AI.motivation: 人脸融合攻击对护照签发、边境控制和数字身份验证中的人脸识别系统构成重大风险。由于缺乏可信参考和攻击生成方法的多样性，从单张人脸图像检测融合攻击仍然具有挑战性。
AI.method: 提出S-MAD框架，整合高频拉普拉斯残差统计与冻结基础视觉变换器表示。采用残差统计门控低秩适配器(R-FLoRA)和特征级残差融合(Res-FiLM)增强对局部融合伪影的敏感性，同时保留骨干网络的语义上下文。使用新颖的残差对比对齐损失正则化融合标记空间。
AI.result: 在四个ICAO兼容数据集上（涵盖七种融合生成技术）的全面实验表明，该方法在检测精度和跨域泛化能力上持续超越九种最新S-MAD算法。冻结骨干网络和最小可训练参数使模型实现实时效率和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合高频残差统计与冻结基础视觉变换器，有效解决了单图像人脸融合攻击检测的挑战，具有高精度、强泛化能力和实时效率，适用于生物特征验证系统的实际应用场景。

title: Process Reward Models Meet Planning: Generating Precise and Scalable Datasets for Step-Level Rewards
summary: Process Reward Models (PRMs) have emerged as a powerful tool for providing step-level feedback when evaluating the reasoning of Large Language Models (LLMs), which frequently produce chains of thought (CoTs) containing errors even when the final answer is correct. However, existing PRM datasets remain expensive to construct, prone to annotation errors, and predominantly limited to the mathematical domain. This work introduces a novel and scalable approach to PRM dataset generation based on planning logical problems expressed in the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL). Using this method, we generate a corpus of approximately one million reasoning steps across various PDDL domains and use it to train PRMs. Experimental results show that augmenting widely-used PRM training datasets with PDDL-derived data yields substantial improvements in both mathematical and non-mathematical reasoning, as demonstrated across multiple benchmarks. These findings indicate that planning problems constitute a scalable and effective resource for generating robust, precise, and fine-grained training data for PRMs, going beyond the classical mathematical sources that dominate this field.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于PDDL规划问题生成PRM训练数据的新方法，解决了现有PRM数据集构建成本高、易出错且局限于数学领域的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有过程奖励模型(PRMs)数据集存在三个主要问题：1) 构建成本高昂；2) 容易产生标注错误；3) 主要局限于数学领域。这些问题限制了PRMs在更广泛推理任务中的应用。
AI.method: 提出基于规划领域定义语言(PDDL)的PRM数据集生成方法。通过PDDL表达规划逻辑问题，生成约100万个推理步骤的数据集，涵盖多个PDDL领域，用于训练PRMs。
AI.result: 实验表明，在广泛使用的PRM训练数据集中加入PDDL生成的数据，在数学和非数学推理的多个基准测试中都取得了显著改进。
AI.conclusion: 规划问题为PRMs提供了可扩展、有效且细粒度的训练数据来源，超越了传统数学领域的主导地位，能够生成更稳健、精确的PRM训练数据。

title: Causally-Constrained Probabilistic Forecasting for Time-Series Anomaly Detection
comment: This work is currently under review for possible publication in the IEEE Access journal. All intellectual property rights are retained by IEEE
summary: Anomaly detection in multivariate time series is a central challenge in industrial monitoring, as failures frequently arise from complex temporal dynamics and cross-sensor interactions. While recent deep learning models, including graph neural networks and Transformers, have demonstrated strong empirical performance, most approaches remain primarily correlational and offer limited support for causal interpretation and root-cause localization. This study introduces a causally-constrained probabilistic forecasting framework which is a Causally Guided Transformer (CGT) model for multivariate time-series anomaly detection, integrating an explicit time-lagged causal graph prior with deep sequence modeling. For each target variable, a dedicated forecasting block employs a hard parent mask derived from causal discovery to restrict the main prediction pathway to graph-supported causes, while a latent Gaussian head captures predictive uncertainty. To leverage residual correlational information without compromising the causal representation, a shadow auxiliary path with stop-gradient isolation and a safety-gated blending mechanism is incorporated to suppress non-causal contributions when reliability is low. Anomalies are identified using negative log-likelihood scores with adaptive streaming thresholding, and root-cause variables are determined through per-dimension probabilistic attribution and counterfactual clamping. Experiments on the ASD and SMD benchmarks indicate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art detection performance, with F1-scores of 96.19% on ASD and 95.32% on SMD, and enhances variable-level attribution quality. These findings suggest that causal structural priors can improve both robustness and interpretability in detecting deep anomalies in multivariate sensor systems.

AI.tldr: 提出CGT模型，将因果图先验与Transformer结合进行多元时间序列异常检测，在ASD和SMD基准上达到SOTA性能，同时提升可解释性和根因定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法（如图神经网络和Transformer）在多元时间序列异常检测中表现出色，但大多基于相关性而非因果关系，缺乏因果解释和根因定位能力。工业监控需要能够理解复杂时间动态和传感器交互的因果机制。
AI.method: 提出因果引导Transformer（CGT）框架：1）使用时滞因果图先验指导预测；2）为每个目标变量设置专用预测块，使用硬父节点掩码限制预测路径；3）引入潜在高斯头捕捉预测不确定性；4）添加影子辅助路径和安全门控混合机制利用相关性信息；5）使用负对数似然评分和自适应流式阈值检测异常；6）通过维度级概率归因和反事实钳位确定根因变量。
AI.result: 在ASD和SMD基准测试中达到最先进性能：ASD上F1分数96.19%，SMD上95.32%。同时提升了变量级归因质量，证明因果结构先验能增强鲁棒性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 因果结构先验能够同时提升多元传感器系统中深度异常检测的鲁棒性和可解释性。CGT框架成功整合了因果发现与深度序列建模，为工业监控提供了更可靠的异常检测和根因定位解决方案。

title: Robust Diabetic Retinopathy Grading Using Dual-Resolution Attention-Based Deep Learning with Ordinal Regression
summary: Diabetic retinopathy (DR) is a leading cause of vision impairment worldwide, and automated grading systems play a crucial role in large-scale screening programs. However, deep learning models often exhibit degraded performance when deployed across datasets acquired under different imaging conditions. This study presents a robust dual-resolution deep learning framework for DR grading that integrates attention-based feature fusion with ordinal regression to improve cross-dataset generalization. The proposed method employs two parallel EfficientNet backbones operating at different spatial resolutions to capture complementary retinal features. A learnable attention mechanism adaptively fuses multi-resolution representations, while an ordinal regression formulation based on the cumulative link model (CORAL) explicitly accounts for the ordered nature of DR severity levels. To mitigate domain discrepancies between datasets, a preprocessing strategy combining circular cropping, contrast enhancement, and histogram matching is applied. The model was trained on the APTOS 2019 dataset and evaluated on both an internal validation split and an external Messidor-2 test set. Experimental results demonstrate strong grading performance, achieving a quadratic weighted kappa (QWK) of 0.88 on the APTOS validation set and 0.68 on the unseen Messidor-2 dataset, indicating improved robustness for cross-dataset DR grading applications.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于糖尿病视网膜病变分级的双分辨率深度学习框架，结合注意力特征融合和有序回归，提升跨数据集泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变是全球视力损害的主要原因，但深度学习模型在不同成像条件下的数据集间部署时性能会下降，需要提高跨数据集泛化能力。
AI.method: 使用两个并行EfficientNet主干网络在不同空间分辨率下提取互补特征，通过可学习注意力机制自适应融合多分辨率表示，采用基于累积链接模型的有序回归处理DR严重程度的顺序特性，并应用预处理策略减少域差异。
AI.result: 在APTOS 2019验证集上获得0.88的二次加权kappa，在未见过的Messidor-2数据集上获得0.68的二次加权kappa，表明跨数据集DR分级应用具有改进的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的双分辨率深度学习框架结合注意力特征融合和有序回归，能够有效提高糖尿病视网膜病变分级的跨数据集泛化能力，为大规模筛查项目提供更可靠的自动化工具。

title: Modeling Multiple Support Strategies within a Single Turn for Emotional Support Conversations
summary: Emotional Support Conversation (ESC) aims to assist individuals experiencing distress by generating empathetic and supportive dialogue. While prior work typically assumes that each supporter turn corresponds to a single strategy, real-world supportive communication often involves multiple strategies within a single utterance. In this paper, we revisit the ESC task by formulating it as multi-strategy utterance generation, where each utterance may contain one or more strategy-response pairs. We propose two generation methods: All-in-One, which predicts all strategy-response pairs in a single decoding step, and One-by-One, which iteratively generates strategy-response pairs until completion. Both methods are further enhanced with cognitive reasoning guided by reinforcement learning to improve strategy selection and response composition. We evaluate our models on the ESConv dataset under both utterance-level and dialogue-level settings. Experimental results show that our methods effectively model multi-strategy utterances and lead to improved supportive quality and dialogue success. To our knowledge, this work provides the first systematic empirical evidence that allowing multiple support strategies within a single utterance is both feasible and beneficial for emotional support conversations. All code and data will be publicly available at https://github.com/aliyun/qwen-dianjin.

AI.tldr: 该论文重新定义情感支持对话任务为多策略话语生成，提出两种生成方法（All-in-One和One-by-One），并通过强化学习增强认知推理，在ESConv数据集上验证了多策略话语的可行性和有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有情感支持对话研究通常假设每个支持者话语对应单一策略，但现实中的支持性交流往往在单个话语中包含多个策略。需要重新审视ESC任务，将其建模为多策略话语生成问题。
AI.method: 提出两种生成方法：1) All-in-One：在单个解码步骤中预测所有策略-响应对；2) One-by-One：迭代生成策略-响应对直到完成。两种方法都通过强化学习增强认知推理，改进策略选择和响应组合。
AI.result: 在ESConv数据集上的实验表明，所提方法能有效建模多策略话语，提高了支持质量和对话成功率。这是首个系统性的实证证据，证明在单个话语中允许多个支持策略对情感支持对话既可行又有益。
AI.conclusion: 多策略话语生成是情感支持对话的有效方法，所提框架为ESC任务提供了新的建模视角，能生成更自然、有效的支持性对话。所有代码和数据将公开。

title: Neural Garbage Collection: Learning to Forget while Learning to Reason
summary: Chain-of-thought reasoning has driven striking advances in language model capability, yet every reasoning step grows the KV cache, creating a bottleneck to scaling this paradigm further. Current approaches manage these constraints on the model's behalf using hand-designed criteria. A more scalable approach would let end-to-end learning subsume this design choice entirely, following a broader pattern in deep learning. After all, if a model can learn to reason, why can't it learn to forget? We introduce Neural Garbage Collection (NGC), in which a language model learns to forget while learning to reason, trained end-to-end from outcome-based task reward alone. As the model reasons, it periodically pauses, decides which KV cache entries to evict, and continues to reason conditioned on the remaining cache. By treating tokens in a chain-of-thought and cache-eviction decisions as discrete actions sampled from the language model, we can use reinforcement learning to jointly optimize how the model reasons and how it manages its own memory: what the model evicts shapes what it remembers, what it remembers shapes its reasoning, and the correctness of that reasoning determines its reward. Crucially, the model learns this behavior entirely from a single learning signal - the outcome-based task reward - without supervised fine-tuning or proxy objectives. On Countdown, AMC, and AIME tasks, NGC maintains strong accuracy relative to the full-cache upper bound at 2-3x peak KV cache size compression and substantially outperforms eviction baselines. Our results are a first step towards a broader vision where end-to-end optimization drives both capability and efficiency in language models.

AI.tldr: 提出Neural Garbage Collection (NGC)，让语言模型在推理过程中学习自主管理KV缓存，通过强化学习端到端优化推理和内存管理，实现2-3倍缓存压缩同时保持高准确率。
AI.motivation: 思维链推理显著提升了语言模型能力，但每一步推理都会增加KV缓存，成为扩展该范式的瓶颈。现有方法使用手工设计的标准管理缓存，不够可扩展。作者认为如果模型能学习推理，也应该能学习遗忘，从而让端到端学习完全接管这一设计选择。
AI.method: 提出Neural Garbage Collection (NGC)：语言模型在推理过程中学习遗忘，从基于结果的奖励中端到端训练。模型在推理过程中定期暂停，决定哪些KV缓存条目需要清除，然后基于剩余缓存继续推理。将思维链中的token和缓存清除决策视为从语言模型采样的离散动作，使用强化学习联合优化模型的推理方式和内存管理。
AI.result: 在Countdown、AMC和AIME任务上，NGC在2-3倍峰值KV缓存压缩的情况下，相对于完整缓存的上界保持了较高的准确率，显著优于各种清除基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 这是迈向更广泛愿景的第一步：通过端到端优化同时驱动语言模型的能力和效率。模型仅从单一学习信号（基于结果的奖励）学习这种行为，无需监督微调或代理目标。

title: When Text Hijacks Vision: Benchmarking and Mitigating Text Overlay-Induced Hallucination in Vision Language Models
summary: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have substantially enhanced their ability across multimodal video understanding benchmarks spanning temporal, action, object, and spatial understanding. However, we identify a critical yet overlooked issue: when embedded on-screen text contradicts the visual scene, existing VLMs systematically hallucinate, prioritizing overlay textual semantics over the actual visual content. We define this phenomenon as Text Overlay-Induced Hallucination (TOIH). In this work, we propose VisualTextTrap, the first comprehensive benchmark, including large-scale human-validated samples with specifically designed evaluation metrics. In particular, we construct VisualTextTrap from widely-used public datasets using a scalable hybrid pipeline of VLMs assisted text generation and rigorous manual verification. The benchmark features 6,057 samples annotated across 88 fine-grained attributes within four dimensions, with hallucination intensity quantified on a five-level scale (L1--L5) that reflects the semantic contradiction between overlay text and visual reality. Moreover, we propose Visual Text Hallucination Mitigation Mixture-of-Experts (VTHM-MoE), a novel Vision-Text Disentanglement framework that employs a dual-encoder architecture. Concretely, four dimension-specialized expert modules spanning Temporal, Action, Object, and Spatial reasoning are first pre-trained to identify and leverage cross-modal discrepancies between textual semantics and actual video content. We develop an Adaptive Token Routing Strategy to enable dynamic expert allocation, conferring robust resistance to TOIH while preserving performance on uncontaminated videos. Extensive experiments conducted on our VisualTextTrap benchmark verify the effectiveness of VTHM-MoE, outperforming state-of-the-art counterparts with diverse video question answering tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VisualTextTrap基准测试和VTHM-MoE框架，用于解决视觉语言模型中文本覆盖导致的幻觉问题，通过双编码器架构和专家模块来缓解文本覆盖诱导的幻觉。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在视频理解方面取得进展，但当屏幕上文本与视觉场景矛盾时，模型会系统性地产生幻觉，优先考虑覆盖文本语义而非实际视觉内容。这种文本覆盖诱导的幻觉（TOIH）问题尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 提出VisualTextTrap基准测试，包含6,057个人工验证样本，覆盖88个细粒度属性和五个幻觉强度等级。同时提出VTHM-MoE框架，采用双编码器架构和四个维度专家模块（时序、动作、对象、空间），通过自适应令牌路由策略动态分配专家。
AI.result: 在VisualTextTrap基准测试上的广泛实验验证了VTHM-MoE的有效性，在多种视频问答任务中优于现有最先进方法，能够有效缓解文本覆盖诱导的幻觉问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统性地识别并解决了视觉语言模型中的文本覆盖诱导幻觉问题，提出的基准测试和缓解框架为未来多模态理解研究提供了重要基础，特别是在处理文本与视觉信息冲突的场景中。

title: ltzGLUE: Luxembourgish General Language Understanding Evaluation
summary: This paper presents ltzGLUE, the first Natural Language Understanding (NLU) benchmark for Luxembourgish (LTZ) based on the popular GLUE benchmark for English. Although NLU tasks are available for many European languages nowadays, LTZ is one of the official national languages that is often overlooked. We construct new tasks and reuse existing ones to introduce the first official NLU benchmark and accompanying evaluation of encoder models for the language. Our tasks include common natural language processing tasks in binary and multi-class classification settings, including named entity recognition, topic classification, and intent classification. We evaluate various pre-trained language models for LTZ to present an overview of the current capabilities of these models on the LTZ language.

AI.tldr: 首个卢森堡语自然语言理解基准测试ltzGLUE，基于英文GLUE框架构建，包含NER、主题分类、意图分类等任务，评估现有预训练模型在卢森堡语上的表现。
AI.motivation: 卢森堡语作为官方语言之一，在自然语言理解研究领域常被忽视。虽然许多欧洲语言已有NLU任务，但卢森堡语缺乏标准化的评估基准，需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 基于英文GLUE基准框架，为卢森堡语构建新的NLU任务并复用现有任务。创建了包含命名实体识别、主题分类、意图分类等任务的基准测试，涵盖二分类和多分类设置。
AI.result: 建立了首个卢森堡语NLU基准测试ltzGLUE，并对多种卢森堡语预训练语言模型进行了评估，展示了这些模型在当前卢森堡语处理能力方面的概况。
AI.conclusion: ltzGLUE填补了卢森堡语自然语言理解评估的空白，为未来卢森堡语NLP研究提供了标准化基准，有助于推动该语言的技术发展。

title: Neural Shape Operator Surrogates -- Expression Rate Bounds
summary:
We prove error bounds for operator surrogates of solution operators for partial differential and boundary integral equations on families of domains which are diffeomorphic to one common reference (or latent) domain $D_{ref}$. The pullback of the PDE to $D_{ref}$ via affine-parametric shape encoding produces a collection of holomorphic parametric PDEs on $D_{ref}$. Sufficient conditions for (uniformly with respect to the parameter) well-posedness are given, implying existence, uniqueness and stability of parametric solution families on $D_{ref}$. We illustrate the abstract hypotheses by reviewing recent holomorphy results for a suite of elliptic and parabolic PDEs.
  Quantified parametric holomorphy implies existence of finite-parametric, discrete approximations of the parametric solution families with convergence rates in terms of the number $N$ of parameters. We obtain constructive proofs of existence of Neural and Spectral Operator surrogates for the shape-to-solution maps with error bounds and convergence rate guarantees uniform on the collection of admissible shapes. We admit principal-component shape encoders and frame decoders.
  Our results support in particular the (empirically reported) ability of neural operators to realize data-to-solution maps for elliptic and parabolic PDEs and BIEs that generalize across parametric families of shapes.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了在参数化形状族上求解偏微分方程和边界积分方程的算子代理方法的误差界，通过将PDE拉回到参考域得到全纯参数PDE，证明了神经算子和谱算子代理的存在性及收敛率保证。
AI.motivation: 研究在参数化形状族上求解PDE和BIE的算子代理方法，为神经算子等数据驱动方法在形状变化问题中的泛化能力提供理论支撑。
AI.method: 将参数化形状上的PDE通过仿射参数形状编码拉回到参考域，得到全纯参数PDE族，证明其适定性，进而构造神经算子和谱算子代理来近似形状到解的映射。
AI.result: 证明了参数化全纯性导致有限参数离散近似的存在性，获得了神经算子和谱算子代理的误差界和收敛率保证，这些结果在允许的形状集合上是一致的。
AI.conclusion: 该理论结果为神经算子等数据驱动方法在椭圆和抛物型PDE及BIE的形状参数化问题中的泛化能力提供了数学证明，支持主成分形状编码器和框架解码器的使用。

title: Towards Generalizable Deepfake Image Detection with Vision Transformers
summary: In today's day and age, we face a challenge in detecting deepfake images because of the fast evolution of modern generative models and the poor generalization capability of existing methods. In this paper, we use an ensemble of fine-tuned vision transformers like DINOv2, AIMv2 and OpenCLIP's ViT-L/14 to create generalizable method to detect deepfakes. We use the DF-Wild dataset released as part of the IEEE SP Cup 2025, because it uses a challenging and diverse set of manipulations and generation techniques. We started our experiments with CNN classifiers trained on spatial features. Experimental results show that our ensemble outperforms individual models and strong CNN baselines, achieving an AUC of 96.77% and an Equal Error Rate (EER) of just 9% on the DF-Wild test set, beating the state-of-the-art deepfake detection algorithm Effort by 7.05% and 8% in AUC and EER respectively. This was the winning solution for SP Cup, presented at ICASSP 2025.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于集成微调视觉Transformer的深度伪造检测方法，在DF-Wild数据集上取得了96.77%的AUC和9%的EER，超越了现有最佳方法，赢得了IEEE SP Cup 2025竞赛。
AI.motivation: 当前深度伪造检测面临两大挑战：现代生成模型的快速演进和现有方法的泛化能力不足。需要开发更具泛化性的检测方法。
AI.method: 使用集成学习方法，结合多个微调的视觉Transformer模型（DINOv2、AIMv2和OpenCLIP的ViT-L/14），在DF-Wild数据集上进行训练。与基于CNN的空间特征分类器进行对比实验。
AI.result: 集成方法显著优于单个模型和CNN基线，在DF-Wild测试集上达到96.77%的AUC和9%的EER。相比当前最佳算法Effort，AUC提升7.05%，EER降低8%。该方案赢得了IEEE SP Cup 2025竞赛并在ICASSP 2025上展示。
AI.conclusion: 基于集成微调视觉Transformer的方法能够有效提升深度伪造检测的泛化能力，在多样化的生成技术和篡改方法上表现出色，为解决深度伪造检测的泛化问题提供了有效方案。

title: Employing General-Purpose and Biomedical Large Language Models with Advanced Prompt Engineering for Pharmacoepidemiologic Study Design
summary: Background: The potential of large language models (LLMs) to automate and support pharmacoepidemiologic study design is an emerging area of interest, yet their reliability remains insufficiently characterized. General-purpose LLMs often display inaccuracies, while the comparative performance of specialized biomedical LLMs in this domain remains unknown. Methods: This study evaluated general-purpose LLMs (GPT-4o and DeepSeek-R1) versus biomedically fine-tuned LLMs (QuantFactory/Bio-Medical-Llama-3-8B-GGUF and Irathernotsay/qwen2-1.5B-medical_qa-Finetune) using 46 protocols (2018-2024) from the HMA-EMA Catalogue and Sentinel System. Performance was assessed across relevance, logic of justification, and ontology-code agreement across multiple coding systems using Least-to-Most (LTM) and Active Prompting strategies. Results: GPT-4o and DeepSeek-R1 paired with LTM prompting achieved the highest relevance and logic of justification scores, with GPT-4o-LTM reaching a median relevance score of 4 in 8 of 9 questions for HMA-EMA protocols. Biomedical LLMs showed lower relevance overall and frequently generated insufficient justification. All LLMs demonstrated limited proficiency in ontology-code mapping, although LTM provided the most consistent improvements in reasoning stability. Conclusion: Off-the-shelf general-purpose LLMs currently offer superior support for pharmacoepidemiologic design compared to biomedical LLMs. Prompt strategy strongly influenced LLM performance.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了通用大语言模型（GPT-4o、DeepSeek-R1）与生物医学微调模型在药物流行病学研究设计中的表现，发现通用模型配合Least-to-Most提示策略效果最佳，而生物医学模型表现较差，所有模型在本体代码映射方面能力有限。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在药物流行病学研究设计自动化方面具有潜力，但其可靠性尚未充分验证。通用LLMs常出现不准确问题，而生物医学专用LLMs在该领域的比较性能仍未知，需要系统评估。
AI.method: 使用2018-2024年HMA-EMA目录和Sentinel系统的46个研究方案，评估通用LLMs（GPT-4o、DeepSeek-R1）与生物医学微调LLMs（Bio-Medical-Llama-3-8B、qwen2-1.5B-medical_qa）。采用Least-to-Most和Active Prompting策略，从相关性、逻辑合理性、本体代码一致性等多个编码系统评估性能。
AI.result: GPT-4o和DeepSeek-R1配合LTM提示策略获得最高的相关性和逻辑合理性评分，GPT-4o-LTM在HMA-EMA方案的9个问题中有8个达到中位数相关性评分4分。生物医学LLMs整体相关性较低，经常生成不充分的论证。所有LLMs在本体代码映射方面能力有限，但LTM在推理稳定性方面提供了最一致的改进。
AI.conclusion: 现成的通用大语言模型目前在药物流行病学研究设计支持方面优于生物医学LLMs。提示策略对LLM性能有强烈影响，需要进一步研究提升本体代码映射能力。

title: Clusterability-Based Assessment of Potentially Noisy Views for Multi-View Clustering
summary: In multi-view clustering, the quality of different views may vary substantially, and low-quality or degraded views can impair overall clustering performance. However, existing studies mainly address this issue within the clustering process through view weighting or noise-robust optimization, while paying limited attention to data-level assessment before clustering. In this paper, we study the problem of pre-clustering noisy-view analysis in multi-view data from a clusterability perspective. To this end, we propose a Multi-View Clusterability Score (MVCS), which quantifies the strength of latent cluster-related structures in multi-view data through three complementary components: per-view structural clusterability, joint-space clusterability, and cross-view neighborhood consistency. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first clusterability score specifically designed for multi-view data. We further use it to perform potentially noisy view analysis and noisy-view detection before clustering. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that noisy views can significantly degrade clustering performance, and that, compared with existing clusterability measures designed for single-view data, the proposed method more effectively supports noisy-view analysis and detection.

AI.tldr: 提出首个针对多视图数据的聚类性评分方法MVCS，用于聚类前分析视图质量并检测噪声视图
AI.motivation: 多视图聚类中不同视图质量差异大，低质量或噪声视图会损害聚类性能，现有方法主要在聚类过程中通过视图加权或噪声鲁棒优化处理，缺乏聚类前数据层面的评估
AI.method: 提出多视图聚类性评分MVCS，通过三个互补组件量化多视图数据中潜在聚类相关结构的强度：单视图结构聚类性、联合空间聚类性和跨视图邻域一致性
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，噪声视图会显著降低聚类性能，相比为单视图数据设计的现有聚类性度量，该方法能更有效地支持噪声视图分析和检测
AI.conclusion: MVCS是首个专门为多视图数据设计的聚类性评分，能够在聚类前进行潜在的噪声视图分析和检测，为多视图聚类提供重要的预处理工具

title: SpatialImaginer: Towards Adaptive Visual Imagination for Spatial Reasoning
summary: Spatial intelligence, which refers to the ability to reason about geometric and physical structure from visual observations, remains a core challenge for multimodal large language models. Despite promising performance, recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often exhibit fragile reasoning traces in spatial intelligence tasks that involve consistent spatial state recognition. We argue that these failures stem from a mismatch between the spatial recognition mechanism and the text-only reasoning behavior of these MLLMs. Effective spatial reasoning requires low-level geometric structure to be faithfully preserved and updated throughout the reasoning process, whereas textual representations tend to abstract away precisely these critical details. To address this issue, we propose SpatialImaginer, a unified multimodal generation framework that integrates textual reasoning with visual imagination. Our framework adopts a divide-and-conquer strategy, using text chain-of-thought for high-level semantic planning and the visual imagination for geometry-sensitive state transformation and consistency preservation. To support this capability, we further introduce a difficulty-aware data engine with closed-loop verification to train the model to invoke visual imagination selectively when stable spatial state tracking is required. Extensive experiments on diverse spatial intelligence benchmarks show that SpatialImaginer achieves state-of-the-art performance and substantially improves robustness on complex multi-step spatial reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: SpatialImaginer：一个结合文本推理与视觉想象的多模态生成框架，通过分治策略解决MLLMs在空间智能任务中的脆弱推理问题，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在空间智能任务（涉及几何和物理结构推理）中表现出脆弱的推理轨迹，主要原因是空间识别机制与纯文本推理行为不匹配。文本表示倾向于抽象掉关键的几何细节，而有效的空间推理需要在整个推理过程中忠实保持和更新低层几何结构。
AI.method: 提出SpatialImaginer统一多模态生成框架，采用分治策略：使用文本思维链进行高层语义规划，使用视觉想象进行几何敏感的状态转换和一致性保持。引入难度感知的数据引擎和闭环验证，训练模型在需要稳定空间状态跟踪时选择性地调用视觉想象。
AI.result: 在多样化的空间智能基准测试中，SpatialImaginer实现了最先进的性能，并在复杂的多步空间推理任务中显著提高了鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将文本推理与视觉想象相结合，SpatialImaginer有效解决了MLLMs在空间智能任务中的根本问题，为需要几何结构保持和更新的空间推理任务提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: How Creative Are Large Language Models in Generating Molecules?
summary: Molecule generation requires satisfying multiple chemical and biological constraints while searching a large and structured chemical space. This makes it a non-binary problem, where effective models must identify non-obvious solutions under constraints while maintaining exploration to improve success by escaping local optima. From this perspective, creativity is a functional requirement in molecular generation rather than an aesthetic notion. Large language models (LLMs) can generate molecular representations directly from natural language prompts, but it remains unclear what type of creativity they exhibit in this setting and how it should be evaluated. In this work, we study the creative behavior of LLMs in molecular generation through a systematic empirical evaluation across physicochemical, ADMET, and biological activity tasks. We characterize creativity along two complementary dimensions, convergent creativity and divergent creativity, and analyze how different factors shape these behaviors. Our results indicate that LLMs exhibit distinct patterns of creative behavior in molecule generation, such as an increase in constraint satisfaction when additional constraints are imposed. Overall, our work is the first to reframe the abilities required for molecule generation as creativity, providing a systematic understanding of creativity in LLM-based molecular generation and clarifying the appropriate use of LLMs in molecular discovery pipelines.

AI.tldr: 该论文首次将分子生成能力重新定义为创造力，通过系统评估LLM在分子生成中的创造性行为，提出了收敛性和发散性两个互补的创造力维度，并分析了不同因素如何塑造这些行为。
AI.motivation: 分子生成需要在满足多种化学和生物约束的同时搜索大规模结构化化学空间，这是一个非二元问题。现有LLM可以直接从自然语言提示生成分子表示，但尚不清楚它们在这种设置下表现出何种创造力以及应如何评估。该研究旨在系统理解LLM在分子生成中的创造性行为。
AI.method: 通过系统实证评估，在物理化学、ADMET和生物活性任务上研究LLM的创造性行为。将创造力表征为两个互补维度：收敛创造力（在约束下找到非明显解决方案）和发散创造力（保持探索以逃离局部最优）。分析不同因素如何塑造这些行为。
AI.result: LLM在分子生成中表现出独特的创造性行为模式，例如当施加额外约束时，约束满足度会增加。研究首次将分子生成所需能力重新框架为创造力，为基于LLM的分子生成提供了系统理解。
AI.conclusion: 创造力是分子生成的功能性需求而非美学概念。该工作为基于LLM的分子发现流程提供了适当的应用指导，澄清了LLM在分子生成中的创造性能力及其评估方法。

title: RASP-Tuner: Retrieval-Augmented Soft Prompts for Context-Aware Black-Box Optimization in Non-Stationary Environments
comment: Withdraw by ICML and prepare for NeurIPS or ICLR
summary: Many deployed systems expose black-box objectives whose minimizing configuration shifts with an externally observed context. When contexts revisit a small set of latent regimes, an optimizer that discards history pays repeated adaptation cost; when each step must remain inexpensive, full Gaussian-process (GP) refits at high observation counts are difficult to sustain. We cast online tuning as context-conditioned regret minimization and present RASP-Tuner, which instantiates a decomposition motivated by first principles: (i) identify a regime proxy by retrieving similar past contexts; (ii) predict short-horizon loss with a mixture-of-experts surrogate whose input concatenates parameters, context, and a retrieved soft prompt; (iii) adapt chiefly in a low-dimensional prompt subspace, invoking full surrogate updates only when scalarized error or disagreement spikes. A RealErrorComposer maps heterogeneous streaming metrics to [0,1] via EMA-stabilized logistic scores, supplying a single differentiable training target. On nine synthetic non-stationary benchmarks, an adversarial-context sanity check, and three tabular real-world streams (Section on real-world experiments), RASP-Tuner improves or matches cumulative regret relative to our GP-UCB and CMA-ES implementations on seven of nine synthetic tasks under paired tests at horizon T=100, while recording 8-12 times lower wall-clock per step than sliding-window GP-UCB on identical hardware. Idealized analysis in a cluster-separated, strongly convex regime model (RA-GD) supplies sufficient conditions for bounded dynamic regret; the deployed pipeline violates several of these premises, and we articulate which gaps remain open.

AI.tldr: RASP-Tuner：一种用于在线黑盒优化的上下文感知方法，通过检索相似历史上下文、使用混合专家模型预测损失、在低维提示子空间中进行自适应，在动态环境中实现高效优化。
AI.motivation: 许多部署系统具有黑盒目标函数，其最优配置会随外部观察到的上下文变化。当上下文重复访问少量潜在机制时，丢弃历史的优化器会重复支付适应成本；当每个步骤必须保持低成本时，在高观测数量下进行完整高斯过程重新拟合难以持续。
AI.method: 1) 通过检索相似历史上下文识别机制代理；2) 使用混合专家模型预测短期损失，其输入连接参数、上下文和检索到的软提示；3) 主要在低维提示子空间中进行自适应，仅在标量化误差或分歧激增时调用完整代理更新。RealErrorComposer通过EMA稳定逻辑分数将异构流式指标映射到[0,1]，提供单一可微分训练目标。
AI.result: 在9个合成非平稳基准测试、对抗上下文健全性检查和3个表格真实世界流上，RASP-Tuner在7/9合成任务中相对于GP-UCB和CMA-ES实现改进或匹配的累积遗憾，同时在相同硬件上记录比滑动窗口GP-UCB低8-12倍的每步挂钟时间。
AI.conclusion: RASP-Tuner通过上下文条件遗憾最小化框架，在动态环境中实现了高效的在线优化。虽然理论分析在集群分离、强凸机制模型(RA-GD)中提供了有界动态遗憾的充分条件，但实际部署管道违反了其中几个前提，这些差距仍然开放。

title: Deep learning based Non-Rigid Volume-to-Surface Registration for Brain Shift compensation Using Point Cloud
summary: Soft-tissue deformation remains a major limitation in image-guided neurosurgery, where intra-operative anatomy can deviate substantially from pre-operative imaging due to brain shift, compromising navigation accuracy and surgical safety. Existing compensation methods often rely on intra-operative MRI, CT, or ultrasound, which are disruptive and difficult to integrate repeatedly into the surgical workflow. In contrast, partial 3D cortical surfaces can be reconstructed as point clouds from stereoscopic microscopes or laser range scanners (LRS), capturing only a limited portion of the exposed cortex. This makes point cloud registration a practical alternative without interrupting surgery; however, such partial and noisy observations make deformation estimation highly challenging. In this study, we propose a deep learning-based framework for non-rigid volume-to-surface registration, enabling dense displacement field estimation from sparse intra-operative surface observations without explicit point correspondences or volumetric intra-operative imaging. The network leverages multi-scale point-based feature extraction and a hierarchical deformation decoder to capture both global and local deformations. The key contribution lies in integrating partial intra-operative surface information into the full pre-operative point cloud domain, enabling implicit correspondence learning and dense deformation recovery under limited visibility. Quantitative results demonstrate accurate recovery of fine-scale deformations, achieving an Endpoint Error (EPE) of 1.13 +/- 0.75 mm and RMSE of 1.33 +/- 0.81 mm under challenging partial-surface conditions. The proposed approach supports automatic, workflow-compatible brain-shift compensation from sparse surface observations.

AI.tldr: 提出深度学习框架进行非刚性体积到表面配准，从稀疏术中表面观测估计密集位移场，无需术中体积成像或显式点对应关系
AI.motivation: 神经外科中软组织变形（脑移位）导致术中解剖结构与术前影像偏差，影响导航精度和手术安全。现有补偿方法依赖术中MRI/CT/超声，会中断手术流程。而术中通过立体显微镜或激光扫描仪只能获取部分皮质表面点云，需要处理部分、噪声观测下的变形估计挑战
AI.method: 提出深度学习框架进行非刚性体积到表面配准，利用多尺度点云特征提取和分层变形解码器捕捉全局和局部变形。关键创新是将部分术中表面信息整合到完整术前点云域，实现隐式对应关系学习和有限可见性下的密集变形恢复
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的部分表面条件下，准确恢复精细尺度变形，达到端点误差(EPE)1.13±0.75mm和均方根误差(RMSE)1.33±0.81mm
AI.conclusion: 该方法支持从稀疏表面观测自动、工作流兼容的脑移位补偿，为图像引导神经外科提供了实用替代方案，无需术中体积成像或显式点对应关系

title: SignDPO: Multi-level Direct Preference Optimisation for Skeleton-based Gloss-free Sign Language Translation
summary: We present SignDPO, a novel multi-level Direct Preference Optimisation (DPO) framework designed to enhance the alignment of skeleton-based Sign Language Translation. While current skeleton-based models have made significant progress using Maximum Likelihood Estimation, they are primarily constrained by an imitation-based paradigm that lacks discriminative sensitivity to the fine-grained spatio-temporal nuances of sign language, often leading to semantic drift. To address this, SignDPO shifts the optimisation goal from simple sequence mimicry to structured preference alignment across spatial, temporal, and linguistic dimensions. Our framework involves three key designs. First, we introduce a hierarchical perturbation strategy to construct spatial and temporal non-preferred samples at both global and local granularities automatically. Second, we propose a self-guiding mechanism that leverages decoder cross-attention scores to identify and perturb semantically salient skeletal regions, forcing the model to distinguish genuine sign signals from structural distortions. Third, we establish an automated language-level preference generator by fine-tuning a dedicated perturbation model, capturing complex output-level failure modes without manual annotation. Extensive experiments on three widely adopted benchmarks, CSL-Daily, How2Sign, and OpenASL, demonstrate that SignDPO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art gloss-free methods and even rivals established gloss-based ones. Our results suggest that multi-level preference alignment is a powerful paradigm for bridging the gap between high-entropy skeletal trajectories and discrete linguistic semantics.

AI.tldr: SignDPO是一个用于骨架手语翻译的多层次直接偏好优化框架，通过空间、时间和语言三个维度的偏好对齐，提升模型对精细时空特征的判别能力，超越现有无注释方法并媲美有注释方法。
AI.motivation: 当前基于骨架的手语翻译模型主要受限于模仿范式，缺乏对精细时空特征的判别敏感性，容易导致语义漂移。需要从简单的序列模仿转向结构化偏好对齐。
AI.method: 1. 分层扰动策略：自动构建全局和局部粒度的空间和时间非偏好样本；2. 自引导机制：利用解码器交叉注意力分数识别并扰动语义显著的骨架区域；3. 自动语言级偏好生成器：微调专用扰动模型捕获复杂输出级失败模式。
AI.result: 在CSL-Daily、How2Sign和OpenASL三个基准测试中，SignDPO持续优于最先进的无注释方法，甚至媲美已建立的基于注释的方法。
AI.conclusion: 多层次偏好对齐是弥合高熵骨架轨迹和离散语言语义之间差距的强大范式，为骨架手语翻译提供了新的优化方向。

title: Variational Autoencoder Domain Adaptation for Cross-System Generalization in ML-Based SOP Monitoring
summary: Machine learning (ML) models trained to detect physical-layer threats on one optical fiber system often fail catastrophically when applied to a different system, due to variations in operating wavelength, fiber properties, and network architecture. To overcome this, we propose a Domain Adaptation (DA) framework based on a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) that learns a shared representation capturing event signatures common to both systems while suppressing system-specific differences. The shared encoder is first trained on the combined data from two distinct optical systems: a 21 km O-band dark-fiber testbed (System 1) and a 63.4 km C-band live metro ring (System 2). The encoder is then frozen, and a classifier is trained using labels from an individual system. The proposed approach achieves 95.3% and 73.5% cross-system accuracy when moving from System 1 to System 2 and vice versa, respectively. This corresponds to gains of 83.4% and 51% over a fully supervised Deep Neural Network (DNN) baseline trained on a single system, while preserving intra-system performance.

AI.tldr: 提出基于变分自编码器的域适应框架，解决光网络物理层威胁检测模型在不同系统间迁移失败的问题，显著提升跨系统检测准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型在特定光网络系统上训练的物理层威胁检测模型，由于波长、光纤特性和网络架构的差异，在其他系统上表现严重下降，需要解决跨系统迁移问题。
AI.method: 使用变分自编码器学习两个不同光网络系统的共享表示，捕捉共同的事件特征同时抑制系统特定差异。先训练共享编码器，然后冻结编码器，使用单个系统的标签训练分类器。
AI.result: 从系统1到系统2的跨系统准确率达到95.3%，反向达到73.5%，相比单系统训练的深度神经网络基线分别提升83.4%和51%，同时保持了系统内性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的域适应框架能有效解决光网络物理层威胁检测的跨系统迁移问题，显著提升模型在不同网络环境中的泛化能力。

title: MESA: A Training-Free Multi-Exemplar Deep Framework for Restoring Ancient Inscription Textures
summary: Ancient inscriptions frequently suffer missing or corrupted regions from fragmentation, erosion, or other damage, hindering reading, and analysis. We review prior image restoration methods and their applicability to inscription image recovery, then introduce MESA (Multi-Exemplar, Style-Aware) -an image-level restoration method that uses well-preserved exemplar inscriptions (from the same epigraphic monument, material, or similar letterforms) to guide reconstruction of damaged text. MESA encodes VGG19 convolutional features as Gram matrices to capture exemplar texture, style, and stroke structure; for each neural network layer it selects the exemplar minimizing Mean-Squared Displacement (MSD) to the damaged input. Layer-wise contribution weights are derived from Optical Character Recognition-estimated character widths in the exemplar set to bias filters toward scales matching letter geometry, and a training mask preserves intact regions so synthesis is restricted to damaged areas. We also summarize prior network architectures and exemplar and single-image synthesis, inpainting, and Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) approaches, highlighting limitations that MESA addresses. Comparative experiments demonstrate the advantages of MESA. Finally, we provide a practical roadmap for choosing restoration strategies given available exemplars and metadata.

AI.tldr: MESA是一种用于修复古代碑文图像的方法，它利用保存完好的样本碑文来指导受损文本的重建，通过VGG19特征编码、Gram矩阵风格匹配和OCR引导的权重分配，专门针对受损区域进行修复。
AI.motivation: 古代碑文常因破碎、侵蚀或损坏而缺失或损坏区域，这阻碍了阅读和分析。现有图像修复方法在碑文图像恢复方面存在局限性，需要一种专门的方法来利用保存完好的样本碑文指导受损文本的重建。
AI.method: MESA使用VGG19卷积特征编码为Gram矩阵来捕捉样本的纹理、风格和笔画结构；为每个神经网络层选择与受损输入MSD最小的样本；使用OCR估计的字符宽度来推导层间贡献权重，使滤波器偏向匹配字母几何的尺度；使用训练掩码保护完整区域，将合成限制在受损区域。
AI.result: 比较实验证明了MESA的优势，该方法在碑文图像修复方面表现出色，能够有效利用保存完好的样本碑文来指导受损文本的重建。
AI.conclusion: MESA解决了现有方法的局限性，为古代碑文图像修复提供了一种有效的多样本风格感知方法，并提供了根据可用样本和元数据选择修复策略的实用路线图。

title: JudgeMeNot: Personalizing Large Language Models to Emulate Judicial Reasoning in Hebrew
comment: To appear in Findings of the ACL 2026
summary: Despite significant advances in large language models, personalizing them for individual decision-makers remains an open problem. Here, we introduce a synthetic-organic supervision pipeline that transforms raw judicial decisions into instruction-tuning data, enabling parameter-efficient fine-tuning of personalized models for individual judges in low-resource settings. We compare our approach to state-of-the-art personalization techniques across three different tasks and settings. The results show that Causal Language Modeling followed by synthetically generated instruction-tuning significantly outperforms all other baselines, providing significant improvements across lexical, stylistic, and semantic similarity. Notably, our model-generated outputs are indistinguishable from the reasoning of human judges, highlighting the viability of efficient personalization, even in low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 提出合成-有机监督管道，将司法判决转化为指令调优数据，实现低资源环境下法官个性化模型的高效微调，性能显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型取得显著进展，但为个体决策者（如法官）进行个性化定制仍是一个开放问题，特别是在低资源环境下。
AI.method: 采用合成-有机监督管道，将原始司法判决转化为指令调优数据，然后进行参数高效微调，为每位法官创建个性化模型。
AI.result: 因果语言建模结合合成生成的指令调优显著优于所有基线方法，在词汇、风格和语义相似度方面均有显著提升，模型输出与人类法官推理难以区分。
AI.conclusion: 即使在低资源环境下，通过合成-有机监督管道实现高效个性化是可行的，为决策者个性化语言模型提供了有效解决方案。

title: Sonata: A Hybrid World Model for Inertial Kinematics under Clinical Data Scarcity
summary: We introduce Sonata, a compact latent world model for six-axis trunk IMU representation learning under clinical data scarcity. Clinical cohorts typically comprise tens to hundreds of patients, making web-scale masked-reconstruction objectives poorly matched to the problem. Sonata is a 3.77 M-parameter hybrid model, pre-trained on a harmonised corpus of nine public datasets (739 subjects, 190k windows) with a latent world-model objective that predicts future state rather than reconstructing raw sensor traces. In a controlled comparison against a matched autoregressive forecasting baseline (MAE) on the same backbone, Sonata yields consistently stronger frozen-probe clinical discrimination, prospective fall-risk prediction, and cross-cohort transfer across a 14-arm evaluation suite, while producing higher-rank, more structured latent representations. At 3.77 M parameters the model is compatible with on-device wearable inference, offering a step toward general kinematic world models for neurological assessment.

AI.tldr: Sonata是一个紧凑的潜在世界模型，用于在临床数据稀缺条件下学习六轴躯干IMU表示，通过预测未来状态而非重建原始传感器数据，在临床评估任务中表现优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 临床队列通常只有几十到几百名患者，这使得基于网络规模掩码重建的目标与实际问题不匹配。需要开发适用于临床数据稀缺条件下的IMU表示学习方法。
AI.method: Sonata是一个3.77M参数的混合模型，在9个公共数据集（739名受试者，19万个窗口）上进行预训练，采用潜在世界模型目标来预测未来状态，而不是重建原始传感器轨迹。
AI.result: 在与相同骨干网络的匹配自回归预测基线（MAE）的对比中，Sonata在14个评估任务中表现出更强的冻结探针临床区分能力、前瞻性跌倒风险预测能力和跨队列迁移能力，同时产生更高秩、更结构化的潜在表示。
AI.conclusion: 3.77M参数的模型兼容设备端可穿戴推理，为神经学评估的通用运动学世界模型迈出了一步。

title: Speculative Decoding for Autoregressive Video Generation
summary: Autoregressive video diffusion is emerging as a promising paradigm for streaming video synthesis, with step distillation serving as the primary means of accelerating inference. Whether speculative decoding, the dominant acceleration strategy for large language models, can be effectively adapted to autoregressive video generation remains an open question, because video blocks are continuous spatiotemporal tensors with no token-level distribution for exact rejection sampling. We introduce SDVG, which brings speculative decoding to block-based autoregressive video diffusion by replacing token verification with an image-quality router. A 1.3B drafter proposes candidate blocks via four denoising steps; each block is VAE-decoded and scored by ImageReward using worst-frame aggregation--taking the minimum per-frame reward to catch single-frame artifacts that averaging would mask. Blocks scoring above a fixed threshold tau are accepted into the 14B target's KV cache; the rest are regenerated by the target. Two additional design choices prove critical: the first block is always force-rejected to anchor scene composition, and tau serves as a single knob that traces a smooth quality-speed Pareto frontier. On 1003 MovieGenVideoBench prompts (832x480), SDVG retains 98.1% of target-only VisionReward quality (0.0773 vs. 0.0788) at a 1.59x speedup with tau=-0.7, and reaches 2.09x at 95.7% quality retention--while consistently outperforming draft-only generation by over +17%. The framework is training-free, requires no architectural changes, and can be seamlessly integrated into existing autoregressive video generation pipelines.

AI.tldr: SDVG将推测解码应用于自回归视频扩散，通过图像质量路由器替代令牌验证，实现训练免费的视频生成加速
AI.motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型推理速度慢，推测解码在LLMs中成功加速，但视频是连续时空张量，没有令牌级分布进行精确拒绝采样，需要新的验证机制
AI.method: 使用1.3B草稿模型通过4步去噪生成候选视频块，VAE解码后用ImageReward评分（最差帧聚合），分数超过阈值τ的块被接受，否则由14B目标模型重新生成；强制拒绝第一块以锚定场景构图
AI.result: 在1003个MovieGenVideoBench提示上，SDVG在τ=-0.7时保持98.1%目标模型质量（0.0773 vs 0.0788 VisionReward），速度提升1.59倍；在2.09倍加速时保持95.7%质量，始终比仅用草稿模型生成质量高17%以上
AI.conclusion: SDVG成功将推测解码适配到块级自回归视频扩散，无需训练或架构修改，可无缝集成现有流程，通过单一阈值τ在质量-速度帕累托前沿平滑调节

title: Modeling Human Perspectives with Socio-Demographic Representations
summary: Humans often hold different perspectives on the same issues. In many NLP tasks, annotation disagreement can reflect valid subjective perspectives. Modeling annotator perspectives and understanding their relationship with other human factors, such as socio-demographic attributes, have received increasing attention. Prior work typically focuses on single demographic factors or limited combinations. However, in real-world settings, annotator perspectives are shaped by complex social contexts, and finer-grained socio-demographic attributes can better explain human perspectives. In this work, we propose Socio-Contrastive Learning, a method that jointly models annotator perspectives while learning socio-demographic representations. Our method provides an effective approach for the fusion of socio-demographic features and textual representations to predict annotator perspectives, outperforming standard concatenation-based methods. The learned representations further enable analysis and visualization of how demographic factors relate to variation in annotator perspectives. Our code is available at GitHub: https://github.com/Leixin-Zhang/Socio_Contrastive_Learning

AI.tldr: 提出Socio-Contrastive Learning方法，联合建模标注者视角并学习社会人口学表征，优于传统拼接方法，能分析人口因素与标注视角的关系
AI.motivation: 在NLP任务中，标注分歧反映了有效的主观视角。现有研究通常关注单一人口因素或有限组合，但真实世界中标注者视角受复杂社会环境影响，更细粒度的人口属性能更好解释人类视角
AI.method: 提出Socio-Contrastive Learning方法，联合建模标注者视角并学习社会人口学表征，有效融合社会人口学特征和文本表征来预测标注者视角
AI.result: 方法优于标准的基于拼接的方法，学习到的表征能进一步分析和可视化人口因素如何与标注者视角的变化相关
AI.conclusion: Socio-Contrastive Learning为建模标注者视角和人口学表征提供了有效方法，有助于理解社会因素如何影响人类视角

title: Towards a Foundation-Model Paradigm for Aerodynamic Prediction in Three-dimensional Design
summary: Accurate machine-learning models for aerodynamic prediction are essential for accelerating shape optimization, yet remain challenging to develop for complex three-dimensional configurations due to the high cost of generating training data. This work introduces a methodology for efficiently constructing accurate surrogate models for design purposes by first pre-training a large-scale model on diverse geometries and then fine-tuning it with a few more detailed task-specific samples. A Transformer-based architecture, AeroTransformer, is developed and tailored for large-scale training to learn aerodynamics. The methodology is evaluated on transonic wings, where the model is pre-trained on SuperWing, a dataset of nearly 30000 samples with broad geometric diversity, and subsequently fine-tuned to handle specific wing shapes perturbed from the Common Research Model. Results show that, with 450 task-specific samples, the proposed methodology achieves 0.36% error on surface-flow prediction, reducing 84.2% compared to training from scratch. The influence of model configurations and training strategies is also systematically studied to provide guidance on effectively training and deploying such models under limited data and computational budgets. To facilitate reuse, we release the datasets and the pre-trained models at https://github.com/tum-pbs/AeroTransformer. An interactive design tool is also built on the pre-trained model and is available online at https://webwing.pbs.cit.tum.de.

AI.tldr: 提出AeroTransformer方法，通过大规模预训练+少量任务特定样本微调，实现高效准确的气动预测模型构建
AI.motivation: 复杂三维构型的气动预测机器学习模型训练数据生成成本高，需要开发高效构建准确代理模型的方法
AI.method: 开发基于Transformer的AeroTransformer架构，先在包含近30000个样本的SuperWing数据集上预训练，然后用少量任务特定样本微调
AI.result: 仅用450个任务特定样本，表面流动预测误差降至0.36%，比从头训练减少84.2%误差
AI.conclusion: 预训练+微调方法能显著降低数据需求，提高气动预测精度，为有限数据和计算预算下的模型训练提供指导

title: Where to Focus: Query-Modulated Multimodal Keyframe Selection for Long Video Understanding
summary: Long video understanding remains a formidable challenge for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) due to the prohibitive computational cost of processing dense frame sequences. Prevailing solutions, which select a keyframe subset, typically rely on either a single visual-centric metric (e.g., CLIP similarity) or a static fusion of heuristic scores. This ``one-size-fits-all'' paradigm frequently fails: visual-only metrics are ineffective for plot-driven narrative queries, while indiscriminately incorporating textual scores introduces severe ``modal noise'' for purely visual tasks. To break this bottleneck, we propose Q-Gate, a plug-and-play and training-free framework that treats keyframe selection as a dynamic modality routing problem. We decouple the retrieval process into three lightweight expert streams: Visual Grounding for local details, Global Matching for scene semantics, and Contextual Alignment for subtitle-driven narratives. Crucially, Q-Gate introduces a Query-Modulated Gating Mechanism that leverages the in-context reasoning of an LLM to assess the query's intent and dynamically allocate attention weights across the experts. This mechanism intelligently activates necessary modalities while ``muting'' irrelevant ones, thereby maximizing the signal-to-noise ratio. Extensive experiments on LongVideoBench and Video-MME across multiple MLLM backbones demonstrate that Q-Gate substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. By effectively suppressing modality-specific noise, it provides a robust, highly interpretable solution for scalable video reasoning.

AI.tldr: Q-Gate：一个即插即用、无需训练的视频关键帧选择框架，通过动态模态路由解决长视频理解中的模态噪声问题，显著提升多模态大语言模型的视频推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有长视频理解方法存在严重缺陷：基于单一视觉度量的方法无法处理情节驱动的叙事查询，而盲目融合文本分数又会为纯视觉任务引入严重的"模态噪声"。这种"一刀切"范式经常失败，需要更智能的模态选择机制。
AI.method: 提出Q-Gate框架，将关键帧选择视为动态模态路由问题。解耦为三个轻量级专家流：视觉定位（局部细节）、全局匹配（场景语义）、上下文对齐（字幕驱动叙事）。核心创新是查询调制门控机制，利用LLM的上下文推理评估查询意图，动态分配专家注意力权重，智能激活必要模态同时"静音"无关模态。
AI.result: 在LongVideoBench和Video-MME基准测试中，Q-Gate在多个MLLM骨干网络上显著优于最先进的基线方法。通过有效抑制模态特定噪声，为可扩展视频推理提供了鲁棒且高度可解释的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: Q-Gate通过动态模态路由打破了长视频理解的关键瓶颈，提供了一种即插即用、无需训练的框架，能够根据查询意图智能选择模态，显著提升多模态大语言模型的视频推理性能。

title: Mix and Match: Context Pairing for Scalable Topic-Controlled Educational Summarisation
comment: To be published at the International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education (AIED'26)
summary: Topic-controlled summarisation enables users to generate summaries focused on specific aspects of source documents. This paper investigates a data augmentation strategy for training small language models (sLMs) to perform topic-controlled summarisation. We propose a pairwise data augmentation method that combines contexts from different documents to create contrastive training examples, enabling models to learn the relationship between topics and summaries more effectively. Using the SciTLDR dataset enriched with Wikipedia-derived topics, we systematically evaluate how augmentation scale affects model performance. Results show consistent improvements in win rate and semantic alignment as the augmentation scale increases, while the amount of real training data remains fixed. Consequently, a T5-base model trained with our augmentation approach achieves competitive performance relative to larger models, despite using significantly fewer parameters and substantially fewer real training examples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于主题控制摘要的数据增强方法，通过组合不同文档的上下文创建对比训练样本，使小型语言模型能够更有效地学习主题与摘要之间的关系。
AI.motivation: 主题控制摘要能让用户生成针对特定方面的摘要，但训练小型语言模型进行主题控制摘要面临数据不足的挑战，需要有效的数据增强策略来提高模型性能。
AI.method: 提出成对数据增强方法，结合不同文档的上下文创建对比训练样本，使用SciTLDR数据集并添加维基百科主题，系统评估增强规模对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 随着增强规模的增加，模型在胜率和语义对齐方面持续改进，而真实训练数据量保持不变。T5-base模型使用该方法后，尽管参数更少且真实训练样本更少，仍能达到与更大模型竞争的性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的数据增强策略能有效提升小型语言模型在主题控制摘要任务上的性能，使其在资源有限的情况下达到与更大模型相当的效果。

title: Towards Real-Time ECG and EMG Modeling on $μ$ NPUs
summary: The miniaturisation of neural processing units (NPUs) and other low-power accelerators has enabled their integration into microcontroller-scale wearable hardware, supporting near-real-time, offline, and privacy-preserving inference. Yet physiological signal analysis has remained infeasible on such hardware; recent Transformer-based models show state-of-the-art performance but are prohibitively large for resource- and power-constrained hardware and incompatible with $μ$ NPUs due to their dynamic attention operations. We introduce PhysioLite, a lightweight, NPU-compatible model architecture and training framework for ECG/EMG signal analysis. Using learnable wavelet filter banks, CPU-offloaded positional encoding, and hardware-aware layer design, PhysioLite reaches performance comparable to state-of-the-art Transformer-based foundation models on ECG and EMG benchmarks, while being <10% of the size ($\sim$370KB with 8-bit quantization). We also profile its component-wise latency and resource consumption on both the MAX78000 and HX6538 WE2 $μ$ NPUs, demonstrating its viability for signal analysis on constrained, battery-powered hardware. We release our model(s) and training framework at: https://github.com/j0shmillar/physiolite.

AI.tldr: PhysioLite：一种轻量级、NPU兼容的ECG/EMG信号分析模型架构，在保持与Transformer模型相当性能的同时，模型大小减少90%以上，可在资源受限的微控制器硬件上运行。
AI.motivation: 虽然微型神经处理单元（NPUs）已能集成到可穿戴硬件中，但生理信号分析（特别是基于Transformer的先进模型）仍无法在资源受限的硬件上运行，因为现有模型过大且与μNPUs不兼容。
AI.method: 提出PhysioLite架构：使用可学习小波滤波器组、CPU卸载的位置编码和硬件感知的层设计，创建轻量级、NPU兼容的模型，支持8位量化（约370KB）。
AI.result: 在ECG和EMG基准测试中达到与最先进Transformer基础模型相当的性能，模型大小减少90%以上，并在MAX78000和HX6538 WE2 μNPUs上验证了延迟和资源消耗的可行性。
AI.conclusion: PhysioLite证明了在资源受限的电池供电硬件上进行实时、离线、隐私保护的生理信号分析的可行性，为可穿戴医疗设备提供了实用的解决方案。

title: Long-CODE: Isolating Pure Long-Context as an Orthogonal Dimension in Video Evaluation
summary: As video generation models achieve unprecedented capabilities, the demand for robust video evaluation metrics becomes increasingly critical. Traditional metrics are intrinsically tailored for short-video evaluation, predominantly assessing frame-level visual quality and localized temporal smoothness. However, as state-of-the-art video generation models scale to generate longer videos, these metrics fail to capture essential long-range characteristics, such as narrative richness and global causal consistency. Recognizing that short-term visual perception and long-context attributes are fundamentally orthogonal dimensions, we argue that long-video metrics should be disentangled from short-video assessments. In this paper, we focus on the rigorous justification and design of a dedicated framework for long-video evaluation. We first introduce a suite of long-video attribute corruption tests, exposing the critical limitations of existing hort-video metrics from their insensitivity to structural inconsistencies, such as shot-level perturbations and narrative shuffling. To bridge this gap, we design a novel long-video metric based on shot dynamics, which is highly sensitive to the long-range testing framework. Furthermore, we introduce Long-CODE (Long-Context as an Orthogonal Dimension for video Evaluation), a specialized dataset designed to benchmark long-video evaluation, with human annotations isolated specifically to genuine long-range characteristics. Extensive experiments show that our proposed metrics achieve state-of-the-art correlation with human judgments. Ultimately, our metric and benchmark seamlessly complement existing short-video standards, establishing a holistic and unbiased evaluation paradigm for video generation models.

AI.tldr: 提出专门的长视频评估框架Long-CODE，将长上下文特性作为与短视频评估正交的维度，通过基于镜头动态的新指标解决现有指标在长视频叙事一致性和全局因果性评估上的不足。
AI.motivation: 随着视频生成模型能够生成长视频，传统基于短视频设计的评估指标无法捕捉长视频的关键特性，如叙事丰富性和全局因果一致性。需要将长上下文特性作为与短视频评估正交的维度来专门设计评估框架。
AI.method: 1) 引入长视频属性破坏测试，揭示现有短视频指标的局限性；2) 设计基于镜头动态的新型长视频评估指标；3) 构建Long-CODE数据集，专门用于长视频评估基准测试，包含针对真实长范围特性的人工标注。
AI.result: 提出的新指标在与人判断的相关性方面达到最先进水平，能够有效捕捉长视频的结构不一致性（如镜头级扰动和叙事重排），而现有指标对此不敏感。
AI.conclusion: 提出的长视频评估指标和基准与现有短视频标准互补，建立了全面且无偏的视频生成模型评估范式，将长上下文特性作为独立维度进行专门评估。

title: Culture-Aware Humorous Captioning: Multimodal Humor Generation across Cultural Contexts
summary: Recent multimodal large language models have shown promising ability in generating humorous captions for images, yet they still lack stable control over explicit cultural context, making it difficult to jointly maintain image relevance, contextual appropriateness, and humor quality under a specified cultural background. To address this limitation, we introduce a new multimodal generation task, culture-aware humorous captioning, which requires a model to generate a humorous caption conditioned on both an input image and a target cultural context. Captions generated under different cultural contexts are not expected to share the same surface form, but should remain grounded in similar visual situations or humorous rationales.To support this task, we establish a six-dimensional evaluation framework covering image relevance, contextual fit, semantic richness, reasonableness, humor, and creativity. We further propose a staged alignment framework that first initializes the model with high-resource supervision under the Western cultural context, then performs multi-dimensional preference alignment via judge-based GRPO with a Degradation-aware Prototype Repulsion Constraint to mitigate reward hacking in open-ended generation, and finally adapts the model to the Eastern cultural context with a small amount of supervision. Experimental results show that our method achieves stronger overall performance under the proposed evaluation framework, with particularly large gains in contextual fit and a better balance between image relevance and humor under cultural constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出文化感知幽默字幕生成任务，通过多阶段对齐框架解决多模态大语言模型在特定文化背景下生成幽默字幕的稳定性问题，建立了六维评估体系并展示了优越性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在生成幽默图像字幕时，缺乏对明确文化背景的稳定控制，难以在指定文化背景下同时保持图像相关性、上下文适当性和幽默质量。
AI.method: 提出三阶段对齐框架：1) 在西方文化背景下用高资源监督初始化模型；2) 通过基于评判的GRPO进行多维度偏好对齐，加入退化感知原型排斥约束以缓解开放生成中的奖励黑客问题；3) 用少量监督将模型适配到东方文化背景。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在提出的六维评估框架下取得更强的整体性能，在上下文适配方面有显著提升，并在文化约束下更好地平衡了图像相关性和幽默性。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功解决了文化感知幽默字幕生成任务，提出的多阶段对齐框架有效提升了模型在特定文化背景下生成幽默字幕的能力，为跨文化多模态生成提供了新思路。

title: Implicit neural representations as a coordinate-based framework for continuous environmental field reconstruction from sparse ecological observations
summary: Reconstructing continuous environmental fields from sparse and irregular observations remains a central challenge in environmental modelling and biodiversity informatics. Many ecological datasets are heterogeneous in space and time, making grid-based approaches difficult to scale or generalise across domains. Here, we evaluate implicit neural representations (INRs) as a coordinate-based modelling framework for learning continuous spatial and spatio-temporal fields directly from coordinate inputs. We analyse their behaviour across three representative modelling scenarios: species distribution reconstruction, phenological dynamics, and morphological segmentation derived from open biodiversity data. Beyond predictive performance, we examine interpolation behaviour, spatial coherence, and computational characteristics relevant for environmental modelling workflows, including scalability, resolution-independent querying, and architectural inductive bias. Results show that neural fields provide stable continuous representations with predictable computational cost, complementing classical smoothers and tree-based approaches. These findings position coordinate-based neural fields as a flexible representation layer that can be integrated into environmental modelling pipelines and exploratory analysis frameworks for large, irregularly sampled datasets.

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了隐式神经表示（INRs）作为坐标建模框架，用于从稀疏和不规则的环境观测数据中重建连续环境场，在物种分布、物候动态和形态分割三个场景中验证了其性能。
AI.motivation: 环境建模和生物多样性信息学面临的核心挑战是从稀疏和不规则观测中重建连续环境场。许多生态数据集在时空上具有异质性，使得基于网格的方法难以跨领域扩展或泛化。
AI.method: 使用隐式神经表示（INRs）作为坐标建模框架，直接从坐标输入学习连续空间和时空场。在三个代表性建模场景中进行分析：物种分布重建、物候动态和形态分割（基于开放生物多样性数据）。
AI.result: 神经场提供了稳定的连续表示，具有可预测的计算成本，补充了经典平滑器和基于树的方法。在插值行为、空间连贯性和计算特性方面表现良好，支持分辨率无关查询。
AI.conclusion: 坐标神经场可作为灵活的表征层，集成到环境建模流程和探索性分析框架中，适用于大规模、不规则采样的数据集。

title: DEM Refinement and Validation on the Lunar Surface Using Shape-from-Shading with Chandrayaan-2 OHRC Imagery
summary: This study presents a Shape from Shading (SfS) framework to enhance sub-metre resolution lunar digital elevation models (DEMs) using imagery from the Orbiter High Resolution Camera (OHRC) aboard Chandrayaan-2. The framework applies SfS to an independent OHRC image of the same region, enabling SfS not just as a refinement tool, but as a source of new topographic data, unconstrained by stereo baseline limitations. The method is applied across three lunar sites, including the Cyrillus crater, the Vikram landing region, and the lunar south pole (Mons Mouton), with a systematic three-stage parameter sweep on the SfS smoothness weight. Results show measurable topographic enhancement, particularly in surface slope statistics, revealing fine-scale crater morphology previously unresolved. A limiting case is also characterized, where large pitch angle separation between the shading image and stereo pair reduces SfS sensitivity, and partial footprint coverage of the shading image is identified as a factor influencing spatially variable enhancement quality.

AI.tldr: 提出基于阴影形状恢复技术增强月球亚米级数字高程模型的方法，利用Chandrayaan-2轨道器高分辨率相机影像，在三个月球区域验证了地形增强效果
AI.motivation: 现有立体摄影测量技术受基线限制，难以获取高分辨率地形细节，需要开发不依赖立体基线的地形增强方法
AI.method: 使用阴影形状恢复框架，对独立的高分辨率相机影像进行处理，通过三阶段参数扫描优化平滑权重，应用于三个月球区域
AI.result: 实现了可测量的地形增强，特别是在表面坡度统计方面，揭示了先前未解析的精细尺度陨石坑形态，但也识别了俯仰角分离和部分覆盖对增强质量的影响
AI.conclusion: 阴影形状恢复技术可作为独立地形数据源，有效增强月球数字高程模型，但需要考虑影像几何条件和覆盖范围对结果的影响

title: Efficient Low-Resource Language Adaptation via Multi-Source Dynamic Logit Fusion
summary: Adapting large language models (LLMs) to low-resource languages (LRLs) is constrained by the scarcity of task data and computational resources. Although Proxy Tuning offers a logit-level strategy for introducing scaling effects, it often fails in LRL settings because the large model's weak LRL competence might overwhelm the knowledge of specialized smaller models. We thus propose TriMix, a test-time logit fusion framework that dynamically balances capabilities from three different sources: LRL competence from a continually pretrained small model, task competence from high-resource language instruction tuning, and the scaling benefits of large models. It is data- and compute-efficient, requiring no LRL task annotations, and only continual pretraining on a small model. Experiments across four model families and eight LRLs show that TriMix consistently outperforms single-model baselines and Proxy Tuning. Our analysis reveals that prioritizing the small LRL-specialized model's logits is crucial for success, challenging the prevalent large-model-dominant assumption.

AI.tldr: TriMix是一个测试时logit融合框架，通过动态平衡三个不同来源的能力来适应低资源语言：小模型的LRL能力、高资源语言指令调优的任务能力，以及大模型的扩展优势。
AI.motivation: 适应大型语言模型到低资源语言受到任务数据稀缺和计算资源有限的限制。现有的Proxy Tuning方法在LRL设置中经常失败，因为大模型的弱LRL能力可能会淹没专门小模型的知识。
AI.method: 提出TriMix测试时logit融合框架，动态平衡三个来源：持续预训练小模型的LRL能力、高资源语言指令调优的任务能力，以及大模型的扩展优势。该方法数据高效且计算高效，无需LRL任务标注，只需在小模型上进行持续预训练。
AI.result: 在四个模型家族和八种低资源语言上的实验表明，TriMix始终优于单模型基线和Proxy Tuning。分析显示，优先考虑小LRL专门模型的logits对成功至关重要。
AI.conclusion: TriMix为低资源语言适应提供了一种高效解决方案，挑战了普遍存在的大模型主导假设，强调小LRL专门模型的重要性。

title: Predicting LLM Compression Degradation from Spectral Statistics
summary: Matrix-level low-rank compression is a promising way to reduce the cost of large language models, but running compression and evaluating the resulting models on language tasks can be prohibitively expensive. Can compression-induced degradation be predicted before committing to this compute? We systematically analyze the Qwen3 and Gemma3 model families across four representative low-rank compression methods: vanilla SVD, two ASVD variants, and SVD-LLM. We find that stable rank and information density, measured in bits per parameter, dominate performance degradation. The interaction term $γ\cdot \barρ_s$, defined as compression ratio times stable rank, is a robust predictor of accuracy degradation, achieving leave-one-out cross-validation Pearson correlations of $0.890$ for attention layers and $0.839$ for MLP layers. We provide theoretical intuition for why this predictor succeeds by connecting it to standard SVD truncation bounds and error composition mechanisms in transformer layers. These findings enable a predict-then-compress workflow: compute $γ\cdot \barρ_s$ from weights, estimate degradation, and invest compute only in desirable configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用压缩比与稳定秩的乘积（γ·ρ_s）作为预测低秩压缩对LLM性能影响的指标，实现"先预测后压缩"的工作流程，避免昂贵的压缩实验成本。
AI.motivation: 低秩压缩是减少大语言模型成本的有效方法，但压缩过程和压缩后模型评估的计算成本过高。需要找到一种在投入大量计算资源进行压缩之前就能预测压缩导致性能下降的方法。
AI.method: 系统分析了Qwen3和Gemma3模型家族，使用四种代表性低秩压缩方法：标准SVD、两种ASVD变体和SVD-LLM。研究发现稳定秩和信息密度（每参数比特数）主导性能下降，并提出压缩比与稳定秩的乘积作为预测指标。
AI.result: 交互项γ·ρ_s（压缩比×稳定秩）是预测精度下降的稳健指标，在注意力层和MLP层的留一交叉验证中分别达到0.890和0.839的皮尔逊相关性。该指标与标准SVD截断边界和Transformer层误差传播机制有理论联系。
AI.conclusion: 研究提出了"先预测后压缩"的工作流程：从权重计算γ·ρ_s，估计性能下降，只对有利的配置投入计算资源进行压缩，从而显著降低低秩压缩的实验成本。

title: Attention Is not Everything: Efficient Alternatives for Vision
summary: Recently computer vision has seen advancements mainly thanks to Transformer-based models. However many non-Transformer methods are still doing well being a direct competition of Transformer-based models. This review tries to present a comprehensive taxonomy of such methods and organize these methods into categories like convolution-based models, MLP-based models, state-space-based and more. These methods are looked at in terms of how efficient they are, how well they scale, how easy they are to understand and how robust they are. A total of 40 papers were chosen for this study. The goal is to give a view of non-Transformer methods and find out what challenges and opportunities exist for future computer vision research.

AI.tldr: 这篇综述论文系统性地分类和分析了非Transformer计算机视觉方法，包括卷积、MLP、状态空间等模型，评估了它们的效率、可扩展性、可解释性和鲁棒性，旨在为非Transformer方法提供全面视角并探索未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer模型在计算机视觉领域取得了显著进展，但许多非Transformer方法仍然表现出色，与Transformer模型形成直接竞争。为了全面了解这一领域，需要对非Transformer方法进行系统性分类和分析，以揭示其优势和局限性。
AI.method: 作者提出了一个全面的分类法，将非Transformer方法组织为卷积模型、MLP模型、状态空间模型等类别。通过选择40篇相关论文，从效率、可扩展性、可解释性和鲁棒性四个维度对这些方法进行评估和分析。
AI.result: 研究系统地整理了非Transformer方法的分类体系，分析了各类方法的性能特点。通过比较不同方法的优劣，为研究者提供了非Transformer方法的全面视角，并识别了当前研究中的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 非Transformer方法在计算机视觉中仍然具有重要地位和竞争力。该综述为未来研究提供了方向性指导，指出了非Transformer方法面临的挑战和发展机遇，有助于推动计算机视觉领域的多元化发展。

title: FLiP: Towards understanding and interpreting multimodal multilingual sentence embeddings
summary: This paper presents factorized linear projection (FLiP) models for understanding pretrained sentence embedding spaces. We train FLiP models to recover the lexical content from multilingual (LaBSE), multimodal (SONAR) and API-based (Gemini) sentence embedding spaces in several high- and mid-resource languages. We show that FLiP can recall more than 75% of lexical content from the embeddings, significantly outperforming existing non-factorized baselines. Using this as a diagnostic tool, we uncover the modality and language biases across the selected sentence encoders and provide practitioners with intrinsic insights about the encoders without relying on conventional downstream evaluation tasks. Our implementation is public https://github.com/BUTSpeechFIT/FLiP.

AI.tldr: FLiP模型用于分析预训练句子嵌入空间，通过因子化线性投影恢复嵌入中的词汇内容，在多种语言和模态上表现优于基线，可作为诊断工具揭示编码器的偏置
AI.motivation: 理解预训练句子嵌入空间的内部工作机制，提供一种无需依赖下游任务就能评估编码器特性的诊断工具
AI.method: 提出因子化线性投影（FLiP）模型，训练其从多语言（LaBSE）、多模态（SONAR）和API基础（Gemini）的句子嵌入空间中恢复词汇内容
AI.result: FLiP能从嵌入中恢复超过75%的词汇内容，显著优于现有的非因子化基线方法，揭示了所选句子编码器的模态和语言偏置
AI.conclusion: FLiP为理解句子嵌入空间提供了有效的诊断工具，使实践者能够获得编码器的内在洞察，而无需依赖传统的下游评估任务

title: Towards E-Value Based Stopping Rules for Bayesian Deep Ensembles
comment: Accepted for presentation at the OPTIMAL Workshop at AISTATS 2026, Tangier, Morocco
summary: Bayesian Deep Ensembles (BDEs) represent a powerful approach for uncertainty quantification in deep learning, combining the robustness of Deep Ensembles (DEs) with flexible multi-chain MCMC. While DEs are affordable in most deep learning settings, (long) sampling of Bayesian neural networks can be prohibitively costly. Yet, adding sampling after optimizing the DEs has been shown to yield significant improvements. This leaves a critical practical question: How long should the sequential sampling process continue to yield significant improvements over the initial optimized DE baseline? To tackle this question, we propose a stopping rule based on E-values. We formulate the ensemble construction as a sequential anytime-valid hypothesis test, providing a principled way to decide whether or not to reject the null hypothesis that MCMC offers no improvement over a strong baseline, to early stop the sampling. Empirically, we study this approach for diverse settings. Our results demonstrate the efficacy of our approach and reveal that only a fraction of the full-chain budget is often required.

AI.tldr: 提出基于E值的停止规则，用于贝叶斯深度集成中的MCMC采样，通过序列假设检验决定何时停止采样，实验表明只需部分采样预算即可获得显著改进。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯深度集成结合了深度集成的鲁棒性和MCMC的灵活性，但MCMC采样成本高昂。现有方法在优化深度集成后添加采样能显著改进，但缺乏何时停止采样的指导原则。
AI.method: 将集成构建建模为序列假设检验，提出基于E值的停止规则。检验零假设"MCMC相比基线无改进"，当E值超过阈值时拒绝零假设并停止采样。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效，通常只需完整采样链预算的一小部分即可获得显著改进，实现了采样效率与性能改进的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 基于E值的停止规则为贝叶斯深度集成中的MCMC采样提供了原则性的停止准则，显著降低了计算成本，同时保持了不确定性量化的质量。

title: HyKey: Hyperspectral Keypoint Detection and Matching in Minimally Invasive Surgery
summary: Purpose: 3D reconstruction in minimally invasive surgery (MIS) enables enhanced surgical guidance through improved visualisation, tool tracking, and augmented reality. However, traditional RGB-based keypoint detection and matching pipelines struggle with surgical challenges, such as poor texture and complex illumination. We investigate whether using snapshot hyperspectral imaging (HSI) can provide improved results on keypoint detection and matching surgical scenes. Methods: We developed HyKey, a HYperspectral KEYpoint detection and description model made up of a hybrid 3D-2D convolutional neural network that jointly extracts spatial-spectral features from HSI. The model was trained using synthetic homographic augmentation and epipolar geometry constraints on a robotically-acquired dual-camera RGB-HSI laparoscopic dataset of ex-vivo organs with calibrated camera poses. We benchmarked performance against established RGB-based methods, including SuperPoint and ALIKE.
