We propose Platypoos, a simple scale-free planning algorithm that adapts to the unknown scale and smoothness of the reward function. We provide a sample complexity analysis for Platypoos that improves upon prior work and holds simultaneously over a broad range of discount factors and reward scales, without the algorithm knowing them. We also establish a matching lower bound showing our analysis is optimal up to constants.

AI.tldr: 提出Platypoos算法解决确定性动态、随机奖励环境中的规划问题，无需已知奖励边界，自适应未知奖励尺度和平滑度，提供改进的样本复杂度分析并证明其最优性。
AI.motivation: 解决在确定性动态和随机奖励环境中规划的问题，其中最优值函数未知且奖励无界，需要算法能够自适应未知的奖励尺度和平滑度。
AI.method: 提出Platypoos算法，这是一种简单的无尺度规划算法，能够自适应奖励函数的未知尺度和平滑度，适用于广泛的折扣因子和奖励尺度范围。
AI.result: 提供了改进的样本复杂度分析，优于先前工作，同时适用于广泛的折扣因子和奖励尺度范围，无需算法预先知道这些参数，并建立了匹配的下界证明分析的最优性。
AI.conclusion: Platypoos算法在确定性动态、随机奖励环境中实现了最优的规划性能，能够自适应未知的奖励特性，为这类问题提供了理论保证和实用解决方案。

title: PBSBench: A Multi-Level Vision-Language Framework and Benchmark for Hematopathology Whole Slide Image Interpretation
comment: 19 pages, 12 figures, Accepted by CVPR Findings 2026
summary: Peripheral Blood Smear (PBS) is a critical microscopic examination in hematopathology that yields whole-slide imaging (WSI). Unlike solid tissue pathology, PBS interpretation focuses on individual cell morphologies rather than tissue architecture, making it distinct in both visual characteristics and diagnostic reasoning. However, current multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for pathology are primarily developed on solid-tissue WSIs and struggle to generalize to PBS. To bridge this gap, we construct PBSInstr, the first vision-language dataset for PBS interpretation, comprising 353 PBS WSIs paired with microscopic impression paragraphs and 29k cell-level image crops annotated with cell type labels and morphological descriptions. To facilitate instruction tuning, PBSInstr further includes 27k question-answer (QA) pairs for cell crops and 1,286 QA pairs for PBS slides. Building upon PBSInstr, we develop PBS-VL, a hematopathology-tailored vision-language model for multi-level PBS interpretation at both cell and slide levels. To comprehensively evaluate PBS understanding, we construct PBSBench, a visual question answering (VQA) benchmark featuring four question categories and six PBS interpretation tasks. Experiments show that PBS-VL outperforms existing general-purpose and pathology MLLMs, underscoring the value of PBS-specific data. We release our code, datasets, and model weights to facilitate future research. Our proposed framework lays the foundation for developing practical AI assistants supporting decision-making in hematopathology.

AI.tldr: 提出了首个用于外周血涂片（PBS）解释的视觉语言数据集PBSInstr和专用模型PBS-VL，在PBSBench基准测试中优于现有通用和病理学多模态大模型。
AI.motivation: 外周血涂片（PBS）与实体组织病理学在视觉特征和诊断推理上存在显著差异，现有基于实体组织WSI的多模态大语言模型难以泛化到PBS领域，需要专门的数据集和模型。
AI.method: 构建了PBSInstr数据集（包含353个PBS全玻片图像、29k细胞级图像裁剪及标注、27k细胞级QA对和1,286个玻片级QA对），并基于此开发了PBS-VL模型，同时创建了包含四类问题和六项任务的PBSBench评估基准。
AI.result: PBS-VL在PBSBench基准测试中显著优于现有通用和病理学多模态大语言模型，证明了PBS专用数据的价值。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为开发支持血液病理学决策的实用AI助手奠定了基础，相关代码、数据集和模型权重已开源以促进未来研究。

title: Where Do Self-Supervised Speech Models Become Unfair?
summary: Speech encoder models are known to model members of some speaker groups (SGs) better than others. However, there has been little work in establishing why this occurs on a technological level. To our knowledge, we present the first layerwise fairness analysis of pretrained self-supervised speech encoder models (S3Ms), probing each embedding layer for speaker identification (SID) automatic speech recognition (ASR). We find S3Ms produce embeddings biased against certain SGs for both tasks, starting at the very first latent layers. Furthermore, we find opposite patterns of layerwise bias for SID vs ASR for all models in our study: SID bias is minimized in layers that minimize overall SID error; on the other hand, ASR bias is maximized in layers that minimize overall ASR error. The inverse bias/error relationship for ASR is unaffected when probing S3Ms that are finetuned for ASR, suggesting SG-level bias is established during pretraining and is difficult to remove.

AI.tldr: 首次对预训练自监督语音编码器模型进行分层公平性分析，发现语音编码器从第一层开始就对某些说话者群体产生有偏见的嵌入，且说话者识别和语音识别的偏见模式相反。
AI.motivation: 虽然已知语音编码器模型对不同说话者群体的建模效果存在差异，但缺乏从技术层面分析这种偏见产生原因的研究。本文旨在填补这一空白，探究预训练自监督语音编码器模型在不同层次上的公平性问题。
AI.method: 对预训练的自监督语音编码器模型进行分层公平性分析，在每一嵌入层上探测说话者识别和自动语音识别任务。研究包括原始预训练模型和针对ASR微调的模型。
AI.result: 发现语音编码器从第一层开始就对某些说话者群体产生偏见嵌入；说话者识别和语音识别的偏见模式相反：SID偏见在最小化整体SID错误的层中最小化，而ASR偏见在最小化整体ASR错误的层中最大化；即使对ASR微调后，这种相反的偏见/错误关系仍然存在。
AI.conclusion: 说话者群体级别的偏见在预训练阶段就已建立，且难以通过微调消除。这表明需要在预训练阶段就考虑公平性问题，而不仅仅是后续的微调阶段。

title: Parkinson's Disease Detection via Self-Supervised Dual-Channel Cross-Attention on Bilateral Wrist-Worn IMU Signals
summary: Parkinson's disease (PD) is a chronic neurodegenerative disease. It shows multiple motor symptoms such as tremor, bradykinesia, postural instability, freezing of gait (FoG). PD is currently diagnosed clinically through physical exam by health-care professionals, which can be time consuming and highly subjective. Wearable IMU sensors has become a promising gateway for passive monitoring of PD patients. We propose a self-supervised cross-attention encoder that processes bilateral wrist-worn IMU signals from a public dataset called PADS, consisting of three groups, PD (Parkinson Disease), HC (Healthy Control) and DD (Differential Diagnosis) of a total of 469 subjects. We have achieved a mean accuracy of 93.12% for HC vs. PD classification and 87.04% for PD vs. DD classification. The results emphasize the clinical challenge of distinguishing Parkinson's from other neurodegenerative diseases. Self-supervised representation learning using contrastive infoNCE loss gained an accuracy of 93.56% for HC vs. PD and 92.50% for PD vs. DD using only 20% of labelled data. This demonstrates the effectiveness of our method in transfer learning for clinical use with minimal labels. The real-time applicability was tested by deploying the optimized model with a mean inference time of 48.32 ms per window on a Raspberry Pi CPU.

AI.tldr: 提出基于自监督交叉注意力编码器的帕金森病分类方法，使用手腕IMU传感器数据，在公开数据集上达到93.12%的HC vs PD分类准确率，并在Raspberry Pi上实现实时推理。
AI.motivation: 帕金森病临床诊断耗时且主观，需要更客观的监测方法。可穿戴IMU传感器为被动监测提供了可能，但需要有效的分类算法来区分帕金森病患者、健康人群和其他神经退行性疾病患者。
AI.method: 提出自监督交叉注意力编码器，处理双侧手腕IMU信号。使用对比性infoNCE损失进行自监督表示学习，在PADS公开数据集（469名受试者）上进行训练和测试。
AI.result: HC vs PD分类平均准确率93.12%，PD vs DD分类87.04%。自监督学习仅用20%标注数据就达到93.56%（HC vs PD）和92.50%（PD vs DD）。在Raspberry Pi CPU上平均推理时间48.32ms/窗口。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效区分帕金森病与其他神经退行性疾病，自监督学习在少量标注数据下表现优异，且具备实时应用潜力，为临床帕金森病监测提供了可行的技术方案。

title: DGSSM: Diffusion guided state-space models for multimodal salient object detection
comment: Accepted at ICPR 2026. Diffusion-guided Mamba framework for multimodal salient object detection. Evaluated on 13 benchmarks (RGB, RGB-D, RGB-T)
summary: Salient object detection (SOD) requires modeling both long-range contextual dependencies and fine-grained structural details, which remains challenging for convolutional, transformer-based, and Mamba-based state space models. While recent Mamba-based state space approaches enable efficient global reasoning, they often struggle to recover precise object boundaries. In contrast, diffusion models capture strong structural priors through iterative denoising, but their use in discriminative dense prediction is still limited due to computational cost and integration challenges. In this work, we propose DGSSM, a diffusion-guided state space (Mamba) framework that formulates multimodal salient object detection as a progressive denoising process. The framework integrates diffusion structural priors with multi-scale state space encoding, adaptive saliency prompting, and an iterative Mamba diffusion refinement mechanism to improve boundary accuracy. A boundary-aware refinement head and self-distillation strategy further enhance spatial coherence and feature consistency. Extensive experiments on 13 public benchmarks across RGB, RGB-D, and RGB-T settings demonstrate that DGSSM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across multiple evaluation metrics while maintaining a compact model size. These results suggest that diffusion-guided state space modeling is an effective and generalizable paradigm for multimodal dense prediction tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出DGSSM框架，将扩散模型的结构先验与状态空间模型结合，通过渐进去噪过程解决多模态显著目标检测问题，在多个基准测试中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在显著目标检测中存在局限性：卷积、Transformer和Mamba模型难以同时建模长程上下文依赖和精细结构细节；Mamba模型虽能高效全局推理但边界恢复不精确；扩散模型有强结构先验但计算成本高且难以集成到判别式密集预测任务中。
AI.method: 提出DGSSM框架，将多模态显著目标检测建模为渐进去噪过程。集成扩散结构先验与多尺度状态空间编码，采用自适应显著提示和迭代Mamba扩散精炼机制。引入边界感知精炼头和自蒸馏策略增强空间一致性和特征一致性。
AI.result: 在13个公开基准测试（RGB、RGB-D、RGB-T设置）上广泛实验表明，DGSSM在多个评估指标上持续优于最先进方法，同时保持紧凑的模型大小。
AI.conclusion: 扩散引导的状态空间建模是多模态密集预测任务的有效且可泛化的范式，通过结合扩散模型的结构先验和状态空间模型的效率，能够同时实现精确的边界恢复和全局上下文建模。

title: An Existence Proof for Neural Language Models That Can Explain Garden-Path Effects via Surprisal
summary: Surprisal theory hypothesizes that the difficulty of human sentence processing increases linearly with surprisal, the negative log-probability of a word given its context. Computational psycholinguistics has tested this hypothesis using language models (LMs) as proxies for human prediction. While surprisal derived from recent neural LMs generally captures human processing difficulty on naturalistic corpora that predominantly consist of simple sentences, it severely underestimates processing difficulty on sentences that require syntactic disambiguation (garden-path effects). This leads to the claim that the processing difficulty of such sentences cannot be reduced to surprisal, although it remains possible that neural LMs simply differ from humans in next-word prediction. In this paper, we investigate whether it is truly impossible to construct a neural LM that can explain garden-path effects via surprisal. Specifically, instead of evaluating off-the-shelf neural LMs, we fine-tune these LMs on garden-path sentences so as to better align surprisal-based reading-time estimates with actual human reading times. Our results show that fine-tuned LMs do not overfit and successfully capture human reading slowdowns on held-out garden-path items; they even improve predictive power for human reading times on naturalistic corpora and preserve their general LM capabilities. These results provide an existence proof for a neural LM that can explain both garden-path effects and naturalistic reading times via surprisal, but also raise a theoretical question: what kind of evidence can truly falsify surprisal theory?

AI.tldr: 通过微调语言模型使其在花园路径句上对齐人类阅读时间，证明神经语言模型可以通过惊奇值解释花园路径效应和自然阅读时间，挑战了惊奇理论无法解释花园路径效应的观点。
AI.motivation: 传统惊奇理论认为人类句子处理难度与惊奇值（词语在上下文中的负对数概率）线性相关。虽然神经语言模型在简单句上能捕捉人类处理难度，但在需要句法消歧的花园路径句上严重低估处理难度，导致有人认为花园路径效应无法用惊奇值解释。本研究旨在探究是否可能构建一个神经语言模型，通过惊奇值解释花园路径效应。
AI.method: 研究采用微调方法：不对现成的神经语言模型进行评估，而是专门在花园路径句上微调这些模型，使基于惊奇值的阅读时间估计更好地与真实人类阅读时间对齐。通过这种方法检验微调后的模型是否能在保持通用语言模型能力的同时，捕捉花园路径效应。
AI.result: 微调后的语言模型没有过拟合，成功捕捉了测试集花园路径项目上的人类阅读减速现象。这些模型甚至提高了对自然语料库中人类阅读时间的预测能力，同时保持了通用语言模型能力。这证明存在能够通过惊奇值同时解释花园路径效应和自然阅读时间的神经语言模型。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了存在性证明：神经语言模型可以通过惊奇值解释花园路径效应和自然阅读时间。但这也提出了一个理论问题：什么样的证据才能真正证伪惊奇理论？研究结果表明，之前认为惊奇理论无法解释花园路径效应的结论可能为时过早，因为语言模型的预测能力可能尚未与人类完全对齐。

title: Forecasting Ionospheric Irregularities on GNSS Lines of Sight Using Dynamic Graphs with Ephemeris Conditioning
comment: 14 pages, 8 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
summary: Most data-driven ionospheric forecasting models operate on gridded products, which do not preserve the time-varying sampling structure of satellite-based sensing. We instead model the ionosphere as a dynamic graph over ionospheric pierce points (IPPs), with connectivity that evolves as satellite positions change. Because satellite trajectories are predictable, the graph topology over the forecast horizon can be constructed in advance. We exploit this property to condition forecasts on the future graph structure, which we term ephemeris conditioning. This enables prediction on lines of sight that appear only in the forecast horizon. We evaluate our framework on multi-GNSS (Global Navigation Satellite System) data from a co-located receiver pair in Singapore spanning January 2023 through April 2025. The task is to forecast Rate of TEC Index (ROTI)-defined irregularities at 5-minute cadence up to 2 hours ahead as binary probabilistic classification per node. The resulting model, IonoDGNN, achieves a Brier Skill Score (BSS) of 0.49 and a precision-recall area under the curve (PR-AUC) of 0.75, improving over persistence by 35\% in BSS and 52\% in PR-AUC, with larger gains at longer lead times. Ablations confirm that graph structure and ephemeris conditioning each contribute meaningfully, with conditioning proving essential for satellites that rise during the forecast horizon (receiver operating characteristic AUC: 0.95 vs.\ 0.52 without). Under simulated coverage dropout, the model retains predictive skill on affected nodes through spatial message passing from observed neighbors. These results suggest that dynamic graph forecasting on evolving lines of sight is a viable alternative to grid-based representations for ionospheric irregularity forecasting. The model and evaluation code will be released upon publication.

AI.tldr: 提出IonoDGNN模型，将电离层建模为动态图，利用卫星轨迹可预测性进行星历条件化，实现电离层不规则性的高精度预报。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动的电离层预报模型大多基于网格化产品，无法保留卫星传感的时间变化采样结构。需要一种能处理动态观测几何结构的方法。
AI.method: 将电离层建模为电离层穿刺点上的动态图，利用卫星轨迹可预测性预先构建预报时段的图拓扑（星历条件化），使用图神经网络进行预测。
AI.result: IonoDGNN在Brier技能评分上达到0.49，PR-AUC达到0.75，比持续性预报分别提高35%和52%。星历条件化对预报期间新出现的卫星至关重要（ROC AUC：0.95 vs. 0.52）。
AI.conclusion: 动态图预报在变化的视线方向上是一种可行的电离层不规则性预报替代方案，优于传统的网格化表示方法。

title: ViPS: Video-informed Pose Spaces for Auto-Rigged Meshes
summary: Kinematic rigs provide a structured interface for articulating 3D meshes, but they lack an inherent representation of the plausible manifold of joint configurations for a given asset. Without such a pose space, stochastic sampling or manual manipulation of raw rig parameters often leads to semantic or geometric violations, such as anatomical hyperextension and non-physical self-intersections. We propose Video-informed Pose Spaces (ViPS), a feed-forward framework that discovers the latent distribution of valid articulations for auto-rigged meshes by distilling motion priors from a pretrained video diffusion model. Unlike existing methods that rely on scarce artist-authored 4D datasets, ViPS transfers generative video priors into a universal distribution over a given rig parameterization. Differentiable geometric validators applied to the skinned mesh enforce asset-specific validity without requiring manual regularizers. Our model learns a smooth, compact, and controllable pose space that supports diverse sampling, manifold projection for inverse kinematics, and temporally coherent trajectories for keyframing. Furthermore, the distilled 3D pose samples serve as precise semantic proxies for guiding video diffusion, effectively closing the loop between generative 2D priors and structured 3D kinematic control. Our evaluations show that ViPS, trained solely on video priors, matches the performance of state-of-the-art methods trained on synthetic artist-created 4D data in both plausibility and diversity. Most importantly, as a universal model, ViPS demonstrates robust zero-shot generalization to out-of-distribution species and unseen skeletal topologies.

AI.tldr: ViPS：利用预训练视频扩散模型提取运动先验，为自动绑定网格学习有效关节配置的潜在分布，实现通用、可控的姿势空间
AI.motivation: 传统运动学绑定缺乏对有效关节配置流形的内在表示，随机采样或手动操作原始绑定参数容易导致语义或几何违规（如解剖学超伸和非物理自相交）。现有方法依赖稀缺的艺术家创作的4D数据集。
AI.method: 提出视频信息姿势空间（ViPS），通过从预训练视频扩散模型中提取运动先验，将生成视频先验转移到给定绑定参数化的通用分布上。应用可微几何验证器到蒙皮网格，强制执行资产特定有效性，无需手动正则化。
AI.result: ViPS学习到平滑、紧凑、可控的姿势空间，支持多样化采样、流形投影用于逆运动学，以及时间一致轨迹用于关键帧。蒸馏的3D姿势样本可作为精确语义代理指导视频扩散。仅使用视频先验训练的ViPS在合理性和多样性上匹配使用合成艺术家创建4D数据训练的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ViPS作为通用模型，在分布外物种和未见骨骼拓扑上表现出强大的零样本泛化能力，有效连接了生成2D先验和结构化3D运动控制之间的循环。

title: Exploring Concreteness Through a Figurative Lens
summary: Static concreteness ratings are widely used in NLP, yet a word's concreteness can shift with context, especially in figurative language such as metaphor, where common concrete nouns can take abstract interpretations. While such shifts are evident from context, it remains unclear how LLMs understand concreteness internally. We conduct a layer-wise and geometric analysis of LLM hidden representations across four model families, examining how models distinguish literal vs figurative uses of the same noun and how concreteness is organized in representation space. We find that LLMs separate literal and figurative usage in early layers, and that mid-to-late layers compress concreteness into a one-dimensional direction that is consistent across models. Finally, we show that this geometric structure is practically useful: a single concreteness direction supports efficient figurative-language classification and enables training-free steering of generation toward more literal or more figurative rewrites.

AI.tldr: LLMs在内部表示中形成了具体性的一维方向，该方向可用于高效分类比喻语言和无训练生成控制
AI.motivation: 静态具体性评分在NLP中广泛使用，但词语的具体性会随上下文变化，特别是在比喻语言中。目前不清楚LLM如何在内部理解具体性。
AI.method: 对四个模型家族进行分层和几何分析，检查模型如何区分同一名词的字面与比喻用法，以及具体性在表示空间中的组织方式。
AI.result: LLMs在早期层分离字面和比喻用法，中后期层将具体性压缩到一维方向，该方向在不同模型中一致。这个几何结构可用于比喻语言分类和无训练生成控制。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在表示空间中形成了具体性的几何结构，这一发现不仅揭示了模型内部表示特性，还具有实际应用价值。

title: Randomly Initialized Networks Can Learn from Peer-to-Peer Consensus
comment: 6 pages, 10 figures. To be published in ChileCON 2025 proceedings
summary:
In self-supervised learning, self-distilled methods have shown impressive performance, learning representations useful for downstream tasks and even displaying emergent properties. However, state-of-the-art methods usually rely on ensembles of complex mechanisms, with many design choices that are empirically motivated and not well understood.
  In this work, we explore the role of self-distillation within learning dynamics. Specifically, we isolate the effect of self-distillation by training a group of randomly initialized networks, removing all other common components such as projectors, predictors, and even pretext tasks. Our findings show that even this minimal setup can lead to learned representations with non-trivial improvements over a random baseline on downstream tasks. We also demonstrate how this effect varies with different hyperparameters and present a short analysis of what is being learned by the models under this setup.

AI.tldr: 自蒸馏方法在自监督学习中表现出色，但现有方法通常依赖复杂的集成机制。本文通过训练一组随机初始化的网络，移除投影器、预测器等所有常见组件，探索自蒸馏在学习动态中的作用。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的自监督学习方法通常依赖复杂的集成机制，包含许多经验性设计选择且缺乏理论理解。本文旨在探索自蒸馏在学习动态中的核心作用，通过最小化实验设置来理解其本质效果。
AI.method: 通过训练一组随机初始化的网络，移除所有常见组件（如投影器、预测器、预训练任务等），仅保留自蒸馏过程，从而隔离自蒸馏的效果。
AI.result: 即使在这种最小化设置下，学习到的表示在下游任务上仍能比随机基线有显著改进。研究还展示了这种效果如何随不同超参数变化，并对模型在这种设置下学习到的内容进行了简要分析。
AI.conclusion: 自蒸馏本身具有独立的学习能力，即使在没有其他复杂组件的情况下也能产生有效的表示学习效果，这为理解自蒸馏的核心机制提供了新的视角。

title: FlowC2S: Flowing from Current to Succeeding Frames for Fast and Memory-Efficient Video Continuation
summary: This paper introduces a novel methodology for generating fast and memory-efficient video continuations. Our method, dubbed FlowC2S, fine-tunes a pre-trained text-to-video flow model to learn a vector field between the current and succeeding video chunks. Two design choices are key. First, we introduce inherent optimal couplings, utilizing temporally adjacent video chunks during training as a practical proxy for true optimal couplings, resulting in straighter flows. Second, we incorporate target inversion, injecting the inverted latent of the target chunk into the input representation to strengthen correspondences and improve visual fidelity. By flowing directly from current to succeeding frames, instead of the common combination of current frames with noise to generate a video continuation, we reduce the dimensionality of the model input by a factor of two. The proposed method, fine-tuned from LTXV and Wan, surpasses the state-of-the-art scores across quantitative evaluations with FID and FVD, with as few as five neural function evaluations.

AI.tldr: FlowC2S：通过微调预训练文本到视频流模型，学习当前视频块与后续视频块之间的向量场，实现快速、内存高效的视频延续生成。
AI.motivation: 现有视频延续生成方法通常将当前帧与噪声结合生成视频，存在计算复杂度高、内存消耗大的问题。需要开发更高效的方法来降低模型输入维度，提高生成速度和质量。
AI.method: 1. 微调预训练文本到视频流模型，学习当前与后续视频块之间的向量场；2. 引入固有最优耦合，使用时间相邻视频块作为真实最优耦合的代理，获得更直的流；3. 采用目标反转，将目标块的反转潜在表示注入输入表示，增强对应关系；4. 直接从当前帧流向后续帧，而非结合噪声生成。
AI.result: 在LTXV和Wan模型上微调后，FlowC2S在FID和FVD定量评估中超越最先进方法，仅需5次神经函数评估，实现了更快的生成速度和更低的内存消耗。
AI.conclusion: FlowC2S通过直接学习视频块间的向量场，显著降低了模型输入维度，实现了高效高质量的视频延续生成，为实时视频生成应用提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: Reasoning Models Know What's Important, and Encode It in Their Activations
summary: Language models often solve complex tasks by generating long reasoning chains, consisting of many steps with varying importance. While some steps are crucial for generating the final answer, others are removable. Determining which steps matter most, and why, remains an open question central to understanding how models process reasoning. We investigate if this question is best approached through model internals or through tokens of the reasoning chain itself. We find that model activations contain more information than tokens for identifying important reasoning steps. Crucially, by training probes on model activations to predict importance, we show that models encode an internal representation of step importance, even prior to the generation of subsequent steps. This internal representation of importance generalizes across models, is distributed across layers, and does not correlate with surface-level features, such as a step's relative position or its length. Our findings suggest that analyzing activations can reveal aspects of reasoning that surface-level approaches fundamentally miss, indicating that reasoning analyses should look into model internals.

AI.tldr: 研究发现语言模型在推理过程中，模型激活比推理链的token本身包含更多关于推理步骤重要性的信息，表明分析模型内部表示能揭示表面方法无法捕捉的推理特性。
AI.motivation: 语言模型通过生成多步骤推理链解决复杂任务，但不同步骤的重要性不同。理解哪些步骤最重要以及为什么重要，是理解模型推理过程的核心问题。研究者想探索这个问题应该通过模型内部表示还是推理链的token本身来研究。
AI.method: 通过训练探针（probes）在模型激活上预测推理步骤的重要性，研究模型是否编码了步骤重要性的内部表示。比较模型激活和token本身包含的信息量，并分析这种表示在模型间的泛化性、在不同层的分布情况，以及与表面特征（如相对位置、长度）的关系。
AI.result: 1. 模型激活比推理链的token包含更多识别重要推理步骤的信息；2. 模型在生成后续步骤之前就编码了步骤重要性的内部表示；3. 这种重要性表示在不同模型间具有泛化性；4. 表示分布在多个层中；5. 与表面特征（如步骤的相对位置或长度）没有相关性。
AI.conclusion: 分析模型激活可以揭示表面方法根本无法捕捉的推理特性，表明推理分析应该深入模型内部表示，而不仅仅是关注推理链的表面特征。

title: Bridge-Centered Metapath Classification Using R-GCN-VGAE for Disaster-Resilient Maintenance Decisions
summary: Daily infrastructure management in preparation for disasters is critical for urban resilience. When bridges remain resilient against disaster-induced external forces, access to hospitals, shops, and residences via metapaths can be sustained, maintaining essential urban functions. However, prioritizing bridge maintenance under limited budgets requires quantifying the multi-dimensional roles that bridges play in disaster scenarios -- a challenge that existing single-indicator approaches fail to address. We focus on metapaths from national highways through bridges to buildings (hospitals, shops, residences), constructing a heterogeneous graph with road, bridge, and building layers. A Relation-centric Graph Convolutional Network Variational Autoencoder (R-GCN-VGAE) learns metapath-based feature representations, enabling classification of bridges into disaster-preparedness categories: Supply Chain (commercial logistics), Medical Access (emergency healthcare), and Residential Protection (preventing isolation). Using OSMnx and open data, we validate our methodology on three diverse cities in Ibaraki Prefecture, Japan: Mito (697 bridges), Chikusei (258 bridges), and Moriya (148 bridges), totaling 1,103 bridges. The heterogeneous graph construction from open data enables redefining bridge roles for disaster scenarios, supporting maintenance budget decision-making. We contributed that (1) Open-data methodology for constructing urban heterogeneous graphs. (2) Redefinition of bridge roles for disaster scenarios via metapath-based classification. (3) Establishment of maintenance budget decision support methodology. (4) k-NN tuning strategy validated across diverse city scales. (5) Empirical demonstration of UMAP superiority over t-SNE/PCA for multi-role bridge visualization.

AI.tldr: 提出基于异构图和元路径的桥梁灾害准备分类方法，通过R-GCN-VGAE模型将桥梁分为供应链、医疗访问和居民保护三类，为有限维护预算下的桥梁优先级决策提供支持。
AI.motivation: 现有单一指标方法无法量化桥梁在灾害场景中的多维角色，难以在有限预算下确定桥梁维护优先级，需要一种能综合考虑桥梁在灾害中多种功能的方法。
AI.method: 构建包含道路、桥梁和建筑物层的异构图，使用R-GCN-VGAE学习基于元路径的特征表示，将桥梁分类为供应链、医疗访问和居民保护三类灾害准备类别。
AI.result: 在日本茨城县三个城市（水户697座、筑西258座、守谷148座）共1103座桥梁上验证了方法有效性，证明了UMAP在可视化方面的优越性，并建立了维护预算决策支持方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过异构图构建和元路径分类重新定义了桥梁在灾害场景中的角色，为城市基础设施维护预算分配提供了数据驱动的决策支持框架。

title: BioVLM: Routing Prompts, Not Parameters, for Cross-Modality Generalization in Biomedical VLMs
summary: Pretrained biomedical vision-language models (VLMs) such as BioMedCLIP perform well on average but often degrade on challenging modalities where inter-class margins are small and acquisition-specific variations are pronounced, especially under few-shot supervision and when modality priors differ from pretraining corpora substantially. We propose BioVLM, a prompt-learning framework that improves cross-domain generalization without extensive backbone fine-tuning. BioVLM learns a diverse prompt bank and introduces dynamic prompt selection: for each input, it selects the most discriminative prompts via a low-entropy criterion on the predictive distribution, effectively coupling sparse few-shot evidence with rich LLM semantic priors. To strengthen this coupling, we distill high-confidence LLM-derived attributes and enforce robust knowledge transfer through strong/weak augmentation consistency. At test time, BioVLM adapts by choosing modality-appropriate prompts, enabling transfer to unseen categories and domains, while keeping training lightweight and inference efficient. On 11 MedMNIST+ 2D datasets, BioVLM achieves new state of the art across three distinct generalization settings. Codes are available at https://github.com/mainaksingha01/BioVLM.

AI.tldr: BioVLM是一个基于提示学习的生物医学视觉-语言模型框架，通过动态提示选择和知识蒸馏提升跨域泛化能力，在少样本场景下显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的生物医学视觉-语言模型（如BioMedCLIP）在具有挑战性的模态上表现不佳，特别是在类别间差异小、采集特异性变化显著、少样本监督以及模态先验与预训练语料差异大的情况下。
AI.method: 提出BioVLM框架：1）学习多样化的提示库；2）引入动态提示选择机制，基于预测分布的低熵准则为每个输入选择最具判别性的提示；3）通过知识蒸馏提取高置信度的LLM衍生属性；4）通过强/弱增强一致性实现稳健的知识迁移。
AI.result: 在11个MedMNIST+ 2D数据集上，BioVLM在三种不同的泛化设置下均达到了新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: BioVLM通过轻量级训练和高效推理，实现了对未见类别和领域的有效迁移，显著提升了生物医学视觉-语言模型在跨域泛化任务中的性能。

title: On the Importance and Evaluation of Narrativity in Natural Language AI Explanations
summary: Explainable AI (XAI) aims to make the behaviour of machine learning models interpretable, yet many explanation methods remain difficult to understand. The integration of Natural Language Generation into XAI aims to deliver explanations in textual form, making them more accessible to practitioners. Current approaches, however, largely yield static lists of feature importances. Although such explanations indicate what influences the prediction, they do not explain why the prediction occurs. In this study, we draw on insights from social sciences and linguistics, and argue that XAI explanations should be presented in the form of narratives. Narrative explanations support human understanding through four defining properties: continuous structure, cause-effect mechanisms, linguistic fluency, and lexical diversity. We show that standard Natural Language Processing (NLP) metrics based solely on token probability or word frequency fail to capture these properties and can be matched or exceeded by tautological text that conveys no explanatory content. To address this issue, we propose seven automatic metrics that quantify the narrative quality of explanations along the four identified dimensions. We benchmark current state-of-the-art explanation generation methods on six datasets and show that the proposed metrics separate descriptive from narrative explanations more reliably than standard NLP metrics. Finally, to further advance the field, we propose a set of problem-agnostic XAI Narrative generation rules for producing natural language XAI explanations, so that the resulting XAI Narratives exhibit stronger narrative properties and align with the findings from the linguistic and social science literature.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出将可解释AI（XAI）的解释以叙事形式呈现，并开发了七个自动指标来评估叙事质量，超越了传统的NLP指标。
AI.motivation: 当前XAI解释方法大多生成静态特征重要性列表，虽然显示什么影响了预测，但不解释为什么发生预测。基于社会科学和语言学的见解，作者认为XAI解释应以叙事形式呈现，因为叙事通过连续结构、因果机制、语言流畅性和词汇多样性更好地支持人类理解。
AI.method: 1）提出叙事解释应具备的四个关键属性：连续结构、因果机制、语言流畅性、词汇多样性；2）开发七个自动指标来量化这些叙事属性；3）在六个数据集上对最先进的解释生成方法进行基准测试；4）提出一套问题无关的XAI叙事生成规则。
AI.result: 研究表明，传统的基于词频或词概率的NLP指标无法有效捕捉叙事属性，甚至可能被无解释内容的同义反复文本匹配或超越。提出的七个叙事指标能更可靠地区分描述性解释和叙事性解释。XAI叙事生成规则能产生具有更强叙事属性的自然语言解释。
AI.conclusion: XAI解释应以叙事形式呈现，提出的叙事质量指标和生成规则能有效提升解释的可理解性，使XAI解释更符合人类认知习惯，推动该领域发展。

title: Balance-Guided Sparse Identification of Multiscale Nonlinear PDEs with Small-coefficient Terms
comment: 32 pages, 7 figures, submitted to Journal of Computational Physics
summary: Data-driven discovery of governing equations has advanced significantly in recent years; however, existing methods often struggle in multiscale systems where dynamically significant terms may have small coefficients. Therefore, we propose Balance-Guided SINDy (BG-SINDy) inspired by the principle of dominant balance, which reformulates $\ell_0$-constrained sparse regression as a term-level $\ell_{2,0}$-regularized problem and solves it using a progressive pruning strategy. Terms are ranked according to their relative contributions to the governing equation balance rather than their absolute coefficient magnitudes. Based on this criterion, BG-SINDy alternates between least-squares regression and elimination of negligible terms, thereby preserving dynamically significant terms even when their coefficients are small. Numerical experiments on the Korteweg--de Vries equation with a small dispersion coefficient, a modified Burgers equation with vanishing hyperviscosity, a modified Kuramoto--Sivashinsky equation with multiple small-coefficient terms, and a two-dimensional reaction--diffusion system demonstrate the validity of BG-SINDy in discovering small-coefficient terms. The proposed method thus provides an efficient approach for discovering governing equations that contain small-coefficient terms.

AI.tldr: BG-SINDy方法通过平衡导向的稀疏回归，解决了传统方法在发现多尺度系统控制方程时难以识别小系数项的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动发现控制方程的方法在多尺度系统中表现不佳，因为动态重要项可能具有小系数，容易被忽略。
AI.method: 提出平衡导向SINDy方法，将ℓ0约束稀疏回归重新表述为项级ℓ2,0正则化问题，采用渐进剪枝策略，根据项对控制方程平衡的相对贡献而非绝对系数大小进行排序。
AI.result: 在KdV方程、修正Burgers方程、修正Kuramoto-Sivashinsky方程和二维反应扩散系统上的数值实验验证了BG-SINDy能够有效发现小系数项。
AI.conclusion: BG-SINDy为发现包含小系数项的控制方程提供了一种高效方法，解决了多尺度系统中动态重要项识别的问题。

title: Infrastructure-Centric World Models: Bridging Temporal Depth and Spatial Breadth for Roadside Perception
summary: World models, generative AI systems that simulate how environments evolve, are transforming autonomous driving, yet all existing approaches adopt an ego-vehicle perspective, leaving the infrastructure viewpoint unexplored. We argue that infrastructure-centric world models offer a fundamentally complementary capability: the bird's-eye, multi-sensor, persistent viewpoint that roadside systems uniquely possess. Central to our thesis is a spatio-temporal complementarity: fixed roadside sensors excel at temporal depth, accumulating long-term behavioral distributions including rare safety-critical events, while vehicle-borne sensors excel at spatial breadth, sampling diverse scenes across large road networks. This paper presents a vision for Infrastructure-centric World Models (I-WM) in three phases: (I) generative scene understanding with quality-aware uncertainty propagation, (II) physics-informed predictive dynamics with multi-agent counterfactual reasoning, and (III) collaborative world models for V2X communication via latent space alignment. We propose a dual-layer architecture, annotation-free perception as a multi-modal data engine feeding end-to-end generative world models, with a phased sensor strategy from LiDAR through 4D radar and signal phase data to event cameras. We establish a taxonomy of driving world model paradigms, position I-WM relative to LeCun's JEPA, Li Fei-Fei's spatial intelligence, and VLA architectures, and introduce Infrastructure VLA (I-VLA) as a novel unification of roadside perception, language commands, and traffic control actions. Our vision builds upon existing multi-LiDAR pipelines and identifies open-source foundations for each phase, providing a path toward infrastructure that understands and anticipates traffic.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出基础设施中心世界模型(I-WM)概念，利用路边固定传感器的时空优势，通过多阶段架构实现生成式场景理解、物理预测和V2X协作，为自动驾驶提供鸟瞰视角的补充能力。
AI.motivation: 现有世界模型都采用车辆中心视角，忽略了基础设施视角的独特优势。路边固定传感器具有鸟瞰视角、多传感器融合和持久观测的特点，在时间深度上优于车载传感器，能够捕捉长期行为分布和罕见安全关键事件，与车载传感器的空间广度形成互补。
AI.method: 提出三阶段基础设施中心世界模型(I-WM)架构：1) 带质量感知不确定性传播的生成式场景理解；2) 多智能体反事实推理的物理信息预测动态；3) 通过潜在空间对齐实现V2X通信的协作世界模型。采用双层架构，无标注感知作为多模态数据引擎，分阶段传感器策略从LiDAR到4D雷达、信号相位数据和事件相机。
AI.result: 建立了驾驶世界模型范式的分类体系，将I-WM定位在LeCun的JEPA、李飞飞的空间智能和VLA架构之间，并提出了基础设施VLA(I-VLA)作为路边感知、语言指令和交通控制动作的统一框架。基于现有多LiDAR流水线，为每个阶段确定了开源基础。
AI.conclusion: 基础设施中心世界模型为自动驾驶提供了与车辆中心视角互补的鸟瞰能力，通过利用路边传感器的时空优势，能够实现更全面的交通理解和预测，为智能交通基础设施的发展指明了方向。

title: FregeLogic at SemEval 2026 Task 11: A Hybrid Neuro-Symbolic Architecture for Content-Robust Syllogistic Validity Prediction
comment: Camera-ready version to appear at The 20th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation (SemEval-2026), ACl 2026
summary: We present FregeLogic, a hybrid neuro-symbolic system for SemEval-2026 Task 11 (Subtask 1), which addresses syllogistic validity prediction while reducing content effects on predictions. Our approach combines an ensemble of five LLM classifiers, spanning three open-weights models (Llama 4 Maverick, Llama 4 Scout, and Qwen3-32B) paired with varied prompting strategies, with a Z3 SMT solver that serves as a formal logic tiebreaker. The central hypothesis is that LLM disagreement within the ensemble signals likely content-biased errors, where real-world believability interferes with logical judgment. By deferring to Z3's structurally-grounded formal verification on these disputed cases, our system achieves 94.3% accuracy with a content effect of 2.85 and a combined score of 41.88 in nested 5-fold cross-validation on the dataset (N=960). This represents a 2.76-point improvement in combined score over the pure ensemble (39.12), with a 0.9% accuracy gain, driven by a 16% reduction in content effect (3.39 to 2.85). Adopting structured-output API calls for Z3 extraction reduced failure rates from ~22% to near zero, and an Aristotelian encoding with existence axioms was validated against task annotations. Our results suggest that targeted neuro-symbolic integration, applying formal methods precisely where ensemble consensus is lowest, can improve the combined accuracy-plus-content-effect metric used by this task.

AI.tldr: FregeLogic是一个神经符号混合系统，通过结合LLM集成和Z3 SMT求解器，在SemEval-2026 Task 11中实现94.3%准确率，同时降低内容效应对推理的影响。
AI.motivation: 解决三段论有效性预测中内容效应（现实世界可信度干扰逻辑判断）的问题，通过神经符号混合方法提高逻辑推理的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 使用五个LLM分类器集成（Llama 4 Maverick、Llama 4 Scout、Qwen3-32B等），配合不同提示策略，当集成内出现分歧时，调用Z3 SMT求解器作为形式逻辑仲裁器。采用结构化输出API调用和亚里士多德编码。
AI.result: 在N=960的数据集上，5折交叉验证达到94.3%准确率，内容效应2.85，综合得分41.88。相比纯集成方法，综合得分提升2.76分，准确率提高0.9%，内容效应降低16%。
AI.conclusion: 针对性地在集成共识最低的情况下应用形式方法，可以有效提高准确率并降低内容效应，神经符号混合方法在逻辑推理任务中具有优势。

title: Knowing When to Quit: A Principled Framework for Dynamic Abstention in LLM Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) using chain-of-thought reasoning often waste substantial compute by producing long, incorrect responses. Abstention can mitigate this by withholding outputs unlikely to be correct. While most abstention methods decide to withhold outputs before or after generation, dynamic mid-generation abstention considers early termination of unpromising reasoning traces at each token position. Prior work has explored empirical variants of this idea, but principled guidance for the abstention rule remains lacking. We present a formal analysis of dynamic abstention for LLMs, modeling abstention as an explicit action within a regularized reinforcement learning framework. An abstention reward parameter controls the trade-off between compute and information. We show that abstaining when the value function falls below this reward strictly outperforms natural baselines under general conditions. We further derive a principled and efficient method to approximate the value function. Empirical results on mathematical reasoning and toxicity avoidance tasks support our theory and demonstrate improved selective accuracy over existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态中止生成的方法，通过强化学习框架建模中止决策，在推理过程中提前终止无望的推理轨迹，以提高计算效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型使用思维链推理时，经常产生冗长但错误的回答，浪费大量计算资源。现有中止方法通常在生成前或生成后决定是否保留输出，缺乏在生成过程中动态中止的指导原则。
AI.method: 将动态中止建模为强化学习框架中的显式动作，引入中止奖励参数控制计算与信息之间的权衡。当中止值函数低于奖励阈值时中止生成，并推导了高效近似值函数的方法。
AI.result: 在数学推理和毒性避免任务上的实验结果表明，该方法在一般条件下严格优于基线方法，提高了选择性准确性。
AI.conclusion: 动态中止生成是一种有效的计算效率优化方法，通过强化学习框架提供理论指导，能够在推理过程中智能地提前终止无望的推理轨迹。

title: Self-Supervised Super-Resolution for Sentinel-5P Hyperspectral Images
summary: Sentinel-5P (S5P) plays a critical role in atmospheric monitoring; however, its spatial resolution limits fine-scale analysis. Existing super-resolution (SR) approaches rely on supervised learning with synthetic low-resolution (LR) data, since true high-resolution (HR) data do not exist, limiting their applicability to real observations. We propose a self-supervised hyperspectral SR framework for S5P that enables training without HR ground truth. The method combines Stein's Unbiased Risk Estimator (SURE) with an equivariant imaging constraint, incorporating the S5P degradation operator and noise statistics derived from signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) metadata. We also introduce depthwise separable convolution U-Net architectures designed for efficiency and spectral fidelity. The framework is evaluated in two settings: (i) LR-HR, where synthetic LR data are used for direct comparison with supervised learning, and (ii) GT-SHR, where super-resolved images surpass the native spatial resolution without HR reference. Results across multiple bands show that self-supervised models achieve performance comparable to supervised methods while maintaining strong consistency. Qualitative analysis shows improved spatial detail over bicubic interpolation, and validation with EMIT data confirms that reconstructed structures are physically meaningful. Code is available at https://github.com/hyamomar/Sentinel-5P-Super-Resolution/tree/main/self_supervised

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于Sentinel-5P卫星的自监督超分辨率框架，无需高分辨率地面真值数据，结合SURE损失和等变成像约束，在保持光谱保真度的同时提升空间分辨率。
AI.motivation: Sentinel-5P卫星在空间分辨率上有限，限制了精细尺度分析。现有超分辨率方法依赖监督学习，需要合成低分辨率数据，但真实高分辨率数据不存在，这限制了方法在实际观测中的应用。
AI.method: 提出自监督高光谱超分辨率框架，结合Stein无偏风险估计器(SURE)和等变成像约束，整合S5P退化算子和从信噪比元数据推导的噪声统计。引入深度可分离卷积U-Net架构以提高效率和光谱保真度。
AI.result: 在两种设置下评估：LR-HR（合成数据）和GT-SHR（超越原生分辨率）。自监督模型在多个波段上达到与监督方法相当的性能，同时保持强一致性。定性分析显示比双三次插值有更好的空间细节，与EMIT数据的验证确认重建结构具有物理意义。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自监督框架能够在没有高分辨率地面真值的情况下训练Sentinel-5P超分辨率模型，性能与监督方法相当，为实际卫星观测应用提供了可行解决方案。

title: Multilingual Training and Evaluation Resources for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) achieved rapid progress in the recent years. However, despite their growth, VLMs development is heavily grounded on English, leading to two main limitations: (i) the lack of multilingual and multimodal datasets for training, and (ii) the scarcity of comprehensive evaluation benchmarks across languages. In this work, we address these gaps by introducing a new comprehensive suite of resources for VLMs training and evaluation spanning five European languages (English, French, German, Italian, and Spanish). We adopt a regeneration-translation paradigm that produces high-quality cross-lingual resources by combining curated synthetic generation and manual annotation. Specifically, we build Multi-PixMo, a training corpus obtained regenerating examples from Pixmo pre-existing datasets with permissively licensed models: PixMo-Cap, PixMo-AskModelAnything, and CoSyn-400k. On the evaluation side, we construct a set of multilingual benchmarks derived translating widely used English datasets (MMbench, ScienceQA, MME, POPE, AI2D). We assess the quality of these resources through qualitative and quantitative human analyses, measuring inter-annotator agreement. Additionally, we perform ablation studies to demonstrate the impact of multilingual data, with respect to English only, in VLMs training. Experiments, comprising 3 different models show that using multilingual, multimodal examples for training VLMs aids is consistently beneficial on non-English benchmarks, with positive transfer to English as well.

AI.tldr: 该研究构建了针对五种欧洲语言的多语言视觉语言模型训练和评估资源，通过再生-翻译范式创建高质量跨语言数据集，实验证明多语言训练对非英语基准测试有益且对英语也有正向迁移。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型(VLMs)发展主要基于英语，存在两个主要限制：1) 缺乏多语言多模态训练数据集；2) 缺少跨语言的全面评估基准。该研究旨在填补这些空白。
AI.method: 采用再生-翻译范式，结合精选的合成生成和人工标注，构建高质量跨语言资源。创建Multi-PixMo训练语料库（基于Pixmo数据集再生），并构建多语言评估基准（通过翻译英文数据集如MMbench、ScienceQA等）。
AI.result: 通过人工分析验证资源质量，测量标注者间一致性。消融实验表明，与仅使用英语相比，使用多语言数据进行VLMs训练对非英语基准测试持续有益，且对英语也有正向迁移效果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为多语言视觉语言模型提供了全面的训练和评估资源，证明了多语言训练的价值，有助于推动VLMs向更广泛的语言覆盖发展。

title: Scalable Physics-Informed Neural Differential Equations and Data-Driven Algorithms for HVAC Systems
summary: We present a scalable, data-driven simulation framework for large-scale heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) systems that couples physics-informed neural ordinary differential equations (PINODEs) with differential-algebraic equation (DAE) solvers. At the component level, we learn heat-exchanger dynamics using an implicit PINODE formulation that predicts conserved quantities (refrigerant mass $M_r$ and internal energy $E_\text{hx}$) as outputs, enabling physics-informed training via automatic differentiation of mass/energy balances. Stable long-horizon prediction is achieved through gradient-stabilized latent evolution with gated architectures and layer normalization. At the system level, we integrate learned components with DAE solvers (IDA and DASSL) that explicitly enforce junction constraints (pressure equilibrium and mass-flow consistency), and we use Bayesian optimization to tune solver parameters for accuracy--efficiency trade-offs. To reduce residual system-level bias, we introduce a lightweight corrector network trained on short trajectory segments. Across dual-compressor and scaled network studies, the proposed approach attains multi-fold speedups over high-fidelity simulation while keeping errors low (MAPE below a few percent) and scales to systems with up to 32 compressor--condenser pairs.

AI.tldr: 提出一个可扩展的数据驱动HVAC系统仿真框架，结合物理信息神经ODE与DAE求解器，实现高精度快速仿真
AI.motivation: 需要开发可扩展的HVAC系统仿真框架，能够处理大规模系统，同时保持物理一致性并实现计算效率
AI.method: 在组件层面使用隐式PINODE学习换热器动力学；在系统层面将学习组件与DAE求解器集成，通过贝叶斯优化调参；引入轻量级校正网络减少系统级偏差
AI.result: 在双压缩机和扩展网络研究中，相比高保真仿真实现多倍加速，误差保持在较低水平（MAPE低于几个百分点），可扩展到32个压缩机-冷凝器对的系统
AI.conclusion: 该框架为大规模HVAC系统提供了可扩展、物理一致且计算高效的仿真解决方案，平衡了精度与效率

title: Low Light Image Enhancement Challenge at NTIRE 2026
summary: This paper presents a comprehensive review of the NTIRE 2026 Low Light Image Enhancement Challenge, highlighting the proposed solutions and final results. The objective of this challenge is to identify effective networks capable of producing clearer and visually compelling images in diverse and challenging conditions by learning representative visual cues with the purpose of restoring information loss due to low-contrast and noisy images. A total of 195 participants registered for the first track and 153 for the second track of the competition, and 22 teams ultimately submitted valid entries. This paper thoroughly evaluates the state-of-the-art advances in (joint denoising and) low-light image enhancement, showcasing the significant progress in the field, while leveraging samples of our novel dataset.

AI.tldr: NTIRE 2026低光照图像增强挑战赛综述，评估了22个团队的有效解决方案，展示了该领域的最新进展
AI.motivation: 低光照图像通常存在对比度低、噪声多的问题，导致信息丢失。挑战赛旨在寻找能够有效恢复这些信息、生成更清晰视觉吸引力的图像的网络
AI.method: 通过组织NTIRE 2026挑战赛，收集了195名参与者（第一赛道）和153名参与者（第二赛道）的注册，最终22个团队提交有效方案。使用新颖的数据集样本进行评估
AI.result: 挑战赛成功识别了能够处理多样化挑战性条件的有效网络，展示了低光照图像增强（联合去噪）领域的最先进进展和显著进步
AI.conclusion: NTIRE 2026挑战赛为低光照图像增强领域提供了全面的评估框架，推动了该领域的技术发展，展示了当前最有效的解决方案

title: HiGMem: A Hierarchical and LLM-Guided Memory System for Long-Term Conversational Agents
comment: Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026. Camera-ready version. 10 pages, 2 figures. Code: https://github.com/ZeroLoss-Lab/HiGMem
summary: Long-term conversational large language model (LLM) agents require memory systems that can recover relevant evidence from historical interactions without overwhelming the answer stage with irrelevant context. However, existing memory systems, including hierarchical ones, still often rely solely on vector similarity for retrieval. It tends to produce bloated evidence sets: adding many superficially similar dialogue turns yields little additional recall, but lowers retrieval precision, increases answer-stage context cost, and makes retrieved memories harder to inspect and manage. To address this, we propose HiGMem (Hierarchical and LLM-Guided Memory System), a two-level event-turn memory system that allows LLMs to use event summaries as semantic anchors to predict which related turns are worth reading. This allows the model to inspect high-level event summaries first and then focus on a smaller set of potentially useful turns, providing a concise and reliable evidence set through reasoning, while avoiding the retrieval overhead that would be excessively high compared to vector retrieval. On the LoCoMo10 benchmark, HiGMem achieves the best F1 on four of five question categories and improves adversarial F1 from 0.54 to 0.78 over A-Mem, while retrieving an order of magnitude fewer turns. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/ZeroLoss-Lab/HiGMem.

AI.tldr: HiGMem提出了一种层次化、LLM引导的记忆系统，通过事件摘要作为语义锚点来预测哪些对话轮次值得阅读，从而提供简洁可靠的证据集，避免向量检索的膨胀问题。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆系统（包括分层系统）主要依赖向量相似性进行检索，这会导致证据集膨胀：添加许多表面相似的对话轮次几乎不会增加召回率，但会降低检索精度、增加答案阶段的上下文成本，并使检索到的记忆更难检查和管理。
AI.method: HiGMem采用两级事件-轮次记忆系统，让LLM使用事件摘要作为语义锚点来预测哪些相关轮次值得阅读。模型首先检查高级事件摘要，然后专注于较小的潜在有用轮次集合，通过推理提供简洁可靠的证据集。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo10基准测试中，HiGMem在五个问题类别中的四个上取得了最佳F1分数，将对抗性F1从A-Mem的0.54提高到0.78，同时检索的轮次数量减少了一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: HiGMem通过层次化结构和LLM引导的推理，有效解决了长期对话LLM代理中记忆检索的膨胀问题，提供更精确、更高效的记忆检索系统。

title: ProtoCLIP: Prototype-Aligned Latent Refinement for Robust Zero-Shot Chest X-Ray Classification
summary: Zero-shot vision-language models (VLMs) have shown promise for chest radiograph classification, but their performance is often limited by confounding label co-occurrence, long-tail class imbalance, and transfer instability under domain shift. We propose ProtoCLIP, a refinement strategy for CLIP-style VLMs that improves zero-shot discrimination through targeted data curation and distilled anchor alignment. Specifically, we construct pathology-focused training subsets with curated negative samples to reduce co-occurrence bias. We also introduce a representation-preserving distillation objective to stabilize adaptation while maintaining semantic structure and improving discrimination of clinically relevant co-occurring pathologies. Evaluated on an unseen dataset VinDr-CXR, ProtoCLIP improves AUC by 2-10 percentage points over a strong CLIP-based baseline across multiple findings. For pneumothorax specifically, ProtoCLIP achieves a state-of-the-art AUC of 0.94. These results demonstrate that anchor-guided refinement, coupled with curated supervision and controlled adaptation, can mitigate common zero-shot transfer failures in medical VLMs without requiring large-scale retraining.

AI.tldr: ProtoCLIP是一种针对CLIP风格视觉语言模型的改进策略，通过针对性数据筛选和锚点对齐蒸馏，提升胸部X光分类的零样本性能，在未见数据集上AUC提升2-10个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本视觉语言模型在胸部X光分类中存在三个主要问题：标签共现混淆、长尾类别不平衡以及领域转移下的不稳定迁移，限制了其在医疗领域的实际应用效果。
AI.method: 1. 构建病理聚焦的训练子集，通过筛选负样本来减少共现偏差；2. 引入表示保持的蒸馏目标，在保持语义结构的同时稳定适应过程，提升临床相关共现病理的区分能力。
AI.result: 在未见数据集VinDr-CXR上，ProtoCLIP相比强CLIP基线在多个发现上AUC提升2-10个百分点。对于气胸检测，达到了0.94的AUC，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 锚点引导的细化策略，结合筛选监督和受控适应，能够缓解医疗视觉语言模型中常见的零样本迁移失败问题，且无需大规模重新训练。

title: Dual-stream Spatio-Temporal GCN-Transformer Network for 3D Human Pose Estimation
comment: Published in Displays, Vol. 93, 2026, Article 103429. DOI: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.displa.2026.103429 Free access: https://authors.elsevier.com/a/1mnPTWHUHYdGQ
summary: 3D human pose estimation is a classic and important research direction in the field of computer vision. In recent years, Transformer-based methods have made significant progress in lifting 2D to 3D human pose estimation. However, these methods primarily focus on modeling global temporal and spatial relationships, neglecting local skeletal relationships and the information interaction between different channels. Therefore, we have proposed a novel method,the Dual-stream Spatio-temporal GCN-Transformer Network (MixTGFormer). This method models the spatial and temporal relationships of human skeletons simultaneously through two parallel channels, achieving effective fusion of global and local features. The core of MixTGFormer is composed of stacked Mixformers. Specifically, the Mixformer includes the Mixformer Block and the Squeeze-and-Excitation Layer ( SE Layer). It first extracts and fuses various information of human skeletons through two parallel Mixformer Blocks with different modes. Then, it further supplements the fused information through the SE Layer. The Mixformer Block integrates Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN) into the Transformer, enhancing both local and global information utilization. Additionally, we further implement its temporal and spatial forms to extract both spatial and temporal relationships. We extensively evaluated our model on two benchmark datasets (Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP). The experimental results showed that, compared to other methods, our MixTGFormer achieved state-of-the-art results, with P1 errors of 37.6mm and 15.7mm on these datasets, respectively.

AI.tldr: MixTGFormer：一种双流时空GCN-Transformer网络，通过并行通道同时建模人体骨架的时空关系，实现全局与局部特征的有效融合，在3D人体姿态估计任务上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的2D到3D人体姿态估计方法主要关注全局时空关系建模，但忽略了局部骨骼关系以及不同通道间的信息交互，这限制了模型对复杂人体姿态的理解能力。
AI.method: 提出双流时空GCN-Transformer网络(MixTGFormer)，核心是堆叠的Mixformer模块。Mixformer包含Mixformer Block和SE Layer：1）通过两种不同模式的并行Mixformer Block提取和融合骨架信息；2）通过SE Layer补充融合信息；3）Mixformer Block将GCN集成到Transformer中，增强局部和全局信息利用；4）实现时空形式以提取时空关系。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP基准数据集上评估，MixTGFormer取得最优结果：P1误差分别为37.6mm和15.7mm，优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: MixTGFormer通过双流架构有效融合全局与局部特征，解决了现有Transformer方法忽略局部骨骼关系和通道交互的问题，在3D人体姿态估计任务上表现出优越性能。

title: PRISMA: Preference-Reinforced Self-Training Approach for Interpretable Emotionally Intelligent Negotiation Dialogues
comment: 10 pages + appendix (23 pages total), paper accepted at ACL (Main) 2026
summary: Emotion plays a pivotal role in shaping negotiation outcomes, influencing trust, cooperation, and long-term relationships. Developing negotiation dialog systems that can recognize and respond strategically to emotions is, therefore, essential to create more effective human-centered interactions. Beyond generating emotionally appropriate responses, interpretability - understanding how a system generates a particular emotion-aware response, is critical for fostering reliability and building rapport. Driven by these aspects, in this work, we introduce PRISMA, an interpretable emotionally intelligent negotiation dialogue system targeting two application domains, viz. job interviews and resource allocation. To enable interpretability, we propose an Emotion-aware Negotiation Strategy-informed Chain-of-Thought (ENS-CoT) reasoning mechanism, which mimics human negotiation by perceiving, understanding, using, and managing emotions. Leveraging ENS-CoT, we curate two new datasets: JobNego (for job interview negotiation) and ResNego (for resource allocation negotiation). We then leverage these datasets to develop PRISMA by augmenting self-training with Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), guiding agents toward more accurate, interpretable, and emotionally appropriate negotiation responses. Automatic and human evaluation on JobNego and ResNego datasets demonstrate that PRISMA substantially enhances interpretability and generates appropriate emotion-aware responses, while improving overall negotiation effectiveness.

AI.tldr: PRISMA是一个可解释的情感智能谈判对话系统，通过ENS-CoT推理机制和DPO增强的自训练方法，在求职面试和资源分配两个领域生成情感感知的谈判响应。
AI.motivation: 情感在谈判结果中起关键作用，影响信任、合作和长期关系。需要开发能够识别并战略性地响应情感的谈判对话系统，同时可解释性对于培养可靠性和建立融洽关系至关重要。
AI.method: 提出ENS-CoT（情感感知谈判策略知情思维链）推理机制，模拟人类谈判的情感感知、理解、使用和管理过程。创建JobNego和ResNego两个新数据集，并通过DPO增强的自训练方法开发PRISMA系统。
AI.result: 在JobNego和ResNego数据集上的自动和人工评估表明，PRISMA显著增强了可解释性，生成适当的情感感知响应，同时提高了整体谈判效果。
AI.conclusion: PRISMA是一个有效的可解释情感智能谈判对话系统，通过ENS-CoT机制和DPO增强训练，在两个应用领域中实现了更好的情感感知响应和谈判效果。

title: AutoPPA: Automated Circuit PPA Optimization via Contrastive Code-based Rule Library Learning
summary:
Performance, power, and area (PPA) optimization is a fundamental task in RTL design, requiring a precise understanding of circuit functionality and the relationship between circuit structures and PPA metrics. Recent studies attempt to automate this process using LLMs, but neither feedback-based nor knowledge-based methods are efficient enough, as they either design without any prior knowledge or rely heavily on human-summarized optimization rules.
  In this paper, we propose AutoPPA, a fully automated PPA optimization framework. The key idea is to automatically generate optimization rules that enhance the search for optimal solutions. To do this, AutoPPA employs an Explore-Evaluate-Induce ($E^2I$) workflow that contrasts and abstracts rules from diverse generated code pairs rather than manually defined prior knowledge, yielding better optimization patterns. To make the abstracted rules more generalizable, AutoPPA employs an adaptive multi-step search framework that adopts the most effective rules for a given circuit. Experiments show that AutoPPA outperforms both the manual optimization and the state-of-the-art methods SymRTLO and RTLRewriter.

AI.tldr: AutoPPA：一个完全自动化的PPA优化框架，通过自动生成优化规则来提升RTL设计中的性能、功耗和面积优化效果
AI.motivation: 当前基于LLM的RTL设计PPA优化方法效率不足，反馈型方法缺乏先验知识，知识型方法过度依赖人工总结的规则，需要更高效的自动化优化方案
AI.method: 采用Explore-Evaluate-Induce（E²I）工作流程，从生成的代码对中对比和抽象规则；结合自适应多步搜索框架，为特定电路选择最有效的规则
AI.result: AutoPPA在实验中优于人工优化和当前最先进的方法SymRTLO和RTLRewriter
AI.conclusion: AutoPPA通过自动生成优化规则的方法，实现了比现有方法更高效的RTL设计PPA优化

title: Dynamic Visual-semantic Alignment for Zero-shot Learning with Ambiguous Labels
comment: Accepted by ICME 2026 (IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo)
summary: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to recognize unseen classes without visual instances. However, existing methods usually assume clean labels, overlooking real-world label noise and ambiguity, which degrades performance. To bridge this gap, we propose the Dynamic Visual-semantic Alignment (DVSA), a robust ZSL framework for learning from ambiguous labels. DVSA uses a bidirectional visual-semantic alignment module with attention to mutually calibrate visual features and attribute prototypes, and a contrastive optimization grounded in Mutual Information (MI) at the attribute level to strengthen discriminative, semantically consistent attributes. In addition, a dynamic label disambiguation mechanism iteratively corrects noisy supervision while preserving semantic consistency, narrowing the instance-label gap, and improving generalization. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks verify that DVSA achieves stronger performance under ambiguous supervision.

AI.tldr: DVSA：一种用于模糊标签学习的鲁棒零样本学习框架，通过双向视觉-语义对齐、基于互信息的对比优化和动态标签消歧机制来提升性能
AI.motivation: 现有零样本学习方法通常假设标签是干净的，忽略了现实世界中的标签噪声和模糊性，这会导致性能下降。需要一种能够处理模糊标签的鲁棒ZSL框架。
AI.method: 提出动态视觉-语义对齐（DVSA）框架：1）双向视觉-语义对齐模块，通过注意力机制相互校准视觉特征和属性原型；2）基于属性级互信息的对比优化，增强判别性和语义一致性；3）动态标签消歧机制，迭代修正噪声监督同时保持语义一致性。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试上的广泛实验验证了DVSA在模糊监督下实现了更强的性能。
AI.conclusion: DVSA通过视觉-语义对齐、对比优化和动态标签消歧，有效解决了零样本学习中的标签模糊问题，提升了模型在真实噪声环境下的泛化能力。

title: ComPASS: Towards Personalized Agentic Social Support via Tool-Augmented Companionship
summary: Developing compassionate interactive systems requires agents to not only understand user emotions but also provide diverse, substantive support. While recent works explore empathetic dialogue generation, they remain limited in response form and content, struggling to satisfy diverse needs across users and contexts. To address this, we explore empowering agents with external tools to execute diverse actions. Grounded in the psychological concept of "social support", this paradigm delivers substantive, human-like companionship. Specifically, we first design a dozen user-centric tools simulating various multimedia applications, which can cover different types of social support behaviors in human-agent interaction scenarios. We then construct ComPASS-Bench, the first personalized social support benchmark for LLM-based agents, via multi-step automated synthesis and manual refinement. Based on ComPASS-Bench, we further synthesize tool use records to fine-tune the Qwen3-8B model, yielding a task-specific ComPASS-Qwen. Comprehensive evaluations across two settings reveal that while the evaluated LLMs can generate valid tool-calling requests with high success rates, significant gaps remain in final response quality. Moreover, tool-augmented responses achieve better overall performance than directly producing conversational empathy. Notably, our trained ComPASS-Qwen demonstrates substantial improvements over its base model, achieving comparable performance to several large-scale models. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/hzp3517/ComPASS.

AI.tldr: 论文提出ComPASS框架，通过工具增强的LLM代理提供个性化社交支持，构建了首个社交支持基准ComPASS-Bench，并训练了ComPASS-Qwen模型，在情感支持任务上表现优于直接对话生成。
AI.motivation: 现有共情对话系统在响应形式和内容上受限，难以满足不同用户和情境下的多样化需求。需要让AI代理能够执行多样化行动来提供实质性、人性化的陪伴支持。
AI.method: 1) 设计12个用户中心工具模拟多媒体应用，覆盖人机交互中的社交支持行为；2) 通过多步自动合成和人工精炼构建ComPASS-Bench基准；3) 基于工具使用记录微调Qwen3-8B模型得到ComPASS-Qwen。
AI.result: 评估显示：LLM能高成功率生成有效工具调用请求，但最终响应质量仍有差距；工具增强的响应优于直接生成共情对话；ComPASS-Qwen相比基础模型有显著提升，性能可与多个大规模模型媲美。
AI.conclusion: 通过工具增强的LLM代理能够提供更有效的个性化社交支持，ComPASS框架为开发富有同情心的交互系统提供了新范式，代码和数据已开源。

title: Learning Invariant Modality Representation for Robust Multimodal Learning from a Causal Inference Perspective
summary: Multimodal affective computing aims to predict humans' sentiment, emotion, intention, and opinion using language, acoustic, and visual modalities. However, current models often learn spurious correlations that harm generalization under distribution shifts or noisy modalities. To address this, we propose a causal modality-invariant representation (CmIR) learning framework for robust multimodal learning. At its core, we introduce a theoretically grounded disentanglement method that separates each modality into `causal invariant representation' and `environment-specific spurious representation' from a causal inference perspective. CmIR ensures that the learned invariant representations retain stable predictive relationships with labels across different environments while preserving sufficient information from the raw inputs via invariance constraint, mutual information constraint, and reconstruction constraint. Experiments across multiple multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that CmIR achieves state-of-the-art performance. CmIR particularly excels on out-of-distribution data and noisy data, confirming its robustness and generalizability.

AI.tldr: 提出因果模态不变表示学习框架CmIR，通过因果推断视角分离模态中的因果不变表示和环境特定虚假表示，提升多模态情感计算的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态情感计算模型容易学习到虚假相关性，在分布偏移或噪声模态下泛化能力差，需要更鲁棒的学习方法。
AI.method: 基于因果推断的表示解耦方法，将每个模态分离为"因果不变表示"和"环境特定虚假表示"，通过不变性约束、互信息约束和重构约束确保学习到的表示既稳定又信息丰富。
AI.result: 在多个多模态基准测试中达到最先进性能，特别是在分布外数据和噪声数据上表现优异，验证了其鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: CmIR框架通过因果视角的表示解耦有效提升了多模态学习的鲁棒性，为解决虚假相关性和分布偏移问题提供了有效方案。

title: GeGS-PCR: Effective and Robust 3D Point Cloud Registration with Two-Stage Color-Enhanced Geometric-3DGS Fusion
summary: We address the challenge of point cloud registration using color information, where traditional methods relying solely on geometric features often struggle in low-overlap and incomplete scenarios. To overcome these limitations, we propose GeGS-PCR, a novel two-stage method that combines geometric, color, and Gaussian information for robust registration. Our approach incorporates a dedicated color encoder that enhances color features by extracting multi-level geometric and color data from the original point cloud. We introduce the \textbf{Ge}ometric-3D\textbf{GS} module, which encodes the local neighborhood information of colored superpoints to ensure a globally invariant geometric-color context. Leveraging LORA optimization, we maintain high performance while preserving the expressiveness of 3DGS. Additionally, fast differentiable rendering is utilized to refine the registration process, leading to improved convergence. To further enhance performance, we propose a joint photometric loss that exploits both geometric and color features. This enables strong performance in challenging conditions with extremely low point cloud overlap. We validate our method by colorizing the Kitti dataset as ColorKitti and testing on both Color3DMatch and Color3DLoMatch datasets. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with \textit{Registration Recall} at 99.9\%, \textit{Relative Rotation Error} as low as 0.013, and \textit{Relative Translation Error} as low as 0.024, improving precision by at least a factor of 2.

AI.tldr: GeGS-PCR：一种结合几何、颜色和高斯信息的两阶段点云配准方法，在低重叠和不完整场景中实现高精度配准
AI.motivation: 传统仅依赖几何特征的点云配准方法在低重叠和不完整场景中表现不佳，需要结合颜色信息来提升鲁棒性
AI.method: 两阶段方法：1) 专用颜色编码器提取多级几何和颜色特征；2) Geometric-3DGS模块编码彩色超点的局部邻域信息；使用LORA优化保持3DGS表达能力；结合快速可微分渲染和联合光度损失进行精炼
AI.result: 在Color3DMatch和Color3DLoMatch数据集上达到SOTA：配准召回率99.9%，相对旋转误差0.013，相对平移误差0.024，精度提升至少2倍
AI.conclusion: GeGS-PCR通过有效结合几何、颜色和高斯信息，显著提升了点云配准在挑战性场景中的性能，为低重叠点云配准提供了有效解决方案

title: ArbGraph: Conflict-Aware Evidence Arbitration for Reliable Long-Form Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) remains unreliable in long-form settings, where retrieved evidence is noisy or contradictory, making it difficult for RAG pipelines to maintain factual consistency. Existing approaches focus on retrieval expansion or verification during generation, leaving conflict resolution entangled with generation. To address this limitation, we propose ArbGraph, a framework for pre-generation evidence arbitration in long-form RAG that explicitly resolves factual conflicts. ArbGraph decomposes retrieved documents into atomic claims and organizes them into a conflict-aware evidence graph with explicit support and contradiction relations. On top of this graph, we introduce an intensity-driven iterative arbitration mechanism that propagates credibility signals through evidence interactions, enabling the system to suppress unreliable and inconsistent claims before final generation. In this way, ArbGraph separates evidence validation from text generation and provides a coherent evidence foundation for downstream long-form generation. We evaluate ArbGraph on two widely used long-form RAG benchmarks, LongFact and RAGChecker, using multiple large language model backbones. Experimental results show that ArbGraph consistently improves factual recall and information density while reducing hallucinations and sensitivity to retrieval noise. Additional analyses show that these gains are evident under conflicting or ambiguous evidence, highlighting the effectiveness of evidence-level conflict resolution for improving the reliability of long-form RAG. The implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/1212Judy/ArbGraph.

AI.tldr: ArbGraph是一个用于长文本RAG的预生成证据仲裁框架，通过构建冲突感知证据图并迭代传播可信度信号，在生成前解决事实冲突，提高事实一致性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当前检索增强生成在长文本场景中不可靠，检索到的证据存在噪声或矛盾，现有方法将冲突解决与生成过程纠缠在一起，难以保持事实一致性。
AI.method: 将检索文档分解为原子声明，构建具有明确支持和矛盾关系的冲突感知证据图，引入强度驱动的迭代仲裁机制，通过证据交互传播可信度信号，在最终生成前抑制不可靠和不一致的声明。
AI.result: 在LongFact和RAGChecker两个长文本RAG基准测试中，使用多种大语言模型骨干网络，ArbGraph持续提高了事实召回率和信息密度，同时减少了幻觉和对检索噪声的敏感性。
AI.conclusion: ArbGraph将证据验证与文本生成分离，为下游长文本生成提供连贯的证据基础，在冲突或模糊证据下特别有效，显著提高了长文本RAG的可靠性。

title: Semantic Step Prediction: Multi-Step Latent Forecasting in LLM Reasoning Trajectories via Step Sampling
summary: Semantic Tube Prediction (STP) leverages representation geometric to regularize LLM hidden-state trajectories toward locally linear geodesics during fine-tuning, thereby greatly improving data efficiency. The original STP recipe samples random token sub-spans, which is compatible with the base large language model (LLM) training architecture. Inspired by STP, we are interested to investigate whether the sampling position can further enhance the semantic structure of multi-step reasoning, and hence affect its geometric impact. We applied STP at consecutive semantic reasoning step boundaries and achieved 168x more accurate multi-step latent prediction than frozen baselines on ProcessBench (3,400 samples), compared to only 4x for the random-token STP. Probing the latent manifold with a learned non-linear predictor reveals that STP-shaped trajectories are smooth curves, not straight lines: a 3-layer MLP reduces prediction error by a further 3-12x over linear extrapolation on step-boundary models. Removing the language modeling loss yields trajectories that are 2x more MLP-predictable than the combined loss, revealing a tradeoff between generation quality and geometric purity. Our results identify sampling position as the critical variable in geometric regularization and establish multi-step latent prediction MSE as a new evaluation metric for this class of methods.

AI.tldr: STP通过在微调期间将LLM隐藏状态轨迹正则化为局部线性测地线来提高数据效率。本文研究了采样位置对多步推理语义结构的影响，发现在连续语义推理步骤边界应用STP比随机标记采样效果更好，实现了168倍更准确的多步潜在预测。
AI.motivation: 研究采样位置是否能够增强多步推理的语义结构，从而影响其几何效果。原始STP方法使用随机标记子跨度采样，本文探索在连续语义推理步骤边界应用STP是否能获得更好的几何正则化效果。
AI.method: 在连续语义推理步骤边界应用STP，而不是随机标记采样。使用ProcessBench数据集（3,400个样本）进行评估。通过学习的非线性预测器（3层MLP）探测潜在流形，分析轨迹形状。比较有无语言建模损失对轨迹几何纯度的影响。
AI.result: 在步骤边界应用STP实现了168倍比冻结基线更准确的多步潜在预测，而随机标记STP仅实现4倍改进。STP形成的轨迹是平滑曲线而非直线，3层MLP比线性外推进一步减少3-12倍预测误差。移除语言建模损失使轨迹的MLP可预测性提高2倍，揭示了生成质量与几何纯度之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 采样位置是几何正则化的关键变量，多步潜在预测MSE可作为此类方法的新评估指标。STP在步骤边界应用能显著增强多步推理的语义结构，但需要在生成质量和几何纯度之间进行权衡。

title: Voronoi-guided Bilateral 2D Gaussian Splatting for Arbitrary-Scale Hyperspectral Image Super-Resolution
summary: Most existing hyperspectral image super-resolution methods require modifications for different scales, limiting their flexibility in arbitrary-scale reconstruction. 2D Gaussian splatting provides a continuous representation that is compatible with arbitrary-scale super-resolution. Existing methods often rely on rasterization strategies, which may limit flexible spatial modeling. Extending them to hyperspectral image super-resolution remains challenging, as the task requires adaptive spatial reconstruction while preserving spectral fidelity. This paper proposes GaussianHSI, a Gaussian-Splatting-based framework for arbitrary-scale hyperspectral image super-resolution. We develop a Voronoi-Guided Bilateral 2D Gaussian Splatting for spatial reconstruction. After predicting a set of Gaussian functions to represent the input, it associates each target pixel with relevant Gaussian functions through Voronoi-guided selection. The target pixel is then reconstructed by aggregating the selected Gaussian functions with reference-aware bilateral weighting, which considers both geometric relevance and consistency with low-resolution features. We further introduce a Spectral Detail Enhancement module to improve spectral reconstruction. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of GaussianHSI over state-of-the-art methods for arbitrary-scale hyperspectral image super-resolution.

AI.tldr: 提出GaussianHSI框架，基于2D高斯泼溅实现任意尺度高光谱图像超分辨率，通过Voronoi引导双边高斯泼溅进行空间重建，结合光谱细节增强模块提升光谱保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有高光谱图像超分辨率方法通常需要针对不同尺度进行调整，缺乏灵活性。2D高斯泼溅提供连续表示适合任意尺度超分辨率，但现有方法依赖光栅化策略限制了空间建模灵活性，且扩展到高光谱图像超分辨率面临空间重建与光谱保真度平衡的挑战。
AI.method: 提出GaussianHSI框架：1) Voronoi引导双边2D高斯泼溅进行空间重建：预测一组高斯函数表示输入，通过Voronoi引导选择将目标像素与相关高斯函数关联，采用参考感知双边加权聚合选择的高斯函数；2) 光谱细节增强模块提升光谱重建质量。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的大量实验表明，GaussianHSI在任意尺度高光谱图像超分辨率任务上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: GaussianHSI框架通过高斯泼溅的连续表示实现了灵活的高光谱图像任意尺度超分辨率，在空间重建和光谱保真度方面均表现出色。

title: IceBreaker for Conversational Agents: Breaking the First-Message Barrier with Personalized Starters
summary: Conversational agents, such as ChatGPT and Doubao, have become essential daily assistants for billions of users. To further enhance engagement, these systems are evolving from passive responders to proactive companions. However, existing efforts focus on activation within ongoing dialogues, while overlooking a key real-world bottleneck. In the conversation initiation stage, users may have a vague need but no explicit query intent, creating a first-message barrier where the conversation holds before it begins. To overcome this, we introduce Conversation Starter Generation: generating personalized starters to guide users into conversation. However, unlike in-conversation stages where immediate context guides the response, initiation must operate in a cold-start moment without explicit user intent. To pioneer in this direction, we present IceBreaker that frames human ice-breaking as a two-step handshake: (i) evoke resonance via Resonance-Aware Interest Distillation from session summaries to capture trigger interests, and (ii) stimulate interaction via Interaction-Oriented Starter Generation, optimized with personalized preference alignment and a self-reinforced loop to maximize engagement. Online A/B tests on one of the world's largest conversational agent products show that IceBreaker improves user active days by +0.184% and click-through rate by +9.425%, and has been deployed in production.

AI.tldr: 提出IceBreaker系统，解决对话启动阶段的冷启动问题，通过生成个性化开场白引导用户进入对话，提升用户活跃度和点击率。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统主要关注对话过程中的激活，但忽视了对话启动阶段的瓶颈。用户在对话开始时可能有模糊需求但没有明确查询意图，形成"首消息障碍"，导致对话无法开始。
AI.method: 提出IceBreaker框架，将人类破冰过程建模为两步握手：(1) 通过共振感知兴趣蒸馏从会话摘要中捕捉触发兴趣；(2) 通过交互导向的开场白生成，结合个性化偏好对齐和自增强循环优化参与度。
AI.result: 在全球最大的对话代理产品之一上进行在线A/B测试，结果显示IceBreaker将用户活跃天数提升了+0.184%，点击率提升了+9.425%，并已投入生产部署。
AI.conclusion: IceBreaker成功解决了对话启动阶段的冷启动问题，通过生成个性化开场白有效引导用户进入对话，显著提升了用户参与度，为对话系统的主动式发展提供了新方向。

title: An Integrated Deep-Learning Framework for Peptide-Protein Interaction Prediction and Target-Conditioned Peptide Generation with ConGA-PePPI and TC-PepGen
summary: Motivation: Peptide-protein interactions (PepPIs) are central to cellular regulation and peptide therapeutics, but experimental characterization remains too slow for large-scale screening. Existing methods usually emphasize either interaction prediction or peptide generation, leaving candidate prioritization, residue-level interpretation, and target-conditioned expansion insufficiently integrated. Results: We present an integrated framework for early-stage peptide screening that combines a partner-aware prediction and localization model (ConGA-PepPI) with a target-conditioned generative model (TC-PepGen). ConGA-PepPI uses asymmetric encoding, bidirectional cross-attention, and progressive transfer from pair prediction to binding-site localization, while TC-PepGen preserves target information throughout autoregressive decoding via layerwise conditioning. In five-fold cross-validation, ConGA-PepPI achieved 0.839 accuracy and 0.921 AUROC, with binding-site AUPR values of 0.601 on the protein side and 0.950 on the peptide side, and remained competitive on external benchmarks. Under a controlled length-conditioned benchmark, 40.39% of TC-PepGen peptides exceeded native templates in AlphaFold 3 ipTM, and unconstrained generation retained evidence of target-conditioned signal.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个整合的肽-蛋白质相互作用早期筛选框架，包含预测定位模型ConGA-PepPI和目标条件生成模型TC-PepGen，实现了从预测到生成的一体化解决方案。
AI.motivation: 肽-蛋白质相互作用在细胞调控和肽疗法中至关重要，但实验表征速度太慢。现有方法通常只关注相互作用预测或肽生成，缺乏候选肽优先排序、残基级解释和目标条件扩展的整合方案。
AI.method: 开发了ConGA-PepPI预测定位模型（使用非对称编码、双向交叉注意力和从配对预测到结合位点定位的渐进迁移）和TC-PepGen目标条件生成模型（通过层级条件在自回归解码中保持目标信息）。
AI.result: ConGA-PepPI在五折交叉验证中达到0.839准确率和0.921 AUROC，结合位点AUPR值在蛋白质侧为0.601，肽侧为0.950。TC-PepGen在长度条件基准测试中，40.39%的生成肽在AlphaFold 3 ipTM上超过天然模板。
AI.conclusion: 该整合框架为肽-蛋白质相互作用的早期筛选提供了从预测到生成的一体化解决方案，在预测准确性和生成肽质量方面均表现出色，有望加速肽疗法的发现过程。

title: Score-Based Matching with Target Guidance for Cryo-EM Denoising
summary: Cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) enables single-particle analysis of biological macromolecules under strict low-dose imaging conditions, but the resulting micrographs often exhibit extremely low signal-to-noise ratios and weak particle visibility. Image denoising is therefore an important preprocessing step for downstream cryo-EM analysis, including particle picking, 2D classification, and 3D reconstruction. Existing cryo-EM denoising methods are commonly trained with pixel-wise or Noise2Noise-style objectives, which can improve visual quality but do not explicitly account for structural consistency required by downstream analysis. In this work, we propose a score-based denoising framework for cryo-EM that learns the clean-data score to recover particle signals while better preserving structural information. Building on this formulation, we further introduce a target-guided variant that incorporates reference-density guidance to stabilize score learning under weak and ambiguous signal conditions. Rather than simply amplifying particle-like responses, our framework better suppresses structured low-frequency background, which improves particle--background separability for downstream analysis. Experiments on multiple cryo-EM datasets show that our score-based methods consistently improve downstream particle picking and produce more structure-consistent 3D reconstructions. Experiments on multiple cryo-EM datasets show that our methods improve downstream particle picking and produce more structure-consistent reconstructions.

AI.tldr: 提出基于分数的冷冻电镜图像去噪框架，通过学习干净数据分数来恢复粒子信号并保持结构一致性，引入目标引导变体以在弱信号条件下稳定学习，改善下游粒子挑选和3D重建质量。
AI.motivation: 冷冻电镜图像通常具有极低的信噪比和弱的粒子可见性，现有去噪方法虽然能改善视觉质量，但未能明确考虑下游分析所需的结构一致性要求。
AI.method: 提出基于分数的去噪框架，学习干净数据的分数来恢复粒子信号；进一步引入目标引导变体，结合参考密度指导以在弱信号条件下稳定分数学习；框架能更好地抑制结构化低频背景，提高粒子-背景分离性。
AI.result: 在多个冷冻电镜数据集上的实验表明，该方法能持续改善下游粒子挑选，并产生更结构一致的3D重建结果。
AI.conclusion: 基于分数的去噪框架能有效恢复冷冻电镜图像中的粒子信号并保持结构信息，通过目标引导变体在弱信号条件下稳定学习，显著提升下游分析质量。

title: Understanding the Prompt Sensitivity
summary: Prompt sensitivity, which refers to how strongly the output of a large language model (LLM) depends on the exact wording of its input prompt, raises concerns among users about the LLM's stability and reliability. In this work, we consider LLMs as multivariate functions and perform a first-order Taylor expansion, thereby analyzing the relationship between meaning-preserving prompts, their gradients, and the log probabilities of the model's next token. We derive an upper bound on the difference between log probabilities using the Cauchy-Schwarz inequality. We show that LLMs do not internally cluster similar inputs like smaller neural networks do, but instead disperse them. This dispersing behavior leads to an excessively high upper bound on the difference of log probabilities between two meaning-preserving prompts, making it difficult to effectively reduce to 0. In our analysis, we also show which types of meaning-preserving prompt variants are more likely to introduce prompt sensitivity risks in LLMs. In addition, we demonstrate that the upper bound is strongly correlated with an existing prompt sensitivity metric, PromptSensiScore. Moreover, by analyzing the logit variance, we find that prompt templates typically exert a greater influence on logits than the questions themselves. Overall, our results provide a general interpretation for why current LLMs can be highly sensitive to prompts with the same meaning, offering crucial evidence for understanding the prompt sensitivity of LLMs. Code for experiments is available at https://github.com/ku-nlp/Understanding_the_Prompt_Sensitivity.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过将大语言模型视为多元函数并进行一阶泰勒展开，分析了含义保留提示词、梯度与模型下一个token对数概率之间的关系，揭示了LLM对相同含义提示词高度敏感的原因。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型对提示词措辞的敏感性（prompt sensitivity）引发了用户对其稳定性和可靠性的担忧。作者旨在从数学角度理解为什么当前LLM对相同含义的提示词会表现出高度敏感性。
AI.method: 将LLM视为多元函数并进行一阶泰勒展开，使用柯西-施瓦茨不等式推导对数概率差异的上界。分析LLM内部如何处理相似输入，并研究哪些类型的含义保留提示词变体更容易引入敏感性风险。
AI.result: 发现LLM不像小型神经网络那样在内部聚类相似输入，而是分散它们。这种分散行为导致两个含义保留提示词之间的对数概率差异上界过高，难以有效降低到0。还发现提示模板通常比问题本身对logits的影响更大。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解当前LLM对相同含义提示词高度敏感的现象提供了通用解释，为理解LLM的提示词敏感性提供了关键证据。推导的上界与现有PromptSensiScore指标强相关。

title: NI Sampling: Accelerating Discrete Diffusion Sampling by Token Order Optimization
summary: Discrete diffusion language models (dLLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to traditional autoregressive approaches, offering the flexibility to generate tokens in arbitrary orders and the potential of parallel decoding. However, existing heuristic sampling strategies remain inefficient: they choose only a small part of tokens to sample at each step, leaving substantial room for improvement. In this work, we study the problem of token sampling order optimization and demonstrate its significant potential for acceleration. Specifically, we find that fully leveraging correct predictions at each step can reduce the number of sampling iterations by an order of magnitude without compromising accuracy. Based on this, we propose Neural Indicator Sampling (NI Sampling), a general sampling order optimization framework that utilize a neural indicator to decide which tokens should be sampled at each step. We further propose a novel trajectory-preserving objective to train the indicator. Experiments on LLaDA and Dream models across multiple benchmarks show that our method achieves up to 14.3$\times$ acceleration over full-step sampling with negligible performance drop, and consistently outperforms confidence threshold sampling in the accuracy-step trade-off. Code is available at https://github.com/imagination-research/NI-Sampling.

AI.tldr: 提出Neural Indicator Sampling (NI Sampling)框架，通过神经指示器优化离散扩散语言模型的token采样顺序，实现最高14.3倍加速且性能损失可忽略。
AI.motivation: 现有离散扩散语言模型的启发式采样策略效率低下，每次只选择少量token进行采样，存在巨大优化空间。研究表明，充分利用每步的正确预测可以大幅减少采样迭代次数而不影响准确性。
AI.method: 提出Neural Indicator Sampling (NI Sampling)框架，使用神经指示器决定每步应该采样哪些token。设计了轨迹保持目标函数来训练指示器，确保采样过程的有效性。
AI.result: 在LLaDA和Dream模型上的多个基准测试表明，该方法相比全步采样实现最高14.3倍加速，性能下降可忽略，在准确率-步数权衡中始终优于置信度阈值采样。
AI.conclusion: NI Sampling通过优化token采样顺序显著加速离散扩散语言模型，证明了采样顺序优化的重要潜力，为高效并行解码提供了新思路。

title: IncreFA: Breaking the Static Wall of Generative Model Attribution
summary: As AI generative models evolve at unprecedented speed, image attribution has become a moving target. New diffusion, adversarial and autoregressive generators appear almost monthly, making existing watermark, classifier and inversion methods obsolete upon release. The core problem lies not in model recognition, but in the inability to adapt attribution itself. We introduce IncreFA, a framework that redefines attribution as a structured incremental learning problem, allowing the system to learn continuously as new generative models emerge. IncreFA departs from conventional incremental learning by exploiting the hierarchical relationships among generative architectures and coupling them with continual adaptation. It integrates two mutually reinforcing mechanisms: (1) Hierarchical Constraints, which encode architectural hierarchies through learnable orthogonal priors to disentangle family-level invariants from model-specific idiosyncrasies; and (2) a Latent Memory Bank, which replays compact latent exemplars and mixes them to generate pseudo-unseen samples, stabilising representation drift and enhancing open-set awareness. On the newly constructed Incremental Attribution Benchmark (IABench) covering 28 generative models released between 2022 and 2025, IncreFA achieves state-of-the-art attribution accuracy and 98.93% unseen detection under a temporally ordered open-set protocol. Code will be available at https://github.com/Ant0ny44/IncreFA.
